> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/playwright-audit-engine",
>   "path": "app/models/finding.py",
>   "sha": "3fe9e1575b23115f500fa3cca507448b599e124b",
>   "message": "Extend findings for axe evidence metadata",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport uuid\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, DateTime, Float, ForeignKey, String, Text, func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\n\n\nclass Finding(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"findings\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n    )\n    scan_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), ForeignKey(\"scans.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"), nullable=False, index=True\n    )\n    rule_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=False, index=True)\n    severity: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(50), nullable=False)\n    description: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n    help_url: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)\n    wcag_refs: Mapped[list[str]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=list, nullable=False)\n    confidence_score: Mapped[float | None] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)\n    evidence_metadata: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(\n        JSON, default=dict, nullable=False\n    )\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n    )\n\n    scan: Mapped[\"Scan\"] = relationship(\"Scan\", back_populates=\"findings\")\n"
> }

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/playwright-audit-engine",
>   "path": "app/db/init_db.py",
>   "sha": "e159a5b903c642c49b910589d3714ac8d5a1c506",
>   "message": "Initialize Playwright scan persistence schema",
>   "content": "from sqlalchemy import text\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import engine\nfrom app.models import Finding, Lead, Scan  # noqa: F401\n\n_SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'processing'\",\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'failed'\",\n)\n\n_SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS started_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_message TEXT\",\n)\n\n_FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS help_url VARCHAR(500)\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wcag_refs JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence_score DOUBLE PRECISION\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n\ndef init_db() -> None:\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n    _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema()\n    _ensure_finding_evidence_schema()\n\n\ndef _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.connect() as connection:\n        autocommit_connection = connection.execution_options(isolation_level=\"AUTOCOMMIT\")\n        for statement in _SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES:\n            autocommit_connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n\ndef _ensure_finding_evidence_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n"
> }
> ```

> ```text
> {"content": "from datetime import UTC, datetime\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.models import Lead, Scan, ScanStatus\nfrom app.workers.scan_worker import run_scan_task\n\n\nclass LeadNotFoundError(Exception):\n    pass\n\n\nclass ScanQueueError(Exception):\n    pass\n\n\ndef create_scan_job(db: Session, lead_id: str) -> Scan:\n    lead = db.get(Lead, lead_id)\n    if lead is None:\n        raise LeadNotFoundError(f\"Lead {lead_id} was not found\")\n\n    scan = Scan(lead_id=lead.id, status=ScanStatus.pending)\n    db.add(scan)\n    db.commit()\n    db.refresh(scan)\n\n    try:\n        run_scan_task.delay(scan.id)\n    except Exception as exc:\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.failed\n        scan.failed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n        db.commit()\n        raise ScanQueueError(\"Could not enqueue scan task\") from exc\n\n    return scan\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "6f01580d3637fddb58fe6b4aef11198c4dece9a6", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/playwright-audit-engine/app/services/scan_service.py", "display_title": "scan_service.py"}
> ```

> ```text
> {"content": "import logging\nimport time\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\n\nfrom app.core.celery import celery_app\nfrom app.db.session import SessionLocal\nfrom app.models import Scan, ScanStatus\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\n@celery_app.task(name=\"app.workers.scan_worker.run_scan\")\ndef run_scan_task(scan_id: str) -> str:\n    db = SessionLocal()\n    try:\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s was not found; skipping task\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.running\n        scan.started_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n        db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\"Started placeholder accessibility scan %s\", scan_id)\n        time.sleep(2)\n\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.done\n        scan.completed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n        db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\"Completed placeholder accessibility scan %s\", scan_id)\n        return scan_id\n    except Exception:\n        db.rollback()\n        _mark_scan_failed(db, scan_id)\n        logger.exception(\"Scan task %s failed\", scan_id)\n        raise\n    finally:\n        db.close()\n\n\ndef _mark_scan_failed(db, scan_id: str) -> None:\n    scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n    if scan is None:\n        return\n\n    scan.status = ScanStatus.failed\n    scan.failed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n    db.commit()\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "871f9f990a6882e0471783d42df91569c67362cb", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/playwright-audit-engine/app/workers/scan_worker.py", "display_title": "scan_worker.py"}
> ```
>

>
> codex_apps.github_update_file
>
> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/playwright-audit-engine",
>   "path": "app/services/scan_service.py",
>   "sha": "6f01580d3637fddb58fe6b4aef11198c4dece9a6",
>   "message": "Queue scan tasks without importing worker module",
>   "content": "from datetime import UTC, datetime\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.core.celery import celery_app\nfrom app.models import Lead, Scan, ScanStatus\n\nSCAN_TASK_NAME = \"app.workers.scan_worker.run_scan\"\n\n\nclass LeadNotFoundError(Exception):\n    pass\n\n\nclass ScanQueueError(Exception):\n    pass\n\n\ndef create_scan_job(db: Session, lead_id: str) -> Scan:\n    lead = db.get(Lead, lead_id)\n    if lead is None:\n        raise LeadNotFoundError(f\"Lead {lead_id} was not found\")\n\n    scan = Scan(lead_id=lead.id, status=ScanStatus.pending)\n    db.add(scan)\n    db.commit()\n    db.refresh(scan)\n\n    try:\n        celery_app.send_task(SCAN_TASK_NAME, args=[scan.id])\n    except Exception as exc:\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.failed\n        scan.failed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n        scan.error_message = \"Could not enqueue scan task\"\n        db.commit()\n        raise ScanQueueError(\"Could not enqueue scan task\") from exc\n\n    return scan\n"
> }
> ```

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/playwright-audit-engine",
>   "path": "app/workers/scan_worker.py",
>   "sha": "871f9f990a6882e0471783d42df91569c67362cb",
>   "message": "Run Playwright axe scans from Celery worker",
>   "content": "import logging\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.core.celery import celery_app\nfrom app.db.session import SessionLocal\nfrom app.models import Finding, Scan, ScanStatus\nfrom app.workers.playwright_engine import PlaywrightScanResult, run_accessibility_scan\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n_MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH = 4000\n\n\n@celery_app.task(name=\"app.workers.scan_worker.run_scan\")\ndef run_scan_task(scan_id: str) -> str:\n    db = SessionLocal()\n    try:\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s was not found; skipping task\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        domain = scan.lead.domain\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.running\n        scan.started_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n        scan.completed_at = None\n        scan.failed_at = None\n        scan.error_message = None\n        db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\"Started Playwright accessibility scan %s for %s\", scan_id, domain)\n        scan_result = run_accessibility_scan(domain)\n\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s disappeared before persistence\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.processing\n        db.commit()\n\n        _persist_findings(db, scan_id=scan_id, scan_result=scan_result)\n\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is not None:\n            scan.status = ScanStatus.done\n            scan.completed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n            scan.error_message = None\n            db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\n            \"Completed Playwright accessibility scan %s with %s findings\",\n            scan_id,\n            len(scan_result.findings),\n        )\n        return scan_id\n    except Exception as exc:\n        db.rollback()\n        _mark_scan_failed(db, scan_id, exc)\n        logger.exception(\"Scan task %s failed\", scan_id)\n        raise\n    finally:\n        db.close()\n\n\ndef _persist_findings(\n    db: Session, *, scan_id: str, scan_result: PlaywrightScanResult\n) -> None:\n    db.query(Finding).filter(Finding.scan_id == scan_id).delete(synchronize_session=False)\n\n    for engine_finding in scan_result.findings:\n        db.add(\n            Finding(\n                scan_id=scan_id,\n                rule_id=engine_finding.rule_id,\n                severity=engine_finding.severity,\n                description=engine_finding.description,\n                help_url=engine_finding.help_url,\n                wcag_refs=engine_finding.wcag_refs,\n                confidence_score=engine_finding.confidence_score,\n                evidence_metadata=engine_finding.evidence_metadata,\n            )\n        )\n\n    db.commit()\n\n\ndef _mark_scan_failed(db: Session, scan_id: str, error: Exception) -> None:\n    scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n    if scan is None:\n        return\n\n    scan.status = ScanStatus.failed\n    scan.failed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n    scan.error_message = str(error)[:_MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH]\n    db.commit()\n"
> }
> ```

>   "message": "Install Playwright browsers in API image",
>   "content": "FROM python:3.12-slim\n\nENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \\\n    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1\n\nWORKDIR /app\n\nCOPY requirements.txt .\nRUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt \\\n    && python -m playwright install --with-deps chromium firefox\n\nCOPY app ./app\n\nCMD [\"uvicorn\", \"app.main:app\", \"--host\", \"0.0.0.0\", \"--port\", \"8000\"]\n"
> }

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/playwright-audit-engine",
>   "path": "docker-compose.yml",
>   "sha": "cfe760660f9b740a39c5d709d2f71d6dc4a579ab",
>   "message": "Configure worker browser runtime",
>   "content": "services:\n  api:\n    build: .\n    environment:\n      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+psycopg2://northaccess:northaccess@db:5432/northaccessbfsg\n      ENVIRONMENT: development\n      CELERY_BROKER_URL: redis://redis:6379/0\n      CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND: redis://redis:6379/1\n    ports:\n      - \"8000:8000\"\n    depends_on:\n      db:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n\n  worker:\n    build: .\n    command: celery -A app.core.celery worker --loglevel=info\n    shm_size: \"1gb\"\n    environment:\n      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+psycopg2://northaccess:northaccess@db:5432/northaccessbfsg\n      ENVIRONMENT: development\n      CELERY_BROKER_URL: redis://redis:6379/0\n      CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND: redis://redis:6379/1\n      BROWSER_NAME: chromium\n      BROWSER_HEADLESS: \"true\"\n      BROWSER_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS: 30000\n      BROWSER_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS: 10000\n      BROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH: 1440\n      BROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT: 900\n      BROWSER_RETRIES: 1\n      BROWSER_WAIT_UNTIL: networkidle\n    depends_on:\n      db:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n\n  db:\n    image: postgres:16-alpine\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_USER: northaccess\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: northaccess\n      POSTGRES_DB: northaccessbfsg\n    ports:\n      - \"5432:5432\"\n    volumes:\n      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg\"]\n      interval: 5s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 10\n\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7-alpine\n    ports:\n      - \"6379:6379\"\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"redis-cli\", \"ping\"]\n      interval: 5s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 10\n\nvolumes:\n  postgres_data:\n"
> }

> ````text
> {"content": "# NorthAccessBFSG\n\nMinimal FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```text\napp/\n  __init__.py\n  main.py\n  api/\n    __init__.py\n    health.py\n    scans.py\n  core/\n    __init__.py\n    celery.py\n    config.py\n  db/\n    __init__.py\n    base.py\n    init_db.py\n    session.py\n  models/\n    __init__.py\n    finding.py\n    lead.py\n    scan.py\n  services/\n    __init__.py\n    scan_service.py\n  workers/\n    __init__.py\n    scan_worker.py\nDockerfile\ndocker-compose.yml\nrequirements.txt\n.env.example\n```\n\n## Run\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose up --build\n```\n\nThen open:\n\n```text\nhttp://localhost:8000/health\n```\n\nExpected response:\n\n```json\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}\n```\n\nThe API waits for PostgreSQL and Redis to become healthy, connects with SQLAlchemy, and auto-creates the `leads`, `scans`, and `findings` tables on startup.\n\n## Async Scan Flow\n\nRun a scan for an existing lead:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/{lead_id}\n```\n\nExpected immediate response:\n\n```json\n{\"scan_id\":\"<scan-id>\"}\n```\n\nThe API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker then updates the scan lifecycle:\n\n```text\npending -> running -> done\n```\n\nIf task execution fails, the worker marks the scan as `failed`.\n\nThe worker process can also be started independently:\n\n```bash\ncelery -A app.core.celery worker --loglevel=info\n```\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "2cbe94105e67c7e016c209380f42b27341543860", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/playwright-audit-engine/README.md", "display_title": "README.md"}
> ````
>
> MCP tool call
>
> codex_apps.github_update_file
>
> ````json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/playwright-audit-engine",
>   "path": "README.md",
>   "sha": "2cbe94105e67c7e016c209380f42b27341543860",
>   "message": "Document Playwright scan execution",
>   "content": "# NorthAccessBFSG\n\nMinimal FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```text\napp/\n  __init__.py\n  main.py\n  api/\n    __init__.py\n    health.py\n    scans.py\n  core/\n    __init__.py\n    browser_config.py\n    celery.py\n    config.py\n  db/\n    __init__.py\n    base.py\n    init_db.py\n    session.py\n  models/\n    __init__.py\n    finding.py\n    lead.py\n    scan.py\n  services/\n    __init__.py\n    scan_service.py\n  workers/\n    __init__.py\n    playwright_engine.py\n    scan_worker.py\nDockerfile\ndocker-compose.yml\nrequirements.txt\n.env.example\n```\n\n## Run\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose up --build\n```\n\nThen open:\n\n```text\nhttp://localhost:8000/health\n```\n\nExpected response:\n\n```json\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}\n```\n\nThe API waits for PostgreSQL and Redis to become healthy, connects with SQLAlchemy, and auto-creates the `leads`, `scans`, and `findings` tables on startup.\n\n## Async Scan Flow\n\nCreate a lead directly in the database while a public lead API does not exist yet:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"INSERT INTO leads (id, domain, company_name) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'https://example.com', 'Example') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;\"\n```\n\nRun a scan for the lead:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111\n```\n\nExpected immediate response:\n\n```json\n{\"scan_id\":\"<scan-id>\"}\n```\n\nThe API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker launches Playwright headless Chromium, loads the lead domain, runs axe-core, captures evidence metadata, and persists raw findings.\n\nLifecycle:\n\n```text\npending -> running -> processing -> done\n```\n\nIf task execution fails, the worker marks the scan as `failed` and stores `error_message`.\n\nInspect stored findings:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT rule_id, severity, wcag_refs, confidence_score FROM findings;\"\n```\n\nThe worker process can also be started independently:\n\n```bash\ncelery -A app.core.celery worker --loglevel=info\n```\n\n## Browser Configuration\n\nThe worker defaults to Chromium and also installs Firefox:\n\n```text\nBROWSER_NAME=chromium\nBROWSER_HEADLESS=true\nBROWSER_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS=30000\nBROWSER_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=10000\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=1440\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=900\nBROWSER_RETRIES=1\nBROWSER_WAIT_UNTIL=networkidle\n```\n\nWebKit is supported by configuration but is not installed in the default image.\n"
> }
> ````

> Eine kleine Celery-CLI-Kante habe ich noch gesehen: Damit `celery -A app.core.celery worker --loglevel=info` robust funktioniert, exponiere ich die Celery-Instanz zusätzlich als `app`-Alias im Modul.
>

> {"content": "from celery import Celery\n\nfrom app.core.config import settings\n\ncelery_app = Celery(\n    \"northaccessbfsg\",\n    broker=settings.celery_broker_url,\n    backend=settings.celery_result_backend,\n    include=[\"app.workers.scan_worker\"],\n)\n\ncelery_app.conf.update(\n    accept_content=[\"json\"],\n    enable_utc=True,\n    result_serializer=\"json\",\n    task_serializer=\"json\",\n    task_track_started=True,\n    timezone=\"UTC\",\n)\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "683e0115c1edabccbddf421a137dd6f65ead013e", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/playwright-audit-engine/app/core/celery.py", "display_title": "celery.py"}

> Ich ergänze noch ein Scan-Level-`evidence_metadata`-Feld. Wichtig, weil ein erfolgreicher Scan auch dann Evidence haben muss, wenn axe keine Violations findet und deshalb keine Finding-Zeilen entstehen.

> ```text
> {"content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport enum\nimport uuid\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import DateTime, Enum, ForeignKey, String, Text, func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\n\n\nclass ScanStatus(str, enum.Enum):\n    pending = \"pending\"\n    running = \"running\"\n    processing = \"processing\"\n    done = \"done\"\n    failed = \"failed\"\n\n\nclass Scan(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"scans\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n    )\n    lead_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), ForeignKey(\"leads.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"), nullable=False, index=True\n    )\n    status: Mapped[ScanStatus] = mapped_column(\n        Enum(ScanStatus, name=\"scan_status\"), default=ScanStatus.pending, nullable=False\n    )\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n    )\n    started_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True\n    )\n    completed_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True\n    )\n    failed_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True\n    )\n    error_message: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n\n    lead: Mapped[\"Lead\"] = relationship(\"Lead\", back_populates=\"scans\")\n    findings: Mapped[list[\"Finding\"]] = relationship(\n        \"Finding\", back_populates=\"scan\", cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\"\n    )\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "57d5fd47b934e6fd421494bea6c3026593fa74dc", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/playwright-audit-engine/app/models/scan.py", "display_title": "scan.py"}
> ```

> ```text
> {"content": "import logging\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.core.celery import celery_app\nfrom app.db.session import SessionLocal\nfrom app.models import Finding, Scan, ScanStatus\nfrom app.workers.playwright_engine import PlaywrightScanResult, run_accessibility_scan\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n_MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH = 4000\n\n\n@celery_app.task(name=\"app.workers.scan_worker.run_scan\")\ndef run_scan_task(scan_id: str) -> str:\n    db = SessionLocal()\n    try:\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s was not found; skipping task\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        domain = scan.lead.domain\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.running\n        scan.started_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n        scan.completed_at = None\n        scan.failed_at = None\n        scan.error_message = None\n        db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\"Started Playwright accessibility scan %s for %s\", scan_id, domain)\n        scan_result = run_accessibility_scan(domain)\n\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s disappeared before persistence\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.processing\n        db.commit()\n\n        _persist_findings(db, scan_id=scan_id, scan_result=scan_result)\n\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is not None:\n            scan.status = ScanStatus.done\n            scan.completed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n            scan.error_message = None\n            db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\n            \"Completed Playwright accessibility scan %s with %s findings\",\n            scan_id,\n            len(scan_result.findings),\n        )\n        return scan_id\n    except Exception as exc:\n        db.rollback()\n        _mark_scan_failed(db, scan_id, exc)\n        logger.exception(\"Scan task %s failed\", scan_id)\n        raise\n    finally:\n        db.close()\n\n\ndef _persist_findings(\n    db: Session, *, scan_id: str, scan_result: PlaywrightScanResult\n) -> None:\n    db.query(Finding).filter(Finding.scan_id == scan_id).delete(synchronize_session=False)\n\n    for engine_finding in scan_result.findings:\n        db.add(\n            Finding(\n                scan_id=scan_id,\n                rule_id=engine_finding.rule_id,\n                severity=engine_finding.severity,\n                description=engine_finding.description,\n                help_url=engine_finding.help_url,\n                wcag_refs=engine_finding.wcag_refs,\n                confidence_score=engine_finding.confidence_score,\n                evidence_metadata=engine_finding.evidence_metadata,\n            )\n        )\n\n    db.commit()\n\n\ndef _mark_scan_failed(db: Session, scan_id: str, error: Exception) -> None:\n    scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n    if scan is None:\n        return\n\n    scan.status = ScanStatus.failed\n    scan.failed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n    scan.error_message = str(error)[:_MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH]\n    db.commit()\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "72c5235e554a7747e726a7603e3e8ff97503669e", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/playwright-audit-engine/app/workers/scan_worker.py", "display_title": "scan_worker.py"}
> ```

> ```text
> {"content": "from sqlalchemy import text\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import engine\nfrom app.models import Finding, Lead, Scan  # noqa: F401\n\n_SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'processing'\",\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'failed'\",\n)\n\n_SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS started_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_message TEXT\",\n)\n\n_FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS help_url VARCHAR(500)\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wcag_refs JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence_score DOUBLE PRECISION\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n\ndef init_db() -> None:\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n    _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema()\n    _ensure_finding_evidence_schema()\n\n\ndef _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.connect() as connection:\n        autocommit_connection = connection.execution_options(isolation_level=\"AUTOCOMMIT\")\n        for statement in _SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES:\n            autocommit_connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n\ndef _ensure_finding_evidence_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "584406cfe262e6d8f0da6eb16ffecd480c8d9a99", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/playwright-audit-engine/app/db/init_db.py", "display_title": "init_db.py"}
> ```

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/playwright-audit-engine",
>   "path": "app/models/scan.py",
>   "sha": "57d5fd47b934e6fd421494bea6c3026593fa74dc",
>   "message": "Persist scan evidence metadata",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport enum\nimport uuid\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, DateTime, Enum, ForeignKey, String, Text, func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\n\n\nclass ScanStatus(str, enum.Enum):\n    pending = \"pending\"\n    running = \"running\"\n    processing = \"processing\"\n    done = \"done\"\n    failed = \"failed\"\n\n\nclass Scan(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"scans\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n    )\n    lead_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), ForeignKey(\"leads.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"), nullable=False, index=True\n    )\n    status: Mapped[ScanStatus] = mapped_column(\n        Enum(ScanStatus, name=\"scan_status\"), default=ScanStatus.pending, nullable=False\n    )\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n    )\n    started_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True\n    )\n    completed_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True\n    )\n    failed_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True\n    )\n    error_message: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n    evidence_metadata: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(\n        JSON, default=dict, nullable=False\n    )\n\n    lead: Mapped[\"Lead\"] = relationship(\"Lead\", back_populates=\"scans\")\n    findings: Mapped[list[\"Finding\"]] = relationship(\n        \"Finding\", back_populates=\"scan\", cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\"\n    )\n"
> }

>   "content": "from sqlalchemy import text\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import engine\nfrom app.models import Finding, Lead, Scan  # noqa: F401\n\n_SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'processing'\",\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'failed'\",\n)\n\n_SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS started_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_message TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n_FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS help_url VARCHAR(500)\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wcag_refs JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence_score DOUBLE PRECISION\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n\ndef init_db() -> None:\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n    _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema()\n    _ensure_finding_evidence_schema()\n\n\ndef _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.connect() as connection:\n        autocommit_connection = connection.execution_options(isolation_level=\"AUTOCOMMIT\")\n        for statement in _SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES:\n            autocommit_connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n\ndef _ensure_finding_evidence_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n"

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",

>   "content": "import logging\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.core.celery import celery_app\nfrom app.db.session import SessionLocal\nfrom app.models import Finding, Scan, ScanStatus\nfrom app.workers.playwright_engine import PlaywrightScanResult, run_accessibility_scan\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n_MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH = 4000\n\n\n@celery_app.task(name=\"app.workers.scan_worker.run_scan\")\ndef run_scan_task(scan_id: str) -> str:\n    db = SessionLocal()\n    try:\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s was not found; skipping task\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        domain = scan.lead.domain\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.running\n        scan.started_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n        scan.completed_at = None\n        scan.failed_at = None\n        scan.error_message = None\n        scan.evidence_metadata = {}\n        db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\"Started Playwright accessibility scan %s for %s\", scan_id, domain)\n        scan_result = run_accessibility_scan(domain)\n\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s disappeared before persistence\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.processing\n        scan.evidence_metadata = scan_result.evidence_metadata\n        db.commit()\n\n        _persist_findings(db, scan_id=scan_id, scan_result=scan_result)\n\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is not None:\n            scan.status = ScanStatus.done\n            scan.completed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n            scan.error_message = None\n            db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\n            \"Completed Playwright accessibility scan %s with %s findings\",\n            scan_id,\n            len(scan_result.findings),\n        )\n        return scan_id\n    except Exception as exc:\n        db.rollback()\n        _mark_scan_failed(db, scan_id, exc)\n        logger.exception(\"Scan task %s failed\", scan_id)\n        raise\n    finally:\n        db.close()\n\n\ndef _persist_findings(\n    db: Session, *, scan_id: str, scan_result: PlaywrightScanResult\n) -> None:\n    db.query(Finding).filter(Finding.scan_id == scan_id).delete(synchronize_session=False)\n\n    for engine_finding in scan_result.findings:\n        db.add(\n            Finding(\n                scan_id=scan_id,\n                rule_id=engine_finding.rule_id,\n                severity=engine_finding.severity,\n                description=engine_finding.description,\n                help_url=engine_finding.help_url,\n                wcag_refs=engine_finding.wcag_refs,\n                confidence_score=engine_finding.confidence_score,\n                evidence_metadata=engine_finding.evidence_metadata,\n            )\n        )\n\n    db.commit()\n\n\ndef _mark_scan_failed(db: Session, scan_id: str, error: Exception) -> None:\n    scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n    if scan is None:\n        return\n\n    scan.status = ScanStatus.failed\n    scan.failed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n    scan.error_message = str(error)[:_MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH]\n    db.commit()\n"
> }
> ```

> ````text
> {"content": "# NorthAccessBFSG\n\nMinimal FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```text\napp/\n  __init__.py\n  main.py\n  api/\n    __init__.py\n    health.py\n    scans.py\n  core/\n    __init__.py\n    browser_config.py\n    celery.py\n    config.py\n  db/\n    __init__.py\n    base.py\n    init_db.py\n    session.py\n  models/\n    __init__.py\n    finding.py\n    lead.py\n    scan.py\n  services/\n    __init__.py\n    scan_service.py\n  workers/\n    __init__.py\n    playwright_engine.py\n    scan_worker.py\nDockerfile\ndocker-compose.yml\nrequirements.txt\n.env.example\n```\n\n## Run\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose up --build\n```\n\nThen open:\n\n```text\nhttp://localhost:8000/health\n```\n\nExpected response:\n\n```json\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}\n```\n\nThe API waits for PostgreSQL and Redis to become healthy, connects with SQLAlchemy, and auto-creates the `leads`, `scans`, and `findings` tables on startup.\n\n## Async Scan Flow\n\nCreate a lead directly in the database while a public lead API does not exist yet:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"INSERT INTO leads (id, domain, company_name) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'https://example.com', 'Example') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;\"\n```\n\nRun a scan for the lead:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111\n```\n\nExpected immediate response:\n\n```json\n{\"scan_id\":\"<scan-id>\"}\n```\n\nThe API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker launches Playwright headless Chromium, loads the lead domain, runs axe-core, captures evidence metadata, and persists raw findings.\n\nLifecycle:\n\n```text\npending -> running -> processing -> done\n```\n\nIf task execution fails, the worker marks the scan as `failed` and stores `error_message`.\n\nInspect stored findings:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT rule_id, severity, wcag_refs, confidence_score FROM findings;\"\n```\n\nThe worker process can also be started independently:\n\n```bash\ncelery -A app.core.celery worker --loglevel=info\n```\n\n## Browser Configuration\n\nThe worker defaults to Chromium and also installs Firefox:\n\n```text\nBROWSER_NAME=chromium\nBROWSER_HEADLESS=true\nBROWSER_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS=30000\nBROWSER_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=10000\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=1440\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=900\nBROWSER_RETRIES=1\nBROWSER_WAIT_UNTIL=networkidle\n```\n\nWebKit is supported by configuration but is not installed in the default image.\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "e239d07afe42b56ea0eb83ea552ab9a8b6517c21", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/playwright-audit-engine/README.md", "display_title": "README.md"}
> ````

> {

>   "sha": "e239d07afe42b56ea0eb83ea552ab9a8b6517c21",
>   "message": "Document scan evidence inspection",
>   "content": "# NorthAccessBFSG\n\nMinimal FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```text\napp/\n  __init__.py\n  main.py\n  api/\n    __init__.py\n    health.py\n    scans.py\n  core/\n    __init__.py\n    browser_config.py\n    celery.py\n    config.py\n  db/\n    __init__.py\n    base.py\n    init_db.py\n    session.py\n  models/\n    __init__.py\n    finding.py\n    lead.py\n    scan.py\n  services/\n    __init__.py\n    scan_service.py\n  workers/\n    __init__.py\n    playwright_engine.py\n    scan_worker.py\nDockerfile\ndocker-compose.yml\nrequirements.txt\n.env.example\n```\n\n## Run\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose up --build\n```\n\nThen open:\n\n```text\nhttp://localhost:8000/health\n```\n\nExpected response:\n\n```json\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}\n```\n\nThe API waits for PostgreSQL and Redis to become healthy, connects with SQLAlchemy, and auto-creates the `leads`, `scans`, and `findings` tables on startup.\n\n## Async Scan Flow\n\nCreate a lead directly in the database while a public lead API does not exist yet:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"INSERT INTO leads (id, domain, company_name) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'https://example.com', 'Example') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;\"\n```\n\nRun a scan for the lead:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111\n```\n\nExpected immediate response:\n\n```json\n{\"scan_id\":\"<scan-id>\"}\n```\n\nThe API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker launches Playwright headless Chromium, loads the lead domain, runs axe-core, captures evidence metadata, and persists raw findings.\n\nLifecycle:\n\n```text\npending -> running -> processing -> done\n```\n\nIf task execution fails, the worker marks the scan as `failed` and stores `error_message`.\n\nInspect scan status and evidence metadata:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT id, status, error_message, evidence_metadata->>'current_url' AS current_url FROM scans;\"\n```\n\nInspect stored findings:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT rule_id, severity, wcag_refs, confidence_score FROM findings;\"\n```\n\nThe worker process can also be started independently:\n\n```bash\ncelery -A app.core.celery worker --loglevel=info\n```\n\n## Browser Configuration\n\nThe worker defaults to Chromium and also installs Firefox:\n\n```text\nBROWSER_NAME=chromium\nBROWSER_HEADLESS=true\nBROWSER_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS=30000\nBROWSER_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=10000\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=1440\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=900\nBROWSER_RETRIES=1\nBROWSER_WAIT_UNTIL=networkidle\n```\n\nWebKit is supported by configuration but is not installed in the default image.\n"
> }
> ````

> ```text
> {"content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport hashlib\nimport json\nimport time\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom urllib.parse import urlparse\n\nfrom axe_playwright_python.sync_playwright import Axe\nfrom playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright\n\nfrom app.core.browser_config import BrowserConfig, get_browser_config\n\n_SEVERITY_BY_AXE_IMPACT = {\n    \"critical\": \"critical\",\n    \"serious\": \"high\",\n    \"moderate\": \"medium\",\n    \"minor\": \"low\",\n}\n_CONFIDENCE_BY_AXE_IMPACT = {\n    \"critical\": 0.95,\n    \"serious\": 0.9,\n    \"moderate\": 0.8,\n    \"minor\": 0.65,\n}\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass EngineFinding:\n    rule_id: str\n    severity: str\n    wcag_refs: list[str]\n    confidence_score: float\n    description: str | None\n    help_url: str | None\n    evidence_metadata: dict[str, Any]\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass PlaywrightScanResult:\n    target_url: str\n    current_url: str\n    captured_at: str\n    evidence_metadata: dict[str, Any]\n    findings: list[EngineFinding]\n\n\ndef run_accessibility_scan(domain: str) -> PlaywrightScanResult:\n    config = get_browser_config()\n    target_url = normalize_target_url(domain)\n    last_error: Exception | None = None\n\n    for attempt in range(config.retries + 1):\n        try:\n            return _run_once(target_url=target_url, config=config, attempt=attempt)\n        except Exception as exc:\n            last_error = exc\n            if attempt < config.retries:\n                time.sleep(min(2**attempt, 5))\n\n    raise RuntimeError(f\"Playwright scan failed for {target_url}\") from last_error\n\n\ndef normalize_target_url(domain: str) -> str:\n    candidate = domain.strip()\n    parsed = urlparse(candidate)\n    if parsed.scheme:\n        return candidate\n    return f\"https://{candidate}\"\n\n\ndef _run_once(\n    target_url: str, config: BrowserConfig, attempt: int\n) -> PlaywrightScanResult:\n    captured_at = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()\n\n    with sync_playwright() as playwright:\n        browser_type = getattr(playwright, config.browser_name)\n        launch_args = [\"--no-sandbox\"] if config.browser_name == \"chromium\" else []\n        browser = browser_type.launch(headless=config.headless, args=launch_args)\n        try:\n            context = browser.new_context(\n                viewport={\n                    \"width\": config.viewport_width,\n                    \"height\": config.viewport_height,\n                }\n            )\n            context.set_default_timeout(config.action_timeout_ms)\n            context.set_default_navigation_timeout(config.navigation_timeout_ms)\n\n            page = context.new_page()\n            page.goto(\n                target_url,\n                wait_until=config.wait_until,\n                timeout=config.navigation_timeout_ms,\n            )\n\n            axe_response = Axe().run(page).response\n            dom_snapshot = page.content()\n            screenshot_bytes = page.screenshot(full_page=True)\n            accessibility_tree = _capture_accessibility_tree(page)\n            current_url = page.url\n            evidence_metadata = _build_scan_evidence_metadata(\n                accessibility_tree=accessibility_tree,\n                axe_response=axe_response,\n                captured_at=captured_at,\n                config=config,\n                current_url=current_url,\n                dom_snapshot=dom_snapshot,\n                screenshot_bytes=screenshot_bytes,\n                target_url=target_url,\n                attempt=attempt,\n            )\n            findings = _findings_from_axe_response(axe_response, evidence_metadata)\n\n            return PlaywrightScanResult(\n                target_url=target_url,\n                current_url=current_url,\n                captured_at=captured_at,\n                evidence_metadata=evidence_metadata,\n                findings=findings,\n            )\n        finally:\n            browser.close()\n\n\ndef _capture_accessibility_tree(page) -> dict[str, Any] | None:\n    try:\n        return page.accessibility.snapshot(interesting_only=False)\n    except Exception:\n        return None\n\n\ndef _build_scan_evidence_metadata(\n    *,\n    accessibility_tree: dict[str, Any] | None,\n    axe_response: dict[str, Any],\n    captured_at: str,\n    config: BrowserConfig,\n    current_url: str,\n    dom_snapshot: str,\n    screenshot_bytes: bytes,\n    target_url: str,\n    attempt: int,\n) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    accessibility_tree_json = _json_dump(accessibility_tree) if accessibility_tree else None\n\n    return {\n        \"target_url\": target_url,\n        \"current_url\": current_url,\n        \"captured_at\": captured_at,\n        \"browser\": {\n            \"name\": config.browser_name,\n            \"headless\": config.headless,\n            \"viewport\": {\n                \"width\": config.viewport_width,\n                \"height\": config.viewport_height,\n            },\n            \"navigation_timeout_ms\": config.navigation_timeout_ms,\n            \"attempt\": attempt + 1,\n        },\n        \"axe\": {\n            \"violations_count\": len(axe_response.get(\"violations\", [])),\n            \"passes_count\": len(axe_response.get(\"passes\", [])),\n            \"incomplete_count\": len(axe_response.get(\"incomplete\", [])),\n            \"inapplicable_count\": len(axe_response.get(\"inapplicable\", [])),\n        },\n        \"screenshot\": {\n            \"storage\": \"pending\",\n            \"full_page\": True,\n            \"byte_count\": len(screenshot_bytes),\n            \"sha256\": hashlib.sha256(screenshot_bytes).hexdigest(),\n        },\n        \"dom_snapshot\": {\n            \"storage\": \"pending\",\n            \"char_count\": len(dom_snapshot),\n            \"sha256\": _sha256_text(dom_snapshot),\n        },\n        \"accessibility_tree\": {\n            \"storage\": \"pending\",\n            \"available\": accessibility_tree is not None,\n            \"node_count\": _count_accessibility_nodes(accessibility_tree),\n            \"sha256\": _sha256_text(accessibility_tree_json)\n            if accessibility_tree_json\n            else None,\n        },\n    }\n\n\ndef _findings_from_axe_response(\n    axe_response: dict[str, Any], scan_evidence: dict[str, Any]\n) -> list[EngineFinding]:\n    findings: list[EngineFinding] = []\n    for violation in axe_response.get(\"violations\", []):\n        impact = violation.get(\"impact\") or \"unknown\"\n        nodes = violation.get(\"nodes\") or []\n        wcag_refs = _extract_wcag_refs(violation.get(\"tags\") or [])\n        confidence_score = _confidence_for_violation(impact=impact, node_count=len(nodes))\n\n        findings.append(\n            EngineFinding(\n                rule_id=violation.get(\"id\", \"unknown\"),\n                severity=_SEVERITY_BY_AXE_IMPACT.get(impact, \"info\"),\n                wcag_refs=wcag_refs,\n                confidence_score=confidence_score,\n                description=violation.get(\"description\") or violation.get(\"help\"),\n                help_url=violation.get(\"helpUrl\"),\n                evidence_metadata={\n                    **scan_evidence,\n                    \"axe_violation\": {\n                        \"impact\": impact,\n                        \"help\": violation.get(\"help\"),\n                        \"help_url\": violation.get(\"helpUrl\"),\n                        \"node_count\": len(nodes),\n                        \"sample_targets\": _sample_node_targets(nodes),\n                    },\n                },\n            )\n        )\n\n    return findings\n\n\ndef _extract_wcag_refs(tags: list[str]) -> list[str]:\n    return sorted({tag for tag in tags if tag.lower().startswith(\"wcag\")})\n\n\ndef _confidence_for_violation(*, impact: str, node_count: int) -> float:\n    base = _CONFIDENCE_BY_AXE_IMPACT.get(impact, 0.5)\n    if node_count >= 3:\n        base += 0.03\n    return min(base, 0.99)\n\n\ndef _sample_node_targets(nodes: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> list[list[str]]:\n    targets: list[list[str]] = []\n    for node in nodes[:5]:\n        target = node.get(\"target\")\n        if isinstance(target, list):\n            targets.append([str(item) for item in target])\n    return targets\n\n\ndef _count_accessibility_nodes(node: dict[str, Any] | None) -> int:\n    if not node:\n        return 0\n    children = node.get(\"children\") or []\n    return 1 + sum(_count_accessibility_nodes(child) for child in children)\n\n\ndef _json_dump(value: Any) -> str:\n    return json.dumps(value, default=str, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True)\n\n\ndef _sha256_text(value: str) -> str:\n    return hashlib.sha256(value.encode(\"utf-8\")).hexdigest()\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "eb98ee3584cd92979599986eb9c0aafd83403dc3", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/playwright-audit-engine/app/workers/playwright_engine.py", "display_title": "playwright_engine.py"}
> ```

>
> ```text
> {"content": "import logging\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.core.celery import celery_app\nfrom app.db.session import SessionLocal\nfrom app.models import Finding, Scan, ScanStatus\nfrom app.workers.playwright_engine import PlaywrightScanResult, run_accessibility_scan\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n_MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH = 4000\n\n\n@celery_app.task(name=\"app.workers.scan_worker.run_scan\")\ndef run_scan_task(scan_id: str) -> str:\n    db = SessionLocal()\n    try:\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s was not found; skipping task\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        domain = scan.lead.domain\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.running\n        scan.started_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n        scan.completed_at = None\n        scan.failed_at = None\n        scan.error_message = None\n        scan.evidence_metadata = {}\n        db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\"Started Playwright accessibility scan %s for %s\", scan_id, domain)\n        scan_result = run_accessibility_scan(domain)\n\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s disappeared before persistence\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.processing\n        scan.evidence_metadata = scan_result.evidence_metadata\n        db.commit()\n\n        _persist_findings(db, scan_id=scan_id, scan_result=scan_result)\n\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is not None:\n            scan.status = ScanStatus.done\n            scan.completed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n            scan.error_message = None\n            db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\n            \"Completed Playwright accessibility scan %s with %s findings\",\n            scan_id,\n            len(scan_result.findings),\n        )\n        return scan_id\n    except Exception as exc:\n        db.rollback()\n        _mark_scan_failed(db, scan_id, exc)\n        logger.exception(\"Scan task %s failed\", scan_id)\n        raise\n    finally:\n        db.close()\n\n\ndef _persist_findings(\n    db: Session, *, scan_id: str, scan_result: PlaywrightScanResult\n) -> None:\n    db.query(Finding).filter(Finding.scan_id == scan_id).delete(synchronize_session=False)\n\n    for engine_finding in scan_result.findings:\n        db.add(\n            Finding(\n                scan_id=scan_id,\n                rule_id=engine_finding.rule_id,\n                severity=engine_finding.severity,\n                description=engine_finding.description,\n                help_url=engine_finding.help_url,\n                wcag_refs=engine_finding.wcag_refs,\n                confidence_score=engine_finding.confidence_score,\n                evidence_metadata=engine_finding.evidence_metadata,\n            )\n        )\n\n    db.commit()\n\n\ndef _mark_scan_failed(db: Session, scan_id: str, error: Exception) -> None:\n    scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n    if scan is None:\n        return\n\n    scan.status = ScanStatus.failed\n    scan.failed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n    scan.error_message = str(error)[:_MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH]\n    db.commit()\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "7c43dfcfd65d3d4ff377bbe625db8e23c7366a3b", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/playwright-audit-engine/app/workers/scan_worker.py", "display_title": "scan_worker.py"}
> ```

> {"content": "FROM python:3.12-slim\n\nENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \\\n    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1\n\nWORKDIR /app\n\nCOPY requirements.txt .\nRUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt \\\n    && python -m playwright install --with-deps chromium firefox\n\nCOPY app ./app\n\nCMD [\"uvicorn\", \"app.main:app\", \"--host\", \"0.0.0.0\", \"--port\", \"8000\"]\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "33c32ee26be8f429788ad81f2e67379f70955e60", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/playwright-audit-engine/Dockerfile", "display_title": "Dockerfile"}
> ```
>
> </details>
>
> Der Diff enthält nur die Playwright/axe-Erweiterung plus notwendige Schema- und Docker-Anpassungen. Ich öffne jetzt einen abhängigen Draft-PR gegen die Celery-Worker-Branch, damit die Review-Schichten sauber getrennt bleiben.
>

>
> ````json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "base_branch": "codex/celery-scan-worker",
>   "head_branch": "codex/playwright-audit-engine",
>   "title": "Add Playwright axe accessibility scan engine",
>   "body": "## Summary\n\n- Add Playwright browser scan configuration in `app/core/browser_config.py`\n- Add `app/workers/playwright_engine.py` using headless Chromium/Firefox-capable Playwright and axe-core via `axe-playwright-python`\n- Replace placeholder worker sleep with real browser navigation, axe scan execution, evidence metadata capture, and finding persistence\n- Extend scan lifecycle to `pending -> running -> processing -> done`, with `failed` and `error_message` on errors\n- Add scan/finding evidence metadata fields, WCAG refs, confidence score, description, and help URL persistence\n- Update Docker image to install Playwright Chromium + Firefox browsers and configure worker shared memory\n\n## Example flow\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose up --build\n\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"INSERT INTO leads (id, domain, company_name) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'https://example.com', 'Example') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;\"\n\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111\n```\n\nWorker result:\n\n```text\npending -> running -> processing -> done\n```\n\nInspect evidence and findings:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT id, status, evidence_metadata->>'current_url' AS current_url FROM scans;\"\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT rule_id, severity, wcag_refs, confidence_score FROM findings;\"\n```\n\n## Notes\n\n- Stores metadata placeholders only for screenshot/DOM/accessibility tree evidence: hash, size/count, URL, timestamp, browser info.\n- Does not implement compliance mapping, reporting, PDF generation, Playwright-driven crawling, or CI/CD gates.\n- I could not run Docker in this scratch environment, so validation was limited to connector-backed diff and code review.\n- Depends on PR #2 (`codex/celery-scan-worker`).",
>   "draft": true
> }
> ````
>

>   "body": "## Summary\n\n- Add Playwright browser scan configuration in `app/core/browser_config.py`\n- Add `app/workers/playwright_engine.py` using headless Chromium/Firefox-capable Playwright and axe-core via `axe-playwright-python`\n- Replace placeholder worker sleep with real browser navigation, axe scan execution, evidence metadata capture, and finding persistence\n- Extend scan lifecycle to `pending -> running -> processing -> done`, with `failed` and `error_message` on errors\n- Add scan/finding evidence metadata fields, WCAG refs, confidence score, description, and help URL persistence\n- Update Docker image to install Playwright Chromium + Firefox browsers and configure worker shared memory\n\n## Example flow\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose up --build\n\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"INSERT INTO leads (id, domain, company_name) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'https://example.com', 'Example') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;\"\n\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111\n```\n\nWorker result:\n\n```text\npending -> running -> processing -> done\n```\n\nInspect evidence and findings:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT id, status, evidence_metadata->>'current_url' AS current_url FROM scans;\"\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT rule_id, severity, wcag_refs, confidence_score FROM findings;\"\n```\n\n## Notes\n\n- Stores metadata placeholders only for screenshot/DOM/accessibility tree evidence: hash, size/count, URL, timestamp, browser info.\n- Does not implement compliance mapping, reporting, PDF generation, Playwright-driven crawling, or CI/CD gates.\n- I could not run Docker in this scratch environment, so validation was limited to connector-backed diff and code review.\n- Depends on PR #2 (`codex/celery-scan-worker`).",

Async Scan Flow\n \n-Run a scan for an existing lead:\n+Create a lead directly in the database while a public lead API does not exist yet:\n \n ```bash\n-curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/{lead_id}\n+docker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"INSERT INTO leads (id, domain, company_name) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'https://example.com', 'Example') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;\"\n+```\n+\n+Run a scan for the lead:\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111\n ```\n \n Expected immediate response:\n@@ -72,16 +80,47 @@ Expected immediate response:\n {\"scan_id\":\"<scan-id>\"}\n ```\n \n-The API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker then updates the scan lifecycle:\n+The API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker launches Playwright headless Chromium, loads the lead domain, runs axe-core, captures evidence metadata, and persists raw findings.\n+\n+Lifecycle:\n \n ```text\n-pending -> running -> done\n+pending -> running -> processing -> done\n+```\n+\n+If task execution fails, the worker marks the scan as `failed` and stores `error_message`.\n+\n+Inspect scan status and evidence metadata:\n+\n+```bash\n+docker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT id, status, error_message, evidence_metadata->>'current_url' AS current_url FROM scans;\"\n ```\n \n-If task execution fails, the worker marks the scan as `failed`.\n+Inspect stored findings:\n+\n+```bash\n+docker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT rule_id, severity, wcag_refs, confidence_score FROM findings;\"\n+```\n \n The worker process can also be started independently:\n \n ```bash\n celery -A app.core.celery worker --loglevel=info\n ```\n+\n+## Browser Configuration\n+\n+The worker defaults to Chromium and also installs Firefox:\n+\n+```text\n+BROWSER_NAME=chromium\n+BROWSER_HEADLESS=true\n+BROWSER_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS=30000\n+BROWSER_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=10000\n+BROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=1440\n+BROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=900\n+BROWSER_RETRIES=1\n+BROWSER_WAIT_UNTIL=networkidle\n+```\n+\n+WebKit is supported by configuration but is not installed in the default image.\ndiff --git a/app/core/browser_config.py b/app/core/browser_config.py\nnew file mode 100644\nindex 0000000..c30bbaa\n--- /dev/null\n+++ b/app/core/browser_config.py\n@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+\n+from app.core.config import settings\n+\n+SUPPORTED_BROWSERS = {\"chromium\", \"firefox\", \"webkit\"}\n+SUPPORTED_WAIT_UNTIL = {\"commit\", \"domcontentloaded\", \"load\", \"networkidle\"}\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class BrowserConfig:\n+    browser_name: str\n+    headless: bool\n+    navigation_timeout_ms: int\n+    action_timeout_ms: int\n+    viewport_width: int\n+    viewport_height: int\n+    retries: int\n+    wait_until: str\n+\n+\n+def get_browser_config() -> BrowserConfig:\n+    browser_name = settings.browser_name.lower().strip()\n+    if browser_name not in SUPPORTED_BROWSERS:\n+        raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported browser '{settings.browser_name}'\")\n+\n+    wait_until = settings.browser_wait_until.lower().strip()\n+    if wait_until not in SUPPORTED_WAIT_UNTIL:\n+        raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported wait strategy '{settings.browser_wait_until}'\")\n+\n+    return BrowserConfig(\n+        browser_name=browser_name,\n+        headless=settings.browser_headless,\n+        navigation_timeout_ms=settings.browser_navigation_timeout_ms,\n+        action_timeout_ms=settings.browser_action_timeout_ms,\n+        viewport_width=settings.browser_viewport_width,\n+ a/app/workers/playwright_engine.py b/app/workers/playwright_engine.py\nnew file mode 100644\nindex 0000000..eb98ee3\n--- /dev/null\n+++ b/app/workers/playwright_engine.py\n@@ -0,0 +1,258 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import hashlib\n+import json\n+import time\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+from urllib.parse import urlparse\n+\n+from axe_playwright_python.sync_playwright import Axe\n+from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright\n+\n+from app.core.browser_config import BrowserConfig, get_browser_config\n+\n+_SEVERITY_BY_AXE_IMPACT = {\n+    \"critical\": \"critical\",\n+    \"serious\": \"high\",\n+    \"moderate\": \"medium\",\n+    \"minor\": \"low\",\n+}\n+_CONFIDENCE_BY_AXE_IMPACT = {\n+    \"critical\": 0.95,\n+    \"serious\": 0.9,\n+    \"moderate\": 0.8,\n+    \"minor\": 0.65,\n+}\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class EngineFinding:\n+    rule_id: str\n+    severity: str\n+    wcag_refs: list[str]\n+    confidence_score: float\n+    description: str | None\n+    help_url: str | None\n+    evidence_metadata: dict[str, Any]\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class PlaywrightScanResult:\n+    target_url: str\n+    current_url: str\n+    captured_at: str\n+    evidence_metadata: dict[str, Any]\n+    findings: list[EngineFinding]\n+\n+\n+def run_accessibility_scan(domain: str) -> PlaywrightScanResult:\n+    config = get_browser_config()\n+    target_url = normalize_target_url(domain)\n+    last_error: Exception | None = None\n+\n+    for attempt in range(config.retries + 1):\n+        try:\n+            return _run_once(target_url=target_url, config=config, attempt=attempt)\n+        except Exception as exc:\n+            last_error = exc\n+            if attempt < config.retries:\n+                time.sleep(min(2**attempt, 5))\n+\n+    raise RuntimeError(f\"Playwright scan failed for {target_url}\") from last_error\n+\n+\n+def normalize_target_url(domain: str) -> str:\n+    candidate = domain.strip()\n+    parsed = urlparse(candidate)\n+    if parsed.scheme:\n+        return candidate\n+    return f\"https://{candidate}\"\n+\n+\n+def _run_once(\n+    target_url: str, config: BrowserConfig, attempt: int\n+) -> PlaywrightScanResult:\n+    captured_at = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()\n+\n+    with sync_playwright() as playwright:\n+        browser_type = getattr(playwright, config.browser_name)\n+        launch_args = [\"--no-sandbox\"] if config.browser_name == \"chromium\" else []\n+        browser = browser_type.launch(headless=config.headless, args=launch_args)\n+        try:\n+            context = browser.new_context(\n+                viewport={\n+                    \"width\": config.viewport_width,\n+                    \"height\": config.viewport_height,\n+                }\n+            )\n+            context.set_default_timeout(config.action_timeout_ms)\n+            context.set_default_navigation_timeout(config.navigation_timeout_ms)\n+\n+            page = context.new_page()\n+            page.goto(\n+                target_url,\n+                wait_until=config.wait_until,\n+                timeout=config.navigation_timeout_ms,\n+            )\n+\n+            axe_response = Axe().run(page).response\n+            dom_snapshot = page.content()\n+            screenshot_bytes = page.screenshot(full_page=True)\n+            accessibility_tree = _capture_accessibility_tree(page)\n+            current_url = page.url\n+            evidence_metadata = _build_scan_evidence_metadata(\n+                accessibility_tree=accessibility_tree,\n+                axe_response=axe_response,\n+                captured_at=captured_at,\n+                config=config,\n+                current_url=current_url,\n+                dom_snapshot=dom_snapshot,\n+                screenshot_bytes=screenshot_bytes,\n+                target_url=target_url,\n+                attempt=attempt,\n+            )\n+            findings = _findings_from_axe_response(axe_response, evidence_metadata)\n+\n+            return PlaywrightScanResult(\n+                target_url=target_url,\n+                current_url=current_url,\n+                captured_at=captured_at,\n+                evidence_metadata=evidence_metadata,\n+                findings=findings,\n+            )\n+        finally:\n+            browser.close()\n+\n+\n+def _capture_accessibility_tree(page) -> dict[str, Any] | None:\n+    try:\n+        return page.accessibility.snapshot(interesting_only=False)\n+    except Exception:\n+        return None\n+\n+\n+def _build_scan_evidence_metadata(\n+    *,\n+    accessibility_tree: dict[str, Any] | None,\n+    axe_response: dict[str, Any],\n+    captured_at: str,\n+    config: BrowserConfig,\n+    current_url: str,\n+    dom_snapshot: str,\n+    screenshot_bytes: bytes,\n+    target_url: str,\n+    attempt: int,\n+) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    accessibility_tree_json = _json_dump(accessibility_tree) if accessibility_tree else None\n+\n+    return {\n+        \"target_url\": target_url,\n+        \"current_url\": current_url,\n+        \"captured_at\": captured_at,\n+        \"browser\": {\n+            \"name\": config.browser_name,\n+            \"headless\": config.headless,\n+            \"viewport\": {\n+                \"width\": config.viewport_width,\n+                \"height\": config.viewport_height,\n+            },\n+            \"navigation_timeout_ms\": config.navigation_timeout_ms,\n+            \"attempt\": attempt + 1,\n+        },\n+        \"axe\": {\n+            \"violations_count\": len(axe_response.get(\"violations\", [])),\n+            \"passes_count\": len(axe_response.get(\"passes\", [])),\n+            \"incomplete_count\": len(axe_response.get(\"incomplete\", [])),\n+            \"inapplicable_count\": len(axe_response.get(\"inapplicable\", [])),\n+        },\n+        \"screenshot\": {\n+            \"storage\": \"pending\",\n+            \"full_page\": True,\n+            \"byte_count\": len(screenshot_bytes),\n+            \"sha256\": hashlib.sha256(screenshot_bytes).hexdigest(),\n+        },\n+        \"dom_snapshot\": {\n+            \"storage\": \"pending\",\n+            \"char_count\": len(dom_snapshot),\n+            \"sha256\": _sha256_text(dom_snapshot),\n+        },\n+        \"accessibility_tree\": {\n+            \"storage\": \"pending\",\n+            \"available\": accessibility_tree is not None,\n+            \"node_count\": _count_accessibility_nodes(accessibility_tree),\n+            \"sha256\": _sha256_text(accessibility_tree_json)\n+            if accessibility_tree_json\n+            else None,\n+        },\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def _findings_from_axe_response(\n+    axe_response: dict[str, Any], scan_evidence: dict[str, Any]\n+) -> list[EngineFinding]:\n+    findings: list[EngineFinding] = []\n+    for violation in axe_response.get(\"violations\", []):\n+        impact = violation.get(\"impact\") or \"unknown\"\n+        nodes = violation.get(\"nodes\") or []\n+        wcag_refs = _extract_wcag_refs(violation.get(\"tags\") or [])\n+        confidence_score = _confidence_for_violation(impact=impact, node_count=len(nodes))\n+\n+        findings.append(\n+            EngineFinding(\n+                rule_id=violation.get(\"id\", \"unknown\"),\n+                severity=_SEVERITY_BY_AXE_IMPACT.get(impact, \"info\"),\n+                wcag_refs=wcag_refs,\n+                confidence_score=confidence_score,\n+                description=violation.get(\"description\") or violation.get(\"help\"),\n+                help_url=violation.get(\"helpUrl\"),\n+                evidence_metadata={\n+                    **scan_evidence,\n+                    \"axe_violation\": {\n+                        \"impact\": impact,\n+                        \"help\": violation.get(\"help\"),\n+                        \"help_url\": violation.get(\"helpUrl\"),\n+                        \"node_count\": len(nodes),\n+                        \"sample_targets\": _sample_node_targets(nodes),\n+                    },\n+                },\n+            )\n+        )\n+\n+    return findings\n+\n+\n+def _extract_wcag_refs(tags: list[str]) -> list[str]:\n+    return sorted({tag for tag in tags if tag.lower().startswith(\"wcag\")})\n+\n+\n+def _confidence_for_violation(*, impact: str, node_count: int) -> float:\n+    base = _CONFIDENCE_BY_AXE_IMPACT.get(impact, 0.5)\n+    if node_count >= 3:\n+        base += 0.03\n+    return min(base, 0.99)\n+\n+\n+def _sample_node_targets(nodes: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> list[list[str]]:\n+    targets: list[list[str]] = []\n+    for node in nodes[:5]:\n+        target = node.get(\"target\")\n+        if isinstance(target, list):\n+            targets.append([str(item) for item in target])\n+    return targets\n+\n+\n+def _count_accessibility_nodes(node: dict[str, Any] | None) -> int:\n+    if not node:\n+        return 0\n+    children = node.get(\"children\") or []\n+    return 1 + sum(_count_accessibility_nodes(child) for child in children)\n+\n+\n+def _json_dump(value: Any) -> str:\n+    return json.dumps(value, default=str, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True)\n+\n+\n+def _sha256_text(value: str) -> str:\n+    return hashlib.sha256(value.encode(\"utf-8\")).hexdigest()\ndiff --git a/app/workers/scan_worker.py Async Scan Flow\n \n-Run a scan for an existing lead:\n+Create a lead directly in the database while a public lead API does not exist yet:\n \n ```bash\n-curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/{lead_id}\n+docker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"INSERT INTO leads (id, domain, company_name) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'https://example.com', 'Example') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;\"\n+```\n+\n+Run a scan for the lead:\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111\n ```\n \n Expected immediate response:\n@@ -72,16 +80,47 @@ Expected immediate response:\n {\"scan_id\":\"<scan-id>\"}\n ```\n \n-The API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker then updates the scan lifecycle:\n+The API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker launches Playwright headless Chromium, loads the lead domain, runs axe-core, captures evidence metadata, and persists raw findings.\n+\n+Lifecycle:\n \n ```text\n-pending -> running -> done\n+pending -> running -> processing -> done\n+```\n+\n+If task execution fails, the worker marks the scan as `failed` and stores `error_message`.\n+\n+Inspect scan status and evidence metadata:\n+\n+```bash\n+docker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT id, status, error_message, evidence_metadata->>'current_url' AS current_url FROM scans;\"\n ```\n \n-If task execution fails, the worker marks the scan as `failed`.\n+Inspect stored findings:\n+\n+```bash\n+docker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT rule_id, severity, wcag_refs, confidence_score FROM findings;\"\n+```\n \n The worker process can also be started independently:\n \n ```bash\n celery -A app.core.celery worker --loglevel=info\n ```\n+\n+## Browser Configuration\n+\n+The worker defaults to Chromium and also installs Firefox:\n+\n+```text\n+BROWSER_NAME=chromium\n+BROWSER_HEADLESS=true\n+BROWSER_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS=30000\n+BROWSER_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=10000\n+BROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=1440\n+BROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=900\n+BROWSER_RETRIES=1\n+BROWSER_WAIT_UNTIL=networkidle\n+```\n+\n+WebKit is supported by configuration but is not installed in the default image.\ndiff --git a/app/core/browser_config.py b/app/core/browser_config.py\nnew file mode 100644\nindex 0000000..c30bbaa\n--- /dev/null\n+++ b/app/core/browser_config.py\n@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+\n+from app.core.config import settings\n+\n+SUPPORTED_BROWSERS = {\"chromium\", \"firefox\", \"webkit\"}\n+SUPPORTED_WAIT_UNTIL = {\"commit\", \"domcontentloaded\", \"load\", \"networkidle\"}\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class BrowserConfig:\n+    browser_name: str\n+    headless: bool\n+    navigation_timeout_ms: int\n+    action_timeout_ms: int\n+    viewport_width: int\n+    viewport_height: int\n+    retries: int\n+    wait_until: str\n+\n+\n+def get_browser_config() -> BrowserConfig:\n+    browser_name = settings.browser_name.lower().strip()\n+    if browser_name not in SUPPORTED_BROWSERS:\n+        raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported browser '{settings.browser_name}'\")\n+\n+    wait_until = settings.browser_wait_until.lower().strip()\n+    if wait_until not in SUPPORTED_WAIT_UNTIL:\n+        raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported wait strategy '{settings.browser_wait_until}'\")\n+\n+    return BrowserConfig(\n+        browser_name=browser_name,\n+        headless=settings.browser_headless,\n+        navigation_timeout_ms=settings.browser_navigation_timeout_ms,\n+        action_timeout_ms=settings.browser_action_timeout_ms,\n+        viewport_width=settings.browser_viewport_width,\n+
