> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/evidence-system",
>   "path": "app/evidence/storage.py",
>   "message": "Add evidence storage service",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport uuid\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\n\nfrom app.core.config import settings\nfrom app.evidence.hashing import sha256_bytes\nfrom app.evidence.storage_backend import (\n    EvidenceStorageBackend,\n    LocalFileStorageBackend,\n    S3StorageBackend,\n)\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass EvidenceArtifact:\n    type: str\n    content: bytes\n    content_type: str\n    extension: str\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass StoredEvidenceArtifact:\n    type: str\n    storage_backend: str\n    storage_path: str\n    hash: str\n    size_bytes: int\n    content_type: str\n\n\nclass EvidenceStorage:\n    def __init__(self, backend: EvidenceStorageBackend) -> None:\n        self.backend = backend\n\n    def store_artifact(\n        self,\n        *,\n        scan_id: str,\n        finding_id: str | None,\n        artifact: EvidenceArtifact,\n    ) -> StoredEvidenceArtifact:\n        artifact_hash = sha256_bytes(artifact.content)\n        storage_path = _build_storage_path(\n            scan_id=scan_id,\n            finding_id=finding_id,\n            artifact_type=artifact.type,\n            artifact_hash=artifact_hash,\n            extension=artifact.extension,\n        )\n        stored_object = self.backend.put_bytes(\n            storage_path=storage_path,\n            content=artifact.content,\n            content_type=artifact.content_type,\n        )\n\n        return StoredEvidenceArtifact(\n            type=artifact.type,\n            storage_backend=stored_object.backend,\n            storage_path=stored_object.storage_path,\n            hash=artifact_hash,\n            size_bytes=stored_object.size_bytes,\n            content_type=artifact.content_type,\n        )\n\n    def retrieve_artifact(self, *, storage_path: str) -> bytes:\n        return self.backend.get_bytes(storage_path=storage_path)\n\n\ndef get_evidence_storage() -> EvidenceStorage:\n    backend_name = settings.evidence_storage_backend.lower().strip()\n    if backend_name == \"local\":\n        backend = LocalFileStorageBackend(settings.evidence_local_root)\n    elif backend_name == \"s3\":\n        backend = S3StorageBackend(\n            bucket=settings.evidence_s3_bucket,\n            prefix=settings.evidence_s3_prefix,\n            endpoint_url=settings.evidence_s3_endpoint_url,\n            region_name=settings.evidence_s3_region,\n        )\n    else:\n        raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported evidence storage backend '{backend_name}'\")\n\n    return EvidenceStorage(backend)\n\n\ndef _build_storage_path(\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str | None,\n    artifact_type: str,\n    artifact_hash: str,\n    extension: str,\n) -> str:\n    captured_at = datetime.now(UTC).strftime(\"%Y%m%dT%H%M%S%fZ\")\n    scope = finding_id or \"global\"\n    object_id = uuid.uuid4().hex\n    clean_extension = extension.lstrip(\".\")\n    return (\n        f\"scans/{scan_id}/{scope}/{artifact_type}/\"\n        f\"{captured_at}-{artifact_hash[:16]}-{object_id}.{clean_extension}\"\n    )\n"
> }
> ```

> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/evidence-system",
>   "path": "app/models/evidence_bundle.py",
>   "message": "Add evidence bundle model",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport uuid\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import DateTime, ForeignKey, Integer, String, Text, UniqueConstraint, func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\n\n\nclass EvidenceBundle(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"evidence_bundles\"\n    __table_args__ = (\n        UniqueConstraint(\n            \"scan_id\",\n            \"finding_id\",\n            \"type\",\n            \"version\",\n            name=\"uq_evidence_bundle_scope_type_version\",\n        ),\n    )\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n    )\n    scan_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), ForeignKey(\"scans.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"), nullable=False, index=True\n    )\n    finding_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), ForeignKey(\"findings.id\", ondelete=\"SET NULL\"), nullable=True, index=True\n    )\n    type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(50), nullable=False, index=True)\n    storage_backend: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(40), nullable=False)\n    storage_path: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=False, unique=True)\n    content_type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(120), nullable=False)\n    size_bytes: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=False)\n    version: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=False)\n    hash: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=False, index=True)\n    previous_hash: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=True)\n    chain_hash: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=False, index=True)\n    fingerprint: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=True, index=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n    )\n\n    scan: Mapped[\"Scan\"] = relationship(\"Scan\")\n    finding: Mapped[\"Finding\"] = relationship(\"Finding\")\n"
> }
> ```

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/evidence-system",
>   "path": "app/services/evidence_service.py",
>   "message": "Add evidence persistence service",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.evidence.hashing import chain_hash, evidence_fingerprint\nfrom app.evidence.storage import EvidenceArtifact, get_evidence_storage\nfrom app.models import EvidenceBundle\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass EvidenceBundleSummary:\n    id: str\n    scan_id: str\n    finding_id: str | None\n    type: str\n    storage_backend: str\n    storage_path: str\n    content_type: str\n    size_bytes: int\n    version: int\n    hash: str\n    previous_hash: str | None\n    chain_hash: str\n    fingerprint: str | None\n    created_at: str\n\n    def as_dict(self) -> dict[str, int | str | None]:\n        return {\n            \"id\": self.id,\n            \"scan_id\": self.scan_id,\n            \"finding_id\": self.finding_id,\n            \"type\": self.type,\n            \"storage_backend\": self.storage_backend,\n            \"storage_path\": self.storage_path,\n            \"content_type\": self.content_type,\n            \"size_bytes\": self.size_bytes,\n            \"version\": self.version,\n            \"hash\": self.hash,\n            \"previous_hash\": self.previous_hash,\n            \"chain_hash\": self.chain_hash,\n            \"fingerprint\": self.fingerprint,\n            \"created_at\": self.created_at,\n        }\n\n\ndef persist_scan_evidence(\n    db: Session, *, scan_id: str, artifacts: list[EvidenceArtifact]\n) -> list[EvidenceBundle]:\n    return [\n        _store_bundle(db, scan_id=scan_id, finding_id=None, artifact=artifact)\n        for artifact in artifacts\n    ]\n\n\ndef persist_finding_evidence(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str,\n    artifacts: list[EvidenceArtifact],\n) -> list[EvidenceBundle]:\n    bundles = [\n        _store_bundle(db, scan_id=scan_id, finding_id=finding_id, artifact=artifact)\n        for artifact in artifacts\n    ]\n    fingerprint = evidence_fingerprint(\n        finding_id=finding_id, artifact_hashes=[bundle.hash for bundle in bundles]\n    )\n    for bundle in bundles:\n        bundle.fingerprint = fingerprint\n    db.flush()\n    return bundles\n\n\ndef list_scan_evidence(db: Session, scan_id: str) -> list[EvidenceBundleSummary]:\n    bundles = (\n        db.query(EvidenceBundle)\n        .filter(EvidenceBundle.scan_id == scan_id)\n        .order_by(EvidenceBundle.created_at.asc(), EvidenceBundle.id.asc())\n        .all()\n    )\n    return [_to_summary(bundle) for bundle in bundles]\n\n\ndef list_finding_evidence(db: Session, finding_id: str) -> list[EvidenceBundleSummary]:\n    bundles = (\n        db.query(EvidenceBundle)\n        .filter(EvidenceBundle.finding_id == finding_id)\n        .order_by(EvidenceBundle.created_at.asc(), EvidenceBundle.id.asc())\n        .all()\n    )\n    return [_to_summary(bundle) for bundle in bundles]\n\n\ndef _store_bundle(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str | None,\n    artifact: EvidenceArtifact,\n) -> EvidenceBundle:\n    stored_artifact = get_evidence_storage().store_artifact(\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        artifact=artifact,\n    )\n    version = _next_version(\n        db,\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        evidence_type=artifact.type,\n    )\n    previous_chain_hash = _latest_chain_hash(db, scan_id=scan_id)\n    bundle_chain_hash = chain_hash(\n        previous_chain_hash=previous_chain_hash,\n        artifact_hash=stored_artifact.hash,\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        evidence_type=artifact.type,\n        storage_path=stored_artifact.storage_path,\n        version=version,\n    )\n    bundle = EvidenceBundle(\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        type=artifact.type,\n        storage_backend=stored_artifact.storage_backend,\n        storage_path=stored_artifact.storage_path,\n        content_type=stored_artifact.content_type,\n        size_bytes=stored_artifact.size_bytes,\n        version=version,\n        hash=stored_artifact.hash,\n        previous_hash=previous_chain_hash,\n        chain_hash=bundle_chain_hash,\n    )\n    db.add(bundle)\n    db.flush()\n    return bundle\n\n\ndef _next_version(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str | None,\n    evidence_type: str,\n) -> int:\n    query = db.query(func.max(EvidenceBundle.version)).filter(\n        EvidenceBundle.scan_id == scan_id,\n        EvidenceBundle.type == evidence_type,\n    )\n    if finding_id is None:\n        query = query.filter(EvidenceBundle.finding_id.is_(None))\n    else:\n        query = query.filter(EvidenceBundle.finding_id == finding_id)\n    return (query.scalar() or 0) + 1\n\n\ndef _latest_chain_hash(db: Session, *, scan_id: str) -> str | None:\n    bundle = (\n        db.query(EvidenceBundle)\n        .filter(EvidenceBundle.scan_id == scan_id)\n        .order_by(EvidenceBundle.created_at.desc(), EvidenceBundle.id.desc())\n        .first()\n    )\n    return bundle.chain_hash if bundle else None\n\n\ndef _to_summary(bundle: EvidenceBundle) -> EvidenceBundleSummary:\n    return EvidenceBundleSummary(\n        id=bundle.id,\n        scan_id=bundle.scan_id,\n        finding_id=bundle.finding_id,\n        type=bundle.type,\n        storage_backend=bundle.storage_backend,\n        storage_path=bundle.storage_path,\n        content_type=bundle.content_type,\n        size_bytes=bundle.size_bytes,\n        version=bundle.version,\n        hash=bundle.hash,\n        previous_hash=bundle.previous_hash,\n        chain_hash=bundle.chain_hash,\n        fingerprint=bundle.fingerprint,\n        created_at=bundle.created_at.isoformat(),\n    )\n"
> }
> ```

> {

>   "message": "Add evidence storage settings",
>   "content": "from functools import lru_cache\n\nfrom pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict\n\n\nclass Settings(BaseSettings):\n    app_name: str = \"NorthAccessBFSG API\"\n    environment: str = \"development\"\n    database_url: str = (\n        \"postgresql+psycopg2://northaccess:northaccess@localhost:5432/northaccessbfsg\"\n    )\n    celery_broker_url: str = \"redis://localhost:6379/0\"\n    celery_result_backend: str = \"redis://localhost:6379/1\"\n    browser_name: str = \"chromium\"\n    browser_headless: bool = True\n    browser_navigation_timeout_ms: int = 30_000\n    browser_action_timeout_ms: int = 10_000\n    browser_viewport_width: int = 1440\n    browser_viewport_height: int = 900\n    browser_retries: int = 1\n    browser_wait_until: str = \"networkidle\"\n    evidence_storage_backend: str = \"local\"\n    evidence_local_root: str = \"/app/evidence-data\"\n    evidence_s3_bucket: str = \"\"\n    evidence_s3_prefix: str = \"northaccessbfsg/evidence\"\n    evidence_s3_endpoint_url: str = \"\"\n    evidence_s3_region: str = \"eu-central-1\"\n\n    model_config = SettingsConfigDict(\n        env_file=\".env\",\n        env_file_encoding=\"utf-8\",\n        extra=\"ignore\",\n    )\n\n\n@lru_cache\ndef get_settings() -> Settings:\n    return Settings()\n\n\nsettings = get_settings()\n"
> }
> ```

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/evidence-system",
>   "path": "app/db/init_db.py",
>   "sha": "b7be0d443669c65e1e9ebe6bc881739a8f10bfbe",
>   "message": "Initialize evidence bundle schema",
>   "content": "from sqlalchemy import text\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import engine\nfrom app.models import ComplianceFinding, EvidenceBundle, Finding, Lead, Scan  # noqa: F401\n\n_SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'processing'\",\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'failed'\",\n)\n\n_SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS started_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_message TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n_FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS help_url VARCHAR(500)\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wcag_refs JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence_score DOUBLE PRECISION\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n\ndef init_db() -> None:\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n    _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema()\n    _ensure_finding_evidence_schema()\n\n\ndef _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.connect() as connection:\n        autocommit_connection = connection.execution_options(isolation_level=\"AUTOCOMMIT\")\n        for statement in _SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES:\n            autocommit_connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n\ndef _ensure_finding_evidence_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n"
> }
> ```

>   "content": "services:\n  api:\n    build: .\n    environment:\n      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+psycopg2://northaccess:northaccess@db:5432/northaccessbfsg\n      ENVIRONMENT: development\n      CELERY_BROKER_URL: redis://redis:6379/0\n      CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND: redis://redis:6379/1\n      EVIDENCE_STORAGE_BACKEND: local\n      EVIDENCE_LOCAL_ROOT: /app/evidence-data\n    ports:\n      - \"8000:8000\"\n    volumes:\n      - evidence_data:/app/evidence-data\n    depends_on:\n      db:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n\n  worker:\n    build: .\n    command: celery -A app.core.celery worker --loglevel=info\n    shm_size: \"1gb\"\n    environment:\n      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+psycopg2://northaccess:northaccess@db:5432/northaccessbfsg\n      ENVIRONMENT: development\n      CELERY_BROKER_URL: redis://redis:6379/0\n      CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND: redis://redis:6379/1\n      BROWSER_NAME: chromium\n      BROWSER_HEADLESS: \"true\"\n      BROWSER_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS: 30000\n      BROWSER_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS: 10000\n      BROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH: 1440\n      BROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT: 900\n      BROWSER_RETRIES: 1\n      BROWSER_WAIT_UNTIL: networkidle\n      EVIDENCE_STORAGE_BACKEND: local\n      EVIDENCE_LOCAL_ROOT: /app/evidence-data\n    volumes:\n      - evidence_data:/app/evidence-data\n    depends_on:\n      db:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n\n  db:\n    image: postgres:16-alpine\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_USER: northaccess\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: northaccess\n      POSTGRES_DB: northaccessbfsg\n    ports:\n      - \"5432:5432\"\n    volumes:\n      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg\"]\n      interval: 5s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 10\n\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7-alpine\n    ports:\n      - \"6379:6379\"\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"redis-cli\", \"ping\"]\n      interval: 5s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 10\n\nvolumes:\n  postgres_data:\n  evidence_data:\n"
> }

>
> Als Nächstes hänge ich Evidence-Hooks an die bestehende Browser-Engine: Screenshot, DOM und Accessibility Tree werden als Artefakte zurückgegeben; der Worker entscheidet danach über Persistenz und DB-Verknüpfung.
>
> <details><summary>Called 1 tool</summary>
>
> MCP tool call
>
> codex_apps.github_update_file
>
> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/evidence-system",
>   "path": "app/workers/playwright_engine.py",
>   "sha": "eb98ee3584cd92979599986eb9c0aafd83403dc3",
>   "message": "Return raw evidence artifacts from Playwright scans",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport hashlib\nimport json\nimport time\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom urllib.parse import urlparse\n\nfrom axe_playwright_python.sync_playwright import Axe\nfrom playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright\n\nfrom app.core.browser_config import BrowserConfig, get_browser_config\nfrom app.evidence.storage import EvidenceArtifact\n\n_SEVERITY_BY_AXE_IMPACT = {\n    \"critical\": \"critical\",\n    \"serious\": \"high\",\n    \"moderate\": \"medium\",\n    \"minor\": \"low\",\n}\n_CONFIDENCE_BY_AXE_IMPACT = {\n    \"critical\": 0.95,\n    \"serious\": 0.9,\n    \"moderate\": 0.8,\n    \"minor\": 0.65,\n}\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass EngineFinding:\n    rule_id: str\n    severity: str\n    wcag_refs: list[str]\n    confidence_score: float\n    description: str | None\n    help_url: str | None\n    evidence_metadata: dict[str, Any]\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass PlaywrightScanResult:\n    target_url: str\n    current_url: str\n    captured_at: str\n    evidence_metadata: dict[str, Any]\n    evidence_artifacts: list[EvidenceArtifact]\n    findings: list[EngineFinding]\n\n\ndef run_accessibility_scan(domain: str) -> PlaywrightScanResult:\n    config = get_browser_config()\n    target_url = normalize_target_url(domain)\n    last_error: Exception | None = None\n\n    for attempt in range(config.retries + 1):\n        try:\n            return _run_once(target_url=target_url, config=config, attempt=attempt)\n        except Exception as exc:\n            last_error = exc\n            if attempt < config.retries:\n                time.sleep(min(2**attempt, 5))\n\n    raise RuntimeError(f\"Playwright scan failed for {target_url}\") from last_error\n\n\ndef normalize_target_url(domain: str) -> str:\n    candidate = domain.strip()\n    parsed = urlparse(candidate)\n    if parsed.scheme:\n        return candidate\n    return f\"https://{candidate}\"\n\n\ndef _run_once(\n    target_url: str, config: BrowserConfig, attempt: int\n) -> PlaywrightScanResult:\n    captured_at = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()\n\n    with sync_playwright() as playwright:\n        browser_type = getattr(playwright, config.browser_name)\n        launch_args = [\"--no-sandbox\"] if config.browser_name == \"chromium\" else []\n        browser = browser_type.launch(headless=config.headless, args=launch_args)\n        try:\n            context = browser.new_context(\n                viewport={\n                    \"width\": config.viewport_width,\n                    \"height\": config.viewport_height,\n                }\n            )\n            context.set_default_timeout(config.action_timeout_ms)\n            context.set_default_navigation_timeout(config.navigation_timeout_ms)\n\n            page = context.new_page()\n            page.goto(\n                target_url,\n                wait_until=config.wait_until,\n                timeout=config.navigation_timeout_ms,\n            )\n\n            axe_response = Axe().run(page).response\n            dom_snapshot = page.content()\n            screenshot_bytes = page.screenshot(full_page=True)\n            accessibility_tree = _capture_accessibility_tree(page)\n            accessibility_tree_json = _json_dump(accessibility_tree)\n            current_url = page.url\n            evidence_artifacts = [\n                EvidenceArtifact(\n                    type=\"screenshot\",\n                    content=screenshot_bytes,\n                    content_type=\"image/png\",\n                    extension=\"png\",\n                ),\n                EvidenceArtifact(\n                    type=\"dom\",\n                    content=dom_snapshot.encode(\"utf-8\"),\n                    content_type=\"text/html; charset=utf-8\",\n                    extension=\"html\",\n                ),\n                EvidenceArtifact(\n                    type=\"a11y_tree\",\n                    content=accessibility_tree_json.encode(\"utf-8\"),\n                    content_type=\"application/json\",\n                    extension=\"json\",\n                ),\n            ]\n            evidence_metadata = _build_scan_evidence_metadata(\n                accessibility_tree=accessibility_tree,\n                accessibility_tree_json=accessibility_tree_json,\n                axe_response=axe_response,\n                captured_at=captured_at,\n                config=config,\n                current_url=current_url,\n                dom_snapshot=dom_snapshot,\n                screenshot_bytes=screenshot_bytes,\n                target_url=target_url,\n                attempt=attempt,\n            )\n            findings = _findings_from_axe_response(axe_response, evidence_metadata)\n\n            return PlaywrightScanResult(\n                target_url=target_url,\n                current_url=current_url,\n                captured_at=captured_at,\n                evidence_metadata=evidence_metadata,\n                evidence_artifacts=evidence_artifacts,\n                findings=findings,\n            )\n        finally:\n            browser.close()\n\n\ndef _capture_accessibility_tree(page) -> dict[str, Any] | None:\n    try:\n        return page.accessibility.snapshot(interesting_only=False)\n    except Exception:\n        return None\n\n\ndef _build_scan_evidence_metadata(\n    *,\n    accessibility_tree: dict[str, Any] | None,\n    accessibility_tree_json: str,\n    axe_response: dict[str, Any],\n    captured_at: str,\n    config: BrowserConfig,\n    current_url: str,\n    dom_snapshot: str,\n    screenshot_bytes: bytes,\n    target_url: str,\n    attempt: int,\n) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"target_url\": target_url,\n        \"current_url\": current_url,\n        \"captured_at\": captured_at,\n        \"browser\": {\n            \"name\": config.browser_name,\n            \"headless\": config.headless,\n            \"viewport\": {\n                \"width\": config.viewport_width,\n                \"height\": config.viewport_height,\n            },\n            \"navigation_timeout_ms\": config.navigation_timeout_ms,\n            \"attempt\": attempt + 1,\n        },\n        \"axe\": {\n            \"violations_count\": len(axe_response.get(\"violations\", [])),\n            \"passes_count\": len(axe_response.get(\"passes\", [])),\n            \"incomplete_count\": len(axe_response.get(\"incomplete\", [])),\n            \"inapplicable_count\": len(axe_response.get(\"inapplicable\", [])),\n        },\n        \"screenshot\": {\n            \"storage\": \"pending\",\n            \"full_page\": True,\n            \"byte_count\": len(screenshot_bytes),\n            \"sha256\": hashlib.sha256(screenshot_bytes).hexdigest(),\n        },\n        \"dom_snapshot\": {\n            \"storage\": \"pending\",\n            \"char_count\": len(dom_snapshot),\n            \"sha256\": _sha256_text(dom_snapshot),\n        },\n        \"accessibility_tree\": {\n            \"storage\": \"pending\",\n            \"available\": accessibility_tree is not None,\n            \"node_count\": _count_accessibility_nodes(accessibility_tree),\n            \"sha256\": _sha256_text(accessibility_tree_json),\n        },\n    }\n\n\ndef _findings_from_axe_response(\n    axe_response: dict[str, Any], scan_evidence: dict[str, Any]\n) -> list[EngineFinding]:\n    findings: list[EngineFinding] = []\n    for violation in axe_response.get(\"violations\", []):\n        impact = violation.get(\"impact\") or \"unknown\"\n        nodes = violation.get(\"nodes\") or []\n        wcag_refs = _extract_wcag_refs(violation.get(\"tags\") or [])\n        confidence_score = _confidence_for_violation(impact=impact, node_count=len(nodes))\n\n        findings.append(\n            EngineFinding(\n                rule_id=violation.get(\"id\", \"unknown\"),\n                severity=_SEVERITY_BY_AXE_IMPACT.get(impact, \"info\"),\n                wcag_refs=wcag_refs,\n                confidence_score=confidence_score,\n                description=violation.get(\"description\") or violation.get(\"help\"),\n                help_url=violation.get(\"helpUrl\"),\n                evidence_metadata={\n                    **scan_evidence,\n                    \"axe_violation\": {\n                        \"impact\": impact,\n                        \"help\": violation.get(\"help\"),\n                        \"help_url\": violation.get(\"helpUrl\"),\n                        \"node_count\": len(nodes),\n                        \"sample_targets\": _sample_node_targets(nodes),\n                    },\n                },\n            )\n        )\n\n    return findings\n\n\ndef _extract_wcag_refs(tags: list[str]) -> list[str]:\n    return sorted({tag for tag in tags if tag.lower().startswith(\"wcag\")})\n\n\ndef _confidence_for_violation(*, impact: str, node_count: int) -> float:\n    base = _CONFIDENCE_BY_AXE_IMPACT.get(impact, 0.5)\n    if node_count >= 3:\n        base += 0.03\n    return min(base, 0.99)\n\n\ndef _sample_node_targets(nodes: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> list[list[str]]:\n    targets: list[list[str]] = []\n    for node in nodes[:5]:\n        target = node.get(\"target\")\n        if isinstance(target, list):\n            targets.append([str(item) for item in target])\n    return targets\n\n\ndef _count_accessibility_nodes(node: dict[str, Any] | None) -> int:\n    if not node:\n        return 0\n    children = node.get(\"children\") or []\n    return 1 + sum(_count_accessibility_nodes(child) for child in children)\n\n\ndef _json_dump(value: Any) -> str:\n    return json.dumps(value, default=str, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True)\n\n\ndef _sha256_text(value: str) -> str:\n    return hashlib.sha256(value.encode(\"utf-8\")).hexdigest()\n"
> }
> ```

>
> Ich optimiere die Verknüpfung: Artefakte werden pro Scan einmal gespeichert, Findings bekommen eigene append-only EvidenceBundle-Referenzen auf dieselben unveränderlichen Objekte. So erfüllt jedes Finding die Evidence-Link-Regel, ohne Screenshots/DOM unnötig pro Violation zu duplizieren.
>
> <details><summary>Called 14 tools</summary>
>
> MCP tool call
>
> codex_apps.github_fetch_file
>
> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "path": "app/services/evidence_service.py",
>   "ref": "codex/evidence-system",
>   "encoding": "utf-8"
> }
> ```
>
> ```text
> {"content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.evidence.hashing import chain_hash, evidence_fingerprint\nfrom app.evidence.storage import EvidenceArtifact, get_evidence_storage\nfrom app.models import EvidenceBundle\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass EvidenceBundleSummary:\n    id: str\n    scan_id: str\n    finding_id: str | None\n    type: str\n    storage_backend: str\n    storage_path: str\n    content_type: str\n    size_bytes: int\n    version: int\n    hash: str\n    previous_hash: str | None\n    chain_hash: str\n    fingerprint: str | None\n    created_at: str\n\n    def as_dict(self) -> dict[str, int | str | None]:\n        return {\n            \"id\": self.id,\n            \"scan_id\": self.scan_id,\n            \"finding_id\": self.finding_id,\n            \"type\": self.type,\n            \"storage_backend\": self.storage_backend,\n            \"storage_path\": self.storage_path,\n            \"content_type\": self.content_type,\n            \"size_bytes\": self.size_bytes,\n            \"version\": self.version,\n            \"hash\": self.hash,\n            \"previous_hash\": self.previous_hash,\n            \"chain_hash\": self.chain_hash,\n            \"fingerprint\": self.fingerprint,\n            \"created_at\": self.created_at,\n        }\n\n\ndef persist_scan_evidence(\n    db: Session, *, scan_id: str, artifacts: list[EvidenceArtifact]\n) -> list[EvidenceBundle]:\n    return [\n        _store_bundle(db, scan_id=scan_id, finding_id=None, artifact=artifact)\n        for artifact in artifacts\n    ]\n\n\ndef persist_finding_evidence(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str,\n    artifacts: list[EvidenceArtifact],\n) -> list[EvidenceBundle]:\n    bundles = [\n        _store_bundle(db, scan_id=scan_id, finding_id=finding_id, artifact=artifact)\n        for artifact in artifacts\n    ]\n    fingerprint = evidence_fingerprint(\n        finding_id=finding_id, artifact_hashes=[bundle.hash for bundle in bundles]\n    )\n    for bundle in bundles:\n        bundle.fingerprint = fingerprint\n    db.flush()\n    return bundles\n\n\ndef list_scan_evidence(db: Session, scan_id: str) -> list[EvidenceBundleSummary]:\n    bundles = (\n        db.query(EvidenceBundle)\n        .filter(EvidenceBundle.scan_id == scan_id)\n        .order_by(EvidenceBundle.created_at.asc(), EvidenceBundle.id.asc())\n        .all()\n    )\n    return [_to_summary(bundle) for bundle in bundles]\n\n\ndef list_finding_evidence(db: Session, finding_id: str) -> list[EvidenceBundleSummary]:\n    bundles = (\n        db.query(EvidenceBundle)\n        .filter(EvidenceBundle.finding_id == finding_id)\n        .order_by(EvidenceBundle.created_at.asc(), EvidenceBundle.id.asc())\n        .all()\n    )\n    return [_to_summary(bundle) for bundle in bundles]\n\n\ndef _store_bundle(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str | None,\n    artifact: EvidenceArtifact,\n) -> EvidenceBundle:\n    stored_artifact = get_evidence_storage().store_artifact(\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        artifact=artifact,\n    )\n    version = _next_version(\n        db,\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        evidence_type=artifact.type,\n    )\n    previous_chain_hash = _latest_chain_hash(db, scan_id=scan_id)\n    bundle_chain_hash = chain_hash(\n        previous_chain_hash=previous_chain_hash,\n        artifact_hash=stored_artifact.hash,\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        evidence_type=artifact.type,\n        storage_path=stored_artifact.storage_path,\n        version=version,\n    )\n    bundle = EvidenceBundle(\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        type=artifact.type,\n        storage_backend=stored_artifact.storage_backend,\n        storage_path=stored_artifact.storage_path,\n        content_type=stored_artifact.content_type,\n        size_bytes=stored_artifact.size_bytes,\n        version=version,\n        hash=stored_artifact.hash,\n        previous_hash=previous_chain_hash,\n        chain_hash=bundle_chain_hash,\n    )\n    db.add(bundle)\n    db.flush()\n    return bundle\n\n\ndef _next_version(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str | None,\n    evidence_type: str,\n) -> int:\n    query = db.query(func.max(EvidenceBundle.version)).filter(\n        EvidenceBundle.scan_id == scan_id,\n        EvidenceBundle.type == evidence_type,\n    )\n    if finding_id is None:\n        query = query.filter(EvidenceBundle.finding_id.is_(None))\n    else:\n        query = query.filter(EvidenceBundle.finding_id == finding_id)\n    return (query.scalar() or 0) + 1\n\n\ndef _latest_chain_hash(db: Session, *, scan_id: str) -> str | None:\n    bundle = (\n        db.query(EvidenceBundle)\n        .filter(EvidenceBundle.scan_id == scan_id)\n        .order_by(EvidenceBundle.created_at.desc(), EvidenceBundle.id.desc())\n        .first()\n    )\n    return bundle.chain_hash if bundle else None\n\n\ndef _to_summary(bundle: EvidenceBundle) -> EvidenceBundleSummary:\n    return EvidenceBundleSummary(\n        id=bundle.id,\n        scan_id=bundle.scan_id,\n        finding_id=bundle.finding_id,\n        type=bundle.type,\n        storage_backend=bundle.storage_backend,\n        storage_path=bundle.storage_path,\n        content_type=bundle.content_type,\n        size_bytes=bundle.size_bytes,\n        version=bundle.version,\n        hash=bundle.hash,\n        previous_hash=bundle.previous_hash,\n        chain_hash=bundle.chain_hash,\n        fingerprint=bundle.fingerprint,\n        created_at=bundle.created_at.isoformat(),\n    )\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "ccd4de52dce1bae8395e73edb134346887602d6c", "display_url": > ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/evidence-system",
>   "path": "app/services/evidence_service.py",
>   "sha": "ccd4de52dce1bae8395e73edb134346887602d6c",
>   "message": "Reference scan evidence from findings",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.evidence.hashing import chain_hash, evidence_fingerprint\nfrom app.evidence.storage import EvidenceArtifact, StoredEvidenceArtifact, get_evidence_storage\nfrom app.models import EvidenceBundle\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass EvidenceBundleSummary:\n    id: str\n    scan_id: str\n    finding_id: str | None\n    type: str\n    storage_backend: str\n    storage_path: str\n    content_type: str\n    size_bytes: int\n    version: int\n    hash: str\n    previous_hash: str | None\n    chain_hash: str\n    fingerprint: str | None\n    created_at: str\n\n    def as_dict(self) -> dict[str, int | str | None]:\n        return {\n            \"id\": self.id,\n            \"scan_id\": self.scan_id,\n            \"finding_id\": self.finding_id,\n            \"type\": self.type,\n            \"storage_backend\": self.storage_backend,\n            \"storage_path\": self.storage_path,\n            \"content_type\": self.content_type,\n            \"size_bytes\": self.size_bytes,\n            \"version\": self.version,\n            \"hash\": self.hash,\n            \"previous_hash\": self.previous_hash,\n            \"chain_hash\": self.chain_hash,\n            \"fingerprint\": self.fingerprint,\n            \"created_at\": self.created_at,\n        }\n\n\ndef persist_scan_evidence(\n    db: Session, *, scan_id: str, artifacts: list[EvidenceArtifact]\n) -> list[EvidenceBundle]:\n    return [\n        _store_bundle(db, scan_id=scan_id, finding_id=None, artifact=artifact)\n        for artifact in artifacts\n    ]\n\n\ndef persist_finding_evidence_refs(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str,\n    source_bundles: list[EvidenceBundle],\n) -> list[EvidenceBundle]:\n    bundles = [\n        _create_reference_bundle(\n            db,\n            scan_id=scan_id,\n            finding_id=finding_id,\n            source_bundle=source_bundle,\n        )\n        for source_bundle in source_bundles\n    ]\n    fingerprint = evidence_fingerprint(\n        finding_id=finding_id, artifact_hashes=[bundle.hash for bundle in bundles]\n    )\n    for bundle in bundles:\n        bundle.fingerprint = fingerprint\n    db.flush()\n    return bundles\n\n\ndef list_scan_evidence(db: Session, scan_id: str) -> list[EvidenceBundleSummary]:\n    bundles = (\n        db.query(EvidenceBundle)\n        .filter(EvidenceBundle.scan_id == scan_id)\n        .order_by(EvidenceBundle.created_at.asc(), EvidenceBundle.id.asc())\n        .all()\n    )\n    return [_to_summary(bundle) for bundle in bundles]\n\n\ndef list_finding_evidence(db: Session, finding_id: str) -> list[EvidenceBundleSummary]:\n    bundles = (\n        db.query(EvidenceBundle)\n        .filter(EvidenceBundle.finding_id == finding_id)\n        .order_by(EvidenceBundle.created_at.asc(), EvidenceBundle.id.asc())\n        .all()\n    )\n    return [_to_summary(bundle) for bundle in bundles]\n\n\ndef _store_bundle(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str | None,\n    artifact: EvidenceArtifact,\n) -> EvidenceBundle:\n    stored_artifact = get_evidence_storage().store_artifact(\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        artifact=artifact,\n    )\n    return _create_bundle_from_stored_artifact(\n        db,\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        stored_artifact=stored_artifact,\n    )\n\n\ndef _create_reference_bundle(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str,\n    source_bundle: EvidenceBundle,\n) -> EvidenceBundle:\n    stored_artifact = StoredEvidenceArtifact(\n        type=source_bundle.type,\n        storage_backend=source_bundle.storage_backend,\n        storage_path=source_bundle.storage_path,\n        hash=source_bundle.hash,\n        size_bytes=source_bundle.size_bytes,\n        content_type=source_bundle.content_type,\n    )\n    return _create_bundle_from_stored_artifact(\n        db,\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        stored_artifact=stored_artifact,\n    )\n\n\ndef _create_bundle_from_stored_artifact(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str | None,\n    stored_artifact: StoredEvidenceArtifact,\n) -> EvidenceBundle:\n    version = _next_version(\n        db,\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        evidence_type=stored_artifact.type,\n    )\n    previous_chain_hash = _latest_chain_hash(db, scan_id=scan_id)\n    bundle_chain_hash = chain_hash(\n        previous_chain_hash=previous_chain_hash,\n        artifact_hash=stored_artifact.hash,\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        evidence_type=stored_artifact.type,\n        storage_path=stored_artifact.storage_path,\n        version=version,\n    )\n    bundle = EvidenceBundle(\n        scan_id=scan_id,\n        finding_id=finding_id,\n        type=stored_artifact.type,\n        storage_backend=stored_artifact.storage_backend,\n        storage_path=stored_artifact.storage_path,\n        content_type=stored_artifact.content_type,\n        size_bytes=stored_artifact.size_bytes,\n        version=version,\n        hash=stored_artifact.hash,\n        previous_hash=previous_chain_hash,\n        chain_hash=bundle_chain_hash,\n    )\n    db.add(bundle)\n    db.flush()\n    return bundle\n\n\ndef _next_version(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str | None,\n    evidence_type: str,\n) -> int:\n    query = db.query(func.max(EvidenceBundle.version)).filter(\n        EvidenceBundle.scan_id == scan_id,\n        EvidenceBundle.type == evidence_type,\n    )\n    if finding_id is None:\n        query = query.filter(EvidenceBundle.finding_id.is_(None))\n    else:\n        query = query.filter(EvidenceBundle.finding_id == finding_id)\n    return (query.scalar() or 0) + 1\n\n\ndef _latest_chain_hash(db: Session, *, scan_id: str) -> str | None:\n    bundle = (\n        db.query(EvidenceBundle)\n        .filter(EvidenceBundle.scan_id == scan_id)\n        .order_by(EvidenceBundle.created_at.desc(), EvidenceBundle.id.desc())\n        .first()\n    )\n    return bundle.chain_hash if bundle else None\n\n\ndef _to_summary(bundle: EvidenceBundle) -> EvidenceBundleSummary:\n    return EvidenceBundleSummary(\n        id=bundle.id,\n        scan_id=bundle.scan_id,\n        finding_id=bundle.finding_id,\n        type=bundle.type,\n        storage_backend=bundle.storage_backend,\n        storage_path=bundle.storage_path,\n        content_type=bundle.content_type,\n        size_bytes=bundle.size_bytes,\n        version=bundle.version,\n        hash=bundle.hash,\n        previous_hash=bundle.previous_hash,\n        chain_hash=bundle.chain_hash,\n        fingerprint=bundle.fingerprint,\n        created_at=bundle.created_at.isoformat(),\n    )\n"
> }

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/evidence-system",
>   "path": "app/workers/scan_worker.py",
>   "sha": "7c43dfcfd65d3d4ff377bbe625db8e23c7366a3b",
>   "message": "Persist evidence bundles from scan worker",
>   "content": "import logging\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.core.celery import celery_app\nfrom app.db.session import SessionLocal\nfrom app.models import EvidenceBundle, Finding, Scan, ScanStatus\nfrom app.services.evidence_service import persist_finding_evidence_refs, persist_scan_evidence\nfrom app.workers.playwright_engine import PlaywrightScanResult, run_accessibility_scan\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n_MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH = 4000\n\n\n@celery_app.task(name=\"app.workers.scan_worker.run_scan\")\ndef run_scan_task(scan_id: str) -> str:\n    db = SessionLocal()\n    try:\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s was not found; skipping task\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        domain = scan.lead.domain\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.running\n        scan.started_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n        scan.completed_at = None\n        scan.failed_at = None\n        scan.error_message = None\n        scan.evidence_metadata = {}\n        db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\"Started Playwright accessibility scan %s for %s\", scan_id, domain)\n        scan_result = run_accessibility_scan(domain)\n\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s disappeared before persistence\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.processing\n        global_evidence_bundles = persist_scan_evidence(\n            db, scan_id=scan_id, artifacts=scan_result.evidence_artifacts\n        )\n        scan.evidence_metadata = _with_evidence_bundle_metadata(\n            scan_result.evidence_metadata, global_evidence_bundles\n        )\n        db.commit()\n\n        _persist_findings(\n            db,\n            scan_id=scan_id,\n            scan_result=scan_result,\n            source_evidence_bundles=global_evidence_bundles,\n        )\n\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is not None:\n            scan.status = ScanStatus.done\n            scan.completed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n            scan.error_message = None\n            db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\n            \"Completed Playwright accessibility scan %s with %s findings\",\n            scan_id,\n            len(scan_result.findings),\n        )\n        return scan_id\n    except Exception as exc:\n        db.rollback()\n        _mark_scan_failed(db, scan_id, exc)\n        logger.exception(\"Scan task %s failed\", scan_id)\n        raise\n    finally:\n        db.close()\n\n\ndef _persist_findings(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    scan_result: PlaywrightScanResult,\n    source_evidence_bundles: list[EvidenceBundle],\n) -> None:\n    db.query(Finding).filter(Finding.scan_id == scan_id).delete(synchronize_session=False)\n    db.flush()\n\n    for engine_finding in scan_result.findings:\n        finding = Finding(\n            scan_id=scan_id,\n            rule_id=engine_finding.rule_id,\n            severity=engine_finding.severity,\n            description=engine_finding.description,\n            help_url=engine_finding.help_url,\n            wcag_refs=engine_finding.wcag_refs,\n            confidence_score=engine_finding.confidence_score,\n            evidence_metadata=engine_finding.evidence_metadata,\n        )\n        db.add(finding)\n        db.flush()\n\n        finding_evidence_bundles = persist_finding_evidence_refs(\n            db,\n            scan_id=scan_id,\n            finding_id=finding.id,\n            source_bundles=source_evidence_bundles,\n        )\n        finding.evidence_metadata = _with_evidence_bundle_metadata(\n            engine_finding.evidence_metadata, finding_evidence_bundles\n        )\n\n    db.commit()\n\n\ndef _with_evidence_bundle_metadata(\n    metadata: dict[str, Any], bundles: list[EvidenceBundle]\n) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        **metadata,\n        \"evidence_bundles\": [\n            {\n                \"id\": bundle.id,\n                \"type\": bundle.type,\n                \"storage_backend\": bundle.storage_backend,\n                \"storage_path\": bundle.storage_path,\n                \"content_type\": bundle.content_type,\n                \"size_bytes\": bundle.size_bytes,\n                \"version\": bundle.version,\n                \"hash\": bundle.hash,\n                \"previous_hash\": bundle.previous_hash,\n                \"chain_hash\": bundle.chain_hash,\n                \"fingerprint\": bundle.fingerprint,\n            }\n            for bundle in bundles\n        ],\n    }\n\n\ndef _mark_scan_failed(db: Session, scan_id: str, error: Exception) -> None:\n    scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n    if scan is None:\n        return\n\n    scan.status = ScanStatus.failed\n    scan.failed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n    scan.error_message = str(error)[:_MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH]\n    db.commit()\n"
> }
> ```

>
> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/evidence-system",
>   "path": "app/api/evidence.py",
>   "message": "Add evidence metadata API endpoints",
>   "content": "from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.db.session import get_db\nfrom app.models import Finding, Scan\nfrom app.services.evidence_service import list_finding_evidence, list_scan_evidence\n\nrouter = APIRouter(prefix=\"/evidence\", tags=[\"evidence\"])\n\n\n@router.get(\"/scan/{scan_id}\")\ndef get_scan_evidence(scan_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    if db.get(Scan, scan_id) is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Scan not found\"\n        )\n\n    evidence = [bundle.as_dict() for bundle in list_scan_evidence(db, scan_id)]\n    return {\"scan_id\": scan_id, \"evidence\": evidence}\n\n\n@router.get(\"/finding/{finding_id}\")\ndef get_finding_evidence(finding_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    if db.get(Finding, finding_id) is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Finding not found\"\n        )\n\n    evidence = [bundle.as_dict() for bundle in list_finding_evidence(db, finding_id)]\n    return {\"finding_id\": finding_id, \"evidence\": evidence}\n"
> }
> ```
>

> ```

> codex_apps.github_update_file
>
> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/evidence-system",
>   "path": "app/main.py",
>   "sha": "4c27566e19b41834b2fe917328b60161fb97a45d",
>   "message": "Register evidence API router",
>   "content": "from collections.abc import AsyncIterator\nfrom contextlib import asynccontextmanager\n\nfrom fastapi import FastAPI\n\nfrom app.api.compliance import router as compliance_router\nfrom app.api.evidence import router as evidence_router\nfrom app.api.health import router as health_router\nfrom app.api.scans import router as scans_router\nfrom app.core.config import settings\nfrom app.db.init_db import init_db\n\n\n@asynccontextmanager\nasync def lifespan(app: FastAPI) -> AsyncIterator[None]:\n    init_db()\n    yield\n\n\napp = FastAPI(\n    title=settings.app_name,\n    version=\"0.1.0\",\n    lifespan=lifespan,\n)\n\napp.include_router(health_router)\napp.include_router(scans_router)\napp.include_router(compliance_router)\napp.include_router(evidence_router)\n"
> }
> ```
>

> {"commit_sha": "59a76fef9029fd1892c00bc687b82a59461d2bc9"}
> ```
>

> ```text
> {"content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom abc import ABC, abstractmethod\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass StoredObject:\n    backend: str\n    storage_path: str\n    size_bytes: int\n\n\nclass EvidenceStorageBackend(ABC):\n    name: str\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def put_bytes(self, *, storage_path: str, content: bytes, content_type: str) -> StoredObject:\n        pass\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def get_bytes(self, *, storage_path: str) -> bytes:\n        pass\n\n\nclass LocalFileStorageBackend(EvidenceStorageBackend):\n    name = \"local\"\n\n    def __init__(self, root_path: str) -> None:\n        self.root_path = Path(root_path)\n\n    def put_bytes(self, *, storage_path: str, content: bytes, content_type: str) -> StoredObject:\n        destination = self._resolve(storage_path)\n        destination.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n        if destination.exists():\n            raise FileExistsError(f\"Evidence object already exists: {storage_path}\")\n\n        destination.write_bytes(content)\n        return StoredObject(\n            backend=self.name,\n            storage_path=storage_path,\n            size_bytes=len(content),\n        )\n\n    def get_bytes(self, *, storage_path: str) -> bytes:\n        return self._resolve(storage_path).read_bytes()\n\n    def _resolve(self, storage_path: str) -> Path:\n        relative_path = Path(storage_path)\n        if relative_path.is_absolute() or \"..\" in relative_path.parts:\n            raise ValueError(\"Evidence storage path must be relative\")\n        return self.root_path / relative_path\n\n\nclass S3StorageBackend(EvidenceStorageBackend):\n    name = \"s3\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        *,\n        bucket: str,\n        prefix: str = \"\",\n        endpoint_url: str | None = None,\n        region_name: str | None = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        if not bucket:\n            raise ValueError(\"S3 evidence storage requires a bucket\")\n\n        import boto3\n\n        self.bucket = bucket\n        self.prefix = prefix.strip(\"/\")\n        self.client = boto3.client(\n            \"s3\", endpoint_url=endpoint_url or None, region_name=region_name or None\n        )\n\n    def put_bytes(self, *, storage_path: str, content: bytes, content_type: str) -> StoredObject:\n        key = self._key(storage_path)\n        try:\n            self.client.head_object(Bucket=self.bucket, Key=key)\n        except self.client.exceptions.ClientError as exc:\n            status_code = exc.response.get(\"ResponseMetadata\", {}).get(\"HTTPStatusCode\")\n            if status_code != 404:\n                raise\n        else:\n            raise FileExistsError(f\"Evidence object already exists: {storage_path}\")\n\n        self.client.put_object(\n            Bucket=self.bucket,\n            Key=key,\n            Body=content,\n            ContentType=content_type,\n            Metadata={\"immutable\": \"true\"},\n        )\n        return StoredObject(\n            backend=self.name,\n            storage_path=f\"s3://{self.bucket}/{key}\",\n            size_bytes=len(content),\n        )\n\n    def get_bytes(self, *, storage_path: str) -> bytes:\n        key = storage_path\n        prefix = f\"s3://{self.bucket}/\"\n        if storage_path.startswith(prefix):\n            key = storage_path[len(prefix) :]\n\n        response = self.client.get_object(Bucket=self.bucket, Key=key)\n        return response[\"Body\"].read()\n\n    def _key(self, storage_path: str) -> str:\n        clean_path = storage_path.strip(\"/\")\n        if self.prefix:\n            return f\"{self.prefix}/{clean_path}\"\n        return clean_path\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "4a95c662cb876e6ecc1a1f386d2f6f1f1683934c", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/evidence-system/app/evidence/storage_backend.py", "display_title": "storage_backend.py"}
> ```

>   "message": "Harden S3 append-only existence checks",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom abc import ABC, abstractmethod\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass StoredObject:\n    backend: str\n    storage_path: str\n    size_bytes: int\n\n\nclass EvidenceStorageBackend(ABC):\n    name: str\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def put_bytes(self, *, storage_path: str, content: bytes, content_type: str) -> StoredObject:\n        pass\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def get_bytes(self, *, storage_path: str) -> bytes:\n        pass\n\n\nclass LocalFileStorageBackend(EvidenceStorageBackend):\n    name = \"local\"\n\n    def __init__(self, root_path: str) -> None:\n        self.root_path = Path(root_path)\n\n    def put_bytes(self, *, storage_path: str, content: bytes, content_type: str) -> StoredObject:\n        destination = self._resolve(storage_path)\n        destination.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n        if destination.exists():\n            raise FileExistsError(f\"Evidence object already exists: {storage_path}\")\n\n        destination.write_bytes(content)\n        return StoredObject(\n            backend=self.name,\n            storage_path=storage_path,\n            size_bytes=len(content),\n        )\n\n    def get_bytes(self, *, storage_path: str) -> bytes:\n        return self._resolve(storage_path).read_bytes()\n\n    def _resolve(self, storage_path: str) -> Path:\n        relative_path = Path(storage_path)\n        if relative_path.is_absolute() or \"..\" in relative_path.parts:\n            raise ValueError(\"Evidence storage path must be relative\")\n        return self.root_path / relative_path\n\n\nclass S3StorageBackend(EvidenceStorageBackend):\n    name = \"s3\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        *,\n        bucket: str,\n        prefix: str = \"\",\n        endpoint_url: str | None = None,\n        region_name: str | None = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        if not bucket:\n            raise ValueError(\"S3 evidence storage requires a bucket\")\n\n        import boto3\n\n        self.bucket = bucket\n        self.prefix = prefix.strip(\"/\")\n        self.client = boto3.client(\n            \"s3\", endpoint_url=endpoint_url or None, region_name=region_name or None\n        )\n\n    def put_bytes(self, *, storage_path: str, content: bytes, content_type: str) -> StoredObject:\n        from botocore.exceptions import ClientError\n\n        key = self._key(storage_path)\n        try:\n            self.client.head_object(Bucket=self.bucket, Key=key)\n        except ClientError as exc:\n            status_code = exc.response.get(\"ResponseMetadata\", {}).get(\"HTTPStatusCode\")\n            error_code = exc.response.get(\"Error\", {}).get(\"Code\")\n            if status_code != 404 and error_code not in {\"404\", \"NoSuchKey\", \"NotFound\"}:\n                raise\n        else:\n            raise FileExistsError(f\"Evidence object already exists: {storage_path}\")\n\n        self.client.put_object(\n            Bucket=self.bucket,\n            Key=key,\n            Body=content,\n            ContentType=content_type,\n            Metadata={\"immutable\": \"true\"},\n        )\n        return StoredObject(\n            backend=self.name,\n            storage_path=f\"s3://{self.bucket}/{key}\",\n            size_bytes=len(content),\n        )\n\n    def get_bytes(self, *, storage_path: str) -> bytes:\n        key = storage_path\n        prefix = f\"s3://{self.bucket}/\"\n        if storage_path.startswith(prefix):\n            key = storage_path[len(prefix) :]\n\n        response = self.client.get_object(Bucket=self.bucket, Key=key)\n        return response[\"Body\"].read()\n\n    def _key(self, storage_path: str) -> str:\n        clean_path = storage_path.strip(\"/\")\n        if self.prefix:\n            return f\"{self.prefix}/{clean_path}\"\n        return clean_path\n"
> }

>
> Die Evidence API ist registriert; jetzt dokumentiere ich den Lebenszyklus und Docker-Storage. Danach mache ich einen Diff-Review der betroffenen Dateien.
>
> <details><summary>Called 5 tools</summary>
>
> MCP tool call
>
> codex_apps.github_update_file
>
> ````json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/evidence-system",
>   "path": "README.md",
>   "sha": "3372df2735fb0cf38cd46d7f137bd4481f690b7f",
>   "message": "Document evidence lifecycle",
>   "content": "# NorthAccessBFSG\n\nMinimal FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```text\napp/\n  __init__.py\n  main.py\n  api/\n    __init__.py\n    compliance.py\n    evidence.py\n    health.py\n    scans.py\n  compliance/\n    __init__.py\n    rule_engine.py\n    rules/\n      __init__.py\n      wcag_en_bfsg_map.json\n  core/\n    __init__.py\n    browser_config.py\n    celery.py\n    config.py\n  db/\n    __init__.py\n    base.py\n    init_db.py\n    session.py\n  evidence/\n    __init__.py\n    hashing.py\n    storage.py\n    storage_backend.py\n  models/\n    __init__.py\n    compliance_finding.py\n    evidence_bundle.py\n    finding.py\n    lead.py\n    scan.py\n  services/\n    __init__.py\n    compliance_service.py\n    evidence_service.py\n    scan_service.py\n  workers/\n    __init__.py\n    playwright_engine.py\n    scan_worker.py\nDockerfile\ndocker-compose.yml\nrequirements.txt\n.env.example\n```\n\n## Run\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose up --build\n```\n\nThen open:\n\n```text\nhttp://localhost:8000/health\n```\n\nExpected response:\n\n```json\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}\n```\n\nThe API waits for PostgreSQL and Redis to become healthy, connects with SQLAlchemy, and auto-creates the `leads`, `scans`, `findings`, `compliance_findings`, and `evidence_bundles` tables on startup.\n\n## Async Scan Flow\n\nCreate a lead directly in the database while a public lead API does not exist yet:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"INSERT INTO leads (id, domain, company_name) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'https://example.com', 'Example') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;\"\n```\n\nRun a scan for the lead:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111\n```\n\nExpected immediate response:\n\n```json\n{\"scan_id\":\"<scan-id>\"}\n```\n\nThe API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker launches Playwright headless Chromium, loads the lead domain, runs axe-core, stores evidence artifacts, captures evidence metadata, and persists raw findings.\n\nLifecycle:\n\n```text\npending -> running -> processing -> done\n```\n\nIf task execution fails, the worker marks the scan as `failed` and stores `error_message`.\n\nInspect scan status and evidence metadata:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT id, status, error_message, evidence_metadata->>'current_url' AS current_url FROM scans;\"\n```\n\nInspect stored findings:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT rule_id, severity, wcag_refs, confidence_score FROM findings;\"\n```\n\n## Evidence Lifecycle\n\nEach scan stores immutable evidence artifacts for the page:\n\n```text\nscreenshot -> image/png\ndom -> text/html\na11y_tree -> application/json\n```\n\nArtifacts are stored through `app/evidence/storage_backend.py`. Local development uses a mounted Docker volume at `/app/evidence-data`; production can switch to an S3-compatible backend with environment configuration.\n\nRetrieve scan-level evidence metadata:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/evidence/scan/{scan_id}\n```\n\nRetrieve finding-linked evidence metadata:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/evidence/finding/{finding_id}\n```\n\nResponses include storage references, artifact hashes, versions, timestamps, and chain hashes. The API does not return raw binary artifacts.\n\nVerify stored evidence rows:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT scan_id, finding_id, type, version, hash, previous_hash, chain_hash, storage_path FROM evidence_bundles ORDER BY created_at;\"\n```\n\nEvidence is append-only: objects are never overwritten, recaptures increment `version`, and each new bundle stores a chain hash that includes the previous bundle hash. Finding-level bundles reference the scan artifacts and include a deterministic fingerprint over the linked artifact hashes.\n\n## Compliance Mapping Flow\n\nRun deterministic compliance mapping for a completed scan:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/compliance/run/{scan_id}\n```\n\nExpected response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"scan_id\": \"<scan-id>\",\n  \"mapping_version\": \"2026.05.08-001:<rules-hash>\",\n  \"total_findings\": 3,\n  \"mapped_findings\": 3,\n  \"critical_count\": 0,\n  \"high_count\": 2,\n  \"compliance_coverage_score\": 1.0\n}\n```\n\nCompliance results are stored separately in `compliance_findings`. Raw `findings` rows are never overwritten. Re-running the endpoint updates the same `finding_id` + `mapping_version` compliance rows and removes stale rows for that scan/version.\n\nInspect enriched compliance findings:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT rule_id, normalized_severity, wcag_refs, en_refs, bfsg_refs, compliance_confidence_score FROM compliance_findings;\"\n```\n\nThe worker process can also be started independently:\n\n```bash\ncelery -A app.core.celery worker --loglevel=info\n```\n\n## Browser Configuration\n\nThe worker defaults to Chromium and also installs Firefox:\n\n```text\nBROWSER_NAME=chromium\nBROWSER_HEADLESS=true\nBROWSER_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS=30000\nBROWSER_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=10000\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=1440\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=900\nBROWSER_RETRIES=1\nBROWSER_WAIT_UNTIL=networkidle\n```\n\nWebKit is supported by configuration but is not installed in the default image.\n\n## Evidence Storage Configuration\n\nLocal storage defaults:\n\n```text\nEVIDENCE_STORAGE_BACKEND=local\nEVIDENCE_LOCAL_ROOT=/app/evidence-data\n```\n\nS3-compatible storage settings:\n\n```text\nEVIDENCE_STORAGE_BACKEND=s3\nEVIDENCE_S3_BUCKET=<bucket>\nEVIDENCE_S3_PREFIX=northaccessbfsg/evidence\nEVIDENCE_S3_ENDPOINT_URL=<optional-s3-compatible-endpoint>\nEVIDENCE_S3_REGION=eu-central-1\n```\n"
> }
> ````
>

>   "content": "# NorthAccessBFSG\n\nMinimal FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```text\napp/\n  __init__.py\n  main.py\n  api/\n    __init__.py\n    compliance.py\n    evidence.py\n    health.py\n    scans.py\n  compliance/\n    __init__.py\n    rule_engine.py\n    rules/\n      __init__.py\n      wcag_en_bfsg_map.json\n  core/\n    __init__.py\n    browser_config.py\n    celery.py\n    config.py\n  db/\n    __init__.py\n    base.py\n    init_db.py\n    session.py\n  evidence/\n    __init__.py\n    hashing.py\n    storage.py\n    storage_backend.py\n  models/\n    __init__.py\n    compliance_finding.py\n    evidence_bundle.py\n    finding.py\n    lead.py\n    scan.py\n  services/\n    __init__.py\n    compliance_service.py\n    evidence_service.py\n    scan_service.py\n  workers/\n    __init__.py\n    playwright_engine.py\n    scan_worker.py\nDockerfile\ndocker-compose.yml\nrequirements.txt\n.env.example\n```\n\n## Run\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose up --build\n```\n\nThen open:\n\n```text\nhttp://localhost:8000/health\n```\n\nExpected response:\n\n```json\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}\n```\n\nThe API waits for PostgreSQL and Redis to become healthy, connects with SQLAlchemy, and auto-creates the `leads`, `scans`, `findings`, `compliance_findings`, and `evidence_bundles` tables on startup.\n\n## Evidence Lifecycle\n\nEach Playwright scan stores immutable evidence artifacts for the page:\n\n```text\nscreenshot -> image/png\ndom -> text/html\na11y_tree -> application/json\n```\n\nLocal development uses a mounted Docker volume at `/app/evidence-data`; production can switch to an S3-compatible backend. Evidence is append-only: objects are never overwritten, recaptures increment `version`, and each bundle stores SHA-256 plus chain hash metadata.\n\nRetrieve scan evidence metadata:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/evidence/scan/{scan_id}\n```\n\nRetrieve finding evidence metadata:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/evidence/finding/{finding_id}\n```\n\nResponses include storage references, artifact hashes, versions, timestamps, fingerprints, and chain hashes. The API does not return raw binary artifacts.\n\nInspect stored evidence rows:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"SELECT scan_id, finding_id, type, version, hash, previous_hash, chain_hash, storage_path FROM evidence_bundles ORDER BY created_at;\"\n```\n\n## Async Scan Flow\n\nCreate a lead directly in the database while a public lead API does not exist yet:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"INSERT INTO leads (id, domain, company_name) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'https://example.com', 'Example') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;\"\n```\n\nRun a scan for the lead:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111\n```\n\nExpected immediate response:\n\n```json\n{\"scan_id\":\"<scan-id>\"}\n```\n\nThe API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker launches Playwright headless Chromium, loads the lead domain, runs axe-core, stores evidence artifacts, captures evidence metadata, and persists raw findings.\n\nLifecycle:\n\n```text\npending -> running -> processing -> done\n```\n\n## Compliance Mapping Flow\n\nRun deterministic compliance mapping for a completed scan:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/compliance/run/{scan_id}\n```\n\nCompliance results are stored separately in `compliance_findings`. Raw `findings` rows are never overwritten.\n\n## Worker\n\nThe worker process can also be started independently:\n\n```bash\ncelery -A app.core.celery worker --loglevel=info\n```\n\n## Browser Configuration\n\n```text\nBROWSER_NAME=chromium\nBROWSER_HEADLESS=true\nBROWSER_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS=30000\nBROWSER_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=10000\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=1440\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=900\nBROWSER_RETRIES=1\nBROWSER_WAIT_UNTIL=networkidle\n```\n\n## Evidence Storage Configuration\n\nLocal storage defaults:\n\n```text\nEVIDENCE_STORAGE_BACKEND=local\nEVIDENCE_LOCAL_ROOT=/app/evidence-data\n```\n\nS3-compatible storage settings:\n\n```text\nEVIDENCE_STORAGE_BACKEND=s3\nEVIDENCE_S3_BUCKET=<bucket>\nEVIDENCE_S3_PREFIX=northaccessbfsg/evidence\nEVIDENCE_S3_ENDPOINT_URL=<optional-s3-compatible-endpoint>\nEVIDENCE_S3_REGION=eu-central-1\n```\n"

Implemented the Evidence System on branch [`codex/evidence-system`](https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/tree/codex/evidence-system), but I could not open the PR or push it live to `main` because the GitHub connector started returning `Unknown tool` for every GitHub action near the end.

What was added before the connector failed:
```text
app/api/evidence.py
app/evidence/hashing.py
app/evidence/storage.py
app/evidence/storage_backend.py
app/models/evidence_bundle.py
app/services/evidence_service.py
```

Also updated:
```text
app/core/config.py
app/db/init_db.py
app/main.py
app/models/__init__.py
app/workers/playwright_engine.py
app/workers/scan_worker.py
docker-compose.yml
requirements.txt
.env.example
.gitignore
.dockerignore
```

Implemented:
- Local + S3-compatible evidence storage abstraction
- SHA-256 artifact hashing
- Finding fingerprint generation
- Evidence chain hashing
- `EvidenceBundle` DB model
- Append-only storage paths and versioned evidence rows
- Worker integration for screenshot, DOM, and accessibility tree artifacts
- Scan-level and finding-level evidence links
- `GET /evidence/scan/{scan_id}`
- `GET /evidence/finding/{finding_id}`
- Docker volume mount at `/app/evidence-data`

Current state: code is on the feature branch, not merged live. The next step is simply to retry opening/merging the PR once the GitHub connector is healthy again.

> push life

> Ich lese „push life“ als „push live“. Ich probiere den GitHub-Connector jetzt erneut und bringe `codex/evidence-system` nach `main`, sofern der Branch sauber auf `main` liegt.

> ```text
> {"content": "from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.db.session import get_db\nfrom app.models import Finding, Scan\nfrom app.services.evidence_service import list_finding_evidence, list_scan_evidence\n\nrouter = APIRouter(prefix=\"/evidence\", tags=[\"evidence\"])\n\n\n@router.get(\"/scan/{scan_id}\")\ndef get_scan_evidence(scan_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    if db.get(Scan, scan_id) is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Scan not found\"\n        )\n\n    evidence = [bundle.as_dict() for bundle in list_scan_evidence(db, scan_id)]\n    return {\"scan_id\": scan_id, \"evidence\": evidence}\n\n\n@router.get(\"/finding/{finding_id}\")\ndef get_finding_evidence(finding_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    if db.get(Finding, finding_id) is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Finding not found\"\n        )\n\n    evidence = [bundle.as_dict() for bundle in list_finding_evidence(db, finding_id)]\n    return {\"finding_id\": finding_id, \"evidence\": evidence}\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "4df9f13ffa498e3e208780d6f2301b3654854b03", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/evidence-system/app/api/evidence.py", "display_title": "evidence.py"}
> ```
>

> ```
>
> ```text
> {"content": "import logging\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.core.celery import celery_app\nfrom app.db.session import SessionLocal\nfrom app.models import EvidenceBundle, Finding, Scan, ScanStatus\nfrom app.services.evidence_service import persist_finding_evidence_refs, persist_scan_evidence\nfrom app.workers.playwright_engine import PlaywrightScanResult, run_accessibility_scan\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n_MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH = 4000\n\n\n@celery_app.task(name=\"app.workers.scan_worker.run_scan\")\ndef run_scan_task(scan_id: str) -> str:\n    db = SessionLocal()\n    try:\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s was not found; skipping task\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        domain = scan.lead.domain\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.running\n        scan.started_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n        scan.completed_at = None\n        scan.failed_at = None\n        scan.error_message = None\n        scan.evidence_metadata = {}\n        db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\"Started Playwright accessibility scan %s for %s\", scan_id, domain)\n        scan_result = run_accessibility_scan(domain)\n\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is None:\n            logger.warning(\"Scan %s disappeared before persistence\", scan_id)\n            return scan_id\n\n        scan.status = ScanStatus.processing\n        global_evidence_bundles = persist_scan_evidence(\n            db, scan_id=scan_id, artifacts=scan_result.evidence_artifacts\n        )\n        scan.evidence_metadata = _with_evidence_bundle_metadata(\n            scan_result.evidence_metadata, global_evidence_bundles\n        )\n        db.commit()\n\n        _persist_findings(\n            db,\n            scan_id=scan_id,\n            scan_result=scan_result,\n            source_evidence_bundles=global_evidence_bundles,\n        )\n\n        scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n        if scan is not None:\n            scan.status = ScanStatus.done\n            scan.completed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n            scan.error_message = None\n            db.commit()\n\n        logger.info(\n            \"Completed Playwright accessibility scan %s with %s findings\",\n            scan_id,\n            len(scan_result.findings),\n        )\n        return scan_id\n    except Exception as exc:\n        db.rollback()\n        _mark_scan_failed(db, scan_id, exc)\n        logger.exception(\"Scan task %s failed\", scan_id)\n        raise\n    finally:\n        db.close()\n\n\ndef _persist_findings(\n    db: Session,\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    scan_result: PlaywrightScanResult,\n    source_evidence_bundles: list[EvidenceBundle],\n) -> None:\n    db.query(Finding).filter(Finding.scan_id == scan_id).delete(synchronize_session=False)\n    db.flush()\n\n    for engine_finding in scan_result.findings:\n        finding = Finding(\n            scan_id=scan_id,\n            rule_id=engine_finding.rule_id,\n            severity=engine_finding.severity,\n            description=engine_finding.description,\n            help_url=engine_finding.help_url,\n            wcag_refs=engine_finding.wcag_refs,\n            confidence_score=engine_finding.confidence_score,\n            evidence_metadata=engine_finding.evidence_metadata,\n        )\n        db.add(finding)\n        db.flush()\n\n        finding_evidence_bundles = persist_finding_evidence_refs(\n            db,\n            scan_id=scan_id,\n            finding_id=finding.id,\n            source_bundles=source_evidence_bundles,\n        )\n        finding.evidence_metadata = _with_evidence_bundle_metadata(\n            engine_finding.evidence_metadata, finding_evidence_bundles\n        )\n\n    db.commit()\n\n\ndef _with_evidence_bundle_metadata(\n    metadata: dict[str, Any], bundles: list[EvidenceBundle]\n) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        **metadata,\n        \"evidence_bundles\": [\n            {\n                \"id\": bundle.id,\n                \"type\": bundle.type,\n                \"storage_backend\": bundle.storage_backend,\n                \"storage_path\": bundle.storage_path,\n                \"content_type\": bundle.content_type,\n                \"size_bytes\": bundle.size_bytes,\n                \"version\": bundle.version,\n                \"hash\": bundle.hash,\n                \"previous_hash\": bundle.previous_hash,\n                \"chain_hash\": bundle.chain_hash,\n                \"fingerprint\": bundle.fingerprint,\n            }\n            for bundle in bundles\n        ],\n    }\n\n\ndef _mark_scan_failed(db: Session, scan_id: str, error: Exception) -> None:\n    scan = db.get(Scan, scan_id)\n    if scan is None:\n        return\n\n    scan.status = ScanStatus.failed\n    scan.failed_at = datetime.now(UTC)\n    scan.error_message = str(error)[:_MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH]\n    db.commit()\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "4fc1221578d1610f0668bef86575ccdc898f5fd3", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/evidence-system/app/workers/scan_worker.py", "display_title": "scan_worker.py"}
> ```

> ```text
> {"content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport uuid\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\n\nfrom app.core.config import settings\nfrom app.evidence.hashing import sha256_bytes\nfrom app.evidence.storage_backend import (\n    EvidenceStorageBackend,\n    LocalFileStorageBackend,\n    S3StorageBackend,\n)\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass EvidenceArtifact:\n    type: str\n    content: bytes\n    content_type: str\n    extension: str\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass StoredEvidenceArtifact:\n    type: str\n    storage_backend: str\n    storage_path: str\n    hash: str\n    size_bytes: int\n    content_type: str\n\n\nclass EvidenceStorage:\n    def __init__(self, backend: EvidenceStorageBackend) -> None:\n        self.backend = backend\n\n    def store_artifact(\n        self,\n        *,\n        scan_id: str,\n        finding_id: str | None,\n        artifact: EvidenceArtifact,\n    ) -> StoredEvidenceArtifact:\n        artifact_hash = sha256_bytes(artifact.content)\n        storage_path = _build_storage_path(\n            scan_id=scan_id,\n            finding_id=finding_id,\n            artifact_type=artifact.type,\n            artifact_hash=artifact_hash,\n            extension=artifact.extension,\n        )\n        stored_object = self.backend.put_bytes(\n            storage_path=storage_path,\n            content=artifact.content,\n            content_type=artifact.content_type,\n        )\n\n        return StoredEvidenceArtifact(\n            type=artifact.type,\n            storage_backend=stored_object.backend,\n            storage_path=stored_object.storage_path,\n            hash=artifact_hash,\n            size_bytes=stored_object.size_bytes,\n            content_type=artifact.content_type,\n        )\n\n    def retrieve_artifact(self, *, storage_path: str) -> bytes:\n        return self.backend.get_bytes(storage_path=storage_path)\n\n\ndef get_evidence_storage() -> EvidenceStorage:\n    backend_name = settings.evidence_storage_backend.lower().strip()\n    if backend_name == \"local\":\n        backend = LocalFileStorageBackend(settings.evidence_local_root)\n    elif backend_name == \"s3\":\n        backend = S3StorageBackend(\n            bucket=settings.evidence_s3_bucket,\n            prefix=settings.evidence_s3_prefix,\n            endpoint_url=settings.evidence_s3_endpoint_url,\n            region_name=settings.evidence_s3_region,\n        )\n    else:\n        raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported evidence storage backend '{backend_name}'\")\n\n    return EvidenceStorage(backend)\n\n\ndef _build_storage_path(\n    *,\n    scan_id: str,\n    finding_id: str | None,\n    artifact_type: str,\n    artifact_hash: str,\n    extension: str,\n) -> str:\n    captured_at = datetime.now(UTC).strftime(\"%Y%m%dT%H%M%S%fZ\")\n    scope = finding_id or \"global\"\n    object_id = uuid.uuid4().hex\n    clean_extension = extension.lstrip(\".\")\n    return (\n        f\"scans/{scan_id}/{scope}/{artifact_type}/\"\n        f\"{captured_at}-{artifact_hash[:16]}-{object_id}.{clean_extension}\"\n    )\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "f997acda6e4c630a3a6608480136ff32e283769c", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/main/app/evidence/storage.py", "display_title": "storage.py"}
> ```
