}\n+\n+\n+def execute_mock_provider(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, discovery_run_id)\n+    provider = MockDiscoveryProvider()\n+    results = provider.search(discovery_run.query_plan)\n+\n+    candidates_created = 0\n+    for result in results:\n+        if result.source_reference and _candidate_exists(db, discovery_run_id, result):\n+            continue\n+\n+        db.add(_candidate_from_provider_result(discovery_run_id, result))\n+        candidates_created += 1\n+\n+    db.commit()\n+    candidates_total = (\n+        db.query(LeadCandidate)\n+        .filter(\n+            LeadCandidate.discovery_run_id == discovery_run_id,\n+            LeadCandidate.source == provider.source,\n+        )\n+        .count()\n+    )\n+    return ProviderExecutionSummary(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run_id,\n+        provider=provider.source,\n+        candidates_created=candidates_created,\n+        candidates_total=candidates_total,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _candidate_exists(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult) -> bool:\n+    return (\n+        db.query(LeadCandidate.id)\n+        .filter(\n+            LeadCandidate.discovery_run_id == discovery_run_id,\n+            LeadCandidate.source == result.source,\n+            LeadCandidate.source_reference == result.source_reference,\n+        )\n+        .first()\n+        is not None\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _candidate_from_provider_result(\n+    discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult\n+) -> LeadCandidate:\n+    return LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run_id,\n+        source=result.source,\n+        source_reference=result.source_reference,\n+        company_name=result.company_name,\n+        domain=result.domain,\n+        city=result.city,\n+        postal_code=result.postal_code,\n+        address=result.address,\n+        phone=result.phone,\n+        category=result.category,\n+        raw_data=result.raw_data or {},\n+        confidence_score=result.confidence_score,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"DiscoveryRunNotFoundError\",\n+    \"ProviderExecutionSummary\",\n+    \"execute_mock_provider\",\n+]\n@@ -115,6 +115,37 @@ def test_mock_provider_endpoint_persists_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n+    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n+\n+    provider_response = client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n+    candidates_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n+\n+    assert provider_response.status_code == 200\n+    assert provider_response.json() == {\n+        \"discovery_run_id\": run_id,\n+        \"provider\": \"mock\",\n+        \"candidates_created\": 10,\n+        \"candidates_total\": 10,\n+    }\n+    candidates = candidates_response.json()[\"candidates\"]\n+    assert len(candidates) == 10\n+    assert candidates[0][\"source\"] == \"mock\"\n+    assert candidates[0][\"company_name\"].startswith(\"Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck\")\n+    assert candidates[0][\"raw_data\"][\"mock\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_provider_endpoint_unknown_run_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+\n+    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/missing/providers/mock\")\n+\n+    assert response.status_code == 404\n+    assert \"Discovery run not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n+\n+\n def test_create_discovery_run_unknown_city_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n     client = make_client(db_session)\n \n@@ -0,0 +1,53 @@\n+import socket\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\n+\n+\n+QUERY_PLAN = [\n+    {\n+        \"city\": \"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n+  \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n+        \"keyword_group_id\": \"banking\",\n+        \"keyword\": \"bank\",\n+        \"query_text\": \"L\u00fcbeck 23552 bank\",\n+    },\n+]\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_provider_returns_deterministic_results() -> None:\n+    provider = MockDiscoveryProvider(max_results=2)\n+\n+    first = provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+    second = provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+    assert first == second\n+    assert len(first) == 2\n+    assert first[0].source == \"mock\"\n+    assert first[0].source_reference == \"mock:luebeck:23552:ecommerce:online-shop\"\n+    assert first[0].company_name == \"Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck 23552 Online Shop\"\n+    assert first[0].domain is None\n+    assert first[0].raw_data \"online shop\",\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_provider_makes_no_external_network_calls(monkeypatch) -> None:\n+    def fail_network(*args, **kwargs):\n+        raise AssertionError(\"network access is not allowed in mock provider\")\n+\n+    monkeypatch.setattr(socket, \"create_connection\", fail_network)\n+\n+    results = MockDiscoveryProvider(max_results=1).search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+    assert len(results) == 1\n@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@\n+import pytest\n+from sqlalchemy import create_engine\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+from app.models import \"L\u00fcbeck\")\n+\n+    summary = execute_mock_provider(db_session, discovery_run.id)\n+\n+    assert summary.discovery_run_id == discovery_run.id\n+    assert summary.provider == \"mock\"\n+ It is not a live Google Maps API integration. It does not scrape websites and does not call external discovery providers. `LeadCandidate` rows are candidate records only; they are not confirmed legal applicability, BFSG violations, or legal conclusions.\n+## Mock Discovery Provider\n+\n+The mock provider executes a stored discovery run query plan and persists bounded, deterministic test candidates. It creates obvious mock rows only, for example `Mock Candidate Lübeck 23552 Online Shop`.\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/mock\n+curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/candidates\n+```\n+\n+Example provider response:\n+\n+```json\n+{\n+  \"discovery_run_id\": \"<run-id>\",\n+  \"provider\": \"mock\",\n+  \"candidates_created\": 10,\n+  \"candidates_total\": 10\n+}\n+```\n+\n+This is only a resolver, keyword, query-planner, and mock-provider persistence foundation. Google Maps and live providers are not integrated yet. The system does not scrape websites and does not call external discovery providers. `LeadCandidate` rows are candidate records only; they are not confirmed legal applicability, BFSG violations, or legal conclusions.\n \n ## Guarded Pipeline\n \n@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@\n     get_discovery_run,\n     list_lead_candidates,\n )\n+from app.services.provider_execution_service import execute_mock_provider\n \n router = APIRouter(prefix=\"/discovery\", tags=[\"discovery\"])\n \n@@ -107,6 +108,15 @@ def read_run(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, Any]:\n     return _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run)\n \n \n+@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n+def run_mock_provider(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n+    try:\n+        summary = execute_mock_provider(db, run_id)\n+    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    return summary.to_dict()\n+\n+\n @router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n def read_run_candidates(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n     try:\n@@ -0,0 +1 @@\n+\"\"\"Discovery provider adapters.\"\"\"\n@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@\n+\"\"\"Provider interface for discovery candidate sources.\n+\n+Provider adapters transform stored query-plan entries into candidate-like result\n+objects. Implementations must not make legal claims about applicability or\n+violations.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass\n+from typing import Any, Protocol\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class ProviderResult:\n+    source: str\n+    source_reference: str | None = None\n+    company_name: str | None = None\n+    domain: str | None = None\n+    city: str | None = None\n+    postal_code: str | None = None\n+    address: str | None = None\n+    phone: str | None = None\n+    category: str | None = None\n+    raw_data: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n+    confidence_score: float | None = None\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        data = asdict(self)\n+        data[\"raw_data\"] = self.raw_data or {}\n+        return data\n+\n+\n+class DiscoveryProvider(Protocol):\n+    source: str\n+\n+    def search(self, query_plan: list[dict[str, str]]) -> list[ProviderResult]:\n+        \"\"\"Return provider results for query-plan entries.\"\"\"\n@@ -0,0 +1,64 @@\n+\"\"\"Deterministic mock provider for discovery candidate persistence tests.\n+\n+This adapter creates obvious test data only. It does not call external services,\n+does not scrape, and does not represent real businesses.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import re\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\n+\n+MAX_MOCK_RESULTS = 10\n+_SLUG_PATTERN = re.compile(r\"[^a-z0-9]+\")\n+\n+\n+def _title_keyword(keyword: str) -> str:\n+    return \" \".join(part.capitalize() for part in keyword.split())\n+\n+\n+def _slug(value: str) -> str:\n+    normalized = value.casefold().replace(\"ä\", \"ae\").replace(\"ö\", \"oe\").replace(\"ü\", \"ue\").replace(\"ß\", \"ss\")\n+    slug = _SLUG_PATTERN.sub(\"-\", normalized).strip(\"-\")\n+    return slug or \"unknown\"\n+\n+\n+class MockDiscoveryProvider:\n+    source = \"mock\"\n+\n+    def __init__(self, max_results: int = MAX_MOCK_RESULTS) -> None:\n+        self.max_results = max_results\n+\n+    def search(self, query_plan: list[dict[str, str]]) -> list[ProviderResult]:\n+        results: list[ProviderResult] = []\n+        for entry in query_plan[: self.max_results]:\n+            city = entry.get(\"city\") or \"Unknown City\"\n+            postal_code = entry.get(\"postal_code\") or \"00000\"\n+            keyword = entry.get(\"keyword\") or \"unknown\"\n+            keyword_group_id = entry.get(\"keyword_group_id\") or \"unknown\"\n+            query_text = entry.get(\"query_text\") or \"\"\n+            reference = f\"mock:{_slug(city)}:{postal_code}:{_slug(keyword_group_id)}:{_slug(keyword)}\"\n+\n+            results.append(\n+                ProviderResult(\n+                    source=self.source,\n+                    source_reference=reference,\n+                    company_name=f\"Mock Candidate {city} {postal_code} {_title_keyword(keyword)}\",\n+                    domain=None,\n+                    city=city,\n+                    postal_code=postal_code,\n+                    address=None,\n+                    phone=None,\n+                    category=keyword_group_id,\n+                    raw_data={\n+                        \"provider\": self.source,\n+                        \"mock\": True,\n+                        \"query_text\": query_text,\n+                        \"keyword_group_id\": keyword_group_id,\n+                        \"keyword\": keyword,\n+                    },\n+                    confidence_score=0.5,\n+                )\n+            )\n+        return results\n@@ -0,0 +1,95 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n+\n+from app.services.discovery_service import DiscoveryRunNotFoundError, get_discovery_run\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    discovery_run_id: str\n+    provider: str\n+ \"provider\": self.provider,\n+            \"candidates_created\": self.candidates_created,\n+            \"candidates_total\": self.candidates_total,\n+        }\n+\n+\n+def execute_mock_provider(db: db.query(LeadCandidate)\n+        .filter(\n+            LeadCandidate.discovery_run_id == discovery_run_id,\n+            LeadCandidate.source == provider.source,\n+        )\n+        .count()\n+    )\n+    return ProviderExecutionSummary(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run_id,\n+        provider=provider.source,\n+        candidates_created=candidates_created,\n+        candidates_total=candidates_total,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _candidate_exists(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult) -> bool:\n+    return (\n+        db.query(LeadCandidate.id)\n+ result.source_reference,\n+        )\n+        .first()\n+        is not None\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _candidate_from_provider_result(\n+    discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult\n+) -> company_name=result.company_name,\n+        domain=result.domain,\n+        city=result.city,\n+        postal_code=result.postal_code,\n+        address=result.address,\n+        phone=result.phone,\n+        category=result.category,\n+        raw_data=result.raw_data or {},\n+        confidence_score=result.confidence_score,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+ It is not a live Google Maps API integration. It does not scrape websites and does not call external discovery providers. `LeadCandidate` rows are candidate records only; they are not confirmed legal applicability, BFSG violations, or legal conclusions.\n+## Mock Discovery Provider\n+\n+The mock provider executes a stored discovery run query plan and persists bounded, deterministic test candidates. It creates obvious mock rows only, for example `Mock Candidate Lübeck 23552 Online Shop`.\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/mock\n+curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/candidates\n+```\n+\n+Example provider response:\n+\n+```json\n+{\n+  \"discovery_run_id\": \"<run-id>\",\n+  \"provider\": \"mock\",\n+  \"candidates_created\": 10,\n+  \"candidates_total\": 10\n+}\n+```\n+\n+This is only a resolver, keyword, query-planner, and mock-provider persistence foundation. Google Maps and live providers are not integrated yet. The system does not scrape websites and does not call external discovery providers. `LeadCandidate` rows are candidate records only; they are not confirmed legal applicability, BFSG violations, or legal conclusions.\n \n ## Guarded Pipeline\n "

>         "patch": "@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@\n     get_discovery_run,\n     list_lead_candidates,\n )\n+from app.services.provider_execution_service import execute_mock_provider\n \n router = APIRouter(prefix=\"/discovery\", tags=[\"discovery\"])\n \n@@ -107,6 +108,15 @@ def read_run(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, Any]:\n     return _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run)\n \n \n+@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n+def run_mock_provider(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n+    try:\n+        summary = execute_mock_provider(db, run_id)\n+    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    return summary.to_dict()\n+\n+\n @router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n def read_run_candidates(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n     try:"

>         "filename": "app/discovery/providers/__init__.py",
>         "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1 @@\n+\"\"\"Discovery provider adapters.\"\"\""
>       },
>       {
>         "filename": "app/discovery/providers/base.py",
>         "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@\n+\"\"\"Provider interface for discovery candidate sources.\n+\n+Provider adapters transform stored query-plan entries into candidate-like result\n+objects. Implementations must not make legal claims about applicability or\n+violations.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass\n+from typing import Any, Protocol\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class ProviderResult:\n+    source: str\n+    source_reference: str | None = None\n+    company_name: str | None = None\n+    domain: str | None = None\n+    city: str | None = None\n+    postal_code: str | None = None\n+    address: str | None = None\n+    phone: str | None = None\n+    category: str | None = None\n+    raw_data: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n+    confidence_score: float | None = None\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        data = asdict(self)\n+        data[\"raw_data\"] = self.raw_data or {}\n+        return data\n+\n+\n+class DiscoveryProvider(Protocol):\n+    source: str\n+\n+    def search(self, query_plan: list[dict[str, str]]) -> list[ProviderResult]:\n+        \"\"\"Return provider results for query-plan entries.\"\"\""
>       },
>       {
>         "filename": "app/discovery/providers/mock_provider.py",
>         "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,64 @@\n+\"\"\"Deterministic mock provider for discovery candidate persistence tests.\n+\n+This adapter creates obvious test data only. It does not call external services,\n+does not scrape, and does not represent real businesses.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import re\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\n+\n+MAX_MOCK_RESULTS = 10\n+_SLUG_PATTERN = re.compile(r\"[^a-z0-9]+\")\n+\n+\n+def _title_keyword(keyword: str) -> str:\n+    return \" \".join(part.capitalize() for part in keyword.split())\n+\n+\n+def _slug(value: str) -> str:\n+    normalized = value.casefold().replace(\"ä\", \"ae\").replace(\"ö\", \"oe\").replace(\"ü\", \"ue\").replace(\"ß\", \"ss\")\n+    slug = _SLUG_PATTERN.sub(\"-\", normalized).strip(\"-\")\n+    return slug or \"unknown\"\n+\n+\n+class MockDiscoveryProvider:\n+    source = \"mock\"\n+\n+    def __init__(self, max_results: int = MAX_MOCK_RESULTS) -> None:\n+        self.max_results = max_results\n+\n+    def search(self, query_plan: list[dict[str, str]]) -> list[ProviderResult]:\n+        results: list[ProviderResult] = []\n+        for entry in query_plan[: self.max_results]:\n+            city = entry.get(\"city\") or \"Unknown City\"\n+            postal_code = entry.get(\"postal_code\") or \"00000\"\n+            keyword = entry.get(\"keyword\") or \"unknown\"\n+            keyword_group_id = entry.get(\"keyword_group_id\") or \"unknown\"\n+            query_text = entry.get(\"query_text\") or \"\"\n+            reference = f\"mock:{_slug(city)}:{postal_code}:{_slug(keyword_group_id)}:{_slug(keyword)}\"\n+\n+            results.append(\n+                ProviderResult(\n+                    source=self.source,\n+                    source_reference=reference,\n+                    company_name=f\"Mock Candidate {city} {postal_code} {_title_keyword(keyword)}\",\n+                    domain=None,\n+                    city=city,\n+                    postal_code=postal_code,\n+                    address=None,\n+                    phone=None,\n+                    category=keyword_group_id,\n+                    raw_data={\n+                        \"provider\": self.source,\n+                        \"mock\": True,\n+                        \"query_text\": query_text,\n+                        \"keyword_group_id\": keyword_group_id,\n+                        \"keyword\": keyword,\n+                    },\n+                    confidence_score=0.5,\n+                )\n+            )\n+        return results"
>       },
>       {
>         "filename": "app/services/provider_execution_service.py",
>         "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,95 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\n+from app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\n+from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+from app.services.discovery_service import DiscoveryRunNotFoundError, get_discovery_run\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    discovery_run_id: str\n+    provider: str\n+    candidates_created: int\n+    candidates_total: int\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n+        return {\n+            \"discovery_run_id\": self.discovery_run_id,\n+            \"provider\": self.provider,\n+            \"candidates_created\": self.candidates_created,\n+            \"candidates_total\": self.candidates_total,\n+        }\n+\n+\n+def execute_mock_provider(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, discovery_run_id)\n+    provider = MockDiscoveryProvider()\n+    results = provider.search(discovery_run.query_plan)\n+\n+    candidates_created = 0\n+    for result in results:\n+        if result.source_reference and _candidate_exists(db, discovery_run_id, result):\n+            continue\n+\n+        db.add(_candidate_from_provider_result(discovery_run_id, result))\n+        candidates_created += 1\n+\n+    db.commit()\n+    candidates_total = (\n+        db.query(LeadCandidate)\n+        .filter(\n+            LeadCandidate.discovery_run_id == discovery_run_id,\n+            LeadCandidate.source == provider.source,\n+        )\n+        .count()\n+    )\n+    return ProviderExecutionSummary(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run_id,\n+        provider=provider.source,\n+        candidates_created=candidates_created,\n+        candidates_total=candidates_total,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _candidate_exists(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult) -> bool:\n+    return (\n+        db.query(LeadCandidate.id)\n+        .filter(\n+            LeadCandidate.discovery_run_id == discovery_run_id,\n+            LeadCandidate.source == result.source,\n+            LeadCandidate.source_reference == result.source_reference,\n+        )\n+        .first()\n+        is not None\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _candidate_from_provider_result(\n+    discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult\n+) -> LeadCandidate:\n+    return LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run_id,\n+        source=result.source,\n+        source_reference=result.source_reference,\n+        company_name=result.company_name,\n+        domain=result.domain,\n+        city=result.city,\n+        postal_code=result.postal_code,\n+        address=result.address,\n+        phone=result.phone,\n+        category=result.category,\n+        raw_data=result.raw_data or {},\n+        confidence_score=result.confidence_score,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"DiscoveryRunNotFoundError\",\n+    \"ProviderExecutionSummary\",\n+    \"execute_mock_provider\",\n+]"

>         "filename": "tests/test_discovery_api.py",
>         "patch": "@@ -115,6 +115,37 @@ def test_discovery_run_candidates_endpoint_returns_empty_list(db_session: Sessio\n     assert response.json() == {\"discovery_run_id\": run_id, \"candidates\": []}\n \n \n+def test_mock_provider_endpoint_persists_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Lübeck\")\n+    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n+\n+    provider_response = client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n+    candidates_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n+\n+    assert provider_response.status_code == 200\n+    assert provider_response.json() == {\n+        \"discovery_run_id\": run_id,\n+        \"provider\": \"mock\",\n+        \"candidates_created\": 10,\n+        \"candidates_total\": 10,\n+    }\n+    candidates = candidates_response.json()[\"candidates\"]\n+    assert len(candidates) == 10\n+    assert candidates[0][\"source\"] == \"mock\"\n+    assert candidates[0][\"company_name\"].startswith(\"Mock Candidate Lübeck\")\n+    assert candidates[0][\"raw_data\"][\"mock\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_provider_endpoint_unknown_run_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+\n+    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/missing/providers/mock\")\n+\n+    assert response.status_code == 404\n+    assert \"Discovery run not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n+\n+\n def test_create_discovery_run_unknown_city_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n     client = make_client(db_session)\n "
>       },

>         "filename": "tests/test_mock_provider.py",
>         "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,53 @@\n+import socket\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\n+\n+\n+QUERY_PLAN = [\n+    {\n+        \"city\": \"Lübeck\",\n+        \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n+        \"keyword_group_id\": \"ecommerce\",\n+        \"keyword\": \"online shop\",\n+        \"query_text\": \"Lübeck 23552 online shop\",\n+    },\n+    {\n+        \"city\": \"Lübeck\",\n+        \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n+        \"keyword_group_id\": \"banking\",\n+        \"keyword\": \"bank\",\n+        \"query_text\": \"Lübeck 23552 bank\",\n+    },\n+]\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_provider_returns_deterministic_results() -> None:\n+    provider = MockDiscoveryProvider(max_results=2)\n+\n+    first = provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+    second = provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+    assert first == second\n+    assert len(first) == 2\n+    assert first[0].source == \"mock\"\n+    assert first[0].source_reference == \"mock:luebeck:23552:ecommerce:online-shop\"\n+    assert first[0].company_name == \"Mock Candidate Lübeck 23552 Online Shop\"\n+    assert first[0].domain is None\n+    assert first[0].raw_data == {\n+        \"provider\": \"mock\",\n+        \"mock\": True,\n+        \"query_text\": \"Lübeck 23552 online shop\",\n+        \"keyword_group_id\": \"ecommerce\",\n+        \"keyword\": \"online shop\",\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_provider_makes_no_external_network_calls(monkeypatch) -> None:\n+    def fail_network(*args, **kwargs):\n+        raise AssertionError(\"network access is not allowed in mock provider\")\n+\n+    monkeypatch.setattr(socket, \"create_connection\", fail_network)\n+\n+    results = MockDiscoveryProvider(max_results=1).search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+    assert len(results) == 1"
>       },
>       {
>         "filename": "tests/test_provider_execution_service.py",
>         "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@\n+import pytest\n+from sqlalchemy import create_engine\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+from app.models import DiscoveryRun, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n+from app.services.discovery_service import DiscoveryRunNotFoundError, create_discovery_run\n+from app.services.provider_execution_service import execute_mock_provider\n+\n+\n+@pytest.fixture()\n+def db_session() -> Session:\n+    engine = create_engine(\"sqlite:///:memory:\")\n+    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n+    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n+    try:\n+        yield session\n+    finally:\n+        session.close()\n+        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+\n+def test_provider_execution_persists_lead_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    discovery_run = create_discovery_run(db_session, \"Lübeck\")\n+\n+    summary = execute_mock_provider(db_session, discovery_run.id)\n+\n+    assert summary.discovery_run_id == discovery_run.id\n+    assert summary.provider == \"mock\"\n+    assert summary.candidates_created == 10\n+    assert summary.candidates_total == 10\n+\n+    candidates = db_session.query(LeadCandidate).all()\n+    assert len(candidates) == 10\n+    assert candidates[0].source == \"mock\"\n+    assert candidates[0].company_name.startswith(\"Mock Candidate Lübeck\")\n+    assert candidates[0].raw_data[\"mock\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_duplicate_provider_execution_does_not_duplicate_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    discovery_run = create_discovery_run(db_session, \"Lübeck\")\n+\n+    first = execute_mock_provider(db_session, discovery_run.id)\n+    second = execute_mock_provider(db_session, discovery_run.id)\n+\n+    assert first.candidates_created == 10\n+    assert first.candidates_total == 10\n+    assert second.candidates_created == 0\n+    assert second.candidates_total == 10\n+    assert db_session.query(LeadCandidate).count() == 10\n+\n+\n+def test_provider_execution_unknown_run_fails_clearly(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    with pytest.raises(DiscoveryRunNotFoundError, match=\"Discovery run not found: missing\"):\n+        execute_mock_provider(db_session, \"missing\")"

      continue\n+\n+        db.add(_candidate_from_provider_result(discovery_run_id, result))\n+        candidates_created += 1\n+\n+    db.commit()\n+    candidates_total = (\n+        db.query(LeadCandidate)\n+        .filter(\n+            LeadCandidate.discovery_run_id == discovery_run_id,\n+            LeadCandidate.source == provider.source,\n+        )\n+        .count()\n+    )\n+    return ProviderExecutionSummary(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run_id,\n+        provider=provider.source,\n+        candidates_created=candidates_created,\n+ result.source_reference,\n+        )\n+        .first()\n+        is not None\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _candidate_from_provider_result(\n+    discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult\n+) -> test_create_discovery_run_unknown_city_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n     client = make_client(db_session)\n \n@@ -0,0 +1,53 @@\n+import socket\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\n+\n+\n+QUERY_PLAN = [\n+    {\n+        \"city\": \"Lübeck\",\n+        \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n+        \"keyword_group_id\": -> None:\n+    provider = MockDiscoveryProvider(max_results=2)\n+\n+    first = provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+    second = provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+    assert first == second\n+    assert True\n+\n+\n+def test_duplicate_provider_execution_does_not_duplicate_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    discovery_run = create_discovery_run(db_session, \"Lübeck\")\n+\n+    first = execute_mock_provider(db_session, discovery_run.id)\n+    second = execute_mock_provider(db_session, discovery_run.id)\n+\n+    assert first.candidates_created == 10\n+    assert first.candidates_total == 10\n+    assert second.candidates_created == 0\n+    assert second.candidates_total == 10\n+    assert db_session.query(LeadCandidate).count() == 10\n+\n+\n+def > ```text
> {"content": "\"\"\"Provider interface for discovery candidate sources.\n\nProvider adapters transform stored query-plan entries into candidate-like result\nobjects. Implementations must not make legal claims about applicability or\nviolations.\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import asdict, dataclass\nfrom typing import Any, Protocol\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass ProviderResult:\n    source: str\n    source_reference: str | None = None\n    company_name: str | None = None\n    domain: str | None = None\n    city: str | None = None\n    postal_code: str | None = None\n    address: str | None = None\n    phone: str | None = None\n    category: str | None = None\n    raw_data: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n    confidence_score: float | None = None\n\n    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        data = asdict(self)\n        data[\"raw_data\"] = self.raw_data or {}\n        return data\n\n\nclass DiscoveryProvider(Protocol):\n    source: str\n\n    def search(self, query_plan: list[dict[str, str]]) -> list[ProviderResult]:\n        \"\"\"Return provider results for query-plan entries.\"\"\"\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "9354b1e24115770049118f432238b223d7d020e4", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/main/app/discovery/providers/base.py", "display_title": "base.py"}
> ```

> ```text
> {"content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\nfrom app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\nfrom app.services.discovery_service import DiscoveryRunNotFoundError, get_discovery_run\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass ProviderExecutionSummary:\n    discovery_run_id: str\n    provider: str\n    candidates_created: int\n    candidates_total: int\n\n    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n        return {\n            \"discovery_run_id\": self.discovery_run_id,\n            \"provider\": self.provider,\n            \"candidates_created\": self.candidates_created,\n            \"candidates_total\": self.candidates_total,\n        }\n\n\ndef execute_mock_provider(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n    discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, discovery_run_id)\n    provider = MockDiscoveryProvider()\n    results = provider.search(discovery_run.query_plan)\n\n    candidates_created = 0\n    for result in results:\n        if result.source_reference and _candidate_exists(db, discovery_run_id, result):\n            continue\n\n        db.add(_candidate_from_provider_result(discovery_run_id, result))\n        candidates_created += 1\n\n    db.commit()\n    candidates_total = (\n        db.query(LeadCandidate)\n        .filter(\n            LeadCandidate.discovery_run_id == discovery_run_id,\n            LeadCandidate.source == provider.source,\n        )\n        .count()\n    )\n    return ProviderExecutionSummary(\n        discovery_run_id=discovery_run_id,\n        provider=provider.source,\n        candidates_created=candidates_created,\n        candidates_total=candidates_total,\n    )\n\n\ndef _candidate_exists(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult) -> bool:\n    return (\n        db.query(LeadCandidate.id)\n        .filter(\n            LeadCandidate.discovery_run_id == discovery_run_id,\n            LeadCandidate.source == result.source,\n            LeadCandidate.source_reference == result.source_reference,\n        )\n        .first()\n        is not None\n    )\n\n\ndef _candidate_from_provider_result(\n    discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult\n) -> LeadCandidate:\n    return LeadCandidate(\n        discovery_run_id=discovery_run_id,\n        source=result.source,\n        source_reference=result.source_reference,\n        company_name=result.company_name,\n        domain=result.domain,\n        city=result.city,\n        postal_code=result.postal_code,\n        address=result.address,\n        phone=result.phone,\n        category=result.category,\n        raw_data=result.raw_data or {},\n        confidence_score=result.confidence_score,\n    )\n\n\n__all__ = [\n    \"DiscoveryRunNotFoundError\",\n    \"ProviderExecutionSummary\",\n    \"execute_mock_provider\",\n]\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "7c73cf74c7b6316c1b02d6d840b5d474cede670f", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/main/app/services/provider_execution_service.py", "display_title": "provider_execution_service.py"}

> ```text
> {"content": "from datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.db.session import get_db\nfrom app.discovery.keywords import get_keyword_groups\nfrom app.discovery.place_resolver import PlaceDataError, PlaceNotFoundError, resolve_city\nfrom app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\nfrom app.services.discovery_service import (\n    DiscoveryRunNotFoundError,\n    create_discovery_run,\n    get_discovery_run,\n    list_lead_candidates,\n)\nfrom app.services.provider_execution_service import execute_mock_provider\n\nrouter = APIRouter(prefix=\"/discovery\", tags=[\"discovery\"])\n\n\ndef _format_datetime(value: datetime | None) -> str | None:\n    return value.isoformat() if value else None\n\n\ndef _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run: DiscoveryRun) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": discovery_run.id,\n        \"city\": discovery_run.city,\n        \"normalized_city\": discovery_run.normalized_city,\n        \"status\": discovery_run.status.value,\n        \"postal_codes\": discovery_run.postal_codes,\n        \"keyword_groups\": discovery_run.keyword_groups,\n        \"query_plan\": discovery_run.query_plan,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(discovery_run.created_at),\n        \"completed_at\": _format_datetime(discovery_run.completed_at),\n        \"error_message\": discovery_run.error_message,\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": candidate.id,\n        \"discovery_run_id\": candidate.discovery_run_id,\n        \"source\": candidate.source,\n        \"source_reference\": candidate.source_reference,\n        \"company_name\": candidate.company_name,\n        \"domain\": candidate.domain,\n        \"city\": candidate.city,\n        \"postal_code\": candidate.postal_code,\n        \"address\": candidate.address,\n        \"phone\": candidate.phone,\n        \"category\": candidate.category,\n        \"raw_data\": candidate.raw_data,\n        \"confidence_score\": candidate.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(candidate.created_at),\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/places/{city}\")\ndef get_places(city: str) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        matches = resolve_city(city)\n    except PlaceNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except PlaceDataError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n            detail=str(exc),\n        ) from exc\n\n    return {\"city\": city, \"matches\": [match.to_dict() for match in matches]}\n\n\n@router.get(\"/keywords\")\ndef get_keywords() -> dict[str, object]:\n    return {\"groups\": get_keyword_groups()}\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{city}\")\ndef create_run(city: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        discovery_run = create_discovery_run(db, city)\n    except PlaceNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except PlaceDataError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n            detail=str(exc),\n        ) from exc\n\n    return {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": discovery_run.id,\n        \"city\": discovery_run.city,\n        \"status\": discovery_run.status.value,\n        \"postal_codes_count\": len(discovery_run.postal_codes),\n        \"query_count\": len(discovery_run.query_plan),\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}\")\ndef read_run(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    try:\n        discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\ndef run_mock_provider(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    try:\n        summary = execute_mock_provider(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\ndef read_run_candidates(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        candidates = list_lead_candidates(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\"discovery_run_id\": run_id, \"candidates\": [_serialize_candidate(candidate) for candidate in candidates]}\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "2abb343a2008caea3f5468bf86ec2c5d2c573d62", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/main/app/api/discovery.py", "display_title": "discovery.py"}
> ```

> ```text
> {"content": "from functools import lru_cache\n\nfrom pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict\n\n\nclass Settings(BaseSettings):\n    app_name: str = \"NorthAccessBFSG API\"\n    environment: str = \"development\"\n    database_url: str = (\n        \"postgresql+psycopg2://northaccess:northaccess@localhost:5432/northaccessbfsg\"\n    )\n    celery_broker_url: str = \"redis://localhost:6379/0\"\n    celery_result_backend: str = \"redis://localhost:6379/1\"\n    browser_name: str = \"chromium\"\n    browser_headless: bool = True\n    browser_navigation_timeout_ms: int = 30_000\n    browser_action_timeout_ms: int = 10_000\n    browser_viewport_width: int = 1440\n    browser_viewport_height: int = 900\n    browser_retries: int = 1\n    browser_wait_until: str = \"networkidle\"\n    evidence_storage_backend: str = \"local\"\n    evidence_local_root: str = \"/app/evidence-data\"\n    evidence_s3_bucket: str = \"\"\n    evidence_s3_prefix: str = \"northaccessbfsg/evidence\"\n    evidence_s3_endpoint_url: str = \"\"\n    evidence_s3_region: str = \"eu-central-1\"\n\n    model_config = SettingsConfigDict(\n        env_file=\".env\",\n        env_file_encoding=\"utf-8\",\n        extra=\"ignore\",\n    )\n\n\n@lru_cache\ndef get_settings() -> Settings:\n    return Settings()\n\n\nsettings = get_settings()\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "90e24fc501c17f776a4b7d763fab6d23a30b1852", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/main/app/core/config.py", "display_title": "config.py"}

> ```text
> {"content": "from app.models.compliance_finding import ComplianceFinding\nfrom app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus\nfrom app.models.evidence_bundle import EvidenceBundle\nfrom app.models.finding import Finding\nfrom app.models.lead import Lead\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\nfrom app.models.scan import Scan, ScanStatus\n\n__all__ = [\n    \"ComplianceFinding\",\n    \"DiscoveryRun\",\n    \"DiscoveryRunStatus\",\n    \"EvidenceBundle\",\n    \"Finding\",\n    \"Lead\",\n    \"LeadCandidate\",\n    \"Scan\",\n    \"ScanStatus\",\n]\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "55d9468dff0485d5f37df9b39e64bbffb9fce8b1", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/main/app/models/__init__.py", "display_title": "__init__.py"}
> ```

> ```text
> {"content": "from sqlalchemy import text\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import engine\nfrom app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n    ComplianceFinding,\n    DiscoveryRun,\n    EvidenceBundle,\n    Finding,\n    Lead,\n    LeadCandidate,\n    Scan,\n)\n\n_SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'processing'\",\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'failed'\",\n)\n\n_SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS started_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_message TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n_FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS help_url VARCHAR(500)\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wcag_refs JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence_score DOUBLE PRECISION\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n\ndef init_db() -> None:\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n    _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema()\n    _ensure_finding_evidence_schema()\n\n\ndef _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.connect() as connection:\n        autocommit_connection = connection.execution_options(isolation_level=\"AUTOCOMMIT\")\n        for statement in _SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES:\n            autocommit_connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n\ndef _ensure_finding_evidence_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "9992256889af7c3e926626545d91d2776925db0a", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/main/app/db/init_db.py", "display_title": "init_db.py"}
> ```

> {"content": "import pytest\nfrom fastapi import FastAPI\nfrom fastapi.testclient import TestClient\nfrom sqlalchemy import create_engine\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\nfrom sqlalchemy.pool import StaticPool\n\nfrom app.api.discovery import router as discovery_router\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import get_db\nfrom app.models import DiscoveryRun, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n\n\n@pytest.fixture()\ndef db_session() -> Session:\n    engine = create_engine(\n        \"sqlite://\",\n        connect_args={\"check_same_thread\": False},\n        poolclass=StaticPool,\n    )\n    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n\n    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n    try:\n        yield session\n    finally:\n        session.close()\n        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n\n\ndef make_client(db_session: Session | None = None) -> TestClient:\n    app = FastAPI()\n    app.include_router(discovery_router)\n    if db_session is not None:\n        app.dependency_overrides[get_db] = lambda: db_session\n    return TestClient(app)\n\n\ndef test_keywords_endpoint_returns_structured_groups() -> None:\n    client = make_client()\n\n    response = client.get(\"/discovery/keywords\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    groups = response.json()[\"groups\"]\n    assert groups\n    assert {\"group_id\", \"label\", \"keywords\", \"bfsg_relevance_reason\", \"enabled\"}.issubset(\n        groups[0]\n    )\n    assert \"ecommerce\" in {group[\"group_id\"] for group in groups}\n\n\ndef test_places_endpoint_returns_luebeck_matches() -> None:\n    client = make_client()\n\n    response = client.get(\"/discovery/places/L\u00fcbeck\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    payload = response.json()\n    assert payload[\"city\"] == \"L\u00fcbeck\"\n    assert payload[\"matches\"]\n    assert {match[\"city\"] for match in payload[\"matches\"]} == {\"L\u00fcbeck\"}\n    assert any(match[\"postal_code\"] == \"23552\" for match in payload[\"matches\"])\n\n\ndef test_places_endpoint_accepts_luebeck_transliteration() -> None:\n    client = make_client()\n\n    response = client.get(\"/discovery/places/Luebeck\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    assert {match[\"city\"] for match in response.json()[\"matches\"]} == {\"L\u00fcbeck\"}\n\n\ndef test_create_discovery_run_endpoint_returns_done_and_query_count(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    payload = response.json()\n    assert payload[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n    assert payload[\"city\"] == \"L\u00fcbeck\"\n    assert payload[\"status\"] == \"done\"\n    assert payload[\"postal_codes_count\"] > 0\n    assert payload[\"query_count\"] > 0\n\n\ndef test_get_discovery_run_endpoint_returns_stored_query_plan(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n\n    response = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    payload = response.json()\n    assert payload[\"id\"] == run_id\n    assert payload[\"status\"] == \"done\"\n    assert payload[\"postal_codes\"]\n    assert payload[\"keyword_groups\"]\n    assert payload[\"query_plan\"]\n    assert payload[\"error_message\"] is None\n\n\ndef test_discovery_run_candidates_endpoint_returns_empty_list(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n\n    response = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    assert response.json() == {\"discovery_run_id\": run_id, \"candidates\": []}\n\n\ndef test_mock_provider_endpoint_persists_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n\n    provider_response = client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n    candidates_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n\n    assert provider_response.status_code == 200\n    assert provider_response.json() == {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": run_id,\n        \"provider\": \"mock\",\n        \"candidates_created\": 10,\n        \"candidates_total\": 10,\n    }\n    candidates = candidates_response.json()[\"candidates\"]\n    assert len(candidates) == 10\n    assert candidates[0][\"source\"] == \"mock\"\n    assert candidates[0][\"company_name\"].startswith(\"Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck\")\n    assert candidates[0][\"raw_data\"][\"mock\"] is True\n\n\ndef test_mock_provider_endpoint_unknown_run_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/missing/providers/mock\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 404\n    assert \"Discovery run not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n\n\ndef test_create_discovery_run_unknown_city_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Atlantis\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 404\n    assert \"No places found for city: Atlantis\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "4c50cfeaf152968dc584c2d687ee38bf3b4af413", "display_url": It does not scrape websites and does not call external discovery providers. `LeadCandidate` rows are candidate records only; they are not confirmed legal applicability, BFSG violations, or legal conclusions.\n+## Mock Discovery Provider\n+\n+The mock provider executes a stored discovery run query plan and persists bounded, deterministic test candidates. It creates obvious mock rows only, for example `Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck 23552 Online Shop`.\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/mock\n+curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/candidates\n+```\n+\n+Example provider response:\n+\n+```json\n+{\n+  \"discovery_run_id\": \"<run-id>\",\n+  \"provider\": \"mock\",\n+  \"candidates_created\": 10,\n+  \"candidates_total\": 10\n+}\n+```\n+\n+This is only a resolver, keyword, query-planner, and mock-provider persistence foundation. Google Maps and live providers are not integrated yet. Implementations must not make legal claims about applicability or\n+violations.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass\n+from typing import Any, Protocol\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class ProviderResult:\n+    source: str\n+    source_reference: str | None = None\n+    company_name: str | None = None\n+    domain: str | None = None\n+    city: str | None = None\n+    postal_code: str | None = None\n+    address: str | None = None\n+    phone: str | None = None\n+    category: str | None = None\n+    raw_data: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n+    confidence_score: float | None = None\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        data = asdict(self)\n+        data[\"raw_data\"] = self.raw_data or {}\n+        return data\n+\n+\n+class DiscoveryProvider(Protocol):\n+    source: str\n+\n+    def search(self, query_plan: list[dict[str, str]]) -> list[ProviderResult]:\n+        \"\"\"Return provider results for query-plan entries.\"\"\"\n@@ -0,0 +1,64 @@\n+\"\"\"Deterministic mock provider for discovery candidate persistence tests.\n+\n+This adapter creates obvious test data only. It does not call external services,\n+does not scrape, and does not represent real businesses.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import re\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\n+\n+MAX_MOCK_RESULTS = 10\n+_SLUG_PATTERN = re.compile(r\"[^a-z0-9]+\")\n+\n+\n+def _title_keyword(keyword: str) -> str:\n+    return \" \".join(part.capitalize() for part in keyword.split())\n+\n+\n+def _slug(value: str) -> str:\n+    normalized = value.casefold().replace(\"\u00e4\", \"ae\").replace(\"\u00f6\", \"oe\").replace(\"\u00fc\", \"ue\").replace(\"\u00df\", \"ss\")\n+    slug = _SLUG_PATTERN.sub(\"-\", normalized).strip(\"-\")\n+    return slug or \"unknown\"\n+\n+\n+class MockDiscoveryProvider:\n+    source = \"mock\"\n+\n+    def __init__(self, max_results: int = MAX_MOCK_RESULTS) -> None:\n+        self.max_results = max_results\n+\n+    def search(self, query_plan: list[dict[str, str]]) -> list[ProviderResult]:\n+        results: list[ProviderResult] = []\n+        for entry in query_plan[: self.max_results]:\n+            city = entry.get(\"city\") or \"Unknown City\"\n+            postal_code = entry.get(\"postal_code\") or \"00000\"\n+            keyword = entry.get(\"keyword\") or \"unknown\"\n+            keyword_group_id = entry.get(\"keyword_group_id\") or \"unknown\"\n+            query_text = entry.get(\"query_text\") or \"\"\n+            reference = f\"mock:{_slug(city)}:{postal_code}:{_slug(keyword_group_id)}:{_slug(keyword)}\"\n+\n+            results.append(\n+                ProviderResult(\n+                    source=self.source,\n+                    source_reference=reference,\n+                    company_name=f\"Mock Candidate {city} {postal_code} {_title_keyword(keyword)}\",\n+                    domain=None,\n+                    city=city,\n+                    postal_code=postal_code,\n+                    address=None,\n+                    phone=None,\n+                    category=keyword_group_id,\n+                    raw_data={\n+                        \"provider\": self.source,\n+                        \"mock\": True,\n+                        \"query_text\": query_text,\n+                        \"keyword_group_id\": keyword_group_id,\n+                        \"keyword\": keyword,\n+                    },\n+                    confidence_score=0.5,\n+                )\n+            )\n+        return results\n@@ -0,0 +1,95 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\n+from app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\n+from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+from app.services.discovery_service import DiscoveryRunNotFoundError, get_discovery_run\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    discovery_run_id: str\n+    provider: str\n+    candidates_created: int\n+    candidates_total: int\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n+        return {\n+            \"discovery_run_id\": self.discovery_run_id,\n+            \"provider\": self.provider,\n+            \"candidates_created\": self.candidates_created,\n+            \"candidates_total\": self.candidates_total,\n+        }\n+\n+\n+def execute_mock_provider(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, discovery_run_id)\n+    provider = MockDiscoveryProvider()\n+    results = provider.search(discovery_run.query_plan)\n+\n+    candidates_created = 0\n+    for result in results:\n+        if result.source_reference and _candidate_exists(db, discovery_run_id, result):\n+            continue\n+\n+        db.add(_candidate_from_provider_result(discovery_run_id, result))\n+        candidates_created += 1\n+\n+    db.commit()\n+    candidates_total = (\n+        db.query(LeadCandidate)\n+        .filter(\n+            LeadCandidate.discovery_run_id == discovery_run_id,\n+            LeadCandidate.source == provider.source,\n+        )\n+        .count()\n+    )\n+    return ProviderExecutionSummary(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run_id,\n+        provider=provider.source,\n+        candidates_created=candidates_created,\n+        candidates_total=candidates_total,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _candidate_exists(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult) -> bool:\n+    return (\n+        db.query(LeadCandidate.id)\n+        .filter(\n+            LeadCandidate.discovery_run_id == discovery_run_id,\n+            LeadCandidate.source == result.source,\n+            LeadCandidate.source_reference == result.source_reference,\n+        )\n+        .first()\n+        is not None\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _candidate_from_provider_result(\n+    discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult\n+) -> LeadCandidate:\n+    return LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run_id,\n+        source=result.source,\n+        source_reference=result.source_reference,\n+        company_name=result.company_name,\n+        domain=result.domain,\n+        city=result.city,\n+        postal_code=result.postal_code,\n+        address=result.address,\n+        phone=result.phone,\n+        category=result.category,\n+        raw_data=result.raw_data or {},\n+        confidence_score=result.confidence_score,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"DiscoveryRunNotFoundError\",\n+    \"ProviderExecutionSummary\",\n+    \"execute_mock_provider\",\n+]\n@@ -115,6 +115,37 @@ def True\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_provider_endpoint_unknown_run_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+\n+    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/missing/providers/mock\")\n+\n+    assert response.status_code == 404\n+    assert \"Discovery run not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n+\n+\n def test_create_discovery_run_unknown_city_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n     client = make_client(db_session)\n \n@@ -0,0 +1,53 @@\n+import socket\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\n+\n+\n+QUERY_PLAN = [\n+    {\n+        \"city\": \"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n+        \"keyword_group_id\": \"ecommerce\",\n+        \"keyword\": \"online shop\",\n+        \"query_text\": \"L\u00fcbeck 23552 online shop\",\n+    },\n+    {\n+        \"city\": \"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n+        \"keyword_group_id\": \"banking\",\n+        \"keyword\": \"bank\",\n+        \"query_text\": \"L\u00fcbeck 23552 bank\",\n+    },\n+]\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_provider_returns_deterministic_results() -> None:\n+    provider = MockDiscoveryProvider(max_results=2)\n+\n+    first = provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+    second = provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+    assert first == second\n+    assert len(first) == 2\n+    assert first[0].source == \"mock\"\n+    assert first[0].source_reference == \"mock:luebeck:23552:ecommerce:online-shop\"\n+    assert first[0].company_name == \"Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck 23552 Online Shop\"\n+    assert first[0].domain is None\n+    assert first[0].raw_data == {\n+        \"provider\": \"mock\",\n+        \"mock\": True,\n+        \"query_text\": \"L\u00fcbeck 23552 online shop\",\n+        \"keyword_group_id\": \"ecommerce\",\n+        \"keyword\": \"online shop\",\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_provider_makes_no_external_network_calls(monkeypatch) -> None:\n+    def fail_network(*args, **kwargs):\n+        raise AssertionError(\"network access is not allowed in mock provider\")\n+\n+    monkeypatch.setattr(socket, \"create_connection\", fail_network)\n+\n+    results = MockDiscoveryProvider(max_results=1).search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+    assert len(results) == 1\n@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@\n+import pytest\n+from sqlalchemy import create_engine\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+from app.models import DiscoveryRun, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n+from app.services.discovery_service import DiscoveryRunNotFoundError, create_discovery_run\n+from app.services.provider_execution_service import execute_mock_provider\n+\n+\n+@pytest.fixture()\n+def db_session() -> Session:\n+    engine = create_engine(\"sqlite:///:memory:\")\n+    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n+    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n+    try:\n+        yield session\n+    finally:\n+        session.close()\n+        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+\n+def test_provider_execution_persists_lead_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    discovery_run = create_discovery_run(db_session, \"L\u00fcbeck\")\n+\n+    summary = execute_mock_provider(db_session, discovery_run.id)\n+\n+    assert summary.discovery_run_id == discovery_run.id\n+    assert summary.provider == \"mock\"\n+    assert summary.candidates_created == 10\n+    assert summary.candidates_total == 10\n+\n+    candidates = db_session.query(LeadCandidate).all()\n+    assert len(candidates) == 10\n+    assert candidates[0].source == \"mock\"\n+    assert candidates[0].company_name.startswith(\"Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck\")\n+    assert candidates[0].raw_data[\"mock\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_duplicate_provider_execution_does_not_duplicate_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    discovery_run = create_discovery_run(db_session, \"L\u00fcbeck\")\n+\n+    first = execute_mock_provider(db_session, discovery_run.id)\n+    second = execute_mock_provider(db_session, discovery_run.id)\n+\n+    assert first.candidates_created == 10\n+    assert first.candidates_total == 10\n+    assert second.candidates_created == 0\n+    assert second.candidates_total == 10\n+    assert db_session.query(LeadCandidate).count() == 10\n+\n+\n+def test_provider_execution_unknown_run_fails_clearly(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    with pytest.raises(DiscoveryRunNotFoundError, match=\"Discovery run not found: missing\"):\n+        execute_mock_provider(db_session, \"missing\")", "files": [{"filename": "README.md", "patch": "@@ -37,6 +37,10 @@ app/\n     __init__.py\n     keywords.py\n     place_resolver.py\n+    providers/\n+      __init__.py\n+      base.py\n+      mock_provider.py\n     query_planner.py\n   evidence/\n     __init__.py\n@@ -48,6 +52,7 @@ app/\n     lead_candidate.py\n   services/\n     discovery_service.py\n+    provider_execution_service.py\n   workers/\n data/\n   orte_deutschland.csv\n@@ -155,7 +160,27 @@ curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}\n curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/candidates\n ```\n \n-This is only a resolver, keyword, and query-planner foundation. It is not a live Google Maps API integration. It does not scrape websites and does not call external discovery providers. `LeadCandidate` rows are candidate records only; they are not confirmed legal applicability, BFSG violations, or legal conclusions.\n+## Mock Discovery Provider\n+\n+The mock provider executes a stored discovery run query plan and persists bounded, deterministic test candidates. It creates obvious mock rows only, for example `Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck 23552 Online Shop`.\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/mock\n+curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/candidates\n+```\n+\n+Example provider response:\n+\n+```json\n+{\n+  \"discovery_run_id\": \"<run-id>\",\n+  \"provider\": \"mock\",\n+  \"candidates_created\": 10,\n+  \"candidates_total\": 10\n+}\n+```\n+\n+This is only a resolver, keyword, query-planner, and mock-provider persistence foundation. Google Maps and live providers are not integrated yet. The system does not scrape websites and does not call external discovery providers. `LeadCandidate` rows are candidate records only; they are not confirmed legal applicability, BFSG violations, or legal conclusions.\n \n ## Guarded Pipeline\n "}, {"filename": "app/api/discovery.py", "patch": "@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@\n     get_discovery_run,\n     list_lead_candidates,\n )\n+from app.services.provider_execution_service import execute_mock_provider\n \n router = APIRouter(prefix=\"/discovery\", tags=[\"discovery\"])\n \n@@ -107,6 +108,15 @@ def read_run(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, Any]:\n     return _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run)\n \n \n+@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n+def run_mock_provider(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n+    try:\n+        summary = execute_mock_provider(db, run_id)\n+    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    return summary.to_dict()\n+\n+\n @router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n def read_run_candidates(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n     try:"}, {"filename": "app/discovery/providers/__init__.py", "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1 @@\n+\"\"\"Discovery provider adapters.\"\"\""}, {"filename": "app/discovery/providers/base.py", "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@\n+\"\"\"Provider interface for discovery candidate sources.\n+\n+Provider adapters transform stored query-plan entries into candidate-like result\n+objects. Implementations must not make legal claims about applicability or\n+violations.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass\n+from typing import Any, Protocol\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class ProviderResult:\n+    source: str\n+    source_reference: str | None = None\n+    company_name: str | None = None\n+    domain: str | None = None\n+    city: str | None = None\n+    postal_code: str | None = None\n+    address: str | None = None\n+    phone: str | None = None\n+    category: str | None = None\n+    raw_data: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n+    confidence_score: float | None = None\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        data = asdict(self)\n+        data[\"raw_data\"] = self.raw_data or {}\n+        return data\n+\n+\n+class DiscoveryProvider(Protocol):\n+    source: str\n+\n+    def search(self, query_plan: list[dict[str, str]]) -> list[ProviderResult]:\n+        \"\"\"Return provider results for query-plan entries.\"\"\""}, {"filename": "app/discovery/providers/mock_provider.py", "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,64 @@\n+\"\"\"Deterministic mock provider for discovery candidate persistence tests.\n+\n+This adapter creates obvious test data only. It does not call external services,\n+does not scrape, and does not represent real businesses.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import re\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\n+\n+MAX_MOCK_RESULTS = 10\n+_SLUG_PATTERN = re.compile(r\"[^a-z0-9]+\")\n+\n+\n+def _title_keyword(keyword: str) -> str:\n+    return \" \".join(part.capitalize() for part in keyword.split())\n+\n+\n+def _slug(value: str) -> str:\n+    normalized = value.casefold().replace(\"\u00e4\", \"ae\").replace(\"\u00f6\", \"oe\").replace(\"\u00fc\", \"ue\").replace(\"\u00df\", \"ss\")\n+    slug = _SLUG_PATTERN.sub(\"-\", normalized).strip(\"-\")\n+    return slug or \"unknown\"\n+\n+\n+class MockDiscoveryProvider:\n+    source = \"mock\"\n+\n+    def __init__(self, max_results: int = MAX_MOCK_RESULTS) -> None:\n+        self.max_results = max_results\n+\n+    def search(self, query_plan: list[dict[str, str]]) -> list[ProviderResult]:\n+        results: list[ProviderResult] = []\n+        for entry in query_plan[: self.max_results]:\n+            city = entry.get(\"city\") or \"Unknown City\"\n+            postal_code = entry.get(\"postal_code\") or \"00000\"\n+            keyword = entry.get(\"keyword\") or \"unknown\"\n+            keyword_group_id = entry.get(\"keyword_group_id\") or \"unknown\"\n+            query_text = entry.get(\"query_text\") or \"\"\n+            reference = f\"mock:{_slug(city)}:{postal_code}:{_slug(keyword_group_id)}:{_slug(keyword)}\"\n+\n+            results.append(\n+                ProviderResult(\n+                    source=self.source,\n+                    source_reference=reference,\n+                    company_name=f\"Mock Candidate {city} {postal_code} {_title_keyword(keyword)}\",\n+                    domain=None,\n+                    city=city,\n+                    postal_code=postal_code,\n+                    address=None,\n+                    phone=None,\n+                    category=keyword_group_id,\n+                    raw_data={\n+                        \"provider\": self.source,\n+                        \"mock\": True,\n+                        \"query_text\": query_text,\n+                        \"keyword_group_id\": keyword_group_id,\n+                        \"keyword\": keyword,\n+                    },\n+                    confidence_score=0.5,\n+                )\n+            )\n+        return results"}, {"filename": "app/services/provider_execution_service.py", "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,95 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\n+from app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\n+from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+from app.services.discovery_service import DiscoveryRunNotFoundError, get_discovery_run\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    discovery_run_id: str\n+    provider: str\n+    candidates_created: int\n+    candidates_total: int\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n+        return {\n+            \"discovery_run_id\": self.discovery_run_id,\n+            \"provider\": self.provider,\n+            \"candidates_created\": self.candidates_created,\n+            \"candidates_total\": self.candidates_total,\n+        }\n+\n+\n+def execute_mock_provider(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, discovery_run_id)\n+    provider = MockDiscoveryProvider()\n+    results = provider.search(discovery_run.query_plan)\n+\n+    candidates_created = 0\n+    for result in results:\n+        if result.source_reference and _candidate_exists(db, discovery_run_id, result):\n+            continue\n+\n+        db.add(_candidate_from_provider_result(discovery_run_id, result))\n+        candidates_created += 1\n+\n+    db.commit()\n+    candidates_total = (\n+        db.query(LeadCandidate)\n+        .filter(\n+            LeadCandidate.discovery_run_id == discovery_run_id,\n+            LeadCandidate.source == provider.source,\n+        )\n+        .count()\n+    )\n+    return ProviderExecutionSummary(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run_id,\n+        provider=provider.source,\n+        candidates_created=candidates_created,\n+        candidates_total=candidates_total,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _candidate_exists(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult) -> bool:\n+    return (\n+        db.query(LeadCandidate.id)\n+        .filter(\n+            LeadCandidate.discovery_run_id == discovery_run_id,\n+            LeadCandidate.source == result.source,\n+            LeadCandidate.source_reference == result.source_reference,\n+        )\n+        .first()\n+        is not None\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _candidate_from_provider_result(\n+    discovery_run_id: str, result: ProviderResult\n+) -> LeadCandidate:\n+    return LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run_id,\n+        source=result.source,\n+        source_reference=result.source_reference,\n+        company_name=result.company_name,\n+        domain=result.domain,\n+        city=result.city,\n+        postal_code=result.postal_code,\n+        address=result.address,\n+        phone=result.phone,\n+        category=result.category,\n+        raw_data=result.raw_data or {},\n+        confidence_score=result.confidence_score,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"DiscoveryRunNotFoundError\",\n+    \"ProviderExecutionSummary\",\n+    \"execute_mock_provider\",\n+]"}, {"filename": "tests/test_discovery_api.py", "patch": "@@ -115,6 +115,37 @@ def test_discovery_run_candidates_endpoint_returns_empty_list(db_session: Sessio\n     assert response.json() == {\"discovery_run_id\": run_id, \"candidates\": []}\n \n \n+def test_mock_provider_endpoint_persists_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n+    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n+\n+    provider_response = client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n+    candidates_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n+\n+    assert provider_response.status_code == 200\n+    assert provider_response.json() == {\n+        \"discovery_run_id\": run_id,\n+        \"provider\": \"mock\",\n+        \"candidates_created\": 10,\n+        \"candidates_total\": 10,\n+    }\n+    candidates = candidates_response.json()[\"candidates\"]\n+    assert len(candidates) == 10\n+    assert candidates[0][\"source\"] == \"mock\"\n+    assert candidates[0][\"company_name\"].startswith(\"Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck\")\n+    assert candidates[0][\"raw_data\"][\"mock\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_provider_endpoint_unknown_run_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+\n+    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/missing/providers/mock\")\n+\n+    assert response.status_code == 404\n+    assert \"Discovery run not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n+\n+\n def test_create_discovery_run_unknown_city_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n     client = make_client(db_session)\n "}, {"filename": "tests/test_mock_provider.py", "patch": "@@ -0,0 yield session\n+    finally:\n+        session.close()\n+        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+\n+def test_provider_execution_persists_lead_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+
