> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/google-places-qualification-foundation",
>   "path": "app/models/lead_candidate.py",
>   "sha": "2df2bd61a2f4180c134aa034072c8f4d73d8b4ac",
>   "message": "Link lead candidates to qualification prechecks",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport uuid\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, DateTime, Float, ForeignKey, String, Text, func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\n\n\nclass LeadCandidate(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"lead_candidates\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n    )\n    discovery_run_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36),\n        ForeignKey(\"discovery_runs.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"),\n        nullable=False,\n        index=True,\n    )\n    source: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=False)\n    source_reference: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)\n    company_name: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    domain: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    city: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    postal_code: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=True)\n    address: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n    phone: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)\n    category: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    raw_data: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\n    confidence_score: Mapped[float | None] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n    )\n\n    discovery_run: Mapped[\"DiscoveryRun\"] = relationship(\n        \"DiscoveryRun\", back_populates=\"candidates\"\n    )\n    qualifications: Mapped[list[\"CompanyQualification\"]] = relationship(\n        \"CompanyQualification\",\n        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n    )\n"
> }
> ```

> {

>   "message": "Export company qualification model",
>   "content": "from app.models.company_qualification import (\n    CompanyQualification,\n    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n)\nfrom app.models.compliance_finding import ComplianceFinding\nfrom app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus\nfrom app.models.evidence_bundle import EvidenceBundle\nfrom app.models.finding import Finding\nfrom app.models.lead import Lead\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\nfrom app.models.scan import Scan, ScanStatus\n\n__all__ = [\n    \"CompanyQualification\",\n    \"CompanyQualificationStatus\",\n    \"ComplianceFinding\",\n    \"DiscoveryRun\",\n    \"DiscoveryRunStatus\",\n    \"EvidenceBundle\",\n    \"Finding\",\n    \"Lead\",\n    \"LeadCandidate\",\n    \"Scan\",\n    \"ScanStatus\",\n]\n"

>
> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/google-places-qualification-foundation",
>   "path": "app/db/init_db.py",
>   "sha": "9992256889af7c3e926626545d91d2776925db0a",
>   "message": "Register qualification model in DB init",
>   "content": "from sqlalchemy import text\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import engine\nfrom app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n    CompanyQualification,\n    ComplianceFinding,\n    DiscoveryRun,\n    EvidenceBundle,\n    Finding,\n    Lead,\n    LeadCandidate,\n    Scan,\n)\n\n_SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'processing'\",\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'failed'\",\n)\n\n_SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS started_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_message TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n_FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS help_url VARCHAR(500)\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wcag_refs JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence_score DOUBLE PRECISION\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n\ndef init_db() -> None:\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n    _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema()\n    _ensure_finding_evidence_schema()\n\n\ndef _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.connect() as connection:\n        autocommit_connection = connection.execution_options(isolation_level=\"AUTOCOMMIT\")\n        for statement in _SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES:\n            autocommit_connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n\ndef _ensure_finding_evidence_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n"
> }
> ```

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/google-places-qualification-foundation",
>   "path": "app/services/company_qualification_service.py",
>   "message": "Add company qualification precheck service",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.core.config import get_settings\nfrom app.models.company_qualification import (\n    CompanyQualification,\n    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n)\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n\n\nclass LeadCandidateNotFoundError(LookupError):\n    pass\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass MicroenterpriseThresholds:\n    employee_count: int\n    annual_revenue_eur: int\n    balance_sheet_total_eur: int\n\n\ndef get_microenterprise_thresholds() -> MicroenterpriseThresholds:\n    settings = get_settings()\n    return MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n        employee_count=settings.bfsg_microenterprise_employee_threshold,\n        annual_revenue_eur=settings.bfsg_microenterprise_revenue_threshold_eur,\n        balance_sheet_total_eur=settings.bfsg_microenterprise_balance_threshold_eur,\n    )\n\n\ndef evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n    *,\n    employee_count: int | None,\n    annual_revenue_eur: int | None,\n    balance_sheet_total_eur: int | None,\n    thresholds: MicroenterpriseThresholds | None = None,\n) -> bool | None:\n    thresholds = thresholds or get_microenterprise_thresholds()\n    financial_values = [\n        value for value in (annual_revenue_eur, balance_sheet_total_eur) if value is not None\n    ]\n    if employee_count is None or not financial_values:\n        return None\n    if employee_count >= thresholds.employee_count:\n        return False\n    if annual_revenue_eur is not None and annual_revenue_eur > thresholds.annual_revenue_eur:\n        return False\n    if (\n        balance_sheet_total_eur is not None\n        and balance_sheet_total_eur > thresholds.balance_sheet_total_eur\n    ):\n        return False\n    return True\n\n\ndef create_candidate_precheck(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyQualification:\n    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n    if candidate is None:\n        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n\n    qualification = precheck_candidate(candidate)\n    db.add(qualification)\n    db.commit()\n    db.refresh(qualification)\n    return qualification\n\n\ndef get_latest_candidate_qualification(\n    db: Session, candidate_id: str\n) -> CompanyQualification | None:\n    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n    if candidate is None:\n        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n\n    return (\n        db.query(CompanyQualification)\n        .filter(CompanyQualification.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n        .order_by(CompanyQualification.created_at.desc(), CompanyQualification.id.desc())\n        .first()\n    )\n\n\ndef precheck_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> CompanyQualification:\n    raw_data = candidate.raw_data or {}\n    employee_count = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"employee_count\"))\n    annual_revenue_eur = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"annual_revenue_eur\"))\n    balance_sheet_total_eur = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"balance_sheet_total_eur\"))\n    is_microenterprise = evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n        employee_count=employee_count,\n        annual_revenue_eur=annual_revenue_eur,\n        balance_sheet_total_eur=balance_sheet_total_eur,\n    )\n    is_mock = candidate.source == \"mock\" or raw_data.get(\"mock\") is True\n    website_signal = bool(candidate.domain)\n    b2c_signal = bool(candidate.category)\n\n    status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data\n    confidence_score = 0.3\n    notes = \"Company enrichment is required before this candidate can be treated as qualified.\"\n\n    if is_mock:\n        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review\n        confidence_score = 0.1\n        notes = \"Mock/test candidate; never treat as a real company qualification.\"\n    elif not candidate.company_name:\n        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data\n        confidence_score = 0.2\n    elif is_microenterprise is not None:\n        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review\n        confidence_score = 0.5\n\n    evidence: dict[str, Any] = {\n        \"source\": candidate.source,\n        \"source_reference\": candidate.source_reference,\n        \"is_seed_candidate\": True,\n        \"requires_company_enrichment\": True,\n        \"uses_external_company_data\": False,\n        \"is_mock_or_test_data\": is_mock,\n        \"has_company_name\": bool(candidate.company_name),\n        \"has_city\": bool(candidate.city),\n        \"has_category\": bool(candidate.category),\n        \"has_website\": website_signal,\n        \"has_employee_count\": employee_count is not None,\n        \"has_annual_revenue_eur\": annual_revenue_eur is not None,\n        \"has_balance_sheet_total_eur\": balance_sheet_total_eur is not None,\n    }\n\n    return CompanyQualification(\n        lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n        status=status,\n        company_name=candidate.company_name,\n        employee_count=employee_count,\n        annual_revenue_eur=annual_revenue_eur,\n        balance_sheet_total_eur=balance_sheet_total_eur,\n        is_microenterprise=is_microenterprise,\n        b2c_signal=b2c_signal,\n        bfsg_category_signal=candidate.category,\n        website_signal=website_signal,\n        confidence_score=confidence_score,\n        evidence=evidence,\n        notes=notes,\n    )\n\n\ndef _int_or_none(value: Any) -> int | None:\n    if value is None or value == \"\":\n        return None\n    try:\n        return int(value)\n    except (TypeError, ValueError):\n        return None\n\n\n__all__ = [\n    \"LeadCandidateNotFoundError\",\n    \"MicroenterpriseThresholds\",\n    \"create_candidate_precheck\",\n    \"evaluate_microenterprise_signal\",\n    \"get_latest_candidate_qualification\",\n    \"precheck_candidate\",\n]\n"
> }
> ```

>   "content": "from datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.db.session import get_db\nfrom app.discovery.keywords import get_keyword_groups\nfrom app.discovery.place_resolver import PlaceDataError, PlaceNotFoundError, resolve_city\nfrom APIRouter(prefix=\"/discovery\", tags=[\"discovery\"])\n\n\ndef _format_datetime(value: datetime | None) -> str | None:\n    return value.isoformat() if value else None\n\n\ndef _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run: DiscoveryRun) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": discovery_run.id,\n        \"city\": discovery_run.city,\n        \"normalized_city\": discovery_run.normalized_city,\n        \"status\": discovery_run.status.value,\n        \"postal_codes\": discovery_run.postal_codes,\n        \"keyword_groups\": discovery_run.keyword_groups,\n        \"query_plan\": discovery_run.query_plan,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(discovery_run.created_at),\n        \"completed_at\": _format_datetime(discovery_run.completed_at),\n        \"error_message\": discovery_run.error_message,\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": candidate.id,\n        \"discovery_run_id\": candidate.discovery_run_id,\n        \"source\": candidate.source,\n        \"source_reference\": candidate.source_reference,\n        \"company_name\": candidate.company_name,\n        \"domain\": candidate.domain,\n        \"city\": candidate.city,\n        \"postal_code\": candidate.postal_code,\n        \"address\": candidate.address,\n        \"phone\": candidate.phone,\n        \"category\": candidate.category,\n        \"raw_data\": candidate.raw_data,\n        \"confidence_score\": candidate.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(candidate.created_at),\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_qualification(qualification: CompanyQualification) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": qualification.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": qualification.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"status\": qualification.status.value,\n        \"company_name\": qualification.company_name,\n        \"legal_form\": qualification.legal_form,\n        \"registry_id\": qualification.registry_id,\n        \"northdata_url\": qualification.northdata_url,\n        \"employee_count\": qualification.employee_count,\n        \"annual_revenue_eur\": qualification.annual_revenue_eur,\n        \"balance_sheet_total_eur\": qualification.balance_sheet_total_eur,\n        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise,\n        \"b2c_signal\": qualification.b2c_signal,\n        \"bfsg_category_signal\": qualification.bfsg_category_signal,\n        \"website_signal\": qualification.website_signal,\n        \"confidence_score\": qualification.confidence_score,\n        \"evidence\": qualification.evidence,\n        \"notes\": qualification.notes,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(qualification.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(qualification.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/places/{city}\")\ndef get_places(city: str) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        matches = resolve_city(city)\n    except PlaceNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except PlaceDataError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n            detail=str(exc),\n        ) from exc\n\n    return {\"city\": city, \"matches\": [match.to_dict() for match in matches]}\n\n\n@router.get(\"/keywords\")\ndef get_keywords() -> dict[str, object]:\n    return {\"groups\": get_keyword_groups()}\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{city}\")\ndef create_run(city: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        discovery_run = create_discovery_run(db, city)\n    except PlaceNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except PlaceDataError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n            detail=str(exc),\n        ) from exc\n\n    return {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": discovery_run.id,\n        \"city\": discovery_run.city,\n        \"status\": discovery_run.status.value,\n        \"postal_codes_count\": len(discovery_run.postal_codes),\n        \"query_count\": len(discovery_run.query_plan),\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}\")\ndef read_run(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    try:\n        discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\ndef run_mock_provider(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    try:\n        summary = execute_mock_provider(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/google-places\")\ndef run_google_places_provider(\n    run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    try:\n        summary = execute_google_places_provider(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except GooglePlacesDisabledError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_503_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, detail=str(exc)\n        ) from exc\n    except GooglePlacesConfigurationError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\ndef read_run_candidates(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        candidates = list_lead_candidates(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": run_id,\n        \"candidates\": [_serialize_candidate(candidate) for candidate in candidates],\n    }\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\")\ndef run_candidate_qualification_precheck(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"candidate_id\": candidate_id,\n        \"qualification_id\": qualification.id,\n        \"status\": qualification.status.value,\n        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise,\n        \"confidence_score\": qualification.confidence_score,\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\")\ndef read_candidate_qualification(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        qualification = get_latest_candidate_qualification(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    if qualification is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n            detail=f\"Company qualification not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n        )\n    return _serialize_qualification(qualification)\n"

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/google-places-qualification-foundation",
>   "path": "tests/test_discovery_api.py",
>   "sha": "4c50cfeaf152968dc584c2d687ee38bf3b4af413",
>   "message": "Test Google Places and qualification endpoints",
>   "content": "import pytest\nfrom fastapi import FastAPI\nfrom fastapi.testclient import TestClient\nfrom sqlalchemy import create_engine\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\nfrom sqlalchemy.pool import StaticPool\n\nfrom app.api.discovery import router as discovery_router\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import get_db\nfrom app.models import CompanyQualification, DiscoveryRun, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n\n\n@pytest.fixture()\ndef db_session() -> Session:\n    engine = create_engine(\n        \"sqlite://\",\n        connect_args={\"check_same_thread\": False},\n        poolclass=StaticPool,\n    )\n    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n\n    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n    try:\n        yield session\n    finally:\n        session.close()\n        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n\n\ndef make_client(db_session: Session | None = None) -> TestClient:\n    app = FastAPI()\n    app.include_router(discovery_router)\n    if db_session is not None:\n        app.dependency_overrides[get_db] = lambda: db_session\n    return TestClient(app)\n\n\ndef test_keywords_endpoint_returns_structured_groups() -> None:\n    client = make_client()\n\n    response = client.get(\"/discovery/keywords\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    groups = response.json()[\"groups\"]\n    assert groups\n    assert {\"group_id\", \"label\", \"keywords\", \"bfsg_relevance_reason\", \"enabled\"}.issubset(\n        groups[0]\n    )\n    assert \"ecommerce\" in {group[\"group_id\"] for group in groups}\n\n\ndef test_places_endpoint_returns_luebeck_matches() -> None:\n    client = make_client()\n\n    response = client.get(\"/discovery/places/Lübeck\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    payload = response.json()\n    assert payload[\"city\"] == \"Lübeck\"\n    assert payload[\"matches\"]\n    assert {match[\"city\"] for match in payload[\"matches\"]} == {\"Lübeck\"}\n    assert any(match[\"postal_code\"] == \"23552\" for match in payload[\"matches\"])\n\n\ndef test_places_endpoint_accepts_luebeck_transliteration() -> None:\n    client = make_client()\n\n    response = client.get(\"/discovery/places/Luebeck\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    assert {match[\"city\"] for match in response.json()[\"matches\"]} == {\"Lübeck\"}\n\n\ndef test_create_discovery_run_endpoint_returns_done_and_query_count(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Lübeck\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    payload = response.json()\n    assert payload[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n    assert payload[\"city\"] == \"Lübeck\"\n    assert payload[\"status\"] == \"done\"\n    assert payload[\"postal_codes_count\"] > 0\n    assert payload[\"query_count\"] > 0\n\n\ndef test_get_discovery_run_endpoint_returns_stored_query_plan(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Lübeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n\n    response = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    payload = response.json()\n    assert payload[\"id\"] == run_id\n    assert payload[\"status\"] == \"done\"\n    assert payload[\"postal_codes\"]\n    assert payload[\"keyword_groups\"]\n    assert payload[\"query_plan\"]\n    assert payload[\"error_message\"] is None\n\n\ndef test_discovery_run_candidates_endpoint_returns_empty_list(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Lübeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n\n    response = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    assert response.json() == {\"discovery_run_id\": run_id, \"candidates\": []}\n\n\ndef test_mock_provider_endpoint_persists_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Lübeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n\n    provider_response = client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n    candidates_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n\n    assert provider_response.status_code == 200\n    assert provider_response.json() == {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": run_id,\n        \"provider\": \"mock\",\n        \"candidates_created\": 10,\n        \"candidates_total\": 10,\n    }\n    candidates = candidates_response.json()[\"candidates\"]\n    assert len(candidates) == 10\n    assert candidates[0][\"source\"] == \"mock\"\n    assert candidates[0][\"company_name\"].startswith(\"Mock Candidate Lübeck\")\n    assert candidates[0][\"raw_data\"][\"mock\"] is True\n\n\ndef test_google_places_endpoint_disabled_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Lübeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n\n    response = client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/google-places\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 503\n    assert response.json()[\"detail\"] == \"Google Places API provider is disabled\"\n\n\ndef test_candidate_qualification_precheck_for_mock_candidate(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Lübeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n    client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n    candidates = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\").json()[\"candidates\"]\n    candidate_id = candidates[0][\"id\"]\n\n    precheck_response = client.post(\n        f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\"\n    )\n    read_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\")\n\n    assert precheck_response.status_code == 200\n    precheck = precheck_response.json()\n    assert precheck[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n    assert precheck[\"status\"] == \"needs_human_review\"\n    assert precheck[\"is_microenterprise\"] is None\n    assert precheck[\"confidence_score\"] == 0.1\n\n    assert read_response.status_code == 200\n    qualification = read_response.json()\n    assert qualification[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n    assert qualification[\"status\"] == \"needs_human_review\"\n    assert qualification[\"evidence\"][\"is_mock_or_test_data\"] is True\n    assert qualification[\"evidence\"][\"requires_company_enrichment\"] is True\n\n\ndef test_qualification_unknown_candidate_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n    response = client.post(\"/discovery/candidates/missing/qualification/precheck\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 404\n    assert \"Lead candidate not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n\n\ndef test_mock_provider_endpoint_unknown_run_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/missing/providers/mock\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 404\n    assert \"Discovery run not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n\n\ndef test_create_discovery_run_unknown_city_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Atlantis\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 404\n    assert \"No places found for city: Atlantis\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n"
> }

>   "content": "import socket\n\nimport pytest\n\nfrom app.discovery.providers.google_places_provider import (\n    GooglePlacesConfigurationError,\n    GooglePlacesDisabledError,\n    GooglePlacesProvider,\n)\n\n\nQUERY_PLAN = [\n    {\n        \"city\": \"Lübeck\",\n        \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n        \"keyword_group_id\": \"ecommerce\",\n        \"keyword\": \"online shop\",\n        \"query_text\": \"Lübeck 23552 online shop\",\n    }\n]\n\n\nclass StubGooglePlacesProvider(GooglePlacesProvider):\n    def _fetch_text_search(self, query_text: str):\n        return {\n            \"places\": [\n                {\n                    \"id\": \"places/mock-place-id\",\n                    \"displayName\": {\"text\": \"Example Seed Company\"},\n                    \"websiteUri\": \"https://example.test\",\n                    \"formattedAddress\": \"Example Street 1, 23552 Lübeck\",\n                    \"nationalPhoneNumber\": \"+49 451 000000\",\n                    \"types\": [\"store\", \"point_of_interest\"],\n                }\n            ]\n        }\n\n\ndef test_google_places_provider_fails_when_disabled() -> None:\n    provider = GooglePlacesProvider(enabled=False, api_key=\"test-key\")\n\n    with pytest.raises(GooglePlacesDisabledError, match=\"provider is disabled\"):\n        provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n\n\ndef test_google_places_provider_fails_when_api_key_missing() -> None:\n    provider = GooglePlacesProvider(enabled=True, api_key=None)\n\n    with pytest.raises(GooglePlacesConfigurationError, match=\"API key is required\"):\n        provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n\n\ndef test_google_places_response_mapping_to_provider_result() -> None:\n    place = {\n        \"place_id\": \"legacy-place-id\",\n        \"displayName\": {\"text\": \"Mapped Seed Company\"},\n        \"websiteUri\": \"https://mapped.example\",\n        \"formattedAddress\": \"Mapped Street 2, 23552 Lübeck\",\n        \"internationalPhoneNumber\": \"+49 451 111111\",\n        \"types\": [\"bank\", \"finance\"],\n    }\n\n    result = GooglePlacesProvider.map_place_to_result(place, QUERY_PLAN[0])\n\n    assert result.source == \"google_places\"\n    assert result.source_reference == \"legacy-place-id\"\n    assert result.company_name == \"Mapped Seed Company\"\n    assert result.domain == \"https://mapped.example\"\n    assert result.address == \"Mapped Street 2, 23552 Lübeck\"\n    assert result.phone == \"+49 451 111111\"\n    assert result.category == \"bank\"\n    assert result.city == \"Lübeck\"\n    assert result.postal_code == \"23552\"\n    assert result.raw_data[\"query_text\"] == \"Lübeck 23552 online shop\"\n    assert result.raw_data[\"keyword_group_id\"] == \"ecommerce\"\n    assert result.raw_data[\"place\"] == place\n\n\ndef test_google_places_provider_search_can_be_mocked_without_network(monkeypatch) -> None:\n    def fail_network(*args, **kwargs):\n        raise AssertionError(\"network access is not allowed in this test\")\n\n    monkeypatch.setattr(socket, \"create_connection\", fail_network)\n\n    provider = StubGooglePlacesProvider(enabled=True, api_key=\"test-key\")\n    results = provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n\n    assert len(results) == 1\n    assert results[0].source == \"google_places\"\n    assert results[0].source_reference == \"places/mock-place-id\"\n    assert results[0].company_name == \"Example Seed Company\"\n"
> }
> ```

>   "message": "Test company qualification precheck service",
>   "content": "import pytest\nfrom sqlalchemy import create_engine\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.models import CompanyQualification, DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\nfrom app.services.company_qualification_service import (\n    MicroenterpriseThresholds,\n    create_candidate_precheck,\n    evaluate_microenterprise_signal,\n    precheck_candidate,\n)\n\n\n@pytest.fixture()\ndef db_session() -> Session:\n    engine = create_engine(\"sqlite:///:memory:\")\n    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n\n    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n    try:\n        yield session\n    finally:\n        session.close()\n        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n\n\ndef _create_run(db_session: Session) -> DiscoveryRun:\n    discovery_run = DiscoveryRun(\n        city=\"Lübeck\",\n        normalized_city=\"luebeck\",\n        status=DiscoveryRunStatus.done,\n        keyword_groups=[],\n        postal_codes=[\"23552\"],\n        query_plan=[],\n    )\n    db_session.add(discovery_run)\n    db_session.commit()\n    db_session.refresh(discovery_run)\n    return discovery_run\n\n\ndef test_precheck_candidate_with_missing_company_data_needs_company_data(\n    db_session: Session,\n) -> None:\n    discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n        source=\"google_places\",\n        source_reference=\"places/seed\",\n        company_name=\"Seed Candidate GmbH\",\n        city=\"Lübeck\",\n        postal_code=\"23552\",\n        category=\"store\",\n        raw_data={},\n    )\n    db_session.add(candidate)\n    db_session.commit()\n    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n\n    qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db_session, candidate.id)\n\n    assert qualification.status.value == \"needs_company_data\"\n    assert qualification.is_microenterprise is None\n    assert qualification.evidence[\"requires_company_enrichment\"] is True\n    assert qualification.evidence[\"uses_external_company_data\"] is False\n\n\ndef test_mock_candidate_precheck_does_not_create_legal_conclusion(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n        source=\"mock\",\n        source_reference=\"mock:luebeck:23552:ecommerce:online-shop\",\n        company_name=\"Mock Candidate Lübeck 23552 Online Shop\",\n        city=\"Lübeck\",\n        postal_code=\"23552\",\n        category=\"ecommerce\",\n        raw_data={\"mock\": True},\n    )\n    db_session.add(candidate)\n    db_session.commit()\n    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n\n    qualification = precheck_candidate(candidate)\n\n    assert qualification.status.value == \"needs_human_review\"\n    assert qualification.is_microenterprise is None\n    assert qualification.confidence_score == 0.1\n    assert qualification.evidence[\"is_mock_or_test_data\"] is True\n    assert \"legal\" not in qualification.notes.casefold()\n\n\ndef test_microenterprise_helper_returns_true_when_all_available_values_are_below_thresholds() -> None:\n    thresholds = MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n        employee_count=10,\n        annual_revenue_eur=2_000_000,\n        balance_sheet_total_eur=2_000_000,\n    )\n\n    assert (\n        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n            employee_count=9,\n            annual_revenue_eur=1_500_000,\n            balance_sheet_total_eur=1_000_000,\n            thresholds=thresholds,\n        )\n        is True\n    )\n\n\ndef test_microenterprise_helper_returns_false_when_threshold_is_exceeded() -> None:\n    thresholds = MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n        employee_count=10,\n        annual_revenue_eur=2_000_000,\n        balance_sheet_total_eur=2_000_000,\n    )\n\n    assert (\n        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n            employee_count=10,\n            annual_revenue_eur=1_000_000,\n            balance_sheet_total_eur=1_000_000,\n            thresholds=thresholds,\n        )\n        is False\n    )\n    assert (\n        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n            employee_count=5,\n            annual_revenue_eur=2_000_001,\n            balance_sheet_total_eur=None,\n            thresholds=thresholds,\n        )\n        is False\n    )\n\n\ndef test_microenterprise_helper_returns_none_when_required_data_is_missing() -> None:\n    thresholds = MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n        employee_count=10,\n        annual_revenue_eur=2_000_000,\n        balance_sheet_total_eur=2_000_000,\n    )\n\n    assert (\n        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n            employee_count=None,\n            annual_revenue_eur=1_000_000,\n            balance_sheet_total_eur=1_000_000,\n            thresholds=thresholds,\n        )\n        is None\n    )\n    assert (\n        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n            employee_count=5,\n            annual_revenue_eur=None,\n            balance_sheet_total_eur=None,\n            thresholds=thresholds,\n        )\n        is None\n    )\n"
> }

>
> ````json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/google-places-qualification-foundation",
>   "path": "README.md",
>   "sha": "c19fcdbf4fcf13b2149378b7eca7425ec3353bf8",
>   "message": "Document Google Places and qualification precheck foundation",
>   "content": "# NorthAccessBFSG\n\nNorthAccessBFSG is a FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n\nThe current scope includes backend infrastructure, asynchronous scans, raw accessibility findings, compliance mapping basics, evidence bundle storage, and a minimal Lead Discovery foundation for city, keyword, provider seed, and company precheck workflows.\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```text\napp/\n  __init__.py\n  main.py\n  api/\n    __init__.py\n    compliance.py\n    discovery.py\n    evidence.py\n    health.py\n    scans.py\n  compliance/\n    __init__.py\n    rule_engine.py\n    rules/\n      __init__.py\n      wcag_en_bfsg_map.json\n  core/\n    __init__.py\n    browser_config.py\n    celery.py\n    config.py\n  db/\n    __init__.py\n    base.py\n    init_db.py\n    session.py\n  discovery/\n    __init__.py\n    keywords.py\n    place_resolver.py\n    providers/\n      __init__.py\n      base.py\n      google_places_provider.py\n      mock_provider.py\n    query_planner.py\n  evidence/\n    __init__.py\n    hashing.py\n    storage.py\n    storage_backend.py\n  models/\n    company_qualification.py\n    discovery_run.py\n    lead_candidate.py\n  services/\n    company_qualification_service.py\n    discovery_service.py\n    provider_execution_service.py\n  workers/\ndata/\n  orte_deutschland.csv\n04_filter_quality.py\n05_run_pipeline.py\n13_city_guard.py\n14_evidence_gate.py\n15_run_pipeline_guarded.py\nDockerfile\ndocker-compose.yml\nrequirements.txt\n.env.example\n```\n\n## Run\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose up --build\n```\n\nThen open:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/health\n```\n\nExpected response:\n\n```json\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}\n```\n\nThe API waits for PostgreSQL and Redis to become healthy, connects with SQLAlchemy, and auto-creates the database tables on startup.\n\n## Lead Discovery Foundation\n\nThe canonical raw city data file is:\n\n```text\ndata/orte_deutschland.csv\n```\n\nThe file is semicolon-separated and must contain these columns:\n\n```text\nplz;stadt\n```\n\nThe resolver treats this file as raw input. The `stadt` column may contain real city names as well as organizations or special postal recipients, so city resolution uses exact normalized city-name matching only. It does not use substring matching.\n\nSupported normalization includes case-insensitive matching and German umlaut handling:\n\n```text\nLübeck -> Luebeck -> lubeck\n```\n\nDiscovery endpoints:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/places/Lübeck\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/places/Luebeck\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/places/lubeck\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/keywords\n```\n\nExample place response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"city\": \"Lübeck\",\n  \"matches\": [\n    {\n      \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n      \"city\": \"Lübeck\",\n      \"country\": \"DE\"\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```\n\n## Discovery Query Planner\n\nA discovery run is a dry-run planning record. It resolves a city to postal codes, combines those postal codes with enabled keyword groups, and persists a deterministic query plan for a later external provider integration.\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/Lübeck\n```\n\nExample response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"discovery_run_id\": \"<run-id>\",\n  \"city\": \"Lübeck\",\n  \"status\": \"done\",\n  \"postal_codes_count\": 12,\n  \"query_count\": 336\n}\n```\n\nFetch a stored run and its candidate list:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/candidates\n```\n\n## Discovery Providers\n\nProvider adapters execute a stored query plan and persist `LeadCandidate` rows. These rows are seed candidates only. They are not confirmed BFSG applicability, accessibility findings, legal obligations, violations, or legal conclusions.\n\n### Mock Provider\n\nThe mock provider creates bounded, deterministic test candidates with obvious test names, for example `Mock Candidate Lübeck 23552 Online Shop`.\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/mock\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/candidates\n```\n\nExample provider response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"discovery_run_id\": \"<run-id>\",\n  \"provider\": \"mock\",\n  \"candidates_created\": 10,\n  \"candidates_total\": 10\n}\n```\n\n### Google Places API Provider\n\nThe Google Places API provider is disabled by default. Tests do not call Google, and normal local runs do not require an API key.\n\nRequired environment settings for live use:\n\n```text\nGOOGLE_PLACES_ENABLED=false\nGOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY=\nGOOGLE_PLACES_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=10\nGOOGLE_PLACES_MAX_RESULTS_PER_QUERY=5\n```\n\nEndpoint:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/google-places\n```\n\nIf disabled or missing configuration, the endpoint returns a clear error and does not make an external call. If enabled with a key, Places API responses are mapped into raw `LeadCandidate` seed rows with `source=\"google_places\"`.\n\nGoogle Places API results are only seed candidates. Northdata-style or comparable company enrichment is required before any candidate can be treated as qualified for downstream audit consideration.\n\n## Company Qualification Precheck\n\n`CompanyQualification` stores precheck signals for a `LeadCandidate`. It is a signal and review layer only. It does not make legal conclusions and it does not call Northdata or any external company-data provider yet.\n\nPrecheck endpoints:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\n```\n\nThe precheck records available signals such as company name, category, website availability, optional employee/revenue/balance values if already present, confidence, and review status. Missing company data results in `needs_company_data` or `needs_human_review` rather than final qualification. Mock/test candidates remain clearly marked as test data.\n\nConfigured microenterprise signal thresholds:\n\n```text\nBFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_EMPLOYEE_THRESHOLD=10\nBFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_REVENUE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\nBFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_BALANCE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n```\n\nThese thresholds are only used as precheck signals. They are not legal scoring and they are not final applicability decisions.\n\nThis discovery layer does not scrape websites, does not perform reporting, and does not run accessibility scans for seed candidates automatically.\n\n## Guarded Pipeline\n\nThe numbered guarded pipeline files validate that runtime dependencies are present and that the canonical city CSV is usable:\n\n```bash\npython -m py_compile \\\n  04_filter_quality.py \\\n  05_run_pipeline.py \\\n  13_city_guard.py \\\n  14_evidence_gate.py \\\n  15_run_pipeline_guarded.py\n\npython 15_run_pipeline_guarded.py\n```\n\nThe guarded runner fails if `data/orte_deutschland.csv` is missing, unreadable, missing required columns, header-only, or contains zero usable rows.\n\n## Async Scan Flow\n\nCreate a lead directly in the database while a public lead API does not exist yet:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"INSERT INTO leads (id, domain, company_name) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'https://example.com', 'Example') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;\"\n```\n\nRun a scan for the lead:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111\n```\n\nExpected immediate response:\n\n```json\n{\"scan_id\":\"<scan-id>\"}\n```\n\nThe API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker launches Playwright headless Chromium, loads the lead domain, runs axe-core, captures evidence metadata, and persists raw findings.\n\nLifecycle:\n\n```text\npending -> running -> processing -> done\n```\n\nIf task execution fails, the worker marks the scan as `failed` and stores `error_message`.\n\n## Compliance Mapping Flow\n\nRun deterministic compliance mapping for a completed scan:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/compliance/run/{scan_id}\n```\n\nCompliance results are stored separately in `compliance_findings`. Raw `findings` rows are never overwritten. Re-running the endpoint updates the same `finding_id` + `mapping_version` compliance rows and removes stale rows for that scan/version.\n\n## Browser Configuration\n\nThe worker defaults to Chromium and also installs Firefox:\n\n```text\nBROWSER_NAME=chromium\nBROWSER_HEADLESS=true\nBROWSER_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS=30000\nBROWSER_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=10000\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=1440\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=900\nBROWSER_RETRIES=1\nBROWSER_WAIT_UNTIL=networkidle\n```\n\nWebKit is supported by configuration but is not installed in the default image.\n"
> }
> ````
>

> ```text
> {"content": "import socket\n\nimport pytest\n\nfrom app.discovery.providers.google_places_provider import (\n    GooglePlacesConfigurationError,\n    GooglePlacesDisabledError,\n    GooglePlacesProvider,\n)\n\n\nQUERY_PLAN = [\n    {\n        \"city\": \"L\u00fcbeck\",\n        \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n        \"keyword_group_id\": \"ecommerce\",\n        \"keyword\": \"online shop\",\n        \"query_text\": \"L\u00fcbeck 23552 online shop\",\n    }\n]\n\n\nclass StubGooglePlacesProvider(GooglePlacesProvider):\n    def _fetch_text_search(self, query_text: str):\n        return {\n            \"places\": [\n                {\n                    \"id\": \"places/mock-place-id\",\n                    \"displayName\": {\"text\": \"Example Seed Company\"},\n                    \"websiteUri\": \"https://example.test\",\n                    \"formattedAddress\": \"Example Street 1, 23552 L\u00fcbeck\",\n                    \"nationalPhoneNumber\": \"+49 451 000000\",\n                    \"types\": [\"store\", \"point_of_interest\"],\n                }\n            ]\n        }\n\n\ndef test_google_places_provider_fails_when_disabled() -> None:\n    provider = GooglePlacesProvider(enabled=False, api_key=\"test-key\")\n\n    with pytest.raises(GooglePlacesDisabledError, match=\"provider is disabled\"):\n        provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n\n\ndef test_google_places_provider_fails_when_api_key_missing() -> None:\n    provider = GooglePlacesProvider(enabled=True, api_key=None)\n\n    with pytest.raises(GooglePlacesConfigurationError, match=\"API key is required\"):\n        provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n\n\ndef test_google_places_response_mapping_to_provider_result() -> None:\n    place = {\n        \"place_id\": \"legacy-place-id\",\n        \"displayName\": {\"text\": \"Mapped Seed Company\"},\n        \"websiteUri\": \"https://mapped.example\",\n        \"formattedAddress\": \"Mapped Street 2, 23552 L\u00fcbeck\",\n        \"internationalPhoneNumber\": \"+49 451 111111\",\n        \"types\": [\"bank\", \"finance\"],\n    }\n\n    result = GooglePlacesProvider.map_place_to_result(place, QUERY_PLAN[0])\n\n    assert result.source == \"google_places\"\n    assert result.source_reference == \"legacy-place-id\"\n    assert result.company_name == \"Mapped Seed Company\"\n    assert result.domain == \"https://mapped.example\"\n    assert result.address == \"Mapped Street 2, 23552 L\u00fcbeck\"\n    assert result.phone == \"+49 451 111111\"\n    assert result.category == \"bank\"\n    assert result.city == \"L\u00fcbeck\"\n    assert result.postal_code == \"23552\"\n    assert result.raw_data[\"query_text\"] == \"L\u00fcbeck 23552 online shop\"\n    assert result.raw_data[\"keyword_group_id\"] == \"ecommerce\"\n    assert result.raw_data[\"place\"] == place\n\n\ndef test_google_places_provider_search_can_be_mocked_without_network(monkeypatch) -> None:\n    def fail_network(*args, **kwargs):\n        raise AssertionError(\"network access is not allowed in this test\")\n\n    monkeypatch.setattr(socket, \"create_connection\", fail_network)\n\n    provider = StubGooglePlacesProvider(enabled=True, api_key=\"test-key\")\n    results = provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n\n    assert len(results) == 1\n    assert results[0].source == \"google_places\"\n    assert results[0].source_reference == \"places/mock-place-id\"\n    assert results[0].company_name == \"Example Seed Company\"\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha":   - `GET /discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification`

>
> # Goal
> Add a company enrichment foundation for Northdata-style/company-register signals.
>
> Important:
> This is NOT a live Northdata integration yet.
> Do NOT scrape Northdata.
> Do NOT scrape websites.
> Do NOT make external network calls in tests.
> Do NOT add legal conclusions.
> Do NOT mark candidates as legally obligated.
>
> This step prepares the enrichment layer that later allows checking:
> - legal form
> - registry ID
> - company-data source URL
> - employee count signal
> - annual revenue signal
> - balance sheet total signal
> - company identity confidence
>
> # Required Work
>
> ## 1. Add company enrichment model
>
> Create:
>
> app/models/company_enrichment.py
>
> Fields:
> - id
> - lead_candidate_id FK
> - source
> - source_reference nullable
> - company_name nullable
> - legal_form nullable
> - registry_id nullable
> - source_url nullable
> - employee_count nullable
> - annual_revenue_eur nullable
> - balance_sheet_total_eur nullable
> - raw_data JSON
> - confidence_score nullable
> - created_at
> - updated_at
>
> Important:
> - This is evidence/signal data only.
> - No legal conclusion.
> - No final BFSG applicability decision.
>
> Wire into:
> - app/models/__init__.py
> - app/db/init_db.py
>
> ## 2. Add company enrichment provider abstraction
>
> Create:
>
> app/enrichment/providers/base.py
>
> Define:
> - CompanyEnrichmentProvider protocol or abstract base class
> - CompanyEnrichmentResult data object
>
> Fields:
> - source
> - source_reference nullable
> - company_name nullable
> - legal_form nullable
> - registry_id nullable
> - source_url nullable
> - employee_count nullable
> - annual_revenue_eur nullable
> - balance_sheet_total_eur nullable
> - raw_data dict
> - confidence_score nullable
>
> ## 3. Add mock company enrichment provider
>
> Create:
>
> app/enrichment/providers/mock_company_provider.py
>
> It should:
> - accept a LeadCandidate
> - return deterministic mock enrichment results
> - never claim real company data
> - clearly mark raw_data as mock/test data
> - allow test cases for:
>   - missing company data
>   - microenterprise-like data
>   - non-microenterprise-like data
>
> No external calls.
>
> ## 4. Add enrichment service
>
> Create:
>
> app/services/company_enrichment_service.py
>
> Expose:
> - enrich_candidate_with_mock(db, candidate_id: str) -> summary/result
> - get_latest_enrichment(db, candidate_id: str)
>
> It should:
> - fail clearly if candidate not found
> - persist CompanyEnrichment
> - be idempotent where practical
> - not overwrite LeadCandidate directly
> - not make legal conclusions
>
> ## 5. Integrate enrichment with qualification update
>
> Extend company_qualification_service minimally:
>
> When a candidate has latest CompanyEnrichment:
> - use employee_count, annual_revenue_eur, balance_sheet_total_eur to calculate is_microenterprise signal
> - update status according to signal logic:
>   - missing company data -> needs_company_data or needs_human_review
>   - microenterprise=True -> likely_not_applicable or needs_human_review depending on category/source
>   - microenterprise=False -> possible_bfsg_candidate if B2C/category/website signals exist, otherwise needs_human_review
> - preserve evidence explaining why
>
> Important:
> - Do NOT say "legally obligated".
> - Do NOT say "violates BFSG".
> - Only signal likelihood and review need.
>
> ## 6. Add API endpoints
>
> Add:
>
> POST /discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock
>
> Response:
> {
>   "candidate_id": "...",
>   "enrichment_id": "...",
>   "source": "mock_company_data",
>   "confidence_score": 0.5
> }
>
> GET /discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment
>
> Returns latest enrichment if present.
>
> Qualification precheck should use enrichment if available.
>
> ## 7. Tests
>
> Add tests for:
> - mock enrichment persists CompanyEnrichment
> - latest enrichment endpoint works
> - unknown candidate fails clearly
> - qualification precheck uses enrichment data
> - microenterprise helper still works
> - non-microenterprise signals produce possible_bfsg_candidate only when enough category/B2C signals exist
> - no external calls are made
>
> ## 8. README
>
> Update README:
> - document enrichment endpoints
> - clarify mock enrichment is test data only
> - clarify future Northdata/company-register integration belongs behind this layer
> - clarify no scraping and no legal conclusions

Northdata-style or comparable company enrichment is required before any candidate can be treated as qualified for downstream audit consideration.\n+\n+## Company Qualification Precheck\n+\n+`CompanyQualification` stores precheck signals for a `LeadCandidate`. It is a signal and review layer only. It does not make legal conclusions and it does not call Northdata or any external company-data provider yet.\n+\n+Precheck endpoints:\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\n+curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\n+```\n+\n+The precheck records available signals such as company name, category, website availability, optional employee/revenue/balance values if already present, confidence, and review status. Missing company data results in `needs_company_data` or `needs_human_review` rather than final qualification. Mock/test candidates remain clearly marked as test data.\n+\n+Configured microenterprise signal thresholds:\n+\n+```text\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_EMPLOYEE_THRESHOLD=10\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_REVENUE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_BALANCE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n+```\n+\n+These thresholds are only used as precheck signals. settings.google_places_max_results_per_query\n+        )\n+\n+    def search(self, query_plan: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> list[ProviderResult]:\n+        self._ensure_enabled()\n+\n+        results: payload.get(\"results\") or []\n+            for place in places[: self.max_results_per_query]:\n+                results.append(self.map_place_to_result(place, entry))\n+        return results\n+\n+    def _ensure_enabled(self) -> None:\n+        if not self.enabled:\n+            raise GooglePlacesDisabledError(\"Google Places API provider is disabled\")\n+        if not self.api_key:\n+            raise GooglePlacesConfigurationError(\n+                \"Google Places API key is required when provider is enabled\"\n+            )\n+\n+    def _fetch_text_search(self, query_text: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        request_payload = {\n+            \"textQuery\": query_text,\n+            \"maxResultCount\": self.max_results_per_query,\n+        }\n+        headers = {\n+            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n+            \"X-Goog-Api-Key\": self.api_key or \"\",\n+            \"X-Goog-FieldMask\": GOOGLE_PLACES_FIELD_MASK,\n+        }\n+        with httpx.Client(timeout=self.timeout_seconds) as client:\n+            response = client.post(\n+                GOOGLE_PLACES_TEXT_SEARCH_URL,\n+                headers=headers,\n+                json=request_payload,\n+            )\n+            response.raise_for_status()\n+            return response.json()\n+\n+    @classmethod\n+    def map_place_to_result(\n+        cls, place: dict[str, Any], query_entry: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n+    ) -> ProviderResult:\n+        query_entry = query_entry or {}\n+        display_name = place.get(\"displayName\") or place.get(\"display_name\") or {}\n+        company_name = (\n+            display_name.get(\"text\")\n+            if isinstance(display_name, dict)\n+            else None\n+        ) or place.get(\"name\")\n+\n+        types = place.get(\"types\") or []\n+        if not isinstance(types, list):\n+            types = []\n+        source_reference = place.get(\"place_id\") or place.get(\"id\") or place.get(\"name\")\n+        raw_data = {\n+            \"provider\": cls.source,\n+            \"query_text\": query_entry.get(\"query_text\"),\n+            \"keyword_group_id\": query_entry.get(\"keyword_group_id\"),\n+            \"keyword\": query_entry.get(\"keyword\"),\n+            \"place\": place,\n+        }\n+\n+        return ProviderResult(\n+            source=cls.source,\n+            source_reference=source_reference,\n+            company_name=company_name,\n+            domain=place.get(\"websiteUri\") or place.get(\"website\"),\n+            city=query_entry.get(\"city\"),\n+            postal_code=query_entry.get(\"postal_code\"),\n+            address=place.get(\"formattedAddress\") or place.get(\"formatted_address\"),\n+            phone=(\n+                place.get(\"nationalPhoneNumber\")\n+                or place.get(\"internationalPhoneNumber\")\n+                or place.get(\"formatted_phone_number\")\n+            ),\n+            category=types[0] if types else None,\n+            raw_data=raw_data,\n+            confidence_score=0.4,\n+        )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"GOOGLE_PLACES_SOURCE\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesConfigurationError\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesDisabledError\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesProvider\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesProviderError\",\n+]\n@@ -1,3 +1,7 @@\n+from app.models.company_qualification import (\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+)\n from app.models.compliance_finding import ComplianceFinding\n from annotations\n+\n+import enum\n+import uuid\n+from datetime import datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from sqlalchemy import JSON, Boolean, DateTime, Enum, Float, ForeignKey, Integer, String, Text, func\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+\n+\n+class CompanyQualificationStatus(str, enum.Enum):\n+    pending = \"pending\"\n+    needs_company_data = \"needs_company_data\"\n+    likely_not_applicable = \"likely_not_applicable\"\n+    possible_bfsg_candidate = \"possible_bfsg_candidate\"\n+    needs_human_review = \"needs_human_review\"\n+    rejected = \"rejected\"\n+\n+\n+class CompanyQualification(Base):\n+    __tablename__ = \"company_qualifications\"\n+\n+    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n+    )\n+    lead_candidate_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"lead_candidates.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"),\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    status: Mapped[CompanyQualificationStatus] = mapped_column(\n+        Enum(CompanyQualificationStatus, name=\"company_qualification_status\"),\n+        default=CompanyQualificationStatus.pending,\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    company_name: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n+    legal_form: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)\n+    registry_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)\n+    northdata_url: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)\n+    employee_count: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n+    annual_revenue_eur: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n+    is_microenterprise: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n+    b2c_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n+    bfsg_category_signal: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n+    website_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n+    confidence_score: Mapped[float | None] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)\n+    evidence: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\n+    notes: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n+    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n+    )\n+    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True),\n+        server_default=func.now(),\n+        onupdate=func.now(),\n+        nullable=False,\n+    )\n+\n+    lead_candidate: Mapped[\"LeadCandidate\"] = relationship(\n+        \"LeadCandidate\", back_populates=\"qualifications\"\n+    )\n@@ -40,3 +40,8 @@ class LeadCandidate(Base):\n     discovery_run: Mapped[\"DiscoveryRun\"] = relationship(\n         \"DiscoveryRun\", back_populates=\"candidates\"\n     )\n+    qualifications: Mapped[list[\"CompanyQualification\"]] = relationship(\n+        \"CompanyQualification\",\n+        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n+        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n+    )\n@@ -0,0 +1,166 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n+\n+from app.core.config import get_settings\n+from app.models.company_qualification import (\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+)\n+from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+\n+\n+class LeadCandidateNotFoundError(LookupError):\n+    pass\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class MicroenterpriseThresholds:\n+    employee_count: int\n+    annual_revenue_eur: int\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur: int\n+\n+\n+def get_microenterprise_thresholds() -> MicroenterpriseThresholds:\n+    settings = get_settings()\n+    return MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n+        employee_count=settings.bfsg_microenterprise_employee_threshold,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=settings.bfsg_microenterprise_revenue_threshold_eur,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=settings.bfsg_microenterprise_balance_threshold_eur,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+    *,\n+    employee_count: int | None,\n+    annual_revenue_eur: int | None,\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur: int | None,\n+    thresholds: MicroenterpriseThresholds | None = None,\n+) -> bool | None:\n+    thresholds = thresholds or get_microenterprise_thresholds()\n+    financial_values = [\n+        value for value in (annual_revenue_eur, balance_sheet_total_eur) if value is not None\n+    ]\n+    if employee_count is None or not financial_values:\n+        return None\n+    if employee_count >= thresholds.employee_count:\n+        return False\n+    if annual_revenue_eur is not None and annual_revenue_eur > thresholds.annual_revenue_eur:\n+        return False\n+    if (\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur is not None\n+        and balance_sheet_total_eur > thresholds.balance_sheet_total_eur\n+    ):\n+        return False\n+    return True\n+\n+\n+def create_candidate_precheck(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyQualification:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    qualification = precheck_candidate(candidate)\n+    db.add(qualification)\n+    db.commit()\n+    db.refresh(qualification)\n+    return qualification\n+\n+\n+def get_latest_candidate_qualification(\n+    db: Session, candidate_id: str\n+) -> CompanyQualification | None:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    return (\n+        db.query(CompanyQualification)\n+        .filter(CompanyQualification.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(CompanyQualification.created_at.desc(), CompanyQualification.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def precheck_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> CompanyQualification:\n+    raw_data = candidate.raw_data or {}\n+    employee_count = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"employee_count\"))\n+    annual_revenue_eur = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"annual_revenue_eur\"))\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"balance_sheet_total_eur\"))\n+    is_microenterprise = evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+        employee_count=employee_count,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=annual_revenue_eur,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=balance_sheet_total_eur,\n+    )\n+    is_mock = candidate.source == \"mock\" or raw_data.get(\"mock\") is True\n+    website_signal = bool(candidate.domain)\n+    b2c_signal = bool(candidate.category)\n+\n+    status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data\n+    confidence_score = 0.3\n+    notes = \"Company enrichment is required before this candidate can be treated as qualified.\"\n+\n+    if is_mock:\n+        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review\n+        confidence_score = 0.1\n+        notes = \"Mock/test candidate; never treat as a real company qualification.\"\n+    elif not candidate.company_name:\n+        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data\n+        confidence_score = 0.2\n+    elif is_microenterprise is not None:\n+        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review\n+        confidence_score = 0.5\n+\n+    evidence: dict[str, Any] = {\n+        \"source\": candidate.source,\n+        \"source_reference\": candidate.source_reference,\n+        \"is_seed_candidate\": True,\n+        \"requires_company_enrichment\": True,\n+        \"uses_external_company_data\": False,\n+        \"is_mock_or_test_data\": is_mock,\n+        \"has_company_name\": bool(candidate.company_name),\n+        \"has_city\": bool(candidate.city),\n+        \"has_category\": bool(candidate.category),\n+        \"has_website\": website_signal,\n+        \"has_employee_count\": employee_count is not None,\n+        \"has_annual_revenue_eur\": annual_revenue_eur is not None,\n+        \"has_balance_sheet_total_eur\": balance_sheet_total_eur is not None,\n+    }\n+\n+    return CompanyQualification(\n+        lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n+        status=status,\n+        company_name=candidate.company_name,\n+        employee_count=employee_count,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=annual_revenue_eur,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=balance_sheet_total_eur,\n+        is_microenterprise=is_microenterprise,\n+        b2c_signal=b2c_signal,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=candidate.category,\n+        website_signal=website_signal,\n+        confidence_score=confidence_score,\n+        evidence=evidence,\n+        notes=notes,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _int_or_none(value: Any) -> int | None:\n+    if value is None or value == \"\":\n+        return None\n+    try:\n+        return int(value)\n+    except (TypeError, ValueError):\n+        return None\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"LeadCandidateNotFoundError\",\n+    \"MicroenterpriseThresholds\",\n+    \"create_candidate_precheck\",\n+    \"evaluate_microenterprise_signal\",\n+    \"get_latest_candidate_qualification\",\n+    \"precheck_candidate\",\n+]\n@@ -4,7 +4,8 @@\n \n from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n \n-from app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import DiscoveryProvider, ProviderResult\n+from app.discovery.providers.google_places_provider import GooglePlacesProvider\n from app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\n from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n from app.services.discovery_service import DiscoveryRunNotFoundError, get_discovery_run\n@@ -27,8 +28,19 @@ def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n \n \n def execute_mock_provider(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    return execute_provider(db, discovery_run_id, MockDiscoveryProvider())\n+\n+\n+def execute_google_places_provider(\n+    db: Session, discovery_run_id: str\n+) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    return execute_provider(db, discovery_run_id, GooglePlacesProvider())\n+\n+\n+def execute_provider(\n+    db: Session, discovery_run_id: str, provider: DiscoveryProvider\n+) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n     discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, discovery_run_id)\n-    provider = MockDiscoveryProvider()\n     results = provider.search(discovery_run.query_plan)\n \n     candidates_created = 0\n@@ -91,5 +103,7 @@ def _candidate_from_provider_result(\n __all__ = [\n DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n+from app.services.company_qualification_service import (\n+    MicroenterpriseThresholds,\n+    create_candidate_precheck,\n+    evaluate_microenterprise_signal,\n+    precheck_candidate,\n+)\n+\n+\n+@pytest.fixture()\n+def db_session() -> Session:\n+    engine = create_engine(\"sqlite:///:memory:\")\n+    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n+    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n+    try:\n+        yield session\n+    finally:\n+        session.close()\n+        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+\n+def _create_run(db_session: Session) -> DiscoveryRun:\n+    discovery_run = DiscoveryRun(\n+        city=\"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        normalized_city=\"luebeck\",\n+        status=DiscoveryRunStatus.done,\n+        keyword_groups=[],\n+        postal_codes=[\"23552\"],\n+        query_plan=[],\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(discovery_run)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(discovery_run)\n+    return discovery_run\n+\n+\n+def test_precheck_candidate_with_missing_company_data_needs_company_data(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+) -> None:\n+    discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n+    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n+        source=\"google_places\",\n+        source_reference=\"places/seed\",\n+        company_name=\"Seed Candidate GmbH\",\n+        city=\"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        postal_code=\"23552\",\n+        category=\"store\",\n+        raw_data={},\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(candidate)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n+\n+    qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert qualification.status.value == \"needs_company_data\"\n+    assert qualification.is_microenterprise is None\n+    assert qualification.evidence[\"requires_company_enrichment\"] is True\n+    assert qualification.evidence[\"uses_external_company_data\"] is False\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_candidate_precheck_does_not_create_legal_conclusion(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n+    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n+        source=\"mock\",\n+        source_reference=\"mock:luebeck:23552:ecommerce:online-shop\",\n+        company_name=\"Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck 23552 Online Shop\",\n+        city=\"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        postal_code=\"23552\",\n+        category=\"ecommerce\",\n+        raw_data={\"mock\": True},\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(candidate)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n+\n+    qualification = precheck_candidate(candidate)\n+\n+    assert qualification.status.value == \"needs_human_review\"\n+    assert qualification.is_microenterprise is None\n+    assert qualification.confidence_score == 0.1\n+    assert qualification.evidence[\"is_mock_or_test_data\"] is True\n+    assert \"legal\" not in qualification.notes.casefold()\n+\n+\n+def test_microenterprise_helper_returns_true_when_all_available_values_are_below_thresholds() -> None:\n+    thresholds = MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n+        employee_count=10,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=2_000_000,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=2_000_000,\n+    )\n+\n+    assert (\n+        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+            employee_count=9,\n+            annual_revenue_eur=1_500_000,\n+            balance_sheet_total_eur=1_000_000,\n+            thresholds=thresholds,\n+        )\n+        is True\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def test_microenterprise_helper_returns_false_when_threshold_is_exceeded() -> None:\n+    thresholds = MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n+        employee_count=10,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=2_000_000,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=2_000_000,\n+    )\n+\n+    assert (\n+        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+            employee_count=10,\n+            annual_revenue_eur=1_000_000,\n+            balance_sheet_total_eur=1_000_000,\n+            thresholds=thresholds,\n+        )\n+        is False\n+    )\n+    assert (\n+        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+            employee_count=5,\n+            annual_revenue_eur=2_000_001,\n+            balance_sheet_total_eur=None,\n+            thresholds=thresholds,\n+        )\n+        is False\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def test_microenterprise_helper_returns_none_when_required_data_is_missing() -> None:\n+    thresholds = MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n+        employee_count=10,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=2_000_000,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=2_000_000,\n+    )\n+\n+    assert (\n+        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+            employee_count=None,\n+            annual_revenue_eur=1_000_000,\n+            balance_sheet_total_eur=1_000_000,\n+            thresholds=thresholds,\n+        )\n+        is None\n+    )\n+    assert (\n+        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+            employee_count=5,\n+            annual_revenue_eur=None,\n+            balance_sheet_total_eur=None,\n+            thresholds=thresholds,\n+        )\n+        is None\n+    )\n@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@\n from
