@@\n+import socket\n+\n+import pytest\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.google_places_provider import (\n+    GooglePlacesConfigurationError,\n+    GooglePlacesDisabledError,\n+    GooglePlacesProvider,\n+)\n+\n+\n+QUERY_PLAN = [\n+    {\n+        \"city\": \"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n+        \"keyword_group_id\": \"ecommerce\",\n+        \"keyword\": \"online shop\",\n+        \"query_text\": \"L\u00fcbeck 23552 online shop\",\n+    }\n+]\n+\n+\n+class StubGooglePlacesProvider(GooglePlacesProvider):\n+    def _fetch_text_search(self, query_text: str):\n+        return {\n+            \"places\": [\n+                {\n+                    \"id\": \"places/mock-place-id\",\n+                    \"displayName\": {\"text\": \"Example Seed Company\"},\n+                    \"websiteUri\": \"https://example.test\",\n+                    \"formattedAddress\": \"Example Street 1, 23552 L\u00fcbeck\",\n+                    \"nationalPhoneNumber\": \"+49 451 000000\",\n+                    \"types\": [\"store\", \"point_of_interest\"],\n+                }\n+            ]\n+        }\n+\n+\n+def test_google_places_provider_fails_when_disabled() -> None:\n+    provider = GooglePlacesProvider(enabled=False, api_key=\"test-key\")\n+\n+    with pytest.raises(GooglePlacesDisabledError, match=\"provider is disabled\"):\n+        provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+\n+def test_google_places_provider_fails_when_api_key_missing() -> None:\n+    provider = GooglePlacesProvider(enabled=True, api_key=\"\")\n+\n+    with pytest.raises(GooglePlacesConfigurationError, match=\"API key is required\"):\n+        provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+\n+def test_google_places_response_mapping_to_provider_result() -> None:\n+    place = {\n+        \"place_id\": \"legacy-place-id\",\n+        \"displayName\": {\"text\": \"Mapped Seed Company\"},\n+        \"websiteUri\": \"https://mapped.example\",\n+        \"formattedAddress\": \"Mapped Street 2, 23552 L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        \"internationalPhoneNumber\": \"+49 451 111111\",\n+        \"types\": [\"bank\", \"finance\"],\n+    }\n+\n+    result = GooglePlacesProvider.map_place_to_result(place, QUERY_PLAN[0])\n+\n+    assert result.source == \"google_places\"\n+    assert result.source_reference == \"legacy-place-id\"\n+    assert result.company_name == \"Mapped Seed Company\"\n+    assert result.domain == \"https://mapped.example\"\n+    assert result.address == \"Mapped Street 2, 23552 L\u00fcbeck\"\n+    assert result.phone == \"+49 451 111111\"\n+    assert result.category == \"bank\"\n+    assert result.city == \"L\u00fcbeck\"\n+    assert result.postal_code == \"23552\"\n+    assert result.raw_data[\"query_text\"] == \"L\u00fcbeck 23552 online shop\"\n+    assert result.raw_data[\"keyword_group_id\"] == \"ecommerce\"\n+    assert result.raw_data[\"place\"] == place\n+\n+\n+def test_google_places_provider_search_can_be_mocked_without_network(monkeypatch) -> None:\n+    def fail_network(*args, **kwargs):\n+        raise AssertionError(\"network access is not allowed in this test\")\n+\n+    monkeypatch.setattr(socket, \"create_connection\", fail_network)\n+\n+    provider = StubGooglePlacesProvider(enabled=True, api_key=\"test-key\")\n+    results = provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+    assert len(results) == 1\n+    assert results[0].source == \"google_places\"\n+    assert results[0].source_reference == \"places/mock-place-id\"\n+    assert results[0].company_name == \"Example Seed Company\"", "files": [{"filename": ".env.example", "patch": "@@ -16,3 +16,10 @@ EVIDENCE_S3_BUCKET=\n EVIDENCE_S3_PREFIX=northaccessbfsg/evidence\n EVIDENCE_S3_ENDPOINT_URL=\n EVIDENCE_S3_REGION=eu-central-1\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_ENABLED=false\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY=\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=10\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_MAX_RESULTS_PER_QUERY=5\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_EMPLOYEE_THRESHOLD=10\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_REVENUE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_BALANCE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000"}, {"filename": "README.md", "patch": "@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@\n \n NorthAccessBFSG is a FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n \n-The current scope includes backend infrastructure, asynchronous scans, raw accessibility findings, compliance mapping basics, evidence bundle storage, and a minimal Lead Discovery foundation for city and keyword resolution.\n+The current scope includes backend infrastructure, asynchronous scans, raw accessibility findings, compliance mapping basics, evidence bundle storage, and a minimal Lead Discovery foundation for city, keyword, provider seed, and company precheck workflows.\n \n ## Project Structure\n \n@@ -40,6 +40,7 @@ app/\n     providers/\n       __init__.py\n       base.py\n+      google_places_provider.py\n       mock_provider.py\n     query_planner.py\n   evidence/\n@@ -48,9 +49,11 @@ app/\n     storage.py\n     storage_backend.py\n   models/\n+    company_qualification.py\n     discovery_run.py\n     lead_candidate.py\n   services/\n+    company_qualification_service.py\n     discovery_service.py\n     provider_execution_service.py\n   workers/\n@@ -160,9 +163,13 @@ curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}\n curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/candidates\n ```\n \n-## Mock Discovery Provider\n+## Discovery Providers\n \n-The mock provider executes a stored discovery run query plan and persists bounded, deterministic test candidates. It creates obvious mock rows only, for example `Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck 23552 Online Shop`.\n+Provider adapters execute a stored query plan and persist `LeadCandidate` rows. These rows are seed candidates only. They are not confirmed BFSG applicability, accessibility findings, legal obligations, violations, or legal conclusions.\n+\n+### Mock Provider\n+\n+The mock provider creates bounded, deterministic test candidates with obvious test names, for example `Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck 23552 Online Shop`.\n \n ```bash\n curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/mock\n@@ -180,7 +187,53 @@ Example provider response:\n }\n ```\n \n-This is only a resolver, keyword, query-planner, and mock-provider persistence foundation. Google Maps and live providers are not integrated yet. The system does not scrape websites and does not call external discovery providers. `LeadCandidate` rows are candidate records only; they are not confirmed legal applicability, BFSG violations, or legal conclusions.\n+### Google Places API Provider\n+\n+The Google Places API provider is disabled by default. Tests do not call Google, and normal local runs do not require an API key.\n+\n+Required environment settings for live use:\n+\n+```text\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_ENABLED=false\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY=\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=10\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_MAX_RESULTS_PER_QUERY=5\n+```\n+\n+Endpoint:\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/google-places\n+```\n+\n+If disabled or missing configuration, the endpoint returns a clear error and does not make an external call. If enabled with a key, Places API responses are mapped into raw `LeadCandidate` seed rows with `source=\"google_places\"`.\n+\n+Google Places API results are only seed candidates. Northdata-style or comparable company enrichment is required before any candidate can be treated as qualified for downstream audit consideration.\n+\n+## Company Qualification Precheck\n+\n+`CompanyQualification` stores precheck signals for a `LeadCandidate`. It is a signal and review layer only. It does not make legal conclusions and it does not call Northdata or any external company-data provider yet.\n+\n+Precheck endpoints:\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\n+curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\n+```\n+\n+The precheck records available signals such as company name, category, website availability, optional employee/revenue/balance values if already present, confidence, and review status. Missing company data results in `needs_company_data` or `needs_human_review` rather than final qualification. Mock/test candidates remain clearly marked as test data.\n+\n+Configured microenterprise signal thresholds:\n+\n+```text\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_EMPLOYEE_THRESHOLD=10\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_REVENUE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_BALANCE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n+```\n+\n+These thresholds are only used as precheck signals. They are not legal scoring and they are not final applicability decisions.\n+\n+This discovery layer does not scrape websites, does not perform reporting, and does not run accessibility scans for seed candidates automatically.\n \n ## Guarded Pipeline\n "}, {"filename": "app/api/discovery.py", "patch": "@@ -7,15 +7,28 @@\n from app.db.session import get_db\n from app.discovery.keywords import GooglePlacesConfigurationError,\n+    GooglePlacesDisabledError,\n+)\n+from app.models.company_qualification import CompanyQualification\n from app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun\n from qualification.lead_candidate_id,\n+        \"status\": qualification.status.value,\n+        \"company_name\": qualification.company_name,\n+        \"legal_form\": qualification.legal_form,\n+ qualification.annual_revenue_eur,\n+        \"balance_sheet_total_eur\": qualification.balance_sheet_total_eur,\n+        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise,\n+ dict[str, object]:\n     try:\n@@ -117,10 +154,63 @@ def run_mock_provider(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, s\n     return summary.to_dict()\n \n \n+@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/google-places\")\n+def run_google_places_provider(\n+    run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n+) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n+    try:\n+        summary = execute_google_places_provider(db, run_id)\n+    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    except GooglePlacesDisabledError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(\n+            status_code=status.HTTP_503_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, detail=str(exc)\n+        ) from exc\n+    except GooglePlacesConfigurationError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    return summary.to_dict()\n+\n+\n @router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n def read_run_candidates(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n     try:\n         candidates = list_lead_candidates(db, \"candidates\": [_serialize_candidate(candidate) for candidate in candidates]}\n+    return {\n+        \"discovery_run_id\": run_id,\n+        \"candidates\": [_serialize_candidate(candidate) for candidate in candidates],\n+    }\n+\n+\n+@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\")\n+def run_candidate_qualification_precheck(\n+    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n+) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    try:\n+        qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db, candidate_id)\n+    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    return {\n+        \"candidate_id\": candidate_id,\n+        \"qualification_id\": qualification.id,\n+        \"status\": qualification.status.value,\n+        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise,\n+        \"confidence_score\": qualification.confidence_score,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\")\n+def read_candidate_qualification(\n+    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n+) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    try:\n+        qualification = get_latest_candidate_qualification(db, candidate_id)\n+    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    if qualification is None:\n+        raise HTTPException(\n+            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n+            detail=f\"Company qualification not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n+        )\n+    return _serialize_qualification(qualification)"}, {"filename": "app/core/config.py", "patch": "@@ -25,6 +25,13 @@ class Settings(BaseSettings):\n google_places_enabled: bool = False\n+    google_places_timeout_seconds: int = 10\n+    google_places_max_results_per_query: int = 5\n+    bfsg_microenterprise_employee_threshold: int = 10\n+    bfsg_microenterprise_revenue_threshold_eur: int = 2_000_000\n+    bfsg_microenterprise_balance_threshold_eur: int = 2_000_000\n \n     model_config = SettingsConfigDict(\n CompanyQualification,\n     ComplianceFinding,\n     DiscoveryRun,\n     EvidenceBundle,"}, {"filename": "app/discovery/providers/__init__.py", "patch": "@@ -1 +1,12 @@\n \"\"\"Discovery provider adapters.\"\"\"\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import DiscoveryProvider, ProviderResult\n+from app.discovery.providers.google_places_provider import GooglePlacesProvider\n+from app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"DiscoveryProvider\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesProvider\",\n+    \"MockDiscoveryProvider\",\n+    \"ProviderResult\",\n+]"}, {"filename": "app/discovery/providers/google_places_provider.py", "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,156 @@\n+\"\"\"Google Places API discovery provider adapter.\n+\n+Google Places results are raw seed candidates only. They are not evidence of BFSG\n+applicability, legal obligation, or accessibility violations.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+import httpx\n+\n+from app.core.config import get_settings\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\n+\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_SOURCE = \"google_places\"\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_TEXT_SEARCH_URL = \"https://places.googleapis.com/v1/places:searchText\"\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_FIELD_MASK = \",\".join(\n+    (\n+        \"places.id\",\n+        \"places.name\",\n+        \"places.displayName\",\n+        \"places.formattedAddress\",\n+        \"places.nationalPhoneNumber\",\n+        \"places.internationalPhoneNumber\",\n+        \"places.websiteUri\",\n+        \"places.types\",\n+    )\n+)\n+\n+\n+class GooglePlacesProviderError(RuntimeError):\n+    pass\n+\n+\n+class GooglePlacesDisabledError(GooglePlacesProviderError):\n+    pass\n+\n+\n+class GooglePlacesConfigurationError(GooglePlacesProviderError):\n+    pass\n+\n+\n+class GooglePlacesProvider:\n+    source = GOOGLE_PLACES_SOURCE\n+\n+    def __init__(\n+        self,\n+        *,\n+        api_key: str | None = None,\n+        enabled: bool | None = None,\n+        timeout_seconds: int | None = None,\n+        max_results_per_query: int | None = None,\n+    ) -> None:\n+        settings = get_settings()\n+        self.api_key = api_key if api_key is not None else settings.google_places_api_key\n+        self.enabled = enabled if enabled is not None else settings.google_places_enabled\n+        self.timeout_seconds = (\n+            timeout_seconds\n+            if timeout_seconds is not None\n+            else settings.google_places_timeout_seconds\n+        )\n+        self.max_results_per_query = (\n+            max_results_per_query\n+            if max_results_per_query is not None\n+            else settings.google_places_max_results_per_query\n+        )\n+\n+    def search(self, query_plan: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> list[ProviderResult]:\n+        self._ensure_enabled()\n+\n+        results: list[ProviderResult] = []\n+        for entry in query_plan:\n+            payload = self._fetch_text_search(entry.get(\"query_text\") or \"\")\n+            places = payload.get(\"places\") or payload.get(\"results\") or []\n+            for place in places[: self.max_results_per_query]:\n+                results.append(self.map_place_to_result(place, entry))\n+        return results\n+\n+    def _ensure_enabled(self) -> None:\n+        if not self.enabled:\n+            raise GooglePlacesDisabledError(\"Google Places API provider is disabled\")\n+        if not self.api_key:\n+            raise GooglePlacesConfigurationError(\n+                \"Google Places API key is required when provider is enabled\"\n+            )\n+\n+    def _fetch_text_search(self, query_text: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        request_payload = {\n+            \"textQuery\": query_text,\n+            \"maxResultCount\": self.max_results_per_query,\n+        }\n+        headers = {\n+            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n+            \"X-Goog-Api-Key\": self.api_key or \"\",\n+            \"X-Goog-FieldMask\": GOOGLE_PLACES_FIELD_MASK,\n+        }\n+        with httpx.Client(timeout=self.timeout_seconds) as client:\n+            response = client.post(\n+                GOOGLE_PLACES_TEXT_SEARCH_URL,\n+                headers=headers,\n+                json=request_payload,\n+            )\n+            response.raise_for_status()\n+            return response.json()\n+\n+    @classmethod\n+    def map_place_to_result(\n+        cls, place: dict[str, Any], query_entry: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n+    ) -> ProviderResult:\n+        query_entry = query_entry or {}\n+        display_name = place.get(\"displayName\") or place.get(\"display_name\") or {}\n+        company_name = (\n+            display_name.get(\"text\")\n+            if isinstance(display_name, dict)\n+            else None\n+        ) or place.get(\"name\")\n+\n+        types = place.get(\"types\") or []\n+        if not isinstance(types, list):\n+            types = []\n+        source_reference = place.get(\"place_id\") or place.get(\"id\") or place.get(\"name\")\n+        raw_data = {\n+            \"provider\": cls.source,\n+            \"query_text\": query_entry.get(\"query_text\"),\n+            \"keyword_group_id\": query_entry.get(\"keyword_group_id\"),\n+            \"keyword\": query_entry.get(\"keyword\"),\n+            \"place\": place,\n+        }\n+\n+        return ProviderResult(\n+            source=cls.source,\n+            source_reference=source_reference,\n+            company_name=company_name,\n+            domain=place.get(\"websiteUri\") or place.get(\"website\"),\n+            city=query_entry.get(\"city\"),\n+            postal_code=query_entry.get(\"postal_code\"),\n+            address=place.get(\"formattedAddress\") or place.get(\"formatted_address\"),\n+            phone=(\n+                place.get(\"nationalPhoneNumber\")\n+                or place.get(\"internationalPhoneNumber\")\n+                or place.get(\"formatted_phone_number\")\n+            ),\n+            category=types[0] if types else None,\n+            raw_data=raw_data,\n+            confidence_score=0.4,\n+        )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"GOOGLE_PLACES_SOURCE\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesConfigurationError\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesDisabledError\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesProvider\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesProviderError\",\n+]"}, {"filename": "app/models/__init__.py", "patch": "@@ -1,3 +1,7 @@\n+from app.models.company_qualification import (\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+)\n from app.models.compliance_finding import ComplianceFinding\n from app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus\n from app.models.evidence_bundle import EvidenceBundle\n@@ -7,6 +11,8 @@\n from app.models.scan import Scan, ScanStatus\n \n __all__ = [\n+    \"CompanyQualification\",\n+    \"CompanyQualificationStatus\",\n     \"ComplianceFinding\",\n     \"DiscoveryRun\",\n     \"DiscoveryRunStatus\","}, {"filename": "app/models/company_qualification.py", "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,67 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import enum\n+import uuid\n+from datetime import datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from sqlalchemy import JSON, Boolean, DateTime, Enum, Float, ForeignKey, Integer, String, Text, func\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+\n+\n+class CompanyQualificationStatus(str, enum.Enum):\n+    pending = \"pending\"\n+    needs_company_data = \"needs_company_data\"\n+    likely_not_applicable = \"likely_not_applicable\"\n+    possible_bfsg_candidate = \"possible_bfsg_candidate\"\n+    needs_human_review = \"needs_human_review\"\n+    rejected = \"rejected\"\n+\n+\n+class CompanyQualification(Base):\n+    __tablename__ = \"company_qualifications\"\n+\n+    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n+    )\n+    lead_candidate_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"lead_candidates.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"),\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    status: Mapped[CompanyQualificationStatus] = mapped_column(\n+        Enum(CompanyQualificationStatus, name=\"company_qualification_status\"),\n+        default=CompanyQualificationStatus.pending,\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    company_name: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n+    legal_form: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)\n+    registry_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)\n+    northdata_url: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)\n+    employee_count: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n+    annual_revenue_eur: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n+    is_microenterprise: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n+    b2c_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n+    bfsg_category_signal: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n+    website_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n+    confidence_score: Mapped[float | None] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)\n+    evidence: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\n+    notes: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n+    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n+    )\n+    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True),\n+        server_default=func.now(),\n+        onupdate=func.now(),\n+        nullable=False,\n+    )\n+\n+    lead_candidate: Mapped[\"LeadCandidate\"] = relationship(\n+        \"LeadCandidate\", back_populates=\"qualifications\"\n+    )"}, {"filename": "app/models/lead_candidate.py", "patch": "@@ -40,3 +40,8 @@ class LeadCandidate(Base):\n     discovery_run: Mapped[\"DiscoveryRun\"] = relationship(\n         \"DiscoveryRun\", back_populates=\"candidates\"\n     )\n+    qualifications: Mapped[list[\"CompanyQualification\"]] = relationship(\n+        \"CompanyQualification\",\n+        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n+        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n+    )"}, {"filename": "app/services/company_qualification_service.py", "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,166 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n+\n+from app.core.config import get_settings\n+from app.models.company_qualification import (\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+)\n+from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+\n+\n+class LeadCandidateNotFoundError(LookupError):\n+    pass\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class MicroenterpriseThresholds:\n+    employee_count: int\n+    annual_revenue_eur: int\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur: int\n+\n+\n+def get_microenterprise_thresholds() -> MicroenterpriseThresholds:\n+    settings = get_settings()\n+    return MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n+        employee_count=settings.bfsg_microenterprise_employee_threshold,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=settings.bfsg_microenterprise_revenue_threshold_eur,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=settings.bfsg_microenterprise_balance_threshold_eur,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+    *,\n+    employee_count: int | None,\n+    annual_revenue_eur: int | None,\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur: int | None,\n+    thresholds: MicroenterpriseThresholds | None = None,\n+) -> bool | None:\n+    thresholds = thresholds or get_microenterprise_thresholds()\n+    financial_values = [\n+        value for value in (annual_revenue_eur, balance_sheet_total_eur) if value is not None\n+    ]\n+    if employee_count is None or not financial_values:\n+        return None\n+    if employee_count >= thresholds.employee_count:\n+        return False\n+    if annual_revenue_eur is not None and annual_revenue_eur > thresholds.annual_revenue_eur:\n+        return False\n+    if (\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur is not None\n+        and balance_sheet_total_eur > thresholds.balance_sheet_total_eur\n+    ):\n+        return False\n+    return True\n+\n+\n+def create_candidate_precheck(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyQualification:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    qualification = precheck_candidate(candidate)\n+    db.add(qualification)\n+    db.commit()\n+    db.refresh(qualification)\n+    return qualification\n+\n+\n+def get_latest_candidate_qualification(\n+    db: Session, candidate_id: str\n+) -> CompanyQualification | None:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    return (\n+        db.query(CompanyQualification)\n+        .filter(CompanyQualification.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(CompanyQualification.created_at.desc(), CompanyQualification.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def precheck_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> CompanyQualification:\n+    raw_data = candidate.raw_data or {}\n+    employee_count = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"employee_count\"))\n+    annual_revenue_eur = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"annual_revenue_eur\"))\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"balance_sheet_total_eur\"))\n+    is_microenterprise = evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+        employee_count=employee_count,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=annual_revenue_eur,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=balance_sheet_total_eur,\n+    )\n+    is_mock = candidate.source == \"mock\" or raw_data.get(\"mock\") is True\n+    website_signal = bool(candidate.domain)\n+    b2c_signal = bool(candidate.category)\n+\n+    status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data\n+    confidence_score = 0.3\n+    notes = \"Company enrichment is required before this candidate can be treated as qualified.\"\n+\n+    if is_mock:\n+        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review\n+        confidence_score = 0.1\n+        notes = \"Mock/test candidate; never treat as a real company qualification.\"\n+    elif not candidate.company_name:\n+        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data\n+        confidence_score = 0.2\n+    elif is_microenterprise is not None:\n+        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review\n+        confidence_score = 0.5\n+\n+    evidence: dict[str, Any] = {\n+        \"source\": candidate.source,\n+        \"source_reference\": candidate.source_reference,\n+        \"is_seed_candidate\": True,\n+        \"requires_company_enrichment\": True,\n+        \"uses_external_company_data\": False,\n+        \"is_mock_or_test_data\": is_mock,\n+        \"has_company_name\": bool(candidate.company_name),\n+        \"has_city\": bool(candidate.city),\n+        \"has_category\": bool(candidate.category),\n+        \"has_website\": website_signal,\n+        \"has_employee_count\": employee_count is not None,\n+        \"has_annual_revenue_eur\": annual_revenue_eur is not None,\n+        \"has_balance_sheet_total_eur\": balance_sheet_total_eur is not None,\n+    }\n+\n+    return CompanyQualification(\n+        lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n+        status=status,\n+        company_name=candidate.company_name,\n+        employee_count=employee_count,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=annual_revenue_eur,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=balance_sheet_total_eur,\n+        is_microenterprise=is_microenterprise,\n+        b2c_signal=b2c_signal,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=candidate.category,\n+        website_signal=website_signal,\n+        confidence_score=confidence_score,\n+        evidence=evidence,\n+        notes=notes,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _int_or_none(value: Any) -> int | None:\n+    if value is None or value == \"\":\n+        return None\n+    try:\n+        return int(value)\n+    except (TypeError, ValueError):\n+        return None\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"LeadCandidateNotFoundError\",\n+    \"MicroenterpriseThresholds\",\n+    \"create_candidate_precheck\",\n+    \"evaluate_microenterprise_signal\",\n+    \"get_latest_candidate_qualification\",\n+    \"precheck_candidate\",\n+]"}, {"filename": "app/services/provider_execution_service.py", "patch": "@@ -4,7 +4,8 @@\n \n from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n \n-from app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import DiscoveryProvider, ProviderResult\n+from app.discovery.providers.google_places_provider import GooglePlacesProvider\n from app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\n from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n from app.services.discovery_service import DiscoveryRunNotFoundError, get_discovery_run\n@@ -27,8 +28,19 @@ def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n \n \n def execute_mock_provider(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    return execute_provider(db, discovery_run_id, MockDiscoveryProvider())\n+\n+\n+def execute_google_places_provider(\n+    db: Session, discovery_run_id: str\n+) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    return execute_provider(db, discovery_run_id, GooglePlacesProvider())\n+\n+\n+def execute_provider(\n+    db: Session, discovery_run_id: str, provider: DiscoveryProvider\n+) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n     discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, discovery_run_id)\n-    provider = MockDiscoveryProvider()\n     results = provider.search(discovery_run.query_plan)\n \n     candidates_created = 0\n@@ -91,5 +103,7 @@ def _candidate_from_provider_result(\n __all__ = [\n     \"DiscoveryRunNotFoundError\",\n     \"ProviderExecutionSummary\",\n+    \"execute_google_places_provider\",\n     \"execute_mock_provider\",\n+    \"execute_provider\",\n ]"}, {"filename": "tests/test_company_qualification_service.py", "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@\n+import pytest\n+from sqlalchemy import create_engine\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+from app.models import CompanyQualification, DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n+from app.services.company_qualification_service import (\n+    MicroenterpriseThresholds,\n+    create_candidate_precheck,\n+    evaluate_microenterprise_signal,\n+    precheck_candidate,\n+)\n+\n+\n+@pytest.fixture()\n+def db_session() -> Session:\n+    engine = create_engine(\"sqlite:///:memory:\")\n+    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n+    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n+    try:\n+        yield session\n+    finally:\n+        session.close()\n+        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+\n+def _create_run(db_session: Session) -> DiscoveryRun:\n+    discovery_run = DiscoveryRun(\n+        city=\"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        normalized_city=\"luebeck\",\n+        status=DiscoveryRunStatus.done,\n+        keyword_groups=[],\n+        postal_codes=[\"23552\"],\n+        query_plan=[],\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(discovery_run)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(discovery_run)\n+    return discovery_run\n+\n+\n+def test_precheck_candidate_with_missing_company_data_needs_company_data(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+) -> None:\n+    discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n+    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n+        source=\"google_places\",\n+        source_reference=\"places/seed\",\n+        company_name=\"Seed Candidate GmbH\",\n+        city=\"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        postal_code=\"23552\",\n+        category=\"store\",\n+        raw_data={},\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(candidate)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n+\n+    qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert qualification.status.value == \"needs_company_data\"\n+    assert qualification.is_microenterprise is None\n+    assert qualification.evidence[\"requires_company_enrichment\"] is True\n+    assert qualification.evidence[\"uses_external_company_data\"] is False\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_candidate_precheck_does_not_create_legal_conclusion(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n+    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n+        source=\"mock\",\n+        source_reference=\"mock:luebeck:23552:ecommerce:online-shop\",\n+        company_name=\"Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck 23552 Online Shop\",\n+        city=\"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        postal_code=\"23552\",\n+        category=\"ecommerce\",\n+        raw_data={\"mock\": True},\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(candidate)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n+\n+    qualification = precheck_candidate(candidate)\n+\n+    assert qualification.status.value == \"needs_human_review\"\n+    assert qualification.is_microenterprise is None\n+    assert qualification.confidence_score == 0.1\n+    assert qualification.evidence[\"is_mock_or_test_data\"] is True\n+    assert \"legal\" not in qualification.notes.casefold()\n+\n+\n+def test_microenterprise_helper_returns_true_when_all_available_values_are_below_thresholds() -> None:\n+    thresholds = MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n+        employee_count=10,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=2_000_000,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=2_000_000,\n+    )\n+\n+    assert (\n+        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+            employee_count=9,\n+            annual_revenue_eur=1_500_000,\n+            balance_sheet_total_eur=1_000_000,\n+            thresholds=thresholds,\n+        )\n+        is True\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def test_microenterprise_helper_returns_false_when_threshold_is_exceeded() -> None:\n+    thresholds = MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n+        employee_count=10,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=2_000_000,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=2_000_000,\n+    )\n+\n+    assert (\n+        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+            employee_count=10,\n+            annual_revenue_eur=1_000_000,\n+            balance_sheet_total_eur=1_000_000,\n+            thresholds=thresholds,\n+        )\n+        is False\n+    )\n+    assert (\n+        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+            employee_count=5,\n+            annual_revenue_eur=2_000_001,\n+            balance_sheet_total_eur=None,\n+            thresholds=thresholds,\n+        )\n+        is False\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def test_microenterprise_helper_returns_none_when_required_data_is_missing() -> None:\n+    thresholds = MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n+        employee_count=10,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=2_000_000,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=2_000_000,\n+    )\n+\n+    assert (\n+        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+            employee_count=None,\n+            annual_revenue_eur=1_000_000,\n+            balance_sheet_total_eur=1_000_000,\n+            thresholds=thresholds,\n+        )\n+        is None\n+    )\n+    assert (\n+        evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+            employee_count=5,\n+            annual_revenue_eur=None,\n+            balance_sheet_total_eur=None,\n+            thresholds=thresholds,\n+        )\n+        is None\n+    )"}, {"filename": import DiscoveryRun, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n+from app.models import CompanyQualification, DiscoveryRun, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n \n \n @pytest.fixture()\n@@ -137,6 +137,54 @@ def test_mock_provider_endpoint_persists_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None\n     assert candidates[0][\"raw_data\"][\"mock\"] is True\n \n \n+def test_google_places_endpoint_disabled_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n+    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n+\n+    response = client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/google-places\")\n+\n+    assert response.status_code == 503\n+    assert response.json()[\"detail\"] == \"Google Places API provider is disabled\"\n+\n+\n+def test_candidate_qualification_precheck_for_mock_candidate(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n+    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n+    client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n+    candidates = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\").json()[\"candidates\"]\n+    candidate_id = candidates[0][\"id\"]\n+\n+    precheck_response = client.post(\n+        f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\"\n+    )\n+    read_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\")\n+\n+    assert precheck_response.status_code == 200\n+    precheck = precheck_response.json()\n+    assert precheck[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n+    assert precheck[\"status\"] == \"needs_human_review\"\n+    assert precheck[\"is_microenterprise\"] is None\n+    assert precheck[\"confidence_score\"] == 0.1\n+\n+    assert read_response.status_code == 200\n+    qualification = read_response.json()\n+    assert qualification[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n+    assert qualification[\"status\"] == \"needs_human_review\"\n+    assert qualification[\"evidence\"][\"is_mock_or_test_data\"] is True\n+    assert qualification[\"evidence\"][\"requires_company_enrichment\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_qualification_unknown_candidate_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+\n+    response = client.post(\"/discovery/candidates/missing/qualification/precheck\")\n+\n+    assert response.status_code == 404\n+    assert \"Lead candidate not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n+\n+\n def test_mock_provider_endpoint_unknown_run_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n     client = make_client(db_session)\n "}, {"filename": "tests/test_google_places_provider.py", "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,91 @@\n+import socket\n+\n+import pytest\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.google_places_provider import (\n+    GooglePlacesConfigurationError,\n+    GooglePlacesDisabledError,\n+    GooglePlacesProvider,\n+)\n+\n+\n+QUERY_PLAN = [\n+    {\n+        \"city\": \"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n+        \"keyword_group_id\": \"ecommerce\",\n+        \"keyword\": \"online shop\",\n+        \"query_text\": \"L\u00fcbeck 23552 online shop\",\n+    }\n+]\n+\n+\n+class StubGooglePlacesProvider(GooglePlacesProvider):\n+    def _fetch_text_search(self, query_text: str):\n+        return {\n+            \"places\": [\n+                {\n+                    \"id\": \"places/mock-place-id\",\n+                    \"displayName\": {\"text\": \"Example Seed Company\"},\n+                    \"websiteUri\": \"https://example.test\",\n+                    \"formattedAddress\": \"Example Street 1, 23552 L\u00fcbeck\",\n+                    \"nationalPhoneNumber\": \"+49 451 000000\",\n+                    \"types\": [\"store\", \"point_of_interest\"],\n+                }\n+            ]\n+        }\n+\n+\n+def test_google_places_provider_fails_when_disabled() -> None:\n+    provider = GooglePlacesProvider(enabled=False, api_key=\"test-key\")\n+\n+    with pytest.raises(GooglePlacesDisabledError, match=\"provider is disabled\"):\n+        provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+\n+def test_google_places_provider_fails_when_api_key_missing() -> None:\n+    provider = GooglePlacesProvider(enabled=True, api_key=\"\")\n+\n+    with pytest.raises(GooglePlacesConfigurationError, match=\"API key is required\"):\n+        provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+\n+def test_google_places_response_mapping_to_provider_result() -> None:\n+    place = {\n+        \"place_id\": \"legacy-place-id\",\n+        \"displayName\": {\"text\": \"Mapped Seed Company\"},\n+        \"websiteUri\": \"https://mapped.example\",\n+        \"formattedAddress\": \"Mapped Street 2, 23552 L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        \"internationalPhoneNumber\": \"+49 451 111111\",\n+        \"types\": [\"bank\", \"finance\"],\n+    }\n+\n+    result = GooglePlacesProvider.map_place_to_result(place, QUERY_PLAN[0])\n+\n+    assert result.source == \"google_places\"\n+    assert result.source_reference == \"legacy-place-id\"\n+    assert result.company_name == \"Mapped Seed Company\"\n+    assert result.domain == \"https://mapped.example\"\n+    assert result.address == \"Mapped Street 2, 23552 L\u00fcbeck\"\n+    assert result.phone == \"+49 451 111111\"\n+    assert result.category == \"bank\"\n+    assert result.city == \"L\u00fcbeck\"\n+    assert result.postal_code == \"23552\"\n+    assert result.raw_data[\"query_text\"] == \"L\u00fcbeck 23552 online shop\"\n+    assert result.raw_data[\"keyword_group_id\"] == \"ecommerce\"\n+    assert result.raw_data[\"place\"] == place\n+\n+\n+def test_google_places_provider_search_can_be_mocked_without_network(monkeypatch) -> None:\n+    def fail_network(*args, **kwargs):\n+        raise AssertionError(\"network access is not allowed in this test\")\n+\n+    monkeypatch.setattr(socket, \"create_connection\", fail_network)\n+\n+    provider = StubGooglePlacesProvider(enabled=True, api_key=\"test-key\")\n+    results = provider.search(QUERY_PLAN)\n+\n+    assert len(results) == 1\n+    assert results[0].source == \"google_places\"\n+    assert results[0].source_reference == \"places/mock-place-id\"\n+    assert results[0].company_name == \"Example Seed Company\""}], "repository_full_name": -2,7 +2,7 @@\n \n NorthAccessBFSG is a FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n \n-The current scope includes backend infrastructure, asynchronous scans, raw accessibility findings, compliance mapping basics, evidence bundle storage, and a minimal Lead Discovery foundation for city and keyword resolution.\n+The current scope includes backend infrastructure, asynchronous scans, raw accessibility findings, compliance mapping basics, evidence bundle storage, and a minimal Lead Discovery foundation for city, keyword, provider seed, and company precheck workflows.\n \n ## Project Structure\n \n@@ -40,6 +40,7 @@ app/\n     providers/\n       __init__.py\n       base.py\n+      google_places_provider.py\n       mock_provider.py\n     query_planner.py\n   evidence/\n@@ -48,9 +49,11 @@ app/\n     storage.py\n     storage_backend.py\n   models/\n+    company_qualification.py\n     discovery_run.py\n     lead_candidate.py\n   services/\n+    company_qualification_service.py\n     discovery_service.py\n     provider_execution_service.py\n   workers/\n@@ -160,9 +163,13 @@ curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}\n curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/candidates\n ```\n \n-## Mock Discovery Provider\n+## Discovery Providers\n \n-The mock provider executes a stored discovery run query plan and persists bounded, deterministic test candidates. It creates obvious mock rows only, for example `Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck 23552 Online Shop`.\n+Provider adapters execute a stored query plan and persist `LeadCandidate` rows. These rows are seed candidates only. They are not confirmed BFSG applicability, accessibility findings, legal obligations, violations, or legal conclusions.\n+\n+### Mock Provider\n+\n+The mock provider creates bounded, deterministic test candidates with obvious test names, for example `Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck 23552 Online Shop`.\n \n ```bash\n curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/mock\n@@ -180,7 +187,53 @@ Example provider response:\n }\n ```\n \n-This is only a resolver, keyword, query-planner, and mock-provider persistence foundation. Google Maps and live providers are not integrated yet. The system does not scrape websites and does not call external discovery providers. `LeadCandidate` rows are candidate records only; they are not confirmed legal applicability, BFSG violations, or legal conclusions.\n+### Google Places API Provider\n+\n+The Google Places API provider is disabled by default. Tests do not call Google, and normal local runs do not require an API key.\n+\n+Required environment settings for live use:\n+\n+```text\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_ENABLED=false\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY=\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=10\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_MAX_RESULTS_PER_QUERY=5\n+```\n+\n+Endpoint:\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/google-places\n+```\n+\n+If disabled or missing configuration, the endpoint returns a clear error and does not make an external call. If enabled with a key, Places API responses are mapped into raw `LeadCandidate` seed rows with `source=\"google_places\"`.\n+\n+Google Places API results are only seed candidates. Northdata-style or comparable company enrichment is required before any candidate can be treated as qualified for downstream audit consideration.\n+\n+## Company Qualification Precheck\n+\n+`CompanyQualification` stores precheck signals for a `LeadCandidate`. It is a signal and review layer only. It does not make legal conclusions and it does not call Northdata or any external company-data provider yet.\n+\n+Precheck endpoints:\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\n+curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\n+```\n+\n+The precheck records available signals such as company name, category, website availability, optional employee/revenue/balance values if already present, confidence, and review status. Missing company data results in `needs_company_data` or `needs_human_review` rather than final qualification. Mock/test candidates remain clearly marked as test data.\n+\n+Configured microenterprise signal thresholds:\n+\n+```text\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_EMPLOYEE_THRESHOLD=10\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_REVENUE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_BALANCE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n+```\n+\n+These thresholds are only used as precheck signals. They are not legal scoring and they are not final applicability decisions.\n+\n+This discovery layer does not scrape websites, does not perform reporting, and does not run accessibility scans for seed candidates automatically.\n \n ## Guarded Pipeline\n \n@@ -7,15 +7,28 @@\n from app.db.session import get_db\n from app.discovery.keywords import get_keyword_groups\n from app.discovery.place_resolver import PlaceDataError, PlaceNotFoundError, resolve_city\n+from app.discovery.providers.google_places_provider import (\n+    GooglePlacesConfigurationError,\n+    GooglePlacesDisabledError,\n+)\n+from app.models.company_qualification import CompanyQualification\n from app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun\n from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+from app.services.company_qualification_service import (\n+    LeadCandidateNotFoundError,\n+    create_candidate_precheck,\n+    get_latest_candidate_qualification,\n+)\n from app.services.discovery_service import (\n     DiscoveryRunNotFoundError,\n     create_discovery_run,\n     get_discovery_run,\n     list_lead_candidates,\n )\n-from app.services.provider_execution_service import execute_mock_provider\n+from app.services.provider_execution_service import (\n+    execute_google_places_provider,\n+    execute_mock_provider,\n+)\n \n router = APIRouter(prefix=\"/discovery\", tags=[\"discovery\"])\n \n@@ -58,6 +71,30 @@ def _serialize_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> dict[str, Any]:\n     }\n \n \n+def _serialize_qualification(qualification: CompanyQualification) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    return {\n+        \"id\": qualification.id,\n+        \"candidate_id\": qualification.lead_candidate_id,\n+        \"status\": qualification.status.value,\n+        \"company_name\": qualification.company_name,\n+        \"legal_form\": qualification.legal_form,\n+        \"registry_id\": qualification.registry_id,\n+        \"northdata_url\": qualification.northdata_url,\n+        \"employee_count\": qualification.employee_count,\n+        \"annual_revenue_eur\": qualification.annual_revenue_eur,\n+        \"balance_sheet_total_eur\": qualification.balance_sheet_total_eur,\n+        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise,\n+        \"b2c_signal\": qualification.b2c_signal,\n+        \"bfsg_category_signal\": qualification.bfsg_category_signal,\n+        \"website_signal\": qualification.website_signal,\n+ }\n+\n+\n+@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\")\n+def read_candidate_qualification(\n+    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n+) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    try:\n+   DiscoveryRun,\n     EvidenceBundle,\n@@ -1 +1,12 @@\n \"\"\"Discovery provider adapters.\"\"\"\n+\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import DiscoveryProvider, ProviderResult\n+from app.discovery.providers.google_places_provider import GooglePlacesProvider\n+from app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"DiscoveryProvider\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesProvider\",\n+    \"MockDiscoveryProvider\",\n+    \"ProviderResult\",\n+]\n@@ -0,0 +1,156 @@\n+\"\"\"Google Places API discovery provider adapter.\n+\n+Google Places results are raw seed candidates only. They are not evidence of BFSG\n+applicability, legal obligation, or accessibility violations.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+import httpx\n+\n+from app.core.config import get_settings\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\n+\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_SOURCE = \"google_places\"\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_TEXT_SEARCH_URL = \"https://places.googleapis.com/v1/places:searchText\"\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_FIELD_MASK = \",\".join(\n+    (\n+        \"places.id\",\n+        \"places.name\",\n+        \"places.displayName\",\n+        \"places.formattedAddress\",\n+        \"places.nationalPhoneNumber\",\n+        \"places.internationalPhoneNumber\",\n+        \"places.websiteUri\",\n+        \"places.types\",\n+    )\n+)\n+\n+\n+class GooglePlacesProviderError(RuntimeError):\n+    pass\n+\n+\n+class GooglePlacesDisabledError(GooglePlacesProviderError):\n+    pass\n+\n+\n+class GooglePlacesConfigurationError(GooglePlacesProviderError):\n+    pass\n+\n+\n+class GooglePlacesProvider:\n+    source = GOOGLE_PLACES_SOURCE\n+\n+    def __init__(\n+        self,\n+        *,\n+        api_key: str | None = None,\n+        enabled: bool | None = None,\n+        timeout_seconds: int | None = None,\n+        max_results_per_query: int | None = None,\n+    ) -> None:\n+        settings = get_settings()\n+        self.api_key = api_key if api_key is not None else settings.google_places_api_key\n+        self.enabled = enabled if enabled is not None else settings.google_places_enabled\n+        self.timeout_seconds = (\n+            timeout_seconds\n+            if timeout_seconds is not None\n+            else settings.google_places_timeout_seconds\n+        )\n+        self.max_results_per_query = (\n+            max_results_per_query\n+            if max_results_per_query is not None\n+            else settings.google_places_max_results_per_query\n+        )\n+\n+    def search(self, query_plan: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> list[ProviderResult]:\n+        self._ensure_enabled()\n+\n+        results: list[ProviderResult] = []\n+        for entry in query_plan:\n+            payload = self._fetch_text_search(entry.get(\"query_text\") or \"\")\n+            places = payload.get(\"places\") or payload.get(\"results\") or []\n+            for place in places[: self.max_results_per_query]:\n+                results.append(self.map_place_to_result(place, entry))\n+        return results\n+\n+    def _ensure_enabled(self) -> None:\n+        if not self.enabled:\n+            raise GooglePlacesDisabledError(\"Google Places API provider is disabled\")\n+        if not self.api_key:\n+            raise GooglePlacesConfigurationError(\n+                \"Google Places API key is required when provider is enabled\"\n+            )\n+\n+    def _fetch_text_search(self, query_text: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        request_payload = {\n+            \"textQuery\": query_text,\n+            \"maxResultCount\": self.max_results_per_query,\n+        }\n+        headers = {\n+            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n+            \"X-Goog-Api-Key\": self.api_key or \"\",\n+            \"X-Goog-FieldMask\": GOOGLE_PLACES_FIELD_MASK,\n+        }\n+        with httpx.Client(timeout=self.timeout_seconds) as client:\n+            response = client.post(\n+                GOOGLE_PLACES_TEXT_SEARCH_URL,\n+                headers=headers,\n+                json=request_payload,\n+            )\n+            response.raise_for_status()\n+            return response.json()\n+\n+    @classmethod\n+    def map_place_to_result(\n+        cls, place: dict[str, Any], query_entry: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n+    ) -> ProviderResult:\n+        query_entry = query_entry or {}\n+        display_name = place.get(\"displayName\") or place.get(\"display_name\") or {}\n+        company_name = (\n+            display_name.get(\"text\")\n+            if isinstance(display_name, dict)\n+            else None\n+        ) or place.get(\"name\")\n+\n+        types = place.get(\"types\") or []\n+        if not isinstance(types, list):\n+            types = []\n+        source_reference = place.get(\"place_id\") or place.get(\"id\") or place.get(\"name\")\n+        raw_data = {\n+            \"provider\": cls.source,\n+            \"query_text\": query_entry.get(\"query_text\"),\n+            \"keyword_group_id\": query_entry.get(\"keyword_group_id\"),\n+            \"keyword\": query_entry.get(\"keyword\"),\n+            \"place\": place,\n+        }\n+\n+        return ProviderResult(\n+            source=cls.source,\n+            source_reference=source_reference,\n+            company_name=company_name,\n+            domain=place.get(\"websiteUri\") or place.get(\"website\"),\n+            city=query_entry.get(\"city\"),\n+            postal_code=query_entry.get(\"postal_code\"),\n+            address=place.get(\"formattedAddress\") or place.get(\"formatted_address\"),\n+            phone=(\n+                place.get(\"nationalPhoneNumber\")\n+                or place.get(\"internationalPhoneNumber\")\n+                or place.get(\"formatted_phone_number\")\n+            ),\n+            category=types[0] if types else None,\n+            raw_data=raw_data,\n+            confidence_score=0.4,\n+        )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"GOOGLE_PLACES_SOURCE\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesConfigurationError\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesDisabledError\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesProvider\",\n+    \"GooglePlacesProviderError\",\n+]\n@@ -1,3 +1,7 @@\n+from app.models.company_qualification import (\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+)\n from app.models.compliance_finding import ComplianceFinding\n from app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus\n from app.models.evidence_bundle import EvidenceBundle\n@@ -7,6 +11,8 @@\n from app.models.scan import Scan, ScanStatus\n \n __all__ = [\n+    \"CompanyQualification\",\n+    \"CompanyQualificationStatus\",\n     \"ComplianceFinding\",\n     \"DiscoveryRun\",\n     \"DiscoveryRunStatus\",\n@@ -0,0 +1,67 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import enum\n+import uuid\n+from datetime import datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from sqlalchemy import JSON, Boolean, DateTime, Enum, Float, ForeignKey, Integer, String, Text, func\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+\n+\n+class CompanyQualificationStatus(str, enum.Enum):\n+    pending = \"pending\"\n+    needs_company_data = \"needs_company_data\"\n+    likely_not_applicable = \"likely_not_applicable\"\n+    possible_bfsg_candidate = \"possible_bfsg_candidate\"\n+    needs_human_review = \"needs_human_review\"\n+    rejected = \"rejected\"\n+\n+\n+class CompanyQualification(Base):\n+    __tablename__ = \"company_qualifications\"\n+\n+    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n+    )\n+    lead_candidate_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"lead_candidates.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"),\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    status: Mapped[CompanyQualificationStatus] = mapped_column(\n+        Enum(CompanyQualificationStatus, name=\"company_qualification_status\"),\n+        default=CompanyQualificationStatus.pending,\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    company_name: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n+    legal_form: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)\n+    registry_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)\n+    northdata_url: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)\n+    employee_count: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n+    annual_revenue_eur: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n+    is_microenterprise: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n+    b2c_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n+    bfsg_category_signal: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n+    website_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n+    confidence_score: Mapped[float | None] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)\n+    evidence: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\n+    notes: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n+    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n+    )\n+    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True),\n+        server_default=func.now(),\n+        onupdate=func.now(),\n+        nullable=False,\n+    )\n+\n+    lead_candidate: Mapped[\"LeadCandidate\"] = relationship(\n+        \"LeadCandidate\", back_populates=\"qualifications\"\n+    )\n@@ -40,3 +40,8 @@ class LeadCandidate(Base):\n     discovery_run: Mapped[\"DiscoveryRun\"] = relationship(\n         \"DiscoveryRun\", back_populates=\"candidates\"\n     )\n+    qualifications: Mapped[list[\"CompanyQualification\"]] = relationship(\n+        \"CompanyQualification\",\n+        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n+        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n+    )\n@@ -0,0 +1,166 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n+\n+from app.core.config import get_settings\n+from app.models.company_qualification import (\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+)\n+from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+\n+\n+class LeadCandidateNotFoundError(LookupError):\n+    pass\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class MicroenterpriseThresholds:\n+    employee_count: int\n+    annual_revenue_eur: int\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur: int\n+\n+\n+def get_microenterprise_thresholds() -> MicroenterpriseThresholds:\n+    settings = get_settings()\n+    return MicroenterpriseThresholds(\n+        employee_count=settings.bfsg_microenterprise_employee_threshold,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=settings.bfsg_microenterprise_revenue_threshold_eur,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=settings.bfsg_microenterprise_balance_threshold_eur,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+    *,\n+    employee_count: int | None,\n+    annual_revenue_eur: int | None,\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur: int | None,\n+    thresholds: MicroenterpriseThresholds | None = None,\n+) -> bool | None:\n+    thresholds = thresholds or get_microenterprise_thresholds()\n+    financial_values = [\n+        value for value in (annual_revenue_eur, balance_sheet_total_eur) if value is not None\n+    ]\n+    if employee_count is None or not financial_values:\n+        return None\n+    if employee_count >= thresholds.employee_count:\n+        return False\n+    if annual_revenue_eur is not None and annual_revenue_eur > thresholds.annual_revenue_eur:\n+        return False\n+    if (\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur is not None\n+        and balance_sheet_total_eur > thresholds.balance_sheet_total_eur\n+    ):\n+        return False\n+    return True\n+\n+\n+def create_candidate_precheck(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyQualification:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    qualification = precheck_candidate(candidate)\n+    db.add(qualification)\n+    db.commit()\n+    db.refresh(qualification)\n+    return qualification\n+\n+\n+def get_latest_candidate_qualification(\n+    db: Session, candidate_id: str\n+) -> CompanyQualification | None:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    return (\n+        db.query(CompanyQualification)\n+        .filter(CompanyQualification.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(CompanyQualification.created_at.desc(), CompanyQualification.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def precheck_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> CompanyQualification:\n+    raw_data = candidate.raw_data or {}\n+    employee_count = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"employee_count\"))\n+    annual_revenue_eur = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"annual_revenue_eur\"))\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"balance_sheet_total_eur\"))\n+    is_microenterprise = evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n+        employee_count=employee_count,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=annual_revenue_eur,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=balance_sheet_total_eur,\n+    )\n+    is_mock = candidate.source == \"mock\" or raw_data.get(\"mock\") is True\n+    website_signal = bool(candidate.domain)\n+    b2c_signal = bool(candidate.category)\n+\n+    status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data\n+    confidence_score = 0.3\n+    notes = \"Company enrichment is required before this candidate can be treated as qualified.\"\n+\n+    if is_mock:\n+        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review\n+        confidence_score = 0.1\n+        notes = \"Mock/test candidate; never treat as a real company qualification.\"\n+    elif not candidate.company_name:\n+        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data\n+        confidence_score = 0.2\n+    elif is_microenterprise is not None:\n+        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review\n+        confidence_score = 0.5\n+\n+    evidence: dict[str, Any] = {\n+        \"source\": candidate.source,\n+        \"source_reference\": candidate.source_reference,\n+        \"is_seed_candidate\": True,\n+        \"requires_company_enrichment\": True,\n+        \"uses_external_company_data\": False,\n+        \"is_mock_or_test_data\": is_mock,\n+        \"has_company_name\": bool(candidate.company_name),\n+        \"has_city\": bool(candidate.city),\n+        \"has_category\": bool(candidate.category),\n+        \"has_website\": website_signal,\n+        \"has_employee_count\": employee_count is not None,\n+        \"has_annual_revenue_eur\": annual_revenue_eur is not None,\n+        \"has_balance_sheet_total_eur\": balance_sheet_total_eur is not None,\n+    }\n+\n+    return CompanyQualification(\n+        lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n+        status=status,\n+        company_name=candidate.company_name,\n+        employee_count=employee_count,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=annual_revenue_eur,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=balance_sheet_total_eur,\n+        is_microenterprise=is_microenterprise,\n+        b2c_signal=b2c_signal,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=candidate.category,\n+        website_signal=website_signal,\n+        confidence_score=confidence_score,\n+        evidence=evidence,\n+        notes=notes,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _int_or_none(value: Any) -> int | None:\n+    if value is None or value == \"\":\n+        return None\n+    try:\n+        return int(value)\n+    except (TypeError, ValueError):\n+        return None\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"LeadCandidateNotFoundError\",\n+    \"MicroenterpriseThresholds\",\n+    \"create_candidate_precheck\",\n+    \"evaluate_microenterprise_signal\",\n+    \"get_latest_candidate_qualification\",\n+    \"precheck_candidate\",\n+]\n@@ -4,7 +4,8 @@\n \n from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n \n-from app.discovery.providers.base import ProviderResult\n+from app.discovery.providers.base import DiscoveryProvider, ProviderResult\n+from app.discovery.providers.google_places_provider import GooglePlacesProvider\n from app.discovery.providers.mock_provider import MockDiscoveryProvider\n from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n from app.services.discovery_service import DiscoveryRunNotFoundError, get_discovery_run\n@@ -27,8 +28,19 @@ def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n \n \n def execute_mock_provider(db: Session, discovery_run_id: str) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    return execute_provider(db, discovery_run_id, MockDiscoveryProvider())\n+\n+\n+def execute_google_places_provider(\n+    db: Session, discovery_run_id: str\n+) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n+    return execute_provider(db, discovery_run_id, GooglePlacesProvider())\n+\n+\n+def execute_provider(\n+    db: Session, discovery_run_id: str, provider: DiscoveryProvider\n+) -> ProviderExecutionSummary:\n     discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, discovery_run_id)\n-    provider = MockDiscoveryProvider()\n     results = provider.search(discovery_run.query_plan)\n \n     candidates_created = 0\n@@ -91,5 +103,7 @@ def _candidate_from_provider_result(\n __all__ = [\n     \"DiscoveryRunNotFoundError\",\n     \"ProviderExecutionSummary\",\n+    \"execute_google_places_provider\",\n     \"execute_mock_provider\",\n+    \"execute_provider\",\n ]\n@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@\n+import pytest\n+from sqlalchemy import create_engine\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+from app.models import CompanyQualification, DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n+from app.services.company_qualification_service import (\n+    MicroenterpriseThresholds,\n+    create_candidate_precheck,\n+    evaluate_microenterprise_signal,\n+    precheck_candidate,\n+)\n+\n+\n+@pytest.fixture()\n+def db_session() -> Session:\n+    engine = create_engine(\"sqlite:///:memory:\")\n+    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n+    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n+    try:\n+        yield session\n+    finally:\n+        session.close()\n+        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+\n+def _create_run(db_session: Session) -> DiscoveryRun:\n+    discovery_run = DiscoveryRun(\n+        city=\"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        normalized_city=\"luebeck\",\n+        status=DiscoveryRunStatus.done,\n+        keyword_groups=[],\n+        postal_codes=[\"23552\"],\n+        query_plan=[],\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(discovery_run)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(discovery_run)\n+    return discovery_run\n+\n+\n+def test_precheck_candidate_with_missing_company_data_needs_company_data(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+) -> None:\n+    discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n+    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n+        source=\"google_places\",\n+        source_reference=\"places/seed\",\n+        company_name=\"Seed Candidate GmbH\",\n+        city=\"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        postal_code=\"23552\",\n+        category=\"store\",\n+        raw_data={},\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(candidate)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n+\n+    qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert qualification.status.value == \"needs_company_data\"\n+    assert qualification.is_microenterprise is None\n+    assert qualification.evidence[\"requires_company_enrichment\"] is True\n+    assert qualification.evidence[\"uses_external_company_data\"] is False\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_candidate_precheck_does_not_create_legal_conclusion(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n+    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n+        source=\"mock\",\n+        source_reference=\"mock:luebeck:23552:ecommerce:online-shop\",\n+        company_name=\"Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck 23552 Online Shop\",\n+        city=\"L\u00fcbeck\",\n+        postal_code=\"23552\",\n+        category=\"ecommerce\",\n+        raw_data={\"mock\": True},\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(candidate)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n+\n+    qualification = precheck_candidate(candidate)\n+\n+    assert qualification.status.value == \"needs_human_review\"\n+    assert qualification.is_microenterprise is None\n+    assert qualification.confidence_score == 0.1\n+    assert qualification.evidence[\"is_mock_or_test_data\"] is True\n+    assert \"legal\" not in It creates obvious mock rows only, for example `Mock Candidate Lübeck 23552 Online Shop`.\n+Provider adapters execute a stored query plan and persist `LeadCandidate` rows. These rows are seed candidates only. They are not confirmed BFSG applicability, accessibility findings, legal obligations, violations, or legal conclusions.\n+\n+### Mock Provider\n+\n+The mock provider creates bounded, deterministic test candidates with obvious test names, for example `Mock Candidate Lübeck 23552 Online Shop`.\n \n ```bash\n curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/mock\n@@ -180,7 +187,53 @@ Example provider response:\n }\n ```\n \n-This is only a resolver, keyword, query-planner, and mock-provider persistence foundation. Google Maps and live providers are not integrated yet. The system does not scrape websites and does not call external discovery providers. `LeadCandidate` rows are candidate records only; they are not confirmed legal applicability, BFSG violations, or legal conclusions.\n+### Google Places API Provider\n+\n+The Google Places API provider is disabled by default. Tests do not call Google, and normal local runs do not require an API key.\n+\n+Required environment settings for live use:\n+\n+```text\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_ENABLED=false\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY=\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=10\n+GOOGLE_PLACES_MAX_RESULTS_PER_QUERY=5\n+```\n+\n+Endpoint:\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/google-places\n+```\n+\n+If disabled or missing configuration, the endpoint returns a clear error and does not make an external call. If enabled with a key, Places API responses are mapped into raw `LeadCandidate` seed rows with `source=\"google_places\"`.\n+\n+Google Places API results are only seed candidates. Northdata-style or comparable company enrichment is required before any candidate can be treated as qualified for downstream audit consideration.\n+\n+## Company Qualification Precheck\n+\n+`CompanyQualification` stores precheck signals for a `LeadCandidate`. It is a signal and review layer only. It does not make legal conclusions and it does not call Northdata or any external company-data provider yet.\n+\n+Precheck endpoints:\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\n+curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\n+```\n+\n+The precheck records available signals such as company name, category, website availability, optional employee/revenue/balance values if already present, confidence, and review status. Missing company data results in `needs_company_data` or `needs_human_review` rather than final qualification. Mock/test candidates remain clearly marked as test data.\n+\n+Configured microenterprise signal thresholds:\n+\n+```text\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_EMPLOYEE_THRESHOLD=10\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_REVENUE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n+BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_BALANCE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n+```\n+\n+These thresholds are only used as precheck signals. They are not legal scoring and they are not final applicability decisions.\n+\n+This discovery layer does not scrape websites, does not perform reporting, and does not run accessibility scans for seed candidates automatically.\n \n ## Guarded Pipeline\n \n@@ -7,15 +7,28 @@\n from app.db.session import get_db\n from app.discovery.keywords import get_keyword_groups\n from app.discovery.place_resolver
