app.models.company_qualification import (\n     CompanyQualification,\n     CompanyQualificationStatus,\n@@ -63,7 +64,10 @@ def create_candidate_precheck(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyQualific\n     if candidate is None:\n         raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n \n-    qualification = precheck_candidate(candidate)\n+    qualification = precheck_candidate(\n+        candidate,\n+        enrichment=_get_latest_enrichment_for_candidate(db, candidate_id),\n+    )\n     db.add(qualification)\n     db.commit()\n     db.refresh(qualification)\n@@ -85,68 +89,120 @@ def get_latest_candidate_qualification(\n     )\n \n \n-def precheck_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> CompanyQualification:\n-    raw_data = candidate.raw_data or {}\n-    employee_count = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"employee_count\"))\n-    annual_revenue_eur = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"annual_revenue_eur\"))\n-    balance_sheet_total_eur = _int_or_none(raw_data.get(\"balance_sheet_total_eur\"))\n+def precheck_candidate(\n+    candidate: LeadCandidate, enrichment: CompanyEnrichment | None = None\n+) -> CompanyQualification:\n+    candidate_raw_data = candidate.raw_data or {}\n+    enrichment_raw_data = enrichment.raw_data if enrichment else {}\n+    employee_count = _int_or_none(\n+        enrichment.employee_count if enrichment else candidate_raw_data.get(\"employee_count\")\n+    )\n+    annual_revenue_eur = _int_or_none(\n+        enrichment.annual_revenue_eur\n+        if enrichment\n+        else candidate_raw_data.get(\"annual_revenue_eur\")\n+    )\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur = _int_or_none(\n+        enrichment.balance_sheet_total_eur\n+        if enrichment\n+        else candidate_raw_data.get(\"balance_sheet_total_eur\")\n+    )\n     is_microenterprise = evaluate_microenterprise_signal(\n         employee_count=employee_count,\n         annual_revenue_eur=annual_revenue_eur,\n         balance_sheet_total_eur=balance_sheet_total_eur,\n     )\n-    is_mock = candidate.source == \"mock\" or raw_data.get(\"mock\") is True\n+    is_mock = (\n+        candidate.source == \"mock\"\n+        or candidate_raw_data.get(\"mock\") is True\n+        or enrichment_raw_data.get(\"mock\") is True\n+    )\n+    company_name = enrichment.company_name if enrichment else candidate.company_name\n     website_signal = bool(candidate.domain)\n     b2c_signal = bool(candidate.category)\n+    category_signal = candidate.category\n \n     status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data\n     confidence_score = 0.3\n     notes = \"Company enrichment is required before this candidate can be treated as qualified.\"\n \n-    if is_mock:\n+    if is_mock and is_microenterprise is None:\n         status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review\n         confidence_score = 0.1\n         notes = \"Mock/test candidate; never treat as a real company qualification.\"\n-    elif not candidate.company_name:\n+    elif not company_name:\n         status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data\n         confidence_score = 0.2\n-    elif is_microenterprise is not None:\n+    elif is_microenterprise is None:\n+        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data\n+        confidence_score = 0.35 if enrichment else 0.3\n+    elif is_microenterprise is True:\n+        status = (\n+            CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review\n+            if is_mock\n+            else CompanyQualificationStatus.likely_not_applicable\n+        )\n+        confidence_score = 0.5 if is_mock else 0.6\n+        notes = \"Microenterprise signal present; human review is still required before exclusion.\"\n+    elif b2c_signal and category_signal and website_signal:\n+        status = CompanyQualificationStatus.possible_bfsg_candidate\n+        confidence_score = 0.65 if enrichment else 0.5\n+        notes = \"Company-size and candidate signals are present; human review remains required.\"\n+    else:\n         status = CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review\n         confidence_score = 0.5\n+        notes = \"Company-size signal is present, but category or website signals need review.\"\n \n     evidence: dict[str, Any] = {\n         \"source\": candidate.source,\n         \"source_reference\": candidate.source_reference,\n         \"is_seed_candidate\": True,\n-        \"requires_company_enrichment\": True,\n+        \"requires_company_enrichment\": enrichment is None,\n         \"uses_external_company_data\": False,\n         \"is_mock_or_test_data\": is_mock,\n-        \"has_company_name\": bool(candidate.company_name),\n+        \"has_company_name\": bool(company_name),\n         \"has_city\": bool(candidate.city),\n         \"has_category\": bool(candidate.category),\n         \"has_website\": website_signal,\n         \"has_employee_count\": employee_count is not None,\n         \"has_annual_revenue_eur\": annual_revenue_eur is not None,\n         \"has_balance_sheet_total_eur\": balance_sheet_total_eur is not None,\n+        \"company_enrichment_id\": enrichment.id if enrichment else None,\n+        \"company_enrichment_source\": enrichment.source if enrichment else None,\n+        \"company_enrichment_is_mock\": enrichment_raw_data.get(\"mock\") is True,\n     }\n \n     return CompanyQualification(\n         lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n         status=status,\n-        company_name=candidate.company_name,\n+        company_name=company_name,\n+        legal_form=enrichment.legal_form if enrichment else None,\n+        registry_id=enrichment.registry_id if enrichment else None,\n+        northdata_url=enrichment.source_url if enrichment else None,\n         employee_count=employee_count,\n         annual_revenue_eur=annual_revenue_eur,\n         balance_sheet_total_eur=balance_sheet_total_eur,\n         is_microenterprise=is_microenterprise,\n         b2c_signal=b2c_signal,\n-        bfsg_category_signal=candidate.category,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=category_signal,\n         website_signal=website_signal,\n         confidence_score=confidence_score,\n         evidence=evidence,\n         notes=notes,\n     )\n \n \n+def _get_latest_enrichment_for_candidate(\n+    db: Session, candidate_id: str\n+) -> CompanyEnrichment | None:\n+    return (\n+        db.query(CompanyEnrichment)\n+        .filter(CompanyEnrichment.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(CompanyEnrichment.created_at.desc(), CompanyEnrichment.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n def _int_or_none(value: Any) -> int | None:\n     if value is None or value == \"\":\n         return None"
>       },
>       {
>         "filename": "tests/test_company_enrichment_service.py",
>         "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,121 @@\n+import socket\n+\n+import pytest\n+from sqlalchemy import create_engine\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+from app.models import CompanyEnrichment, DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n+from app.services.company_enrichment_service import (\n+    enrich_candidate_with_mock,\n+    get_latest_enrichment,\n+)\n+from app.services.company_qualification_service import LeadCandidateNotFoundError\n+\n+\n+@pytest.fixture()\n+def db_session() -> Session:\n+    engine = create_engine(\"sqlite:///:memory:\")\n+    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n+    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n+    try:\n+        yield session\n+    finally:\n+        session.close()\n+        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+\n+def _create_candidate(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+    *,\n+    profile: str | None = None,\n+    domain: str | None = None,\n+) -> LeadCandidate:\n+    discovery_run = DiscoveryRun(\n+        city=\"Lübeck\",\n+        normalized_city=\"luebeck\",\n+        status=DiscoveryRunStatus.done,\n+        keyword_groups=[],\n+        postal_codes=[\"23552\"],\n+        query_plan=[],\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(discovery_run)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(discovery_run)\n+\n+    raw_data = {\"mock_company_profile\": profile} if profile else {}\n+    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n+        source=\"google_places\",\n+        source_reference=\"places/seed\",\n+        company_name=\"Seed Candidate GmbH\",\n+        domain=domain,\n+        city=\"Lübeck\",\n+        postal_code=\"23552\",\n+        category=\"store\",\n+        raw_data=raw_data,\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(candidate)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n+    return candidate\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_enrichment_persists_company_enrichment(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, profile=\"microenterprise\")\n+\n+    summary = enrich_candidate_with_mock(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert summary.candidate_id == candidate.id\n+    assert summary.source == \"mock_company_data\"\n+    assert summary.confidence_score == 0.6\n+\n+    enrichment = db_session.get(CompanyEnrichment, summary.enrichment_id)\n+    assert enrichment is not None\n+    assert enrichment.lead_candidate_id == candidate.id\n+    assert enrichment.employee_count == 5\n+    assert enrichment.annual_revenue_eur == 500_000\n+    assert enrichment.raw_data[\"mock\"] is True\n+    assert enrichment.raw_data[\"profile\"] == \"microenterprise\"\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_enrichment_is_idempotent_for_same_candidate_and_profile(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, profile=\"non_microenterprise\")\n+\n+    first = enrich_candidate_with_mock(db_session, candidate.id)\n+    second = enrich_candidate_with_mock(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert first.enrichment_id == second.enrichment_id\n+    assert db_session.query(CompanyEnrichment).count() == 1\n+\n+\n+def test_get_latest_enrichment_returns_latest_for_candidate(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, profile=\"missing\")\n+    summary = enrich_candidate_with_mock(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    enrichment = get_latest_enrichment(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert enrichment is not None\n+    assert enrichment.id == summary.enrichment_id\n+    assert enrichment.source == \"mock_company_data\"\n+\n+\n+def test_enrichment_unknown_candidate_fails_clearly(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    with pytest.raises(LeadCandidateNotFoundError, match=\"Lead candidate not found: missing\"):\n+        enrich_candidate_with_mock(db_session, \"missing\")\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_enrichment_makes_no_external_network_calls(monkeypatch, db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    def fail_network(*args, **kwargs):\n+        raise AssertionError(\"network access is not allowed in mock enrichment\")\n+\n+    monkeypatch.setattr(socket, \"create_connection\", fail_network)\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, profile=\"missing\")\n+\n+    summary = enrich_candidate_with_mock(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert summary.source == \"mock_company_data\""

>         "patch": "@@ -3,7 +3,14 @@\n from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n \n from app.db.base import Base\n-from app.models import CompanyQualification, DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n+from app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n+    CompanyEnrichment,\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    DiscoveryRun,\n+    DiscoveryRunStatus,\n+    LeadCandidate,\n+)\n+from app.services.company_enrichment_service import enrich_candidate_with_mock\n from app.services.company_qualification_service import (\n     MicroenterpriseThresholds,\n     create_candidate_precheck,\n@@ -41,23 +48,37 @@ def _create_run(db_session: Session) -> DiscoveryRun:\n     return discovery_run\n \n \n-def test_precheck_candidate_with_missing_company_data_needs_company_data(\n+def _create_candidate(\n     db_session: Session,\n-) -> None:\n+    *,\n+    source: str = \"google_places\",\n+    domain: str | None = \"https://seed.example\",\n+    category: str | None = \"store\",\n+    profile: str | None = None,\n+) -> LeadCandidate:\n     discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n+    raw_data = {\"mock_company_profile\": profile} if profile else {}\n     candidate = LeadCandidate(\n         discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n-        source=\"google_places\",\n+        source=source,\n         source_reference=\"places/seed\",\n         company_name=\"Seed Candidate GmbH\",\n+        domain=domain,\n         city=\"Lübeck\",\n         postal_code=\"23552\",\n-        category=\"store\",\n-        raw_data={},\n+        category=category,\n+        raw_data=raw_data,\n     )\n     db_session.add(candidate)\n     db_session.commit()\n     db_session.refresh(candidate)\n+    return candidate\n+\n+\n+def test_precheck_candidate_with_missing_company_data_needs_company_data(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, profile=None)\n \n     qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db_session, candidate.id)\n \n@@ -92,6 +113,62 @@ def test_mock_candidate_precheck_does_not_create_legal_conclusion(db_session: Se\n     assert \"legal\" not in qualification.notes.casefold()\n \n \n+def test_qualification_precheck_uses_microenterprise_enrichment_data(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, profile=\"microenterprise\")\n+    enrich_candidate_with_mock(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert qualification.is_microenterprise is True\n+    assert qualification.status.value == \"needs_human_review\"\n+    assert qualification.employee_count == 5\n+    assert qualification.annual_revenue_eur == 500_000\n+    assert qualification.evidence[\"company_enrichment_source\"] == \"mock_company_data\"\n+    assert qualification.evidence[\"requires_company_enrichment\"] is False\n+\n+\n+def test_non_microenterprise_enrichment_can_signal_possible_candidate(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(\n+        db_session,\n+        profile=\"non_microenterprise\",\n+        domain=\"https://seed.example\",\n+        category=\"store\",\n+    )\n+    enrich_candidate_with_mock(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert qualification.is_microenterprise is False\n+    assert qualification.status.value == \"possible_bfsg_candidate\"\n+    assert qualification.employee_count == 25\n+    assert qualification.website_signal is True\n+    assert qualification.b2c_signal is True\n+    assert \"legal\" not in qualification.notes.casefold()\n+\n+\n+def test_non_microenterprise_without_category_or_website_needs_review(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(\n+        db_session,\n+        profile=\"non_microenterprise\",\n+        domain=None,\n+        category=None,\n+    )\n+    enrich_candidate_with_mock(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert qualification.is_microenterprise is False\n+    assert qualification.status.value == \"needs_human_review\"\n+    assert qualification.website_signal is False\n+    assert qualification.b2c_signal is False\n+\n+\n def test_microenterprise_helper_returns_true_when_all_available_values_are_below_thresholds() -> None:\n Northdata-style or comparable company enrichment is required before any candidate can be treated as qualified for downstream audit consideration.\n \n+## Company Enrichment Foundation\n+\n+`CompanyEnrichment` stores company-data signals for a `LeadCandidate`: legal form, registry ID, source URL, employee count, annual revenue, balance sheet total, raw source payload, and confidence. These records are evidence/signal data only. They do not make legal conclusions or final BFSG applicability decisions.\n+\n+The mock enrichment provider creates deterministic test data only. It does not call Northdata, scrape company registers, scrape websites, or claim real company data.\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\n+curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment\n+```\n+\n+Example response:\n+\n+```json\n+{\n+  \"candidate_id\": \"<candidate-id>\",\n+  \"enrichment_id\": \"<enrichment-id>\",\n+  \"source\": \"mock_company_data\",\n+  \"confidence_score\": 0.5\n+}\n+```\n+\n+A future Northdata or company-register integration should live behind the enrichment provider abstraction. Live company-data calls are not implemented in this foundation step.\n+\n ## Company Qualification Precheck\n \n `CompanyQualification` stores precheck signals for a `LeadCandidate`. It is a signal and review layer only. It does not make legal conclusions and it does not call Northdata or any external company-data provider yet.\n@@ -221,7 +253,7 @@ curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualifica\n curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\n ```\n \n-The precheck records available signals such as company name, category, website availability, optional employee/revenue/balance values if already present, confidence, and review status. Missing company data results in `needs_company_data` or `needs_human_review` rather than final qualification. Mock/test candidates remain clearly marked as test data.\n+The precheck uses the latest `CompanyEnrichment` when available. Missing company data results in `needs_company_data` or `needs_human_review`. Microenterprise-like data can signal `likely_not_applicable` or review need. Non-microenterprise-like data can signal `possible_bfsg_candidate` only when category/B2C and website signals are present. These are review signals, not legal scoring or final applicability decisions.\n \n Configured microenterprise signal thresholds:\n \n@@ -231,7 +263,7 @@ BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_REVENUE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_BALANCE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n ```\n \n-These thresholds are only used as precheck signals. They are not legal scoring and they are not final applicability decisions.\n+These thresholds are only used as precheck signals.\n \n This discovery layer does not scrape websites, does not perform reporting, and does not run accessibility scans for seed candidates automatically.\n \n@@ -11,9 +11,14 @@\n     GooglePlacesConfigurationError,\n     GooglePlacesDisabledError,\n )\n+from enrichment.lead_candidate_id,\n+        \"source\": enrichment.source,\n+        \"source_reference\": enrichment.source_reference,\n+        \"company_name\": enrichment.company_name,\n+ Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str,\n     }\n \n \n+@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\")\n+def run_mock_company_enrichment(\n+    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n+) -> dict[str, str | float | None]:\n+    try:\n+        summary = enrich_candidate_with_mock(db, candidate_id)\n+    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise DiscoveryRun,\n@@ -0,0 +1 @@\n+\"\"\"Company enrichment foundation.\"\"\"\n@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@\n+\"\"\"Company enrichment provider adapters.\"\"\"\n+\n+from app.enrichment.providers.base import (\n+    CompanyEnrichmentProvider,\n+    CompanyEnrichmentResult,\n+)\n+from app.enrichment.providers.mock_company_provider import MockCompanyEnrichmentProvider\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"CompanyEnrichmentProvider\",\n+    \"CompanyEnrichmentResult\",\n+    \"MockCompanyEnrichmentProvider\",\n+]\n@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@\n+\"\"\"Provider interface for company enrichment signals.\n+\n+Company enrichment results are evidence/signal data only. They must not make\n+legal conclusions or final BFSG applicability decisions.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass\n+from typing import Any, Protocol\n+\n+from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class CompanyEnrichmentResult:\n+    source: str\n+    source_reference: str | None = None\n+    company_name: str | None = None\n+    legal_form: str | None = None\n+    registry_id: str | None = None\n+    source_url: str | None = None\n+    employee_count: int | None = None\n+    annual_revenue_eur: int | None = None\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur: int | None = None\n+    raw_data: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n+    confidence_score: float | None = None\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        data = asdict(self)\n+        data[\"raw_data\"] = self.raw_data or {}\n+        return data\n+\n+\n+class CompanyEnrichmentProvider(Protocol):\n+    source: str\n+\n+    def enrich(self, candidate: LeadCandidate) -> CompanyEnrichmentResult:\n+        \"\"\"Return company-data signals for a lead candidate.\"\"\"\n@@ -0,0 +1,93 @@\n+\"\"\"Deterministic mock company-data provider.\n+\n+The mock provider creates obvious test enrichment signals only. It does not call\n+Northdata, scrape company registers, or represent real company data.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from app.enrichment.providers.base import CompanyEnrichmentResult\n+from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+\n+MOCK_COMPANY_SOURCE = \"mock_company_data\"\n+PROFILE_MISSING = \"missing\"\n+PROFILE_MICROENTERPRISE = \"microenterprise\"\n+PROFILE_NON_MICROENTERPRISE = \"non_microenterprise\"\n+\n+\n+def _profile_for_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> str:\n+    raw_data = candidate.raw_data or {}\n+    profile = raw_data.get(\"mock_company_profile\")\n+    if profile in {PROFILE_MICROENTERPRISE, PROFILE_NON_MICROENTERPRISE}:\n+        return profile\n+    return PROFILE_MISSING\n+\n+\n+class MockCompanyEnrichmentProvider:\n+    source = MOCK_COMPANY_SOURCE\n+\n+    def enrich(self, candidate: LeadCandidate) -> CompanyEnrichmentResult:\n+        profile = _profile_for_candidate(candidate)\n+        company_name = candidate.company_name\n+        source_reference = f\"mock-company-data:{candidate.id}:{profile}\"\n+        raw_data = {\n+            \"provider\": self.source,\n+            \"mock\": True,\n+            \"profile\": profile,\n+            \"lead_candidate_id\": candidate.id,\n+            \"lead_candidate_source\": candidate.source,\n+            \"message\": \"Mock/test company-data signals only; not real register data.\",\n+        }\n+\n+        if profile == PROFILE_MICROENTERPRISE:\n+            return CompanyEnrichmentResult(\n+                source=self.source,\n+                source_reference=source_reference,\n+                company_name=company_name,\n+                legal_form=\"GmbH\",\n+                registry_id=f\"HRB-MOCK-{candidate.id[:8]}\",\n+                source_url=f\"mock://company-data/{candidate.id}\",\n+                employee_count=5,\n+                annual_revenue_eur=500_000,\n+                balance_sheet_total_eur=400_000,\n+                raw_data=raw_data,\n+                confidence_score=0.6,\n+            )\n+\n+        if profile == PROFILE_NON_MICROENTERPRISE:\n+            return CompanyEnrichmentResult(\n+                source=self.source,\n+                source_reference=source_reference,\n+                company_name=company_name,\n+                legal_form=\"GmbH\",\n+                registry_id=f\"HRB-MOCK-{candidate.id[:8]}\",\n+                source_url=f\"mock://company-data/{candidate.id}\",\n+                employee_count=25,\n+                annual_revenue_eur=3_000_000,\n+                balance_sheet_total_eur=2_500_000,\n+                raw_data=raw_data,\n+                confidence_score=0.7,\n+            )\n+\n+        return CompanyEnrichmentResult(\n+            source=self.source,\n+            source_reference=source_reference,\n+            company_name=company_name,\n+            legal_form=None,\n+            registry_id=None,\n+            source_url=None,\n+            employee_count=None,\n+            annual_revenue_eur=None,\n+            balance_sheet_total_eur=None,\n+            raw_data=raw_data,\n+            confidence_score=0.2,\n+        )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"MOCK_COMPANY_SOURCE\",\n+    \"PROFILE_MICROENTERPRISE\",\n+    \"PROFILE_MISSING\",\n+    \"PROFILE_NON_MICROENTERPRISE\",\n+    \"MockCompanyEnrichmentProvider\",\n+]\n@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@\n+from app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\n from app.models.company_qualification import (\n     CompanyQualification,\n     CompanyQualificationStatus,\n@@ -11,6 +12,7 @@\n from app.models.scan import Scan, ScanStatus\n \n __all__ = [\n+    \"CompanyEnrichment\",\n     \"CompanyQualification\",\n     \"CompanyQualificationStatus\",\n     \"ComplianceFinding\",\n@@ -0,0 +1,48 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import uuid\n+from datetime import datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from sqlalchemy import JSON, DateTime, Float, ForeignKey, Integer, String, func\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+\n+\n+class CompanyEnrichment(Base):\n+    __tablename__ = \"company_enrichments\"\n+\n+    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n+    )\n+    lead_candidate_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"lead_candidates.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"),\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    source: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=False, index=True)\n+    source_reference: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)\n+    company_name: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n+    legal_form: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)\n+    registry_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)\n+    source_url: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)\n+    employee_count: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n+    annual_revenue_eur: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n+    balance_sheet_total_eur: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n+    raw_data: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\n+    confidence_score: Mapped[float | None] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)\n+    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n+    )\n+    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True),\n+        server_default=func.now(),\n+        onupdate=func.now(),\n+        nullable=False,\n+    )\n+\n+    lead_candidate: Mapped[\"LeadCandidate\"] = relationship(\n+        \"LeadCandidate\", back_populates=\"enrichments\"\n+    )\n@@ -45,3 +45,8 @@ class LeadCandidate(Base):\n         back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n         cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n     )\n+    enrichments: Mapped[list[\"CompanyEnrichment\"]] = relationship(\n+        \"CompanyEnrichment\",\n+        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n+        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n+    )\n@@ -0,0 +1,110 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n+\n+from app.enrichment.providers.base import CompanyEnrichmentProvider, CompanyEnrichmentResult\n+from app.enrichment.providers.mock_company_provider import MockCompanyEnrichmentProvider\n+from app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\n+from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+from app.services.company_qualification_service import LeadCandidateNotFoundError\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class CompanyEnrichmentSummary:\n+    candidate_id: str\n+    enrichment_id: str\n+    source: str\n+    confidence_score: float | None\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, str | float | None]:\n+        return {\n+            \"candidate_id\": self.candidate_id,\n+            \"enrichment_id\": self.enrichment_id,\n+            \"source\": self.source,\n+            \"confidence_score\": self.confidence_score,\n+        }\n+\n+\n+def enrich_candidate_with_mock(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyEnrichmentSummary:\n+    return enrich_candidate(db, candidate_id, MockCompanyEnrichmentProvider())\n+\n+\n+def enrich_candidate(\n+    db: Session, candidate_id: str, provider: CompanyEnrichmentProvider\n+) -> CompanyEnrichmentSummary:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    result = provider.enrich(candidate)\n+    enrichment = _find_existing_enrichment(db, candidate_id, result)\n+    if enrichment is None:\n+        enrichment = _enrichment_from_result(candidate_id, result)\n+        db.add(enrichment)\n+        db.commit()\n+        db.refresh(enrichment)\n+\n+    return CompanyEnrichmentSummary(\n+        candidate_id=candidate_id,\n+        enrichment_id=enrichment.id,\n+        source=enrichment.source,\n+        confidence_score=enrichment.confidence_score,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def get_latest_enrichment(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyEnrichment | None:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    return (\n+        db.query(CompanyEnrichment)\n+        .filter(CompanyEnrichment.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(CompanyEnrichment.created_at.desc(), CompanyEnrichment.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _find_existing_enrichment(\n+    db: Session, candidate_id: str, result: CompanyEnrichmentResult\n+) -> CompanyEnrichment | None:\n+    if not result.source_reference:\n+        return None\n+    return (\n+        db.query(CompanyEnrichment)\n+        .filter(\n+            CompanyEnrichment.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id,\n+            CompanyEnrichment.source == result.source,\n+            CompanyEnrichment.source_reference == result.source_reference,\n+        )\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _enrichment_from_result(\n+    candidate_id: str, result: CompanyEnrichmentResult\n+) -> CompanyEnrichment:\n+    return CompanyEnrichment(\n+        lead_candidate_id=candidate_id,\n+        source=result.source,\n+        source_reference=result.source_reference,\n+        company_name=result.company_name,\n+        legal_form=result.legal_form,\n+        registry_id=result.registry_id,\n+        source_url=result.source_url,\n+        employee_count=result.employee_count,\n+        annual_revenue_eur=result.annual_revenue_eur,\n+        balance_sheet_total_eur=result.balance_sheet_total_eur,\n+        raw_data=result.raw_data or {},\n+        confidence_score=result.confidence_score,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"CompanyEnrichmentSummary\",\n+    \"enrich_candidate\",\n+    \"enrich_candidate_with_mock\",\n+    \"get_latest_enrichment\",\n+]\n@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@\n from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n \n from app.core.config import get_settings\n+from app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\n from get_db\nfrom app.discovery.keywords import get_keyword_groups\nfrom app.discovery.place_resolver import PlaceDataError, PlaceNotFoundError, resolve_city\nfrom app.discovery.providers.google_places_provider import (\n    GooglePlacesConfigurationError,\n    GooglePlacesDisabledError,\n)\nfrom app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\nfrom execute_mock_provider,\n)\n\nrouter = APIRouter(prefix=\"/discovery\", tags=[\"discovery\"])\n\n\ndef _format_datetime(value: datetime | None) -> str | None:\n    return value.isoformat() if value else None\n\n\ndef _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run: DiscoveryRun) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": discovery_run.id,\n        \"city\": discovery_run.city,\n        \"normalized_city\": discovery_run.normalized_city,\n        \"status\": discovery_run.status.value,\n        \"postal_codes\": discovery_run.postal_codes,\n        \"keyword_groups\": discovery_run.keyword_groups,\n        \"query_plan\": discovery_run.query_plan,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(discovery_run.created_at),\n        \"completed_at\": _format_datetime(discovery_run.completed_at),\n        \"error_message\": discovery_run.error_message,\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": candidate.id,\n        \"discovery_run_id\": candidate.discovery_run_id,\n        \"source\": candidate.source,\n        \"source_reference\": candidate.source_reference,\n        \"company_name\": candidate.company_name,\n        \"domain\": candidate.domain,\n        \"city\": candidate.city,\n        \"postal_code\": candidate.postal_code,\n        \"address\": candidate.address,\n        \"phone\": candidate.phone,\n        \"category\": candidate.category,\n        \"raw_data\": candidate.raw_data,\n        \"confidence_score\": candidate.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(candidate.created_at),\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_enrichment(enrichment: CompanyEnrichment) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": enrichment.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": enrichment.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"source\": enrichment.source,\n        \"source_reference\": enrichment.source_reference,\n        \"company_name\": enrichment.company_name,\n        \"legal_form\": enrichment.legal_form,\n        \"registry_id\": enrichment.registry_id,\n        \"source_url\": enrichment.source_url,\n        \"employee_count\": enrichment.employee_count,\n        \"annual_revenue_eur\": enrichment.annual_revenue_eur,\n        \"balance_sheet_total_eur\": enrichment.balance_sheet_total_eur,\n        \"raw_data\": enrichment.raw_data,\n        \"confidence_score\": enrichment.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(enrichment.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(enrichment.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_qualification(qualification: CompanyQualification) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": qualification.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": qualification.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"status\": qualification.status.value,\n        \"company_name\": qualification.company_name,\n        \"legal_form\": qualification.legal_form,\n        \"registry_id\": qualification.registry_id,\n        \"northdata_url\": qualification.northdata_url,\n        \"employee_count\": qualification.employee_count,\n        \"annual_revenue_eur\": qualification.annual_revenue_eur,\n        \"balance_sheet_total_eur\": qualification.balance_sheet_total_eur,\n        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise,\n        \"b2c_signal\": qualification.b2c_signal,\n        \"bfsg_category_signal\": qualification.bfsg_category_signal,\n        \"website_signal\": qualification.website_signal,\n        \"confidence_score\": qualification.confidence_score,\n        \"evidence\": qualification.evidence,\n        \"notes\": qualification.notes,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(qualification.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(qualification.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/places/{city}\")\ndef get_places(city: str) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        matches = resolve_city(city)\n    except PlaceNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except PlaceDataError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n            detail=str(exc),\n        ) from exc\n\n    return {\"city\": city, \"matches\": [match.to_dict() for match in matches]}\n\n\n@router.get(\"/keywords\")\ndef get_keywords() -> dict[str, object]:\n    return {\"groups\": get_keyword_groups()}\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{city}\")\ndef create_run(city: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        discovery_run = create_discovery_run(db, city)\n    except PlaceNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except PlaceDataError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n            detail=str(exc),\n        ) from exc\n\n    return {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": discovery_run.id,\n        \"city\": discovery_run.city,\n        \"status\": discovery_run.status.value,\n        \"postal_codes_count\": len(discovery_run.postal_codes),\n        \"query_count\": len(discovery_run.query_plan),\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}\")\ndef read_run(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    try:\n        discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\ndef run_mock_provider(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    try:\n        summary = execute_mock_provider(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/google-places\")\ndef run_google_places_provider(\n    run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    try:\n        summary = execute_google_places_provider(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except GooglePlacesDisabledError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_503_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, detail=str(exc)\n        ) from exc\n    except GooglePlacesConfigurationError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\ndef read_run_candidates(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        candidates = list_lead_candidates(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": run_id,\n        \"candidates\": [_serialize_candidate(candidate) for candidate in candidates],\n    }\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\")\ndef run_mock_company_enrichment(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, str | float | None]:\n    try:\n        summary = enrich_candidate_with_mock(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment\")\ndef read_candidate_enrichment(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        enrichment = get_latest_enrichment(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    if enrichment is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n            detail=f\"Company enrichment not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n        )\n    return _serialize_enrichment(enrichment)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\")\ndef run_candidate_qualification_precheck(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"candidate_id\": candidate_id,\n        \"qualification_id\": qualification.id,\n        \"status\": qualification.status.value,\n        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise,\n        \"confidence_score\": qualification.confidence_score,\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\")\ndef read_candidate_qualification(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        qualification = get_latest_candidate_qualification(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    if qualification is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n            detail=f\"Company qualification not found for candidate: > {"content": "from app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\nfrom app.models.company_qualification import (\n    CompanyQualification,\n    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n)\nfrom app.models.compliance_finding import ComplianceFinding\nfrom app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus\nfrom app.models.evidence_bundle import EvidenceBundle\nfrom app.models.finding import Finding\nfrom app.models.lead import Lead\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\nfrom app.models.scan import Scan, ScanStatus\n\n__all__ = [\n    \"CompanyEnrichment\",\n    \"CompanyQualification\",\n    \"CompanyQualificationStatus\",\n    \"ComplianceFinding\",\n    \"DiscoveryRun\",\n    \"DiscoveryRunStatus\",\n    \"EvidenceBundle\",\n    \"Finding\",\n    \"Lead\",\n    \"LeadCandidate\",\n    \"Scan\",\n    \"ScanStatus\",\n]\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "07622880465da7a8ea1d9efa2c4c06684596f98c", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/promotion-gate-foundation/app/models/__init__.py", "display_title": "__init__.py"}

> ```text
> {"content": "from sqlalchemy import text\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import engine\nfrom app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n    CompanyEnrichment,\n    CompanyQualification,\n    ComplianceFinding,\n    DiscoveryRun,\n    EvidenceBundle,\n    Finding,\n    Lead,\n    LeadCandidate,\n    Scan,\n)\n\n_SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'processing'\",\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'failed'\",\n)\n\n_SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS started_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_message TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n_FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS help_url VARCHAR(500)\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wcag_refs JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence_score DOUBLE PRECISION\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n\ndef init_db() -> None:\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n    _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema()\n    _ensure_finding_evidence_schema()\n\n\ndef _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.connect() as connection:\n        autocommit_connection = connection.execution_options(isolation_level=\"AUTOCOMMIT\")\n        for statement in _SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES:\n            autocommit_connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n\ndef _ensure_finding_evidence_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "e0ff4d7ed3fec9c93e3bae44635bc7521c55f69b", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/promotion-gate-foundation/app/db/init_db.py", "display_title": "init_db.py"}

> {"content": "import pytest\nfrom fastapi import FastAPI\nfrom fastapi.testclient import TestClient\nfrom sqlalchemy import create_engine\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\nfrom sqlalchemy.pool import StaticPool\n\nfrom app.api.discovery import router as discovery_router\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import get_db\nfrom app.models import CompanyEnrichment, CompanyQualification, DiscoveryRun, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n\n\n@pytest.fixture()\ndef db_session() -> Session:\n    engine = create_engine(\n        \"sqlite://\",\n        connect_args={\"check_same_thread\": False},\n        poolclass=StaticPool,\n    )\n    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n\n    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n    try:\n        yield session\n    finally:\n        session.close()\n        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n\n\ndef make_client(db_session: Session | None = None) -> TestClient:\n    app = FastAPI()\n    app.include_router(discovery_router)\n    if db_session is not None:\n        app.dependency_overrides[get_db] = lambda: db_session\n    return TestClient(app)\n\n\ndef test_keywords_endpoint_returns_structured_groups() -> None:\n    client = make_client()\n\n    response = client.get(\"/discovery/keywords\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    groups = response.json()[\"groups\"]\n    assert groups\n    assert {\"group_id\", \"label\", \"keywords\", \"bfsg_relevance_reason\", \"enabled\"}.issubset(\n        groups[0]\n    )\n    assert \"ecommerce\" in {group[\"group_id\"] for group in groups}\n\n\ndef test_places_endpoint_returns_luebeck_matches() -> None:\n    client = make_client()\n\n    response = client.get(\"/discovery/places/L\u00fcbeck\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    payload = response.json()\n    assert payload[\"city\"] == \"L\u00fcbeck\"\n    assert payload[\"matches\"]\n    assert {match[\"city\"] for match in payload[\"matches\"]} == {\"L\u00fcbeck\"}\n    assert any(match[\"postal_code\"] == \"23552\" for match in payload[\"matches\"])\n\n\ndef test_places_endpoint_accepts_luebeck_transliteration() -> None:\n    client = make_client()\n\n    response = client.get(\"/discovery/places/Luebeck\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    assert {match[\"city\"] for match in response.json()[\"matches\"]} == {\"L\u00fcbeck\"}\n\n\ndef test_create_discovery_run_endpoint_returns_done_and_query_count(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    payload = response.json()\n    assert payload[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n    assert payload[\"city\"] == \"L\u00fcbeck\"\n    assert payload[\"status\"] == \"done\"\n    assert payload[\"postal_codes_count\"] > 0\n    assert payload[\"query_count\"] > 0\n\n\ndef test_get_discovery_run_endpoint_returns_stored_query_plan(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n\n    response = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    payload = response.json()\n    assert payload[\"id\"] == run_id\n    assert payload[\"status\"] == \"done\"\n    assert payload[\"postal_codes\"]\n    assert payload[\"keyword_groups\"]\n    assert payload[\"query_plan\"]\n    assert payload[\"error_message\"] is None\n\n\ndef test_discovery_run_candidates_endpoint_returns_empty_list(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n\n    response = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    assert response.json() == {\"discovery_run_id\": run_id, \"candidates\": []}\n\n\ndef test_mock_provider_endpoint_persists_candidates(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n\n    provider_response = client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n    candidates_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\n\n    assert provider_response.status_code == 200\n    assert provider_response.json() == {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": run_id,\n        \"provider\": \"mock\",\n        \"candidates_created\": 10,\n        \"candidates_total\": 10,\n    }\n    candidates = candidates_response.json()[\"candidates\"]\n    assert len(candidates) == 10\n    assert candidates[0][\"source\"] == \"mock\"\n    assert candidates[0][\"company_name\"].startswith(\"Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck\")\n    assert candidates[0][\"raw_data\"][\"mock\"] is True\n\n\ndef test_google_places_endpoint_disabled_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n\n    response = client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/google-places\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 503\n    assert response.json()[\"detail\"] == \"Google Places API provider is disabled\"\n\n\ndef test_candidate_enrichment_mock_endpoint_persists_and_reads_latest(\n    db_session: Session,\n) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n    client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n    candidate_id = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\").json()[\"candidates\"][0][\"id\"]\n\n    enrichment_response = client.post(\n        f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\"\n    )\n    read_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment\")\n\n    assert enrichment_response.status_code == 200\n    enrichment_summary = enrichment_response.json()\n    assert enrichment_summary[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n    assert enrichment_summary[\"source\"] == \"mock_company_data\"\n    assert enrichment_summary[\"confidence_score\"] == 0.2\n\n    assert read_response.status_code == 200\n    enrichment = read_response.json()\n    assert enrichment[\"id\"] == enrichment_summary[\"enrichment_id\"]\n    assert enrichment[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n    assert enrichment[\"raw_data\"][\"mock\"] is True\n    assert enrichment[\"raw_data\"][\"profile\"] == \"missing\"\n\n\ndef test_candidate_enrichment_unknown_candidate_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n    response = client.post(\"/discovery/candidates/missing/enrichment/mock\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 404\n    assert \"Lead candidate not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n\n\ndef test_candidate_qualification_precheck_for_mock_candidate(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\")\n    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n    client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n    candidates = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\").json()[\"candidates\"]\n    candidate_id = candidates[0][\"id\"]\n\n    precheck_response = client.post(\n        f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\"\n    )\n    read_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\")\n\n    assert precheck_response.status_code == 200\n    precheck = precheck_response.json()\n    assert precheck[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n    assert precheck[\"status\"] == \"needs_human_review\"\n    assert precheck[\"is_microenterprise\"] is None\n    assert precheck[\"confidence_score\"] == 0.1\n\n    assert read_response.status_code == 200\n    qualification = read_response.json()\n    assert qualification[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n    assert qualification[\"status\"] == \"needs_human_review\"\n    assert qualification[\"evidence\"][\"is_mock_or_test_data\"] is True\n    assert qualification[\"evidence\"][\"requires_company_enrichment\"] is True\n\n\ndef test_qualification_unknown_candidate_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n    response = client.post(\"/discovery/candidates/missing/qualification/precheck\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 404\n    assert \"Lead candidate not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n\n\ndef test_mock_provider_endpoint_unknown_run_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/missing/providers/mock\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 404\n    assert \"Discovery run not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n\n\ndef test_create_discovery_run_unknown_city_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n    response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Atlantis\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 404\n    assert \"No places found for city: Atlantis\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "f407fdd1d20af2992791fdd911e1cfddb81bf74e", "display_url": >
> Ich füge jetzt das eigentliche Gate hinzu: ein persistentes `PromotionDecision`-Modell, einen Service mit deterministischer Entscheidungsmatrix und API-Endpunkte zum Evaluieren/Lesen der letzten Entscheidung.

needs_review = \"needs_review\"\n    ready_for_website_probe = \"ready_for_website_probe\"\n\n\nclass PromotionReasonCode(str, enum.Enum):\n    missing_company_data = \"missing_company_data\"\n    missing_website = \"missing_website\"\n    likely_microenterprise = \"likely_microenterprise\"\n    mock_or_test_data = \"mock_or_test_data\"\n    insufficient_bfsg_signal = \"insufficient_bfsg_signal\"\n    possible_bfsg_candidate = \"possible_bfsg_candidate\"\n    needs_human_review = \"needs_human_review\"\n\n\nclass PromotionDecision(Base):\n    __tablename__ = > {"content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport uuid\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, DateTime, Float, ForeignKey, String, Text, func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\n\n\nclass LeadCandidate(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"lead_candidates\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n    )\n    discovery_run_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36),\n func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\n\n\nclass LeadCandidate(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"lead_candidates\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = source_reference: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)\n    company_name: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    domain: Mapped[str | None] = address: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n    phone: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)\n    category: Mapped[str | None] = >   "content": "from app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\nfrom app.models.company_qualification import (\n    CompanyQualification,\n    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n)\nfrom app.models.compliance_finding import ComplianceFinding\nfrom app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus\nfrom app.models.evidence_bundle import EvidenceBundle\nfrom app.models.finding import Finding\nfrom app.models.lead import Lead\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\nfrom app.models.promotion_decision import (\n    PromotionDecision,\n    PromotionDecisionStatus,\n    PromotionReasonCode,\n)\nfrom app.models.scan import Scan, ScanStatus\n\n__all__ = [\n    \"CompanyEnrichment\",\n    \"CompanyQualification\",\n    \"CompanyQualificationStatus\",\n    \"ComplianceFinding\",\n    \"DiscoveryRun\",\n    \"DiscoveryRunStatus\",\n    \"EvidenceBundle\",\n    \"Finding\",\n    \"Lead\",\n    \"LeadCandidate\",\n    \"PromotionDecision\",\n    \"PromotionDecisionStatus\",\n    \"PromotionReasonCode\",\n    \"Scan\",\n    \"ScanStatus\",\n]\n"

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/promotion-gate-foundation",
>   "path": "app/db/init_db.py",
>   "sha": "e0ff4d7ed3fec9c93e3bae44635bc7521c55f69b",
>   "message": "Register promotion decision model in DB init",
>   "content": "from sqlalchemy import text\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import engine\nfrom app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n    CompanyEnrichment,\n    CompanyQualification,\n    ComplianceFinding,\n    DiscoveryRun,\n    EvidenceBundle,\n    Finding,\n    Lead,\n    LeadCandidate,\n    PromotionDecision,\n    Scan,\n)\n\n_SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'processing'\",\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'failed'\",\n)\n\n_SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS started_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_message TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n_FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS help_url VARCHAR(500)\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wcag_refs JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence_score DOUBLE PRECISION\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n\ndef init_db() -> None:\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n    _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema()\n    _ensure_finding_evidence_schema()\n\n\ndef _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.connect() as connection:\n        autocommit_connection = connection.execution_options(isolation_level=\"AUTOCOMMIT\")\n        for statement in _SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES:\n            autocommit_connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n\ndef _ensure_finding_evidence_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n"
> }

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/promotion-gate-foundation",
>   "path": "app/services/promotion_service.py",
>   "message": "Add promotion gate service",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\nfrom app.models.company_qualification import (\n    CompanyQualification,\n    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n)\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\nfrom app.models.promotion_decision import (\n    PromotionDecision,\n    PromotionDecisionStatus,\n    PromotionReasonCode,\n)\nfrom app.services.company_qualification_service import LeadCandidateNotFoundError\n\n\ndef evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> PromotionDecision:\n    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n    if candidate is None:\n        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n\n    qualification = _get_latest_qualification(db, candidate_id)\n    enrichment = _get_latest_enrichment(db, candidate_id)\n    status, reason_code, confidence_score = _decide(candidate, qualification)\n    decision = PromotionDecision(\n        lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n        company_qualification_id=qualification.id if qualification else None,\n        company_enrichment_id=enrichment.id if enrichment else None,\n        status=status,\n        reason_code=reason_code.value,\n        reasons=_build_reasons(candidate, qualification, enrichment),\n        confidence_score=confidence_score,\n    )\n    db.add(decision)\n    db.commit()\n    db.refresh(decision)\n    return decision\n\n\ndef get_latest_promotion_decision(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> PromotionDecision | None:\n    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n    if candidate is None:\n        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n\n    return (\n        db.query(PromotionDecision)\n        .filter(PromotionDecision.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n        .order_by(PromotionDecision.created_at.desc(), PromotionDecision.id.desc())\n        .first()\n    )\n\n\ndef _decide(\n    candidate: LeadCandidate, qualification: CompanyQualification | None\n) -> tuple[PromotionDecisionStatus, PromotionReasonCode, float | None]:\n    raw_data = candidate.raw_data or {}\n    if candidate.source == \"mock\" or raw_data.get(\"mock\") is True:\n        return (\n            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n            PromotionReasonCode.mock_or_test_data,\n            0.2,\n        )\n\n    if qualification is None:\n        return (\n            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n            PromotionReasonCode.missing_company_data,\n            0.2,\n        )\n\n    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.likely_not_applicable:\n        reason_code = (\n            PromotionReasonCode.likely_microenterprise\n            if qualification.is_microenterprise is True\n            else PromotionReasonCode.insufficient_bfsg_signal\n        )\n        return (PromotionDecisionStatus.rejected, reason_code, qualification.confidence_score)\n\n    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data:\n        return (\n            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n            PromotionReasonCode.missing_company_data,\n            qualification.confidence_score,\n        )\n\n    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review:\n        return (\n            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n            PromotionReasonCode.needs_human_review,\n            qualification.confidence_score,\n        )\n\n    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.possible_bfsg_candidate:\n        if candidate.domain or qualification.website_signal is True:\n            return (\n                PromotionDecisionStatus.ready_for_website_probe,\n                PromotionReasonCode.possible_bfsg_candidate,\n                qualification.confidence_score,\n            )\n        return (\n            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n            PromotionReasonCode.missing_website,\n            qualification.confidence_score,\n        )\n\n    return (\n        PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n        PromotionReasonCode.needs_human_review,\n        qualification.confidence_score,\n    )\n\n\ndef _build_reasons(\n    candidate: LeadCandidate,\n    qualification: CompanyQualification | None,\n    enrichment: CompanyEnrichment | None,\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    return {\n        \"candidate_source\": candidate.source,\n        \"category\": candidate.category,\n        \"has_domain\": bool(candidate.domain),\n        \"qualification_status\": qualification.status.value if qualification else None,\n        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise if qualification else None,\n        \"b2c_signal\": qualification.b2c_signal if qualification else None,\n        \"bfsg_category_signal\": qualification.bfsg_category_signal if qualification else None,\n        \"website_signal\": qualification.website_signal if qualification else None,\n        \"enrichment_source\": enrichment.source if enrichment else None,\n        \"no_legal_conclusion\": True,\n    }\n\n\ndef _get_latest_qualification(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyQualification | None:\n    return (\n        db.query(CompanyQualification)\n        .filter(CompanyQualification.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n        .order_by(CompanyQualification.created_at.desc(), CompanyQualification.id.desc())\n        .first()\n    )\n\n\ndef _get_latest_enrichment(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyEnrichment | None:\n    return (\n        db.query(CompanyEnrichment)\n        .filter(CompanyEnrichment.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n        .order_by(CompanyEnrichment.created_at.desc(), CompanyEnrichment.id.desc())\n        .first()\n    )\n\n\n__all__ = [\n    \"evaluate_candidate_for_promotion\",\n    \"get_latest_promotion_decision\",\n]\n"
> }
> ```

> Das Gate-Modell und die Service-Entscheidungsmatrix sind drin. Jetzt verdrahte ich die zwei Discovery-Endpunkte und gebe eine klare, kleine Response zurück, die nur Routingstatus, Reason-Code und Confidence enthält.

> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",

>   "sha": "c7b4883dc0420cc67e052d4f2b2375a1b7431389",
>   "message": "Expose promotion gate endpoints",
>   "content": "from datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.db.session import get_db\nfrom app.discovery.keywords import get_keyword_groups\nfrom app.discovery.place_resolver import PlaceDataError, PlaceNotFoundError, resolve_city\nfrom app.discovery.providers.google_places_provider import (\n    GooglePlacesConfigurationError,\n    GooglePlacesDisabledError,\n)\nfrom app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\nfrom app.models.company_qualification import CompanyQualification\nfrom app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\nfrom app.models.promotion_decision import PromotionDecision\nfrom app.services.company_enrichment_service import (\n    enrich_candidate_with_mock,\n    get_latest_enrichment,\n)\nfrom app.services.company_qualification_service import (\n    LeadCandidateNotFoundError,\n    create_candidate_precheck,\n    get_latest_candidate_qualification,\n)\nfrom app.services.discovery_service import (\n    DiscoveryRunNotFoundError,\n    create_discovery_run,\n    get_discovery_run,\n    list_lead_candidates,\n)\nfrom app.services.promotion_service import (\n    evaluate_candidate_for_promotion,\n    get_latest_promotion_decision,\n)\nfrom app.services.provider_execution_service import (\n    execute_google_places_provider,\n    execute_mock_provider,\n)\n\nrouter = APIRouter(prefix=\"/discovery\", tags=[\"discovery\"])\n\n\ndef _format_datetime(value: datetime | None) -> str | None:\n    return value.isoformat() if value else None\n\n\ndef _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run: DiscoveryRun) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": discovery_run.id,\n        \"city\": discovery_run.city,\n        \"normalized_city\": discovery_run.normalized_city,\n        \"status\": discovery_run.status.value,\n        \"postal_codes\": discovery_run.postal_codes,\n        \"keyword_groups\": discovery_run.keyword_groups,\n        \"query_plan\": discovery_run.query_plan,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(discovery_run.created_at),\n        \"completed_at\": _format_datetime(discovery_run.completed_at),\n        \"error_message\": discovery_run.error_message,\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": candidate.id,\n        \"discovery_run_id\": candidate.discovery_run_id,\n        \"source\": candidate.source,\n        \"source_reference\": candidate.source_reference,\n        \"company_name\": candidate.company_name,\n        \"domain\": candidate.domain,\n        \"city\": candidate.city,\n        \"postal_code\": candidate.postal_code,\n        \"address\": candidate.address,\n        \"phone\": candidate.phone,\n        \"category\": candidate.category,\n        \"raw_data\": candidate.raw_data,\n        \"confidence_score\": candidate.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(candidate.created_at),\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_enrichment(enrichment: CompanyEnrichment) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": enrichment.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": enrichment.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"source\": enrichment.source,\n        \"source_reference\": enrichment.source_reference,\n        \"company_name\": enrichment.company_name,\n        \"legal_form\": enrichment.legal_form,\n        \"registry_id\": enrichment.registry_id,\n        \"source_url\": enrichment.source_url,\n        \"employee_count\": enrichment.employee_count,\n        \"annual_revenue_eur\": enrichment.annual_revenue_eur,\n        \"balance_sheet_total_eur\": enrichment.balance_sheet_total_eur,\n        \"raw_data\": enrichment.raw_data,\n        \"confidence_score\": enrichment.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(enrichment.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(enrichment.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_qualification(qualification: CompanyQualification) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": qualification.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": qualification.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"status\": qualification.status.value,\n        \"company_name\": qualification.company_name,\n        \"legal_form\": qualification.legal_form,\n        \"registry_id\": qualification.registry_id,\n        \"northdata_url\": qualification.northdata_url,\n        \"employee_count\": qualification.employee_count,\n        \"annual_revenue_eur\": qualification.annual_revenue_eur,\n        \"balance_sheet_total_eur\": qualification.balance_sheet_total_eur,\n        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise,\n        \"b2c_signal\": qualification.b2c_signal,\n        \"bfsg_category_signal\": qualification.bfsg_category_signal,\n        \"website_signal\": qualification.website_signal,\n        \"confidence_score\": qualification.confidence_score,\n        \"evidence\": qualification.evidence,\n        \"notes\": qualification.notes,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(qualification.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(qualification.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_promotion_decision(decision: PromotionDecision) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": decision.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": decision.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"company_qualification_id\": decision.company_qualification_id,\n        \"company_enrichment_id\": decision.company_enrichment_id,\n        \"status\": decision.status.value,\n        \"reason_code\": decision.reason_code,\n        \"reasons\": decision.reasons,\n        \"confidence_score\": decision.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(decision.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(decision.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/places/{city}\")\ndef get_places(city: str) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        matches = resolve_city(city)\n    except PlaceNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except PlaceDataError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n            detail=str(exc),\n        ) from exc\n\n    return {\"city\": city, \"matches\": [match.to_dict() for match in matches]}\n\n\n@router.get(\"/keywords\")\ndef get_keywords() -> dict[str, object]:\n    return {\"groups\": get_keyword_groups()}\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{city}\")\ndef create_run(city: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        discovery_run = create_discovery_run(db, city)\n    except PlaceNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except PlaceDataError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n            detail=str(exc),\n        ) from exc\n\n    return {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": discovery_run.id,\n        \"city\": discovery_run.city,\n        \"status\": discovery_run.status.value,\n        \"postal_codes_count\": len(discovery_run.postal_codes),\n        \"query_count\": len(discovery_run.query_plan),\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}\")\ndef read_run(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    try:\n        discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\ndef run_mock_provider(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    try:\n        summary = execute_mock_provider(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/google-places\")\ndef run_google_places_provider(\n    run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    try:\n        summary = execute_google_places_provider(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except GooglePlacesDisabledError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_503_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, detail=str(exc)\n        ) from exc\n    except GooglePlacesConfigurationError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\ndef read_run_candidates(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        candidates = list_lead_candidates(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": run_id,\n        \"candidates\": [_serialize_candidate(candidate) for candidate in candidates],\n    }\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\")\ndef run_mock_company_enrichment(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, str | float | None]:\n    try:\n        summary = enrich_candidate_with_mock(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment\")\ndef read_candidate_enrichment(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        enrichment = get_latest_enrichment(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    if enrichment is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n            detail=f\"Company enrichment not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n        )\n    return _serialize_enrichment(enrichment)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\")\ndef run_candidate_qualification_precheck(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"candidate_id\": candidate_id,\n        \"qualification_id\": qualification.id,\n        \"status\": qualification.status.value,\n        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise,\n        \"confidence_score\": qualification.confidence_score,\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\")\ndef read_candidate_qualification(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        qualification = get_latest_candidate_qualification(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    if qualification is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n            detail=f\"Company qualification not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n        )\n    return _serialize_qualification(qualification)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\")\ndef evaluate_candidate_promotion(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"candidate_id\": candidate_id,\n        \"promotion_decision_id\": decision.id,\n        \"status\": decision.status.value,\n        \"reason_code\": decision.reason_code,\n        \"confidence_score\": decision.confidence_score,\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\")\ndef read_candidate_promotion(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        decision = get_latest_promotion_decision(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    if decision is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n            detail=f\"Promotion decision not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n        )\n    return _serialize_promotion_decision(decision)\n"

> Die Endpunkte sind verdrahtet. Ich ergänze jetzt gezielte Tests für alle Gate-Ausgänge: mock, fehlende Qualification, microenterprise rejection, ready-for-website-probe, fehlende Website und API-Flow.
>
> <details><summary>Called 3 tools</summary>
