>     "diff": "@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@\n \n NorthAccessBFSG is a FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n \n-The current scope includes backend infrastructure, asynchronous scans, raw accessibility findings, compliance mapping basics, evidence bundle storage, and a minimal Lead Discovery foundation for city, keyword, provider seed, company enrichment, and company precheck workflows.\n+The current scope includes backend infrastructure, asynchronous scans, raw accessibility findings, compliance mapping basics, evidence bundle storage, and a minimal Lead Discovery foundation for city, keyword, provider seed, company enrichment, company precheck, and internal promotion routing workflows.\n \n ## Project Structure\n \n@@ -59,10 +59,12 @@ app/\n     company_qualification.py\n     discovery_run.py\n     lead_candidate.py\n+    promotion_decision.py\n   services/\n     company_enrichment_service.py\n     company_qualification_service.py\n     discovery_service.py\n+    promotion_service.py\n     provider_execution_service.py\n   workers/\n data/\n@@ -265,6 +267,37 @@ BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_BALANCE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n \n These thresholds are only used as precheck signals.\n \n+## Promotion Gate\n+\n+`PromotionDecision` stores an internal routing decision for a `LeadCandidate` after company enrichment and qualification precheck. The possible routing statuses are:\n+\n+```text\n+rejected\n+needs_review\n+ready_for_website_probe\n+```\n+\n+Promotion endpoints:\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\n+curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\n+```\n+\n+Example response:\n+\n+```json\n+{\n+  \"candidate_id\": \"<candidate-id>\",\n+  \"promotion_decision_id\": \"<decision-id>\",\n+  \"status\": \"needs_review\",\n+  \"reason_code\": \"mock_or_test_data\",\n+  \"confidence_score\": 0.2\n+}\n+```\n+\n+The Promotion Gate is only internal routing. `ready_for_website_probe` means the candidate can move to a future Website Probe stage. It does not mean a BFSG obligation, an accessibility issue, or any violation has been established. The Website Probe stage is not implemented in this step.\n+\n This discovery layer does not scrape websites, does not perform reporting, and does not run accessibility scans for seed candidates automatically.\n \n ## Guarded Pipeline\n@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@\n from app.models.company_qualification import CompanyQualification\n from app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun\n from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+from app.models.promotion_decision import PromotionDecision\n from app.services.company_enrichment_service import (\n     enrich_candidate_with_mock,\n     get_latest_enrichment,\n@@ -30,6 +31,10 @@\n     get_discovery_run,\n     list_lead_candidates,\n )\n+from app.services.promotion_service import (\n+    evaluate_candidate_for_promotion,\n+    get_latest_promotion_decision,\n+)\n from app.services.provider_execution_service import (\n     execute_google_places_provider,\n     execute_mock_provider,\n@@ -120,6 +125,21 @@ def _serialize_qualification(qualification: CompanyQualification) -> dict[str, A\n     }\n \n \n+def _serialize_promotion_decision(decision: PromotionDecision) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    return {\n+        \"id\": decision.id,\n+        \"candidate_id\": decision.lead_candidate_id,\n+        \"company_qualification_id\": decision.company_qualification_id,\n+        \"company_enrichment_id\": decision.company_enrichment_id,\n+        \"status\": decision.status.value,\n+        \"reason_code\": decision.reason_code,\n+        \"reasons\": decision.reasons,\n+        \"confidence_score\": decision.confidence_score,\n+        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(decision.created_at),\n+        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(decision.updated_at),\n+    }\n+\n+\n @router.get(\"/places/{city}\")\n def get_places(city: str) -> dict[str, object]:\n     try:\n@@ -266,3 +286,36 @@ def read_candidate_qualification(\n             detail=f\"Company qualification not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n         )\n     return _serialize_qualification(qualification)\n+\n+\n+@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\")\n+def evaluate_candidate_promotion(\n+    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n+) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    try:\n+        decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db, candidate_id)\n+    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    return {\n+        \"candidate_id\": candidate_id,\n+        \"promotion_decision_id\": decision.id,\n+        \"status\": decision.status.value,\n+        \"reason_code\": decision.reason_code,\n+        \"confidence_score\": decision.confidence_score,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\")\n+def read_candidate_promotion(\n+    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n+) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    try:\n+        decision = get_latest_promotion_decision(db, candidate_id)\n+    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    if decision is None:\n+        raise HTTPException(\n+            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n+            detail=f\"Promotion decision not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n+        )\n+    return _serialize_promotion_decision(decision)\n@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@\n     Finding,\n     Lead,\n     LeadCandidate,\n+    PromotionDecision,\n     Scan,\n )\n \n@@ -9,6 +9,11 @@\n from app.models.finding import Finding\n from app.models.lead import Lead\n from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+from app.models.promotion_decision import (\n+    PromotionDecision,\n+    PromotionDecisionStatus,\n+    PromotionReasonCode,\n+)\n from app.models.scan import Scan, ScanStatus\n \n __all__ = [\n@@ -22,6 +27,9 @@\n     \"Finding\",\n     \"Lead\",\n     \"LeadCandidate\",\n+    \"PromotionDecision\",\n+    \"PromotionDecisionStatus\",\n+    \"PromotionReasonCode\",\n     \"Scan\",\n     \"ScanStatus\",\n ]\n@@ -50,3 +50,8 @@ class LeadCandidate(Base):\n         back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n         cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n     )\n+    promotion_decisions: Mapped[list[\"PromotionDecision\"]] = relationship(\n+        \"PromotionDecision\",\n+        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n+        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n+    )\n@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import enum\n+import uuid\n+from datetime import datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from sqlalchemy import JSON, DateTime, Enum, Float, ForeignKey, String, func\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+\n+\n+class PromotionDecisionStatus(str, enum.Enum):\n+    rejected = \"rejected\"\n+    needs_review = \"needs_review\"\n+    ready_for_website_probe = \"ready_for_website_probe\"\n+\n+\n+class PromotionReasonCode(str, enum.Enum):\n+    missing_company_data = \"missing_company_data\"\n+    missing_website = \"missing_website\"\n+    likely_microenterprise = \"likely_microenterprise\"\n+    mock_or_test_data = \"mock_or_test_data\"\n+    insufficient_bfsg_signal = \"insufficient_bfsg_signal\"\n+    possible_bfsg_candidate = \"possible_bfsg_candidate\"\n+    needs_human_review = \"needs_human_review\"\n+\n+\n+class PromotionDecision(Base):\n+    __tablename__ = \"promotion_decisions\"\n+\n+    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n+    )\n+    lead_candidate_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"lead_candidates.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"),\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    company_qualification_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"company_qualifications.id\", ondelete=\"SET NULL\"),\n+        nullable=True,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    company_enrichment_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"company_enrichments.id\", ondelete=\"SET NULL\"),\n+        nullable=True,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    status: Mapped[PromotionDecisionStatus] = mapped_column(\n+        Enum(PromotionDecisionStatus, name=\"promotion_decision_status\"),\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    reason_code: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=False, index=True)\n+    reasons: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\n+    confidence_score: Mapped[float | None] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)\n+    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n+    )\n+    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True),\n+        server_default=func.now(),\n+        onupdate=func.now(),\n+        nullable=False,\n+    )\n+\n+    lead_candidate: Mapped[\"LeadCandidate\"] = relationship(\n+        \"LeadCandidate\", back_populates=\"promotion_decisions\"\n+    )\n+    company_qualification: Mapped[\"CompanyQualification | None\"] = relationship(\n+        \"CompanyQualification\"\n+    )\n+    company_enrichment: Mapped[\"CompanyEnrichment | None\"] = relationship(\n+        \"CompanyEnrichment\"\n+    )\n@@ -0,0 +1,155 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n+\n+from app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\n+from app.models.company_qualification import (\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+)\n+from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+from app.models.promotion_decision import (\n+    PromotionDecision,\n+    PromotionDecisionStatus,\n+    PromotionReasonCode,\n+)\n+from app.services.company_qualification_service import LeadCandidateNotFoundError\n+\n+\n+def evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> PromotionDecision:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    qualification = _get_latest_qualification(db, candidate_id)\n+    enrichment = _get_latest_enrichment(db, candidate_id)\n+    status, reason_code, confidence_score = _decide(candidate, qualification)\n+    decision = PromotionDecision(\n+        lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n+        company_qualification_id=qualification.id if qualification else None,\n+        company_enrichment_id=enrichment.id if enrichment else None,\n+        status=status,\n+        reason_code=reason_code.value,\n+        reasons=_build_reasons(candidate, qualification, enrichment),\n+        confidence_score=confidence_score,\n+    )\n+    db.add(decision)\n+    db.commit()\n+    db.refresh(decision)\n+    return decision\n+\n+\n+def get_latest_promotion_decision(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> PromotionDecision | None:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    return (\n+        db.query(PromotionDecision)\n+        .filter(PromotionDecision.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(PromotionDecision.created_at.desc(), PromotionDecision.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _decide(\n+    candidate: LeadCandidate, qualification: CompanyQualification | None\n+) -> tuple[PromotionDecisionStatus, PromotionReasonCode, float | None]:\n+    raw_data = candidate.raw_data or {}\n+    if candidate.source == \"mock\" or raw_data.get(\"mock\") is True:\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.mock_or_test_data,\n+            0.2,\n+        )\n+\n+    if qualification is None:\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.missing_company_data,\n+            0.2,\n+        )\n+\n+    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.likely_not_applicable:\n+        reason_code = (\n+            PromotionReasonCode.likely_microenterprise\n+            if qualification.is_microenterprise is True\n+            else PromotionReasonCode.insufficient_bfsg_signal\n+        )\n+        return (PromotionDecisionStatus.rejected, reason_code, qualification.confidence_score)\n+\n+    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data:\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.missing_company_data,\n+            qualification.confidence_score,\n+        )\n+\n+    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review:\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.needs_human_review,\n+            qualification.confidence_score,\n+        )\n+\n+    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.possible_bfsg_candidate:\n+        if candidate.domain or qualification.website_signal is True:\n+            return (\n+                PromotionDecisionStatus.ready_for_website_probe,\n+                PromotionReasonCode.possible_bfsg_candidate,\n+                qualification.confidence_score,\n+            )\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.missing_website,\n+            qualification.confidence_score,\n+        )\n+\n+    return (\n+        PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+        PromotionReasonCode.needs_human_review,\n+        qualification.confidence_score,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _build_reasons(\n+    candidate: LeadCandidate,\n+    qualification: CompanyQualification | None,\n+    enrichment: CompanyEnrichment | None,\n+) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    return {\n+        \"candidate_source\": candidate.source,\n+        \"category\": candidate.category,\n+        \"has_domain\": bool(candidate.domain),\n+        \"qualification_status\": qualification.status.value if qualification else None,\n+        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise if qualification else None,\n+        \"b2c_signal\": qualification.b2c_signal if qualification else None,\n+        \"bfsg_category_signal\": qualification.bfsg_category_signal if qualification else None,\n+        \"website_signal\": qualification.website_signal if qualification else None,\n+        \"enrichment_source\": enrichment.source if enrichment else None,\n+        \"no_legal_conclusion\": True,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def _get_latest_qualification(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyQualification | None:\n+    return (\n+        db.query(CompanyQualification)\n+        .filter(CompanyQualification.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(CompanyQualification.created_at.desc(), CompanyQualification.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _get_latest_enrichment(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyEnrichment | None:\n+    return (\n+        db.query(CompanyEnrichment)\n+        .filter(CompanyEnrichment.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(CompanyEnrichment.created_at.desc(), CompanyEnrichment.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"evaluate_candidate_for_promotion\",\n+    \"get_latest_promotion_decision\",\n+]\n@@ -8,7 +8,13 @@\n from app.api.discovery import router as discovery_router\n from app.db.base import Base\n from app.db.session import get_db\n-from app.models import CompanyEnrichment, CompanyQualification, DiscoveryRun, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n+from app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n+    CompanyEnrichment,\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    DiscoveryRun,\n+    LeadCandidate,\n+    PromotionDecision,\n+)\n \n \n @pytest.fixture()\n@@ -213,6 +219,46 @@ def test_candidate_qualification_precheck_for_mock_candidate(db_session: Session\n     assert qualification[\"evidence\"][\"requires_company_enrichment\"] is True\n \n \n+def test_candidate_promotion_endpoint_evaluates_and_reads_latest(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Lübeck\")\n+    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n+    client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n+    candidate_id = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\").json()[\"candidates\"][0][\"id\"]\n+    client.post(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\")\n+    client.post(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\")\n+\n+    evaluate_response = client.post(\n+        f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\"\n+    )\n+    read_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\")\n+\n+    assert evaluate_response.status_code == 200\n+    evaluation = evaluate_response.json()\n+    assert evaluation[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n+    assert evaluation[\"status\"] == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert evaluation[\"reason_code\"] == \"mock_or_test_data\"\n+    assert evaluation[\"confidence_score\"] == 0.2\n+\n+    assert read_response.status_code == 200\n+    promotion = read_response.json()\n+    assert promotion[\"id\"] == evaluation[\"promotion_decision_id\"]\n+    assert promotion[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n+    assert promotion[\"status\"] == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert promotion[\"reasons\"][\"no_legal_conclusion\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_promotion_unknown_candidate_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+\n+    response = client.post(\"/discovery/candidates/missing/promotion/evaluate\")\n+\n+    assert response.status_code == 404\n+    assert \"Lead candidate not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n+\n+\n def test_qualification_unknown_candidate_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n     client = make_client(db_session)\n \n@@ -0,0 +1,207 @@\n+import json\n+import socket\n+\n+import pytest\n+from sqlalchemy import create_engine\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+from app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n+    CompanyEnrichment,\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+    DiscoveryRun,\n+    DiscoveryRunStatus,\n+    LeadCandidate,\n+    PromotionDecision,\n+)\n+from app.services.company_qualification_service import LeadCandidateNotFoundError\n+from app.services.promotion_service import evaluate_candidate_for_promotion\n+\n+\n+@pytest.fixture()\n+def db_session() -> Session:\n+    engine = create_engine(\"sqlite:///:memory:\")\n+    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n+    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n+    try:\n+        yield session\n+    finally:\n+        session.close()\n+        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+\n+def _create_run(db_session: Session) -> DiscoveryRun:\n+    discovery_run = DiscoveryRun(\n+        city=\"Lübeck\",\n+        normalized_city=\"luebeck\",\n+        status=DiscoveryRunStatus.done,\n+        keyword_groups=[],\n+        postal_codes=[\"23552\"],\n+        query_plan=[],\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(discovery_run)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(discovery_run)\n+    return discovery_run\n+\n+\n+def _create_candidate(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+    *,\n+    source: str = \"google_places\",\n+    domain: str | None = \"https://seed.example\",\n+    category: str | None = \"store\",\n+    raw_data: dict | None = None,\n+) -> LeadCandidate:\n+    discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n+    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n+        source=source,\n+        source_reference=\"places/seed\",\n+        company_name=\"Seed Candidate GmbH\",\n+        domain=domain,\n+        city=\"Lübeck\",\n+        postal_code=\"23552\",\n+        category=category,\n+        raw_data=raw_data or {},\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(candidate)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n+    return candidate\n+\n+\n+def _add_qualification(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+    candidate: LeadCandidate,\n+    *,\n+    status: CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+    is_microenterprise: bool | None = None,\n+    website_signal: bool | None = None,\n+    b2c_signal: bool | None = None,\n+    bfsg_category_signal: str | None = None,\n+) -> CompanyQualification:\n+    qualification = CompanyQualification(\n+        lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n+        status=status,\n+        company_name=candidate.company_name,\n+        is_microenterprise=is_microenterprise,\n+        b2c_signal=b2c_signal,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=bfsg_category_signal,\n+        website_signal=website_signal,\n+        confidence_score=0.6,\n+        evidence={\"test\": True},\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(qualification)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(qualification)\n+    return qualification\n+\n+\n+def test_unknown_candidate_fails_clearly(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    with pytest.raises(LeadCandidateNotFoundError, match=\"Lead candidate not found: missing\"):\n+        evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, \"missing\")\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_candidate_results_in_needs_review(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, source=\"mock\", raw_data={\"mock\": True})\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"mock_or_test_data\"\n+    assert decision.confidence_score == 0.2\n+    assert decision.reasons[\"no_legal_conclusion\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_missing_qualification_results_in_missing_company_data(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session)\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"missing_company_data\"\n+    assert decision.company_qualification_id is None\n+\n+\n+def test_likely_not_applicable_qualification_results_in_rejected(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session)\n+    qualification = _add_qualification(\n+        db_session,\n+        candidate,\n+        status=CompanyQualificationStatus.likely_not_applicable,\n+        is_microenterprise=True,\n+    )\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"rejected\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"likely_microenterprise\"\n+    assert decision.company_qualification_id == qualification.id\n+\n+\n+def test_possible_candidate_with_domain_is_ready_for_website_probe(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, domain=\"https://seed.example\")\n+    _add_qualification(\n+        db_session,\n+        candidate,\n+        status=CompanyQualificationStatus.possible_bfsg_candidate,\n+        is_microenterprise=False,\n+        website_signal=True,\n+        b2c_signal=True,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=\"store\",\n+    )\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"ready_for_website_probe\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"possible_bfsg_candidate\"\n+    assert decision.reasons[\"has_domain\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_possible_candidate_without_website_needs_review(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, domain=None)\n+    _add_qualification(\n+        db_session,\n+        candidate,\n+        status=CompanyQualificationStatus.possible_bfsg_candidate,\n+        is_microenterprise=False,\n+        website_signal=False,\n+        b2c_signal=True,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=\"store\",\n+    )\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"missing_website\"\n+    assert decision.reasons[\"website_signal\"] is False\n+\n+\n+def test_reason_fields_do_not_contain_forbidden_legal_claims(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, source=\"mock\", raw_data={\"mock\": True})\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+    reason_text = json.dumps(\n+        {\"reason_code\": decision.reason_code, \"reasons\": decision.reasons},\n+        sort_keys=True,\n+    ).casefold()\n+\n+    assert \"legally obligated\" not in reason_text\n+    assert \"violation\" not in reason_text\n+    assert \"violates\" not in reason_text\n+\n+\n+def test_promotion_gate_makes_no_external_network_calls(monkeypatch, db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    def fail_network(*args, **kwargs):\n+        raise AssertionError(\"network access is not allowed in promotion gate\")\n+\n+    monkeypatch.setattr(socket, \"create_connection\", fail_network)\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session)\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"needs_review\"",
>     "files": [
>       {
>         "filename": "README.md",
>         "patch": "@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@\n \n NorthAccessBFSG is a FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n \n-The current scope includes backend infrastructure, asynchronous scans, raw accessibility findings, compliance mapping basics, evidence bundle storage, and a minimal Lead Discovery foundation for city, keyword, provider seed, company enrichment, and company precheck workflows.\n+The current scope includes backend infrastructure, asynchronous scans, raw accessibility findings, compliance mapping basics, evidence bundle storage, and a minimal Lead Discovery foundation for city, keyword, provider seed, company enrichment, company precheck, and internal promotion routing workflows.\n \n ## Project Structure\n \n@@ -59,10 +59,12 @@ app/\n     company_qualification.py\n     discovery_run.py\n     lead_candidate.py\n+    promotion_decision.py\n   services/\n     company_enrichment_service.py\n     company_qualification_service.py\n     discovery_service.py\n+    promotion_service.py\n     provider_execution_service.py\n   workers/\n data/\n@@ -265,6 +267,37 @@ BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_BALANCE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n \n These thresholds are only used as precheck signals.\n \n+## Promotion Gate\n+\n+`PromotionDecision` stores an internal routing decision for a `LeadCandidate` after company enrichment and qualification precheck. The possible routing statuses are:\n+\n+```text\n+rejected\n+needs_review\n+ready_for_website_probe\n+```\n+\n+Promotion endpoints:\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\n+curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\n+```\n+\n+Example response:\n+\n+```json\n+{\n+  \"candidate_id\": \"<candidate-id>\",\n+  \"promotion_decision_id\": \"<decision-id>\",\n+  \"status\": \"needs_review\",\n+  \"reason_code\": \"mock_or_test_data\",\n+  \"confidence_score\": 0.2\n+}\n+```\n+\n+The Promotion Gate is only internal routing. `ready_for_website_probe` means the candidate can move to a future Website Probe stage. It does not mean a BFSG obligation, an accessibility issue, or any violation has been established. The Website Probe stage is not implemented in this step.\n+\n This discovery layer does not scrape websites, does not perform reporting, and does not run accessibility scans for seed candidates automatically.\n \n ## Guarded Pipeline"

-30,6 +31,10 @@\n     get_discovery_run,\n     list_lead_candidates,\n )\n+from app.services.promotion_service import (\n+    evaluate_candidate_for_promotion,\n+    get_latest_promotion_decision,\n+)\n from app.services.provider_execution_service import (\n     execute_google_places_provider,\n     execute_mock_provider,\n@@ -120,6 +125,21 @@ def _serialize_qualification(qualification: CompanyQualification) -> dict[str, A\n     }\n \n \n+def _serialize_promotion_decision(decision: PromotionDecision) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    return {\n+        \"id\": decision.id,\n+        \"candidate_id\": decision.lead_candidate_id,\n+        \"company_qualification_id\": decision.company_qualification_id,\n+        \"company_enrichment_id\": decision.company_enrichment_id,\n+        \"status\": decision.status.value,\n+        \"reason_code\": decision.reason_code,\n+        \"reasons\": decision.reasons,\n+        \"confidence_score\": decision.confidence_score,\n+        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(decision.created_at),\n+        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(decision.updated_at),\n+    }\n+\n+\n @router.get(\"/places/{city}\")\n def get_places(city: str) -> dict[str, object]:\n     try:\n@@ -266,3 +286,36 @@ def read_candidate_qualification(\n             detail=f\"Company qualification not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n         )\n     return _serialize_qualification(qualification)\n+\n+\n+@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\")\n+def evaluate_candidate_promotion(\n+    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n+) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    try:\n+        decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db, candidate_id)\n+    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    return {\n+        \"candidate_id\": candidate_id,\n+        \"promotion_decision_id\": decision.id,\n+        \"status\": decision.status.value,\n+        \"reason_code\": decision.reason_code,\n+        \"confidence_score\": decision.confidence_score,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\")\n+def read_candidate_promotion(\n+    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n+) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    try:\n+        decision = get_latest_promotion_decision(db, candidate_id)\n+    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    if decision is None:\n+        raise HTTPException(\n+            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n+            detail=f\"Promotion decision not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n+        )\n+    return _serialize_promotion_decision(decision)"

>         "filename": "app/models/promotion_decision.py",
>         "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import enum\n+import uuid\n+from datetime import datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from sqlalchemy import JSON, DateTime, Enum, Float, ForeignKey, String, func\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+\n+\n+class PromotionDecisionStatus(str, enum.Enum):\n+    rejected = \"rejected\"\n+    needs_review = \"needs_review\"\n+    ready_for_website_probe = \"ready_for_website_probe\"\n+\n+\n+class PromotionReasonCode(str, enum.Enum):\n+    missing_company_data = \"missing_company_data\"\n+    missing_website = \"missing_website\"\n+    likely_microenterprise = \"likely_microenterprise\"\n+    mock_or_test_data = \"mock_or_test_data\"\n+    insufficient_bfsg_signal = \"insufficient_bfsg_signal\"\n+    possible_bfsg_candidate = \"possible_bfsg_candidate\"\n+    needs_human_review = \"needs_human_review\"\n+\n+\n+class PromotionDecision(Base):\n+    __tablename__ = \"promotion_decisions\"\n+\n+    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n+    )\n+    lead_candidate_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"lead_candidates.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"),\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    company_qualification_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"company_qualifications.id\", ondelete=\"SET NULL\"),\n+        nullable=True,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    company_enrichment_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"company_enrichments.id\", ondelete=\"SET NULL\"),\n+        nullable=True,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    status: Mapped[PromotionDecisionStatus] = mapped_column(\n+        Enum(PromotionDecisionStatus, name=\"promotion_decision_status\"),\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    reason_code: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=False, index=True)\n+    reasons: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\n+    confidence_score: Mapped[float | None] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)\n+    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n+    )\n+    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True),\n+        server_default=func.now(),\n+        onupdate=func.now(),\n+        nullable=False,\n+    )\n+\n+    lead_candidate: Mapped[\"LeadCandidate\"] = relationship(\n+        \"LeadCandidate\", back_populates=\"promotion_decisions\"\n+    )\n+    company_qualification: Mapped[\"CompanyQualification | None\"] = relationship(\n+        \"CompanyQualification\"\n+    )\n+    company_enrichment: Mapped[\"CompanyEnrichment | None\"] = relationship(\n+        \"CompanyEnrichment\"\n+    )"
>       },

>         "filename": "app/services/promotion_service.py",
>         "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,155 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n+\n+from app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\n+from app.models.company_qualification import (\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+)\n+from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+from app.models.promotion_decision import (\n+    PromotionDecision,\n+    PromotionDecisionStatus,\n+    PromotionReasonCode,\n+)\n+from app.services.company_qualification_service import LeadCandidateNotFoundError\n+\n+\n+def evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> PromotionDecision:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    qualification = _get_latest_qualification(db, candidate_id)\n+    enrichment = _get_latest_enrichment(db, candidate_id)\n+    status, reason_code, confidence_score = _decide(candidate, qualification)\n+    decision = PromotionDecision(\n+        lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n+        company_qualification_id=qualification.id if qualification else None,\n+        company_enrichment_id=enrichment.id if enrichment else None,\n+        status=status,\n+        reason_code=reason_code.value,\n+        reasons=_build_reasons(candidate, qualification, enrichment),\n+        confidence_score=confidence_score,\n+    )\n+    db.add(decision)\n+    db.commit()\n+    db.refresh(decision)\n+    return decision\n+\n+\n+def get_latest_promotion_decision(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> PromotionDecision | None:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    return (\n+        db.query(PromotionDecision)\n+        .filter(PromotionDecision.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(PromotionDecision.created_at.desc(), PromotionDecision.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _decide(\n+    candidate: LeadCandidate, qualification: CompanyQualification | None\n+) -> tuple[PromotionDecisionStatus, PromotionReasonCode, float | None]:\n+    raw_data = candidate.raw_data or {}\n+    if candidate.source == \"mock\" or raw_data.get(\"mock\") is True:\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.mock_or_test_data,\n+            0.2,\n+        )\n+\n+    if qualification is None:\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.missing_company_data,\n+            0.2,\n+        )\n+\n+    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.likely_not_applicable:\n+        reason_code = (\n+            PromotionReasonCode.likely_microenterprise\n+            if qualification.is_microenterprise is True\n+            else PromotionReasonCode.insufficient_bfsg_signal\n+        )\n+        return (PromotionDecisionStatus.rejected, reason_code, qualification.confidence_score)\n+\n+    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data:\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.missing_company_data,\n+            qualification.confidence_score,\n+        )\n+\n+    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review:\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.needs_human_review,\n+            qualification.confidence_score,\n+        )\n+\n+    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.possible_bfsg_candidate:\n+        if candidate.domain or qualification.website_signal is True:\n+            return (\n+                PromotionDecisionStatus.ready_for_website_probe,\n+                PromotionReasonCode.possible_bfsg_candidate,\n+                qualification.confidence_score,\n+            )\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.missing_website,\n+            qualification.confidence_score,\n+        )\n+\n+    return (\n+        PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+        PromotionReasonCode.needs_human_review,\n+        qualification.confidence_score,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _build_reasons(\n+    candidate: LeadCandidate,\n+    qualification: CompanyQualification | None,\n+    enrichment: CompanyEnrichment | None,\n+) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    return {\n+        \"candidate_source\": candidate.source,\n+        \"category\": candidate.category,\n+        \"has_domain\": bool(candidate.domain),\n+        \"qualification_status\": qualification.status.value if qualification else None,\n+        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise if qualification else None,\n+        \"b2c_signal\": qualification.b2c_signal if qualification else None,\n+        \"bfsg_category_signal\": qualification.bfsg_category_signal if qualification else None,\n+        \"website_signal\": qualification.website_signal if qualification else None,\n+        \"enrichment_source\": enrichment.source if enrichment else None,\n+        \"no_legal_conclusion\": True,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def _get_latest_qualification(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyQualification | None:\n+    return (\n+        db.query(CompanyQualification)\n+        .filter(CompanyQualification.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(CompanyQualification.created_at.desc(), CompanyQualification.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _get_latest_enrichment(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyEnrichment | None:\n+    return (\n+        db.query(CompanyEnrichment)\n+        .filter(CompanyEnrichment.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(CompanyEnrichment.created_at.desc(), CompanyEnrichment.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"evaluate_candidate_for_promotion\",\n+    \"get_latest_promotion_decision\",\n+]"

>         "patch": "@@ -8,7 +8,13 @@\n from app.api.discovery import router as discovery_router\n from app.db.base import Base\n from app.db.session import get_db\n-from app.models import CompanyEnrichment, CompanyQualification, DiscoveryRun, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n+from app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n+    CompanyEnrichment,\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    DiscoveryRun,\n+    LeadCandidate,\n+    PromotionDecision,\n+)\n \n \n @pytest.fixture()\n@@ -213,6 +219,46 @@ def test_candidate_qualification_precheck_for_mock_candidate(db_session: Session\n     assert qualification[\"evidence\"][\"requires_company_enrichment\"] is True\n \n \n+def test_candidate_promotion_endpoint_evaluates_and_reads_latest(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Lübeck\")\n+    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n+    client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n+    candidate_id = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\").json()[\"candidates\"][0][\"id\"]\n+    client.post(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\")\n+    client.post(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\")\n+\n+    evaluate_response = client.post(\n+        f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\"\n+    )\n+    read_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\")\n+\n+    assert evaluate_response.status_code == 200\n+    evaluation = evaluate_response.json()\n+    assert evaluation[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n+    assert evaluation[\"status\"] == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert evaluation[\"reason_code\"] == \"mock_or_test_data\"\n+    assert evaluation[\"confidence_score\"] == 0.2\n+\n+    assert read_response.status_code == 200\n+    promotion = read_response.json()\n+    assert promotion[\"id\"] == evaluation[\"promotion_decision_id\"]\n+    assert promotion[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n+    assert promotion[\"status\"] == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert promotion[\"reasons\"][\"no_legal_conclusion\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_promotion_unknown_candidate_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+\n+    response = client.post(\"/discovery/candidates/missing/promotion/evaluate\")\n+\n+    assert response.status_code == 404\n+    assert \"Lead candidate not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n+\n+\n def test_qualification_unknown_candidate_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n     client = make_client(db_session)\n "

>         "filename": "tests/test_promotion_service.py",
>         "patch": "@@ -0,0 +1,207 @@\n+import json\n+import socket\n+\n+import pytest\n+from sqlalchemy import create_engine\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+from app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n+    CompanyEnrichment,\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+    DiscoveryRun,\n+    DiscoveryRunStatus,\n+    LeadCandidate,\n+    PromotionDecision,\n+)\n+from app.services.company_qualification_service import LeadCandidateNotFoundError\n+from app.services.promotion_service import evaluate_candidate_for_promotion\n+\n+\n+@pytest.fixture()\n+def db_session() -> Session:\n+    engine = create_engine(\"sqlite:///:memory:\")\n+    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n+    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n+    try:\n+        yield session\n+    finally:\n+        session.close()\n+        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+\n+def _create_run(db_session: Session) -> DiscoveryRun:\n+    discovery_run = DiscoveryRun(\n+        city=\"Lübeck\",\n+        normalized_city=\"luebeck\",\n+        status=DiscoveryRunStatus.done,\n+        keyword_groups=[],\n+        postal_codes=[\"23552\"],\n+        query_plan=[],\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(discovery_run)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(discovery_run)\n+    return discovery_run\n+\n+\n+def _create_candidate(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+    *,\n+    source: str = \"google_places\",\n+    domain: str | None = \"https://seed.example\",\n+    category: str | None = \"store\",\n+    raw_data: dict | None = None,\n+) -> LeadCandidate:\n+    discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n+    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n+        source=source,\n+        source_reference=\"places/seed\",\n+        company_name=\"Seed Candidate GmbH\",\n+        domain=domain,\n+        city=\"Lübeck\",\n+        postal_code=\"23552\",\n+        category=category,\n+        raw_data=raw_data or {},\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(candidate)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n+    return candidate\n+\n+\n+def _add_qualification(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+    candidate: LeadCandidate,\n+    *,\n+    status: CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+    is_microenterprise: bool | None = None,\n+    website_signal: bool | None = None,\n+    b2c_signal: bool | None = None,\n+    bfsg_category_signal: str | None = None,\n+) -> CompanyQualification:\n+    qualification = CompanyQualification(\n+        lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n+        status=status,\n+        company_name=candidate.company_name,\n+        is_microenterprise=is_microenterprise,\n+        b2c_signal=b2c_signal,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=bfsg_category_signal,\n+        website_signal=website_signal,\n+        confidence_score=0.6,\n+        evidence={\"test\": True},\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(qualification)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(qualification)\n+    return qualification\n+\n+\n+def test_unknown_candidate_fails_clearly(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    with pytest.raises(LeadCandidateNotFoundError, match=\"Lead candidate not found: missing\"):\n+        evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, \"missing\")\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_candidate_results_in_needs_review(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, source=\"mock\", raw_data={\"mock\": True})\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"mock_or_test_data\"\n+    assert decision.confidence_score == 0.2\n+    assert decision.reasons[\"no_legal_conclusion\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_missing_qualification_results_in_missing_company_data(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session)\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"missing_company_data\"\n+    assert decision.company_qualification_id is None\n+\n+\n+def test_likely_not_applicable_qualification_results_in_rejected(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session)\n+    qualification = _add_qualification(\n+        db_session,\n+        candidate,\n+        status=CompanyQualificationStatus.likely_not_applicable,\n+        is_microenterprise=True,\n+    )\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"rejected\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"likely_microenterprise\"\n+    assert decision.company_qualification_id == qualification.id\n+\n+\n+def test_possible_candidate_with_domain_is_ready_for_website_probe(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, domain=\"https://seed.example\")\n+    _add_qualification(\n+        db_session,\n+        candidate,\n+        status=CompanyQualificationStatus.possible_bfsg_candidate,\n+        is_microenterprise=False,\n+        website_signal=True,\n+        b2c_signal=True,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=\"store\",\n+    )\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"ready_for_website_probe\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"possible_bfsg_candidate\"\n+    assert decision.reasons[\"has_domain\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_possible_candidate_without_website_needs_review(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, domain=None)\n+    _add_qualification(\n+        db_session,\n+        candidate,\n+        status=CompanyQualificationStatus.possible_bfsg_candidate,\n+        is_microenterprise=False,\n+        website_signal=False,\n+        b2c_signal=True,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=\"store\",\n+    )\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"missing_website\"\n+    assert decision.reasons[\"website_signal\"] is False\n+\n+\n+def test_reason_fields_do_not_contain_forbidden_legal_claims(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, source=\"mock\", raw_data={\"mock\": True})\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+    reason_text = json.dumps(\n+        {\"reason_code\": decision.reason_code, \"reasons\": decision.reasons},\n+        sort_keys=True,\n+    ).casefold()\n+\n+    assert \"legally obligated\" not in reason_text\n+    assert \"violation\" not in reason_text\n+    assert \"violates\" not in reason_text\n+\n+\n+def test_promotion_gate_makes_no_external_network_calls(monkeypatch, db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    def fail_network(*args, **kwargs):\n+        raise AssertionError(\"network access is not allowed in promotion gate\")\n+\n+    monkeypatch.setattr(socket, \"create_connection\", fail_network)\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session)\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"needs_review\""
>       }

>   "diff": "@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@\n \n NorthAccessBFSG is a FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n \n-The current scope includes backend infrastructure, asynchronous scans, raw accessibility findings, compliance mapping basics, evidence bundle storage, and a minimal Lead Discovery foundation for city, keyword, provider seed, company enrichment, and company precheck workflows.\n+The current scope includes backend infrastructure, asynchronous scans, raw accessibility findings, compliance mapping basics, evidence bundle storage, and a minimal Lead Discovery foundation for city, keyword, provider seed, company enrichment, company precheck, and internal promotion routing workflows.\n \n ## Project Structure\n \n@@ -59,10 +59,12 @@ app/\n     company_qualification.py\n     discovery_run.py\n     lead_candidate.py\n+    promotion_decision.py\n   services/\n     company_enrichment_service.py\n     company_qualification_service.py\n     discovery_service.py\n+    promotion_service.py\n     provider_execution_service.py\n   workers/\n data/\n@@ -265,6 +267,37 @@ BFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_BALANCE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n \n These thresholds are only used as precheck signals.\n \n+## Promotion Gate\n+\n+`PromotionDecision` stores an internal routing decision for a `LeadCandidate` after company enrichment and qualification precheck. The possible routing statuses are:\n+\n+```text\n+rejected\n+needs_review\n+ready_for_website_probe\n+```\n+\n+Promotion endpoints:\n+\n+```bash\n+curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\n+curl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\n+```\n+\n+Example response:\n+\n+```json\n+{\n+  \"candidate_id\": \"<candidate-id>\",\n+  \"promotion_decision_id\": \"<decision-id>\",\n+  \"status\": \"needs_review\",\n+  \"reason_code\": \"mock_or_test_data\",\n+  \"confidence_score\": 0.2\n+}\n+```\n+\n+The Promotion Gate is only internal routing. `ready_for_website_probe` means the candidate can move to a future Website Probe stage. It does not mean a BFSG obligation, an accessibility issue, or any violation has been established. The Website Probe stage is not implemented in this step.\n+\n This discovery layer does not scrape websites, does not perform reporting, and does not run accessibility scans for seed candidates automatically.\n \n ## Guarded Pipeline\n@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@\n from app.models.company_qualification import CompanyQualification\n from app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun\n from \"id\": decision.id,\n+        \"candidate_id\": decision.lead_candidate_id,\n+        \"company_qualification_id\": decision.company_qualification_id,\n+        \"company_enrichment_id\": decision.company_enrichment_id,\n+        \"status\": decision.status.value,\n+        \"reason_code\": decision.reason_code,\n+        \"reasons\": decision.reasons,\n+        \"confidence_score\": found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n         )\n     return _serialize_qualification(qualification)\n+\n+\n+@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\")\n+def evaluate_candidate_promotion(\n+    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n+) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    try:\n+        decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db, candidate_id)\n+    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    return {\n+        \"candidate_id\": candidate_id,\n+        \"promotion_decision_id\": decision.id,\n+        \"status\": decision.status.value,\n+        \"reason_code\": decision.reason_code,\n+        \"confidence_score\": decision.confidence_score,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\")\n+def read_candidate_promotion(\n+    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n+) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    try:\n+        decision = get_latest_promotion_decision(db, candidate_id)\n+    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n+    if decision is None:\n+        raise HTTPException(\n+            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n+            detail=f\"Promotion decision not found for candidate: PromotionDecision,\n+    PromotionDecisionStatus,\n+    PromotionReasonCode,\n+)\n from app.models.scan import Scan, ScanStatus\n \n __all__ = [\n@@ -22,6 +27,9 @@\n     \"Finding\",\n     \"Lead\",\n     \"LeadCandidate\",\n+    \"PromotionDecision\",\n+    \"PromotionDecisionStatus\",\n+    \"PromotionReasonCode\",\n     \"Scan\",\n     \"ScanStatus\",\n ]\n@@ -50,3 +50,8 @@ class LeadCandidate(Base):\n         back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n         cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n     )\n+    promotion_decisions: Mapped[list[\"PromotionDecision\"]] = relationship(\n+        \"PromotionDecision\",\n+        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n+        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n+    )\n@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import enum\n+import uuid\n+from datetime import datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from sqlalchemy import JSON, DateTime, Enum, Float, ForeignKey, String, func\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+\n+\n+class PromotionDecisionStatus(str, enum.Enum):\n+    rejected = \"rejected\"\n+    needs_review = \"needs_review\"\n+    ready_for_website_probe = \"ready_for_website_probe\"\n+\n+\n+class PromotionReasonCode(str, enum.Enum):\n+    missing_company_data = \"missing_company_data\"\n+    missing_website = \"missing_website\"\n+    likely_microenterprise = \"likely_microenterprise\"\n+    mock_or_test_data = \"mock_or_test_data\"\n+    insufficient_bfsg_signal = \"insufficient_bfsg_signal\"\n+    possible_bfsg_candidate = \"possible_bfsg_candidate\"\n+    needs_human_review = \"needs_human_review\"\n+\n+\n+class PromotionDecision(Base):\n+    __tablename__ = \"promotion_decisions\"\n+\n+    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n+    )\n+    lead_candidate_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"lead_candidates.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"),\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    company_qualification_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"company_qualifications.id\", ondelete=\"SET NULL\"),\n+        nullable=True,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    company_enrichment_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(\n+        String(36),\n+        ForeignKey(\"company_enrichments.id\", ondelete=\"SET NULL\"),\n+        nullable=True,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    status: Mapped[PromotionDecisionStatus] = mapped_column(\n+        Enum(PromotionDecisionStatus, name=\"promotion_decision_status\"),\n+        nullable=False,\n+        index=True,\n+    )\n+    reason_code: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=False, index=True)\n+    reasons: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\n+    confidence_score: Mapped[float | None] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)\n+    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n+    )\n+    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n+        DateTime(timezone=True),\n+        server_default=func.now(),\n+        onupdate=func.now(),\n+        nullable=False,\n+    )\n+\n+    lead_candidate: Mapped[\"LeadCandidate\"] = relationship(\n+        \"LeadCandidate\", back_populates=\"promotion_decisions\"\n+    )\n+    company_qualification: Mapped[\"CompanyQualification | None\"] = relationship(\n+        \"CompanyQualification\"\n+    )\n+    company_enrichment: Mapped[\"CompanyEnrichment | None\"] = relationship(\n+        \"CompanyEnrichment\"\n+    )\n@@ -0,0 +1,155 @@\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n+\n+from app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\n+from app.models.company_qualification import (\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+)\n+from app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n+from app.models.promotion_decision import (\n+    PromotionDecision,\n+    PromotionDecisionStatus,\n+    PromotionReasonCode,\n+)\n+from app.services.company_qualification_service import LeadCandidateNotFoundError\n+\n+\n+def evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> PromotionDecision:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    qualification = _get_latest_qualification(db, candidate_id)\n+    enrichment = _get_latest_enrichment(db, candidate_id)\n+    status, reason_code, confidence_score = _decide(candidate, qualification)\n+    decision = PromotionDecision(\n+        lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n+        company_qualification_id=qualification.id if qualification else None,\n+        company_enrichment_id=enrichment.id if enrichment else None,\n+        status=status,\n+        reason_code=reason_code.value,\n+        reasons=_build_reasons(candidate, qualification, enrichment),\n+        confidence_score=confidence_score,\n+    )\n+    db.add(decision)\n+    db.commit()\n+    db.refresh(decision)\n+    return decision\n+\n+\n+def get_latest_promotion_decision(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> PromotionDecision | None:\n+    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n+    if candidate is None:\n+        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n+\n+    return (\n+        db.query(PromotionDecision)\n+        .filter(PromotionDecision.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(PromotionDecision.created_at.desc(), PromotionDecision.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _decide(\n+    candidate: LeadCandidate, qualification: CompanyQualification | None\n+) -> tuple[PromotionDecisionStatus, PromotionReasonCode, float | None]:\n+    raw_data = candidate.raw_data or {}\n+    if candidate.source == \"mock\" or raw_data.get(\"mock\") is True:\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.mock_or_test_data,\n+            0.2,\n+        )\n+\n+    if qualification is None:\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.missing_company_data,\n+            0.2,\n+        )\n+\n+    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.likely_not_applicable:\n+        reason_code = (\n+            PromotionReasonCode.likely_microenterprise\n+            if qualification.is_microenterprise is True\n+            else PromotionReasonCode.insufficient_bfsg_signal\n+        )\n+        return (PromotionDecisionStatus.rejected, reason_code, qualification.confidence_score)\n+\n+    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_company_data:\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.missing_company_data,\n+            qualification.confidence_score,\n+        )\n+\n+    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.needs_human_review:\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.needs_human_review,\n+            qualification.confidence_score,\n+        )\n+\n+    if qualification.status == CompanyQualificationStatus.possible_bfsg_candidate:\n+        if candidate.domain or qualification.website_signal is True:\n+            return (\n+                PromotionDecisionStatus.ready_for_website_probe,\n+                PromotionReasonCode.possible_bfsg_candidate,\n+                qualification.confidence_score,\n+            )\n+        return (\n+            PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+            PromotionReasonCode.missing_website,\n+            qualification.confidence_score,\n+        )\n+\n+    return (\n+        PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n+        PromotionReasonCode.needs_human_review,\n+        qualification.confidence_score,\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _build_reasons(\n+    candidate: LeadCandidate,\n+    qualification: CompanyQualification | None,\n+    enrichment: CompanyEnrichment | None,\n+) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    return {\n+        \"candidate_source\": candidate.source,\n+        \"category\": candidate.category,\n+        \"has_domain\": bool(candidate.domain),\n+        \"qualification_status\": qualification.status.value if qualification else None,\n+        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise if qualification else None,\n+        \"b2c_signal\": qualification.b2c_signal if qualification else None,\n+        \"bfsg_category_signal\": qualification.bfsg_category_signal if qualification else None,\n+        \"website_signal\": qualification.website_signal if qualification else None,\n+        \"enrichment_source\": enrichment.source if enrichment else None,\n+        \"no_legal_conclusion\": True,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def _get_latest_qualification(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyQualification | None:\n+    return (\n+        db.query(CompanyQualification)\n+        .filter(CompanyQualification.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(CompanyQualification.created_at.desc(), CompanyQualification.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _get_latest_enrichment(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> CompanyEnrichment | None:\n+    return (\n+        db.query(CompanyEnrichment)\n+        .filter(CompanyEnrichment.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n+        .order_by(CompanyEnrichment.created_at.desc(), CompanyEnrichment.id.desc())\n+        .first()\n+    )\n+\n+\n+__all__ = [\n+    \"evaluate_candidate_for_promotion\",\n+    \"get_latest_promotion_decision\",\n+]\n@@ -8,7 +8,13 @@\n from app.api.discovery import router as discovery_router\n from app.db.base import Base\n from app.db.session import get_db\n-from app.models import CompanyEnrichment, CompanyQualification, DiscoveryRun, LeadCandidate  # noqa: F401\n+from app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n+    CompanyEnrichment,\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    DiscoveryRun,\n+    LeadCandidate,\n+    PromotionDecision,\n+)\n \n \n @pytest.fixture()\n@@ -213,6 +219,46 @@ def test_candidate_qualification_precheck_for_mock_candidate(db_session: Session\n     assert qualification[\"evidence\"][\"requires_company_enrichment\"] is True\n \n \n+def test_candidate_promotion_endpoint_evaluates_and_reads_latest(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+    create_response = client.post(\"/discovery/runs/Lübeck\")\n+    run_id = create_response.json()[\"discovery_run_id\"]\n+    client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n+    candidate_id = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\").json()[\"candidates\"][0][\"id\"]\n+    client.post(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\")\n+    client.post(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\")\n+\n+    evaluate_response = client.post(\n+        f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\"\n+    )\n+    read_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\")\n+\n+    assert evaluate_response.status_code == 200\n+    evaluation = evaluate_response.json()\n+    assert evaluation[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n+    assert evaluation[\"status\"] == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert evaluation[\"reason_code\"] == \"mock_or_test_data\"\n+    assert evaluation[\"confidence_score\"] == 0.2\n+\n+    assert read_response.status_code == 200\n+    promotion = read_response.json()\n+    assert promotion[\"id\"] == evaluation[\"promotion_decision_id\"]\n+    assert promotion[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n+    assert promotion[\"status\"] == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert promotion[\"reasons\"][\"no_legal_conclusion\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_promotion_unknown_candidate_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    client = make_client(db_session)\n+\n+    response = client.post(\"/discovery/candidates/missing/promotion/evaluate\")\n+\n+    assert response.status_code == 404\n+    assert \"Lead candidate not found: missing\" in response.json()[\"detail\"]\n+\n+\n def test_qualification_unknown_candidate_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n     client = make_client(db_session)\n \n@@ -0,0 +1,207 @@\n+import json\n+import socket\n+\n+import pytest\n+from sqlalchemy import create_engine\n+from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n+\n+from app.db.base import Base\n+from app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n+    CompanyEnrichment,\n+    CompanyQualification,\n+    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+    DiscoveryRun,\n+    DiscoveryRunStatus,\n+    LeadCandidate,\n+    PromotionDecision,\n+)\n+from app.services.company_qualification_service import LeadCandidateNotFoundError\n+from app.services.promotion_service import evaluate_candidate_for_promotion\n+\n+\n+@pytest.fixture()\n+def db_session() -> Session:\n+    engine = create_engine(\"sqlite:///:memory:\")\n+    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n+    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n+    try:\n+        yield session\n+    finally:\n+        session.close()\n+        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n+\n+\n+def _create_run(db_session: Session) -> DiscoveryRun:\n+    discovery_run = DiscoveryRun(\n+        city=\"Lübeck\",\n+        normalized_city=\"luebeck\",\n+        status=DiscoveryRunStatus.done,\n+        keyword_groups=[],\n+        postal_codes=[\"23552\"],\n+        query_plan=[],\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(discovery_run)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(discovery_run)\n+    return discovery_run\n+\n+\n+def _create_candidate(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+    *,\n+    source: str = \"google_places\",\n+    domain: str | None = \"https://seed.example\",\n+    category: str | None = \"store\",\n+    raw_data: dict | None = None,\n+) -> LeadCandidate:\n+    discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n+    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n+        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n+        source=source,\n+        source_reference=\"places/seed\",\n+        company_name=\"Seed Candidate GmbH\",\n+        domain=domain,\n+        city=\"Lübeck\",\n+        postal_code=\"23552\",\n+        category=category,\n+        raw_data=raw_data or {},\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(candidate)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n+    return candidate\n+\n+\n+def _add_qualification(\n+    db_session: Session,\n+    candidate: LeadCandidate,\n+    *,\n+    status: CompanyQualificationStatus,\n+    is_microenterprise: bool | None = None,\n+    website_signal: bool | None = None,\n+    b2c_signal: bool | None = None,\n+    bfsg_category_signal: str | None = None,\n+) -> CompanyQualification:\n+    qualification = CompanyQualification(\n+        lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n+        status=status,\n+        company_name=candidate.company_name,\n+        is_microenterprise=is_microenterprise,\n+        b2c_signal=b2c_signal,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=bfsg_category_signal,\n+        website_signal=website_signal,\n+        confidence_score=0.6,\n+        evidence={\"test\": True},\n+    )\n+    db_session.add(qualification)\n+    db_session.commit()\n+    db_session.refresh(qualification)\n+    return qualification\n+\n+\n+def test_unknown_candidate_fails_clearly(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    with pytest.raises(LeadCandidateNotFoundError, match=\"Lead candidate not found: missing\"):\n+        evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, \"missing\")\n+\n+\n+def test_mock_candidate_results_in_needs_review(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, source=\"mock\", raw_data={\"mock\": True})\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"mock_or_test_data\"\n+    assert decision.confidence_score == 0.2\n+    assert decision.reasons[\"no_legal_conclusion\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_missing_qualification_results_in_missing_company_data(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session)\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"missing_company_data\"\n+    assert decision.company_qualification_id is None\n+\n+\n+def test_likely_not_applicable_qualification_results_in_rejected(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session)\n+    qualification = _add_qualification(\n+        db_session,\n+        candidate,\n+        status=CompanyQualificationStatus.likely_not_applicable,\n+        is_microenterprise=True,\n+    )\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"rejected\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"likely_microenterprise\"\n+    assert decision.company_qualification_id == qualification.id\n+\n+\n+def test_possible_candidate_with_domain_is_ready_for_website_probe(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, domain=\"https://seed.example\")\n+    _add_qualification(\n+        db_session,\n+        candidate,\n+        status=CompanyQualificationStatus.possible_bfsg_candidate,\n+        is_microenterprise=False,\n+        website_signal=True,\n+        b2c_signal=True,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=\"store\",\n+    )\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"ready_for_website_probe\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"possible_bfsg_candidate\"\n+    assert decision.reasons[\"has_domain\"] is True\n+\n+\n+def test_possible_candidate_without_website_needs_review(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, domain=None)\n+    _add_qualification(\n+        db_session,\n+        candidate,\n+        status=CompanyQualificationStatus.possible_bfsg_candidate,\n+        is_microenterprise=False,\n+        website_signal=False,\n+        b2c_signal=True,\n+        bfsg_category_signal=\"store\",\n+    )\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"needs_review\"\n+    assert decision.reason_code == \"missing_website\"\n+    assert decision.reasons[\"website_signal\"] is False\n+\n+\n+def test_reason_fields_do_not_contain_forbidden_legal_claims(db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, source=\"mock\", raw_data={\"mock\": True})\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+    reason_text = json.dumps(\n+        {\"reason_code\": decision.reason_code, \"reasons\": decision.reasons},\n+        sort_keys=True,\n+    ).casefold()\n+\n+    assert \"legally obligated\" not in reason_text\n+    assert \"violation\" not in reason_text\n+    assert \"violates\" not in reason_text\n+\n+\n+def test_promotion_gate_makes_no_external_network_calls(monkeypatch, db_session: Session) -> None:\n+    def fail_network(*args, **kwargs):\n+        raise AssertionError(\"network access is not allowed in promotion gate\")\n+\n+    monkeypatch.setattr(socket, \"create_connection\", fail_network)\n+    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session)\n+\n+    decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db_session, candidate.id)\n+\n+    assert decision.status.value == \"needs_review\"",

(\n    LeadCandidateNotFoundError,\n    create_candidate_precheck,\n    get_latest_candidate_qualification,\n)\nfrom app.services.discovery_service import (\n    DiscoveryRunNotFoundError,\n
