APIRouter(prefix=\"/discovery\", tags=[\"discovery\"])\n\n\ndef _format_datetime(value: datetime | None) -> str | None:\n    return value.isoformat() if value else None\n\n\ndef _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run: DiscoveryRun) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": discovery_run.id,\n        \"city\": discovery_run.city,\n        \"normalized_city\": discovery_run.normalized_city,\n        \"status\": discovery_run.status.value,\n        \"postal_codes\": discovery_run.postal_codes,\n        \"keyword_groups\": discovery_run.keyword_groups,\n        \"query_plan\": discovery_run.query_plan,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(discovery_run.created_at),\n        \"completed_at\": _format_datetime(discovery_run.completed_at),\n        \"error_message\": discovery_run.error_message,\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": candidate.id,\n        \"discovery_run_id\": candidate.discovery_run_id,\n        \"source\": candidate.source,\n        \"source_reference\": candidate.source_reference,\n        \"company_name\": candidate.company_name,\n        \"domain\": candidate.domain,\n        \"city\": candidate.city,\n        \"postal_code\": candidate.postal_code,\n        \"address\": candidate.address,\n        \"phone\": candidate.phone,\n        \"category\": candidate.category,\n        \"raw_data\": candidate.raw_data,\n        \"confidence_score\": candidate.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(candidate.created_at),\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_enrichment(enrichment: CompanyEnrichment) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": enrichment.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": enrichment.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"source\": enrichment.source,\n        \"source_reference\": enrichment.source_reference,\n        \"company_name\": enrichment.company_name,\n        \"legal_form\": enrichment.legal_form,\n        \"registry_id\": enrichment.registry_id,\n        \"source_url\": enrichment.source_url,\n        \"employee_count\": enrichment.employee_count,\n        \"annual_revenue_eur\": enrichment.annual_revenue_eur,\n        \"balance_sheet_total_eur\": enrichment.balance_sheet_total_eur,\n        \"raw_data\": enrichment.raw_data,\n        \"confidence_score\": enrichment.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(enrichment.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(enrichment.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_qualification(qualification: CompanyQualification) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": qualification.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": qualification.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"status\": qualification.status.value,\n        \"company_name\": qualification.company_name,\n        \"legal_form\": qualification.legal_form,\n        \"registry_id\": qualification.registry_id,\n        \"northdata_url\": qualification.northdata_url,\n        \"employee_count\": qualification.employee_count,\n        \"annual_revenue_eur\": qualification.annual_revenue_eur,\n        \"balance_sheet_total_eur\": qualification.balance_sheet_total_eur,\n        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise,\n        \"b2c_signal\": qualification.b2c_signal,\n        \"bfsg_category_signal\": qualification.bfsg_category_signal,\n        \"website_signal\": qualification.website_signal,\n        \"confidence_score\": qualification.confidence_score,\n        \"evidence\": qualification.evidence,\n        \"notes\": qualification.notes,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(qualification.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(qualification.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_promotion_decision(decision: PromotionDecision) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": decision.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": decision.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"company_qualification_id\": decision.company_qualification_id,\n        \"company_enrichment_id\": decision.company_enrichment_id,\n        \"status\": decision.status.value,\n        \"reason_code\": decision.reason_code,\n        \"reasons\": decision.reasons,\n        \"confidence_score\": decision.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(decision.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(decision.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/places/{city}\")\ndef get_places(city: str) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        matches = resolve_city(city)\n    except PlaceNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except PlaceDataError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n            detail=str(exc),\n        ) from exc\n\n    return {\"city\": city, \"matches\": [match.to_dict() for match in matches]}\n\n\n@router.get(\"/keywords\")\ndef get_keywords() -> dict[str, object]:\n    return {\"groups\": get_keyword_groups()}\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{city}\")\ndef create_run(city: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        discovery_run = create_discovery_run(db, city)\n    except PlaceNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except PlaceDataError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n            detail=str(exc),\n        ) from exc\n\n    return {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": discovery_run.id,\n        \"city\": discovery_run.city,\n        \"status\": discovery_run.status.value,\n        \"postal_codes_count\": len(discovery_run.postal_codes),\n        \"query_count\": len(discovery_run.query_plan),\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}\")\ndef read_run(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    try:\n        discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\ndef run_mock_provider(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    try:\n        summary = execute_mock_provider(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/google-places\")\ndef run_google_places_provider(\n    run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    try:\n        summary = execute_google_places_provider(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except GooglePlacesDisabledError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_503_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, detail=str(exc)\n        ) from exc\n    except GooglePlacesConfigurationError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\ndef read_run_candidates(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        candidates = list_lead_candidates(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": run_id,\n        \"candidates\": [_serialize_candidate(candidate) for candidate in candidates],\n    }\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\")\ndef run_mock_company_enrichment(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, str | float | None]:\n    try:\n        summary = enrich_candidate_with_mock(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment\")\ndef read_candidate_enrichment(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        enrichment = get_latest_enrichment(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    if enrichment is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n            detail=f\"Company enrichment not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n        )\n    return _serialize_enrichment(enrichment)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\")\ndef run_candidate_qualification_precheck(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"candidate_id\": candidate_id,\n        \"qualification_id\": qualification.id,\n }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\")\ndef read_candidate_qualification(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        qualification = get_latest_candidate_qualification(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) {candidate_id}\",\n        )\n    return _serialize_qualification(qualification)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\")\ndef evaluate_candidate_promotion(\n > {"content": "from app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\nfrom app.models.company_qualification import (\n    CompanyQualification,\n    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n)\nfrom app.models.compliance_finding import ComplianceFinding\nfrom app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus\nfrom app.models.evidence_bundle import EvidenceBundle\nfrom app.models.finding import Finding\nfrom app.models.lead import Lead\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\nfrom app.models.promotion_decision import (\n    PromotionDecision,\n    PromotionDecisionStatus,\n    PromotionReasonCode,\n)\nfrom app.models.scan import Scan, ScanStatus\n\n__all__ = [\n    \"CompanyEnrichment\",\n    \"CompanyQualification\",\n    \"CompanyQualificationStatus\",\n    \"ComplianceFinding\",\n    \"DiscoveryRun\",\n    \"DiscoveryRunStatus\",\n    \"EvidenceBundle\",\n    \"Finding\",\n    \"Lead\",\n    \"LeadCandidate\",\n    \"PromotionDecision\",\n    \"PromotionDecisionStatus\",\n    \"PromotionReasonCode\",\n    \"Scan\",\n    \"ScanStatus\",\n]\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "6cecde50f89724f6973331b162cea687dd87af97", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/website-probe-foundation/app/models/__init__.py", "display_title": "__init__.py"}

> ```text
> {"content": "from sqlalchemy import text\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import engine\nfrom app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n    CompanyEnrichment,\n    CompanyQualification,\n    ComplianceFinding,\n    DiscoveryRun,\n    EvidenceBundle,\n    Finding,\n    Lead,\n    LeadCandidate,\n    PromotionDecision,\n    Scan,\n)\n\n_SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'processing'\",\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'failed'\",\n)\n\n_SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS started_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_message TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n_FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS help_url VARCHAR(500)\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wcag_refs JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence_score DOUBLE PRECISION\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n\ndef init_db() -> None:\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n    _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema()\n    _ensure_finding_evidence_schema()\n\n\ndef _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.connect() as connection:\n        autocommit_connection = connection.execution_options(isolation_level=\"AUTOCOMMIT\")\n        for statement in _SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES:\n            autocommit_connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n\ndef _ensure_finding_evidence_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "d61b4e3b3a57e76e298bda5e60672e625acfc9f6", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/website-probe-foundation/app/db/init_db.py", "display_title": "init_db.py"}

> {"content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport uuid\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, DateTime, Float, ForeignKey, String, Text, func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\n\n\nclass LeadCandidate(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"lead_candidates\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n    )\n    discovery_run_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36),\n        ForeignKey(\"discovery_runs.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"),\n        nullable=False,\n        index=True,\n    )\n    source: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=False)\n    source_reference: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)\n    company_name: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    domain: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    city: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    postal_code: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=True)\n    address: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n    phone: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)\n    category: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    raw_data: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\n    confidence_score: Mapped[float | None] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n    )\n\n    discovery_run: Mapped[\"DiscoveryRun\"] = relationship(\n        \"DiscoveryRun\", back_populates=\"candidates\"\n    )\n    qualifications: Mapped[list[\"CompanyQualification\"]] = relationship(\n        \"CompanyQualification\",\n        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n    )\n    enrichments: Mapped[list[\"CompanyEnrichment\"]] = relationship(\n        \"CompanyEnrichment\",\n        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n    )\n    promotion_decisions: Mapped[list[\"PromotionDecision\"]] = relationship(\n        \"PromotionDecision\",\n        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n    )\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "f533510b398d8733ead87580b78012e84f503bd6", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/website-probe-foundation/app/models/lead_candidate.py", "display_title": "lead_candidate.py"}

>
> Die vorhandene Kette ist erwartungsgemäß. Ich erstelle jetzt Modell, Provider-Abstraktion, deterministischen Mock-Provider und Service, inklusive Skip bei abgelehnter Promotion oder fehlender Domain.

>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/website-probe-foundation",
>   "path": "app/models/website_probe.py",
>   "message": "Add website probe model",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport enum\nimport uuid\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, Boolean, DateTime, Enum, Float, ForeignKey, Integer, String, func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\n\n\nclass WebsiteProbeStatus(str, enum.Enum):\n    pending = \"pending\"\n    skipped = \"skipped\"\n    reachable = \"reachable\"\n    unreachable = \"unreachable\"\n    needs_review = \"needs_review\"\n\n\nclass WebsiteProbe(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"website_probes\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n    )\n    lead_candidate_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36),\n        ForeignKey(\"lead_candidates.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"),\n        nullable=False,\n        index=True,\n    )\n    promotion_decision_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(\n        String(36),\n        ForeignKey(\"promotion_decisions.id\", ondelete=\"SET NULL\"),\n        nullable=True,\n        index=True,\n    )\n    url: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)\n    normalized_domain: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    status: Mapped[WebsiteProbeStatus] = mapped_column(\n        Enum(WebsiteProbeStatus, name=\"website_probe_status\"),\n        default=WebsiteProbeStatus.pending,\n        nullable=False,\n        index=True,\n    )\n    http_status: Mapped[int | None] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)\n    has_homepage_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n    has_impressum_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n    has_login_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n    has_shop_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n    has_booking_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n    has_checkout_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n    has_b2c_transaction_signal: Mapped[bool | None] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)\n    evidence: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\n    confidence_score: Mapped[float | None] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n    )\n    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True),\n        server_default=func.now(),\n        onupdate=func.now(),\n        nullable=False,\n    )\n\n    lead_candidate: Mapped[\"LeadCandidate\"] = relationship(\n        \"LeadCandidate\", back_populates=\"website_probes\"\n    )\n    promotion_decision: Mapped[\"PromotionDecision | None\"] = relationship(\n        \"PromotionDecision\"\n    )\n"
> }
> ```

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/website-probe-foundation",
>   "path": "app/website_probe/providers/base.py",
>   "message": "Add website probe provider interface",
>   "content": "\"\"\"Provider interface for lightweight website probe signals.\n\nWebsite probe results are routing signals only. They are not accessibility scan\nresults, legal conclusions, or BFSG violation findings.\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import asdict, dataclass\nfrom typing import Any, Protocol\n\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass WebsiteProbeResult:\n    url: str | None\n    normalized_domain: str | None\n    status: str\n    http_status: int | None = None\n    has_homepage_signal: bool | None = None\n    has_impressum_signal: bool | None = None\n    has_login_signal: bool | None = None\n    has_shop_signal: bool | None = None\n    has_booking_signal: bool | None = None\n    has_checkout_signal: bool | None = None\n    has_b2c_transaction_signal: bool | None = None\n    evidence: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n    confidence_score: float | None = None\n\n    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        data = asdict(self)\n        data[\"evidence\"] = self.evidence or {}\n        return data\n\n\nclass WebsiteProbeProvider(Protocol):\n    def probe(self, candidate: LeadCandidate) -> WebsiteProbeResult:\n        \"\"\"Return lightweight website signals for a lead candidate.\"\"\"\n"
> }
> ```

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/website-probe-foundation",
>   "path": "app/website_probe/providers/__init__.py",
>   "message": "Add website probe provider exports",
>   "content": "\"\"\"Website probe providers.\"\"\"\n\nfrom app.website_probe.providers.base import WebsiteProbeProvider, WebsiteProbeResult\nfrom app.website_probe.providers.mock_provider import MockWebsiteProbeProvider\n\n__all__ = [\n    \"MockWebsiteProbeProvider\",\n    \"WebsiteProbeProvider\",\n    \"WebsiteProbeResult\",\n]\n"
> }

> codex_apps.github_create_file
>
> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/website-probe-foundation",
>   "path": "app/website_probe/providers/mock_provider.py",
>   "message": "Add mock website probe provider",
>   "content": "\"\"\"Deterministic mock website probe provider.\n\nThis provider does not fetch websites. It derives lightweight test signals from\ncandidate fields and raw_data only.\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom urllib.parse import urlparse\n\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\nfrom app.website_probe.providers.base import WebsiteProbeResult\n\n\nclass MockWebsiteProbeProvider:\n    def probe(self, candidate: LeadCandidate) -> WebsiteProbeResult:\n        url = _candidate_url(candidate.domain)\n        normalized_domain = _normalize_domain(url)\n        if not url or not normalized_domain:\n            return WebsiteProbeResult(\n                url=url,\n                normalized_domain=normalized_domain,\n                status=\"skipped\",\n                http_status=None,\n                has_homepage_signal=None,\n                has_impressum_signal=None,\n                has_login_signal=None,\n                has_shop_signal=None,\n                has_booking_signal=None,\n                has_checkout_signal=None,\n                has_b2c_transaction_signal=None,\n                evidence={\n                    \"mock\": True,\n                    \"reason\": \"missing_domain\",\n                    \"missing_domain\": True,\n                    \"no_legal_conclusion\": True,\n                },\n                confidence_score=0.2,\n            )\n\n        signals = _signals_for_candidate(candidate)\n        evidence = {\n            \"mock\": True,\n            \"provider\": \"mock_website_probe\",\n            \"category\": candidate.category,\n            \"candidate_source\": candidate.source,\n            \"raw_signal_profile\": (candidate.raw_data or {}).get(\"website_probe_profile\"),\n            \"no_legal_conclusion\": True,\n        }\n        return WebsiteProbeResult(\n            url=url,\n            normalized_domain=normalized_domain,\n            status=\"reachable\",\n            http_status=200,\n            has_homepage_signal=True,\n            has_impressum_signal=True,\n            has_login_signal=signals[\"login\"],\n            has_shop_signal=signals[\"shop\"],\n            has_booking_signal=signals[\"booking\"],\n            has_checkout_signal=signals[\"checkout\"],\n            has_b2c_transaction_signal=signals[\"b2c_transaction\"],\n            evidence=evidence,\n            confidence_score=0.6,\n        )\n\n\ndef _candidate_url(domain: str | None) -> str | None:\n    if not domain:\n        return None\n    value = domain.strip()\n    if not value:\n        return None\n    if value.startswith((\"http://\", \"https://\")):\n        return value\n    return f\"https://{value}\"\n\n\ndef _normalize_domain(url: str | None) -> str | None:\n    if not url:\n        return None\n    parsed = urlparse(url)\n    host = parsed.netloc or parsed.path\n    host = host.casefold().strip().removeprefix(\"www.\")\n    return host or None\n\n\ndef _signals_for_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> dict[str, bool]:\n    category = (candidate.category or \"\").casefold()\n    raw_data = candidate.raw_data or {}\n    profile = str(raw_data.get(\"website_probe_profile\") or \"\").casefold()\n    haystack = f\"{category} {profile}\"\n    shop = \"ecommerce\" in haystack or \"shop\" in haystack or \"store\" in haystack\n    booking = any(term in haystack for term in (\"booking\", \"termin\", \"transport\", \"ticket\"))\n    login = \"bank\" in haystack or \"banking\" in haystack or \"login\" in haystack\n    checkout = shop or \"checkout\" in haystack\n    b2c_transaction = shop or booking or checkout\n    return {\n        \"shop\": shop,\n        \"booking\": booking,\n        \"login\": login,\n        \"checkout\": checkout,\n        \"b2c_transaction\": b2c_transaction,\n    }\n\n\n__all__ = [\"MockWebsiteProbeProvider\"]\n"
> }
> ```

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/website-probe-foundation",
>   "path": "app/models/lead_candidate.py",
>   "sha": "f533510b398d8733ead87580b78012e84f503bd6",
>   "message": "Link lead candidates to website probes",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport uuid\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, DateTime, Float, ForeignKey, String, Text, func\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\n\n\nclass LeadCandidate(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"lead_candidates\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\n    )\n    discovery_run_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36),\n        ForeignKey(\"discovery_runs.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"),\n        nullable=False,\n        index=True,\n    )\n    source: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=False)\n    source_reference: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)\n    company_name: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    domain: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    city: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    postal_code: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=True)\n    address: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n    phone: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)\n    category: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)\n    raw_data: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\n    confidence_score: Mapped[float | None] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now(), nullable=False\n    )\n\n    discovery_run: Mapped[\"DiscoveryRun\"] = relationship(\n        \"DiscoveryRun\", back_populates=\"candidates\"\n    )\n    qualifications: Mapped[list[\"CompanyQualification\"]] = relationship(\n        \"CompanyQualification\",\n        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n    )\n    enrichments: Mapped[list[\"CompanyEnrichment\"]] = relationship(\n        \"CompanyEnrichment\",\n        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n    )\n    promotion_decisions: Mapped[list[\"PromotionDecision\"]] = relationship(\n        \"PromotionDecision\",\n        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n    )\n    website_probes: Mapped[list[\"WebsiteProbe\"]] = relationship(\n        \"WebsiteProbe\",\n        back_populates=\"lead_candidate\",\n        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n    )\n"
> }
> ```

> {

>   "branch": "codex/website-probe-foundation",
>   "path": "app/models/__init__.py",
>   "sha": "6cecde50f89724f6973331b162cea687dd87af97",
>   "message": "Export website probe model",
>   "content": "from app.models.company_enrichment import CompanyEnrichment\nfrom app.models.company_qualification import (\n    CompanyQualification,\n    CompanyQualificationStatus,\n)\nfrom app.models.compliance_finding import ComplianceFinding\nfrom app.models.discovery_run import DiscoveryRun, DiscoveryRunStatus\nfrom app.models.evidence_bundle import EvidenceBundle\nfrom app.models.finding import Finding\nfrom app.models.lead import Lead\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\nfrom app.models.promotion_decision import (\n    PromotionDecision,\n    PromotionDecisionStatus,\n    PromotionReasonCode,\n)\nfrom app.models.scan import Scan, ScanStatus\nfrom app.models.website_probe import WebsiteProbe, WebsiteProbeStatus\n\n__all__ = [\n    \"CompanyEnrichment\",\n    \"CompanyQualification\",\n    \"CompanyQualificationStatus\",\n    \"ComplianceFinding\",\n    \"DiscoveryRun\",\n    \"DiscoveryRunStatus\",\n    \"EvidenceBundle\",\n    \"Finding\",\n    \"Lead\",\n    \"LeadCandidate\",\n    \"PromotionDecision\",\n    \"PromotionDecisionStatus\",\n    \"PromotionReasonCode\",\n    \"Scan\",\n    \"ScanStatus\",\n    \"WebsiteProbe\",\n    \"WebsiteProbeStatus\",\n]\n"
> }

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/website-probe-foundation",
>   "path": "app/db/init_db.py",
>   "sha": "d61b4e3b3a57e76e298bda5e60672e625acfc9f6",
>   "message": "Register website probe model in DB init",
>   "content": "from sqlalchemy import text\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import engine\nfrom app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n    CompanyEnrichment,\n    CompanyQualification,\n    ComplianceFinding,\n    DiscoveryRun,\n    EvidenceBundle,\n    Finding,\n    Lead,\n    LeadCandidate,\n    PromotionDecision,\n    Scan,\n    WebsiteProbe,\n)\n\n_SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'processing'\",\n    \"ALTER TYPE scan_status ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'failed'\",\n)\n\n_SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS started_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_message TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE scans ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n_FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES = (\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS help_url VARCHAR(500)\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wcag_refs JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence_score DOUBLE PRECISION\",\n    \"ALTER TABLE findings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS evidence_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb\",\n)\n\n\ndef init_db() -> None:\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n    _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema()\n    _ensure_finding_evidence_schema()\n\n\ndef _ensure_scan_lifecycle_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.connect() as connection:\n        autocommit_connection = connection.execution_options(isolation_level=\"AUTOCOMMIT\")\n        for statement in _SCAN_ENUM_UPDATES:\n            autocommit_connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _SCAN_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n\n\ndef _ensure_finding_evidence_schema() -> None:\n    if engine.dialect.name != \"postgresql\":\n        return\n\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        for statement in _FINDING_COLUMN_UPDATES:\n            connection.execute(text(statement))\n"
> }
> ```

> ```json
> {
>   "repository_full_name": "DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG",
>   "branch": "codex/website-probe-foundation",
>   "path": "app/services/website_probe_service.py",
>   "message": "Add website probe service",
>   "content": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.models.lead_candidate import LeadCandidate\nfrom app.models.promotion_decision import PromotionDecision, PromotionDecisionStatus\nfrom app.models.website_probe import WebsiteProbe, WebsiteProbeStatus\nfrom app.services.company_qualification_service import LeadCandidateNotFoundError\nfrom app.website_probe.providers.base import WebsiteProbeResult\nfrom app.website_probe.providers.mock_provider import MockWebsiteProbeProvider\n\n\ndef run_mock_website_probe(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> WebsiteProbe:\n    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n    if candidate is None:\n        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n\n    promotion = _get_latest_promotion_decision(db, candidate_id)\n    if promotion and promotion.status == PromotionDecisionStatus.rejected:\n        result = WebsiteProbeResult(\n            url=None,\n            normalized_domain=None,\n            status=WebsiteProbeStatus.skipped.value,\n            evidence={\n                \"reason\": \"rejected_by_promotion_gate\",\n                \"promotion_status\": promotion.status.value,\n                \"promotion_decision_id\": promotion.id,\n                \"no_legal_conclusion\": True,\n            },\n            confidence_score=0.2,\n        )\n    else:\n        result = MockWebsiteProbeProvider().probe(candidate)\n        evidence = dict(result.evidence or {})\n        if promotion:\n            evidence[\"promotion_status\"] = promotion.status.value\n            evidence[\"promotion_decision_id\"] = promotion.id\n        result = WebsiteProbeResult(\n            url=result.url,\n            normalized_domain=result.normalized_domain,\n            status=result.status,\n            http_status=result.http_status,\n            has_homepage_signal=result.has_homepage_signal,\n            has_impressum_signal=result.has_impressum_signal,\n            has_login_signal=result.has_login_signal,\n            has_shop_signal=result.has_shop_signal,\n            has_booking_signal=result.has_booking_signal,\n            has_checkout_signal=result.has_checkout_signal,\n            has_b2c_transaction_signal=result.has_b2c_transaction_signal,\n            evidence=evidence,\n            confidence_score=result.confidence_score,\n        )\n\n    existing = _find_existing_probe(db, candidate_id, promotion, result)\n    if existing:\n        return existing\n\n    probe = _probe_from_result(candidate_id, promotion, result)\n    db.add(probe)\n    db.commit()\n    db.refresh(probe)\n    return probe\n\n\ndef get_latest_website_probe(db: Session, candidate_id: str) -> WebsiteProbe | None:\n    candidate = db.get(LeadCandidate, candidate_id)\n    if candidate is None:\n        raise LeadCandidateNotFoundError(f\"Lead candidate not found: {candidate_id}\")\n\n    return (\n        db.query(WebsiteProbe)\n        .filter(WebsiteProbe.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n        .order_by(WebsiteProbe.created_at.desc(), WebsiteProbe.id.desc())\n        .first()\n    )\n\n\ndef _get_latest_promotion_decision(\n    db: Session, candidate_id: str\n) -> PromotionDecision | None:\n    return (\n        db.query(PromotionDecision)\n        .filter(PromotionDecision.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id)\n        .order_by(PromotionDecision.created_at.desc(), PromotionDecision.id.desc())\n        .first()\n    )\n\n\ndef _find_existing_probe(\n    db: Session,\n    candidate_id: str,\n    promotion: PromotionDecision | None,\n    result: WebsiteProbeResult,\n) -> WebsiteProbe | None:\n    return (\n        db.query(WebsiteProbe)\n        .filter(\n            WebsiteProbe.lead_candidate_id == candidate_id,\n            WebsiteProbe.promotion_decision_id == (promotion.id if promotion else None),\n            WebsiteProbe.normalized_domain == result.normalized_domain,\n            WebsiteProbe.status == WebsiteProbeStatus(result.status),\n        )\n        .first()\n    )\n\n\ndef _probe_from_result(\n    candidate_id: str,\n    promotion: PromotionDecision | None,\n    result: WebsiteProbeResult,\n) -> WebsiteProbe:\n    return WebsiteProbe(\n        lead_candidate_id=candidate_id,\n        promotion_decision_id=promotion.id if promotion else None,\n        url=result.url,\n        normalized_domain=result.normalized_domain,\n        status=WebsiteProbeStatus(result.status),\n        http_status=result.http_status,\n        has_homepage_signal=result.has_homepage_signal,\n        has_impressum_signal=result.has_impressum_signal,\n        has_login_signal=result.has_login_signal,\n        has_shop_signal=result.has_shop_signal,\n        has_booking_signal=result.has_booking_signal,\n        has_checkout_signal=result.has_checkout_signal,\n        has_b2c_transaction_signal=result.has_b2c_transaction_signal,\n        evidence=result.evidence or {},\n        confidence_score=result.confidence_score,\n    )\n\n\n__all__ = [\"get_latest_website_probe\", \"run_mock_website_probe\"]\n"
> }
> ```

> ```json

>   "commit_sha": "c191b2f5962e24f0414ddffb8378862a36f71b42"

> </details>
>
> Website-Probe-Modell und Service sind drin. Ich erweitere jetzt die Discovery-API um `POST /website-probe/mock` und `GET /website-probe`, inklusive vollständiger Probe-Serialisierung für die Signals.
>
> <details><summary>Called 1 tool</summary>
>
> MCP tool call
>

 \"created_at\": _format_datetime(discovery_run.created_at),\n        \"completed_at\": _format_datetime(discovery_run.completed_at),\n        \"error_message\": discovery_run.error_message,\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_candidate(candidate: LeadCandidate) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": candidate.id,\n        \"discovery_run_id\": candidate.discovery_run_id,\n        \"source\": candidate.source,\n        \"source_reference\": candidate.source_reference,\n        \"company_name\": candidate.company_name,\n        \"domain\": candidate.domain,\n        \"city\": _serialize_enrichment(enrichment: CompanyEnrichment) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": enrichment.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": enrichment.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"source\": enrichment.source,\n        \"source_reference\": enrichment.source_reference,\n        \"company_name\": enrichment.company_name,\n        \"legal_form\": enrichment.legal_form,\n        \"registry_id\": enrichment.registry_id,\n        \"source_url\": enrichment.source_url,\n        \"employee_count\": enrichment.employee_count,\n        \"annual_revenue_eur\": enrichment.annual_revenue_eur,\n        \"balance_sheet_total_eur\": enrichment.balance_sheet_total_eur,\n        \"raw_data\": enrichment.raw_data,\n        \"confidence_score\": enrichment.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(enrichment.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(enrichment.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_qualification(qualification: CompanyQualification) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": qualification.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": qualification.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"status\": qualification.status.value,\n        \"company_name\": qualification.company_name,\n        \"legal_form\": qualification.legal_form,\n        \"registry_id\": qualification.registry_id,\n        \"northdata_url\": qualification.northdata_url,\n        \"employee_count\": qualification.employee_count,\n        \"annual_revenue_eur\": qualification.annual_revenue_eur,\n        \"balance_sheet_total_eur\": qualification.balance_sheet_total_eur,\n        \"is_microenterprise\": qualification.is_microenterprise,\n        \"b2c_signal\": qualification.b2c_signal,\n        \"bfsg_category_signal\": qualification.bfsg_category_signal,\n        \"website_signal\": qualification.website_signal,\n        \"confidence_score\": qualification.confidence_score,\n        \"evidence\": qualification.evidence,\n        \"notes\": qualification.notes,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(qualification.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(qualification.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_promotion_decision(decision: PromotionDecision) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": decision.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": decision.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"company_qualification_id\": decision.company_qualification_id,\n        \"company_enrichment_id\": decision.company_enrichment_id,\n        \"status\": decision.status.value,\n        \"reason_code\": decision.reason_code,\n        \"reasons\": decision.reasons,\n        \"confidence_score\": decision.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(decision.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(decision.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\ndef _serialize_website_probe(probe: WebsiteProbe) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"id\": probe.id,\n        \"candidate_id\": probe.lead_candidate_id,\n        \"promotion_decision_id\": probe.promotion_decision_id,\n        \"url\": probe.url,\n        \"normalized_domain\": probe.normalized_domain,\n        \"status\": probe.status.value,\n        \"http_status\": probe.http_status,\n        \"has_homepage_signal\": probe.has_homepage_signal,\n        \"has_impressum_signal\": probe.has_impressum_signal,\n        \"has_login_signal\": probe.has_login_signal,\n        \"has_shop_signal\": probe.has_shop_signal,\n        \"has_booking_signal\": probe.has_booking_signal,\n        \"has_checkout_signal\": probe.has_checkout_signal,\n        \"has_b2c_transaction_signal\": probe.has_b2c_transaction_signal,\n        \"evidence\": probe.evidence,\n        \"confidence_score\": probe.confidence_score,\n        \"created_at\": _format_datetime(probe.created_at),\n        \"updated_at\": _format_datetime(probe.updated_at),\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/places/{city}\")\ndef get_places(city: str) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        matches = resolve_city(city)\n    except PlaceNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except PlaceDataError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n            detail=str(exc),\n        ) from exc\n\n    return {\"city\": city, \"matches\": [match.to_dict() for match in matches]}\n\n\n@router.get(\"/keywords\")\ndef get_keywords() -> dict[str, object]:\n    return {\"groups\": get_keyword_groups()}\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{city}\")\ndef create_run(city: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        discovery_run = create_discovery_run(db, city)\n    except PlaceNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except PlaceDataError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n            detail=str(exc),\n        ) from exc\n\n    return {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": discovery_run.id,\n        \"city\": discovery_run.city,\n        \"status\": discovery_run.status.value,\n        \"postal_codes_count\": len(discovery_run.postal_codes),\n        \"query_count\": len(discovery_run.query_plan),\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}\")\ndef read_run(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    try:\n        discovery_run = get_discovery_run(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return _serialize_discovery_run(discovery_run)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\ndef run_mock_provider(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    try:\n        summary = execute_mock_provider(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.post(\"/runs/{run_id}/providers/google-places\")\ndef run_google_places_provider(\n    run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    try:\n        summary = execute_google_places_provider(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    except GooglePlacesDisabledError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_503_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, detail=str(exc)\n        ) from exc\n    except GooglePlacesConfigurationError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.get(\"/runs/{run_id}/candidates\")\ndef read_run_candidates(run_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        candidates = list_lead_candidates(db, run_id)\n    except DiscoveryRunNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"discovery_run_id\": run_id,\n        \"candidates\": [_serialize_candidate(candidate) for candidate in candidates],\n    }\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\")\ndef run_mock_company_enrichment(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, str | float | None]:\n    try:\n        summary = enrich_candidate_with_mock(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return summary.to_dict()\n\n\n@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment\")\ndef read_candidate_enrichment(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        enrichment = get_latest_enrichment(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    if enrichment is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n            detail=f\"Company enrichment not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n        )\n    return _serialize_enrichment(enrichment)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\")\ndef run_candidate_qualification_precheck(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        qualification = create_candidate_precheck(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"candidate_id\": candidate_id,\n        \"qualification_id\": qualification.id,\n }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\")\ndef read_candidate_qualification(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        qualification = get_latest_candidate_qualification(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    if qualification is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n            detail=f\"Company qualification not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n        )\n    return _serialize_qualification(qualification)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\")\ndef evaluate_candidate_promotion(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        decision = evaluate_candidate_for_promotion(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"candidate_id\": candidate_id,\n        \"promotion_decision_id\": }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\")\ndef read_candidate_promotion(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        decision = decision is None:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\n            detail=f\"Promotion decision not found for candidate: {candidate_id}\",\n        )\n    return _serialize_promotion_decision(decision)\n\n\n@router.post(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/website-probe/mock\")\ndef run_candidate_website_probe(\n    candidate_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)\n) -> dict[str, object]:\n    try:\n        probe = run_mock_website_probe(db, candidate_id)\n    except LeadCandidateNotFoundError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n    return {\n        \"candidate_id\": candidate_id,\n        \"website_probe_id\": probe.id,\n        \"status\": probe.status.value,\n        \"confidence_score\": probe.confidence_score,\n    }\n\n\n@router.get(\"/candidates/{candidate_id}/website-probe\")\ndef read_candidate_website_probe(\n    candidate_id: > API ist verdrahtet. Jetzt schreibe ich Tests für die wichtigsten Wege: fehlende Domain, Ecommerce-Signale, rejected-Promotion-Skip, needs_review im Evidence-Kontext, API-POST/GET und No-Network.
>

>   "content": "import json\nimport socket\n\nimport pytest\nfrom sqlalchemy import create_engine\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.models db_session() -> Session:\n    engine = create_engine(\"sqlite:///:memory:\")\n    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n\n    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n    try:\n        yield session\n    finally:\n        session.close()\n        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n\n\ndef _create_run(db_session: Session) -> DiscoveryRun:\n    discovery_run = DiscoveryRun(\n        city=\"Lübeck\",\n        normalized_city=\"luebeck\",\n        status=DiscoveryRunStatus.done,\n        keyword_groups=[],\n        postal_codes=[\"23552\"],\n        query_plan=[],\n    )\n    db_session.add(discovery_run)\n    db_session.commit()\n    db_session.refresh(discovery_run)\n    return discovery_run\n\n\ndef _create_candidate(\n    db_session: Session,\n    *,\n    domain: str | None = None,\n    category: str | None = \"ecommerce\",\n    raw_data: dict | None = None,\n) -> LeadCandidate:\n    discovery_run = _create_run(db_session)\n    candidate = LeadCandidate(\n        discovery_run_id=discovery_run.id,\n        source=\"google_places\",\n        source_reference=\"places/seed\",\n        company_name=\"Seed Candidate GmbH\",\n        domain=domain,\n        city=\"Lübeck\",\n        postal_code=\"23552\",\n        category=category,\n        raw_data=raw_data or {},\n    )\n    db_session.add(candidate)\n    db_session.commit()\n    db_session.refresh(candidate)\n    return candidate\n\n\ndef _add_promotion(\n    db_session: Session,\n    candidate: LeadCandidate,\n    *,\n    status: PromotionDecisionStatus,\n) -> PromotionDecision:\n    decision = PromotionDecision(\n        lead_candidate_id=candidate.id,\n        status=status,\n        reason_code=\"test_reason\",\n        reasons={\"test\": True, \"no_legal_conclusion\": True},\n        confidence_score=0.5,\n    )\n    db_session.add(decision)\n    db_session.commit()\n    db_session.refresh(decision)\n    return decision\n\n\ndef test_unknown_candidate_fails_clearly(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    with pytest.raises(LeadCandidateNotFoundError, match=\"Lead candidate not found: missing\"):\n        run_mock_website_probe(db_session, \"missing\")\n\n\ndef test_candidate_without_domain_produces_skipped_missing_domain(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, domain=None)\n\n    probe = run_mock_website_probe(db_session, candidate.id)\n\n    assert probe.status.value == \"skipped\"\n    assert probe.url is None\n    assert probe.normalized_domain is None\n    assert probe.evidence[\"missing_domain\"] is True\n    assert probe.evidence[\"reason\"] == \"missing_domain\"\n\n\ndef test_ecommerce_candidate_with_domain_produces_transaction_signals(\n    db_session: Session,\n) -> None:\n    candidate = _create_candidate(\n        db_session,\n        domain=\"https://shop.example\",\n        category=\"ecommerce\",\n    )\n\n    probe = run_mock_website_probe(db_session, candidate.id)\n\n    assert probe.status.value == \"reachable\"\n    assert probe.http_status == 200\n    assert probe.normalized_domain == \"shop.example\"\n    assert probe.has_homepage_signal is True\n    assert probe.has_impressum_signal is True\n    assert probe.has_shop_signal is True\n    assert probe.has_checkout_signal is True\n    assert probe.has_b2c_transaction_signal is True\n\n\ndef test_rejected_promotion_produces_skipped_probe(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, domain=\"https://shop.example\")\n    promotion = _add_promotion(\n        db_session,\n        candidate,\n        status=PromotionDecisionStatus.rejected,\n    )\n\n    probe = run_mock_website_probe(db_session, candidate.id)\n\n    assert probe.status.value == \"skipped\"\n    assert probe.promotion_decision_id == promotion.id\n    assert probe.evidence[\"reason\"] == \"rejected_by_promotion_gate\"\n    assert probe.evidence[\"promotion_status\"] == \"rejected\"\n\n\ndef test_needs_review_promotion_is_included_in_evidence(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, domain=\"https://booking.example\", category=\"booking\")\n    promotion = _add_promotion(\n        db_session,\n        candidate,\n        status=PromotionDecisionStatus.needs_review,\n    )\n\n    probe = run_mock_website_probe(db_session, candidate.id)\n\n    assert probe.status.value == \"reachable\"\n    assert probe.promotion_decision_id == promotion.id\n    assert probe.evidence[\"promotion_status\"] == \"needs_review\"\n    assert probe.evidence[\"promotion_decision_id\"] == promotion.id\n    assert probe.has_booking_signal is True\n\n\ndef test_probe_fields_do_not_contain_forbidden_legal_claims(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, domain=\"https://shop.example\", category=\"ecommerce\")\n\n    probe = run_mock_website_probe(db_session, candidate.id)\n    text = json.dumps(probe.evidence, sort_keys=True).casefold()\n\n    assert \"legally obligated\" not in text\n    assert \"violation\" not in text\n    assert \"violates\" not in text\n    assert probe.evidence[\"no_legal_conclusion\"] is True\n\n\ndef test_website_probe_makes_no_external_network_calls(monkeypatch, db_session: Session) -> None:\n    def fail_network(*args, **kwargs):\n        raise AssertionError(\"network access is not allowed in website probe\")\n\n    monkeypatch.setattr(socket, \"create_connection\", fail_network)\n    candidate = _create_candidate(db_session, domain=\"https://shop.example\")\n\n    probe = run_mock_website_probe(db_session, candidate.id)\n\n    assert probe.status.value == \"reachable\"\n"

> {"content": "import pytest\nfrom fastapi import FastAPI\nfrom fastapi.testclient import TestClient\nfrom sqlalchemy import create_engine\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\nfrom sqlalchemy.pool import StaticPool\n\nfrom app.api.discovery import router as discovery_router\nfrom app.db.base import Base\nfrom app.db.session import get_db\nfrom app.models import (  # noqa: F401\n    CompanyEnrichment,\n    CompanyQualification,\n    DiscoveryRun,\n    LeadCandidate,\n    PromotionDecision,\n)\n\n\n@pytest.fixture()\ndef db_session() -> Session:\n    engine = create_engine(\n        \"sqlite://\",\n        connect_args={\"check_same_thread\": False},\n        poolclass=StaticPool,\n    )\n    TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)\n\n    session = TestingSessionLocal()\n    try:\n        yield session\n    finally:\n        session.close()\n        Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)\n\n\ndef make_client(db_session: Session | None = None) -> TestClient:\n    app = FastAPI()\n    app.include_router(discovery_router)\n    if db_session is not None:\n        app.dependency_overrides[get_db] = lambda: db_session\n    return TestClient(app)\n\n\ndef test_keywords_endpoint_returns_structured_groups() -> None:\n    client = make_client()\n\n    response = client.get(\"/discovery/keywords\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n    groups = response.json()[\"groups\"]\n    assert groups\n    assert {\"group_id\", \"label\", \"keywords\", \"bfsg_relevance_reason\", \"enabled\"}.issubset(\n        groups[0]\n    )\n    assert \"ecommerce\" in {group[\"group_id\"] for group in groups}\n\n\ndef test_places_endpoint_returns_luebeck_matches() -> None:\n    client = make_client()\n\n    response = client.get(\"/discovery/places/L\u00fcbeck\")\n\n    assert response.status_code == 200\n run_id,\n        \"provider\": \"mock\",\n        \"candidates_created\": 10,\n        \"candidates_total\": 10,\n    }\n    candidates = candidates_response.json()[\"candidates\"]\n    assert candidates[0][\"raw_data\"][\"mock\"] is True\n\n\ndef test_google_places_endpoint_disabled_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n    create_response    client.post(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/providers/mock\")\n    candidate_id = client.get(f\"/discovery/runs/{run_id}/candidates\").json()[\"candidates\"][0][\"id\"]\n\n    enrichment_response = client.post(\n        f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\"\n    )\n    read_response = client.get(f\"/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment\")\n\n    assert == \"mock_company_data\"\n    assert enrichment_summary[\"confidence_score\"] == 0.2\n\n    assert read_response.status_code == 200\n    enrichment = read_response.json()\n    assert enrichment[\"raw_data\"][\"profile\"] == \"missing\"\n\n\ndef test_candidate_enrichment_unknown_candidate_returns_clear_error(db_session: Session) -> None:\n    client = make_client(db_session)\n\n precheck_response.status_code == 200\n    precheck = precheck_response.json()\n    assert precheck[\"candidate_id\"] == candidate_id\n    assert precheck[\"status\"] == \"needs_human_review\"\n    assert precheck[\"is_microenterprise\"] is None\n    assert precheck[\"confidence_score\"] == 0.1\n\n    assert read_response.status_code == 200\n    qualification = read_response.json()\n    assert > ````text
> {"content": "# NorthAccessBFSG\n\nNorthAccessBFSG is a FastAPI backend foundation for a BFSG/WCAG compliance audit platform.\n\nThe current scope includes backend infrastructure, asynchronous scans, raw accessibility findings, compliance mapping basics, evidence bundle storage, and a minimal Lead Discovery foundation for city, keyword, provider seed, company enrichment, company precheck, and internal promotion routing workflows.\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```text\napp/\n  __init__.py\n  main.py\n  api/\n    __init__.py\n    compliance.py\n    discovery.py\n    evidence.py\n    health.py\n    scans.py\n  compliance/\n    __init__.py\n    rule_engine.py\n    rules/\n      __init__.py\n      wcag_en_bfsg_map.json\n  core/\n    __init__.py\n    browser_config.py\n    celery.py\n    config.py\n  db/\n    __init__.py\n    base.py\n    init_db.py\n    session.py\n  discovery/\n    __init__.py\n    keywords.py\n    place_resolver.py\n    providers/\n      __init__.py\n      base.py\n      google_places_provider.py\n      mock_provider.py\n    query_planner.py\n  enrichment/\n    __init__.py\n    providers/\n      __init__.py\n      base.py\n      mock_company_provider.py\n  evidence/\n    __init__.py\n    hashing.py\n    storage.py\n    storage_backend.py\n  models/\n    company_enrichment.py\n    company_qualification.py\n    discovery_run.py\n    lead_candidate.py\n    promotion_decision.py\n  services/\n    company_enrichment_service.py\n    company_qualification_service.py\n    discovery_service.py\n    promotion_service.py\n    provider_execution_service.py\n  workers/\ndata/\n  orte_deutschland.csv\n04_filter_quality.py\n05_run_pipeline.py\n13_city_guard.py\n14_evidence_gate.py\n15_run_pipeline_guarded.py\nDockerfile\ndocker-compose.yml\nrequirements.txt\n.env.example\n```\n\n## Run\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose up --build\n```\n\nThen open:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/health\n```\n\nExpected response:\n\n```json\n{\"status\":\"ok\"}\n```\n\nThe API waits for PostgreSQL and Redis to become healthy, connects with SQLAlchemy, and auto-creates the database tables on startup.\n\n## Lead Discovery Foundation\n\nThe canonical raw city data file is:\n\n```text\ndata/orte_deutschland.csv\n```\n\nThe file is semicolon-separated and must contain these columns:\n\n```text\nplz;stadt\n```\n\nThe resolver treats this file as raw input. The `stadt` column may contain real city names as well as organizations or special postal recipients, so city resolution uses exact normalized city-name matching only. It does not use substring matching.\n\nSupported normalization includes case-insensitive matching and German umlaut handling:\n\n```text\nL\u00fcbeck -> Luebeck -> lubeck\n```\n\nDiscovery endpoints:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/places/L\u00fcbeck\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/places/Luebeck\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/places/lubeck\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/keywords\n```\n\nExample place response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"city\": \"L\u00fcbeck\",\n  \"matches\": [\n    {\n      \"postal_code\": \"23552\",\n      \"city\": \"L\u00fcbeck\",\n      \"country\": \"DE\"\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```\n\n## Discovery Query Planner\n\nA discovery run is a dry-run planning record. It resolves a city to postal codes, combines those postal codes with enabled keyword groups, and persists a deterministic query plan for a later external provider integration.\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/L\u00fcbeck\n```\n\nExample response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"discovery_run_id\": \"<run-id>\",\n  \"city\": \"L\u00fcbeck\",\n  \"status\": \"done\",\n  \"postal_codes_count\": 12,\n  \"query_count\": 336\n}\n```\n\nFetch a stored run and its candidate list:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/candidates\n```\n\n## Discovery Providers\n\nProvider adapters execute a stored query plan and persist `LeadCandidate` rows. These rows are seed candidates only. They are not confirmed BFSG applicability, accessibility findings, legal obligations, violations, or legal conclusions.\n\n### Mock Provider\n\nThe mock provider creates bounded, deterministic test candidates with obvious test names, for example `Mock Candidate L\u00fcbeck 23552 Online Shop`.\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/mock\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/candidates\n```\n\nExample provider response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"discovery_run_id\": \"<run-id>\",\n  \"provider\": \"mock\",\n  \"candidates_created\": 10,\n  \"candidates_total\": 10\n}\n```\n\n### Google Places API Provider\n\nThe Google Places API provider is disabled by default. Tests do not call Google, and normal local runs do not require an API key.\n\nRequired environment settings for live use:\n\n```text\nGOOGLE_PLACES_ENABLED=false\nGOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY=\nGOOGLE_PLACES_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=10\nGOOGLE_PLACES_MAX_RESULTS_PER_QUERY=5\n```\n\nEndpoint:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/google-places\n```\n\nIf disabled or missing configuration, the endpoint returns a clear error and does not make an external call. If enabled with a key, Places API responses are mapped into raw `LeadCandidate` seed rows with `source=\"google_places\"`.\n\nGoogle Places API results are only seed candidates. Northdata-style or comparable company enrichment is required before any candidate can be treated as qualified for downstream audit consideration.\n\n## Company Enrichment Foundation\n\n`CompanyEnrichment` stores company-data signals for a `LeadCandidate`: legal form, registry ID, source URL, employee count, annual revenue, balance sheet total, raw source payload, and confidence. These records are evidence/signal data only. They do not make legal conclusions or final BFSG applicability decisions.\n\nThe mock enrichment provider creates deterministic test data only. It does not call Northdata, scrape company registers, scrape websites, or claim real company data.\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment\n```\n\nExample response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"candidate_id\": \"<candidate-id>\",\n  \"enrichment_id\": \"<enrichment-id>\",\n  \"source\": \"mock_company_data\",\n  \"confidence_score\": 0.5\n}\n```\n\nA future Northdata or company-register integration should live behind the enrichment provider abstraction. Live company-data calls are not implemented in this foundation step.\n\n## Company Qualification Precheck\n\n`CompanyQualification` stores precheck signals for a `LeadCandidate`. It is a signal and review layer only. It does not make legal conclusions and it does not call Northdata or any external company-data provider yet.\n\nPrecheck endpoints:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\n```\n\nThe precheck uses the latest `CompanyEnrichment` when available. Missing company data results in `needs_company_data` or `needs_human_review`. Microenterprise-like data can signal `likely_not_applicable` or review need. Non-microenterprise-like data can signal `possible_bfsg_candidate` only when category/B2C and website signals are present. These are review signals, not legal scoring or final applicability decisions.\n\nConfigured microenterprise signal thresholds:\n\n```text\nBFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_EMPLOYEE_THRESHOLD=10\nBFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_REVENUE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\nBFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_BALANCE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n```\n\nThese thresholds are only used as precheck signals.\n\n## Promotion Gate\n\n`PromotionDecision` stores an internal routing decision for a `LeadCandidate` after company enrichment and qualification precheck. The possible routing statuses are:\n\n```text\nrejected\nneeds_review\nready_for_website_probe\n```\n\nPromotion endpoints:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\n```\n\nExample response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"candidate_id\": \"<candidate-id>\",\n  \"promotion_decision_id\": \"<decision-id>\",\n  \"status\": \"needs_review\",\n  \"reason_code\": \"mock_or_test_data\",\n  \"confidence_score\": 0.2\n}\n```\n\nThe Promotion Gate is only internal routing. `ready_for_website_probe` means the candidate can move to a future Website Probe stage. It does not mean a BFSG obligation, an accessibility issue, or any violation has been established. The Website Probe stage is not implemented in this step.\n\nThis discovery layer does not scrape websites, does not perform reporting, and does not run accessibility scans for seed candidates automatically.\n\n## Guarded Pipeline\n\nThe numbered guarded pipeline files validate that runtime dependencies are present and that the canonical city CSV is usable:\n\n```bash\npython -m py_compile \\\n  04_filter_quality.py \\\n  05_run_pipeline.py \\\n  13_city_guard.py \\\n  14_evidence_gate.py \\\n  15_run_pipeline_guarded.py\n\npython 15_run_pipeline_guarded.py\n```\n\nThe guarded runner fails if `data/orte_deutschland.csv` is missing, unreadable, missing required columns, header-only, or contains zero usable rows.\n\n## Async Scan Flow\n\nCreate a lead directly in the database while a public lead API does not exist yet:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"INSERT INTO leads (id, domain, company_name) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'https://example.com', 'Example') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;\"\n```\n\nRun a scan for the lead:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111\n```\n\nExpected immediate response:\n\n```json\n{\"scan_id\":\"<scan-id>\"}\n```\n\nThe API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker launches Playwright headless Chromium, loads the lead domain, runs axe-core, captures evidence metadata, and persists raw findings.\n\nLifecycle:\n\n```text\npending -> running -> processing -> done\n```\n\nIf task execution fails, the worker marks the scan as `failed` and stores `error_message`.\n\n## Compliance Mapping Flow\n\nRun deterministic compliance mapping for a completed scan:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/compliance/run/{scan_id}\n```\n\nCompliance results are stored separately in `compliance_findings`. Raw `findings` rows are never overwritten. Re-running the endpoint updates the same `finding_id` + `mapping_version` compliance rows and removes stale rows for that scan/version.\n\n## Browser Configuration\n\nThe worker defaults to Chromium and also installs Firefox:\n\n```text\nBROWSER_NAME=chromium\nBROWSER_HEADLESS=true\nBROWSER_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS=30000\nBROWSER_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=10000\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=1440\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=900\nBROWSER_RETRIES=1\nBROWSER_WAIT_UNTIL=networkidle\n```\n\nWebKit is supported by configuration but is not installed in the default image.\n", "encoding": "utf-8", "sha": "d2cf43b76f153273710d9849d742a4cd1431537e", "display_url": "https://github.com/DopeChicka/NorthAccessBFSG/blob/codex/website-probe-foundation/README.md", "display_title": "README.md"}
> ````

It resolves a city to postal codes, combines those postal codes with enabled keyword groups, and persists a deterministic query plan for a later external provider integration.\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/Lübeck\n```\n\nExample response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"discovery_run_id\": \"<run-id>\",\n  \"city\": \"Lübeck\",\n  \"status\": \"done\",\n  \"postal_codes_count\": 12,\n  \"query_count\": 336\n}\n```\n\nFetch a stored run and its candidate list:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/candidates\n```\n\n## Discovery Providers\n\nProvider adapters execute a stored query plan and persist `LeadCandidate` rows. These rows are seed candidates only. Tests do not call Google, and normal local runs do not require an API key.\n\nRequired environment settings for live use:\n\n```text\nGOOGLE_PLACES_ENABLED=false\nGOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY=\nGOOGLE_PLACES_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=10\nGOOGLE_PLACES_MAX_RESULTS_PER_QUERY=5\n```\n\nEndpoint:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/runs/{discovery_run_id}/providers/google-places\n```\n\nIf disabled or missing configuration, the endpoint returns a clear error and does not make an external call. If enabled with a key, Places API responses are mapped into raw `LeadCandidate` seed rows with `source=\"google_places\"`.\n\nGoogle Places API results are only seed candidates. Northdata-style or comparable company enrichment is required before any candidate can be treated as qualified for downstream audit consideration.\n\n## Company Enrichment Foundation\n\n`CompanyEnrichment` stores company-data signals for a `LeadCandidate`: legal form, registry ID, source URL, employee count, annual revenue, balance sheet total, raw source payload, and confidence. These records are evidence/signal data only. They do not make legal conclusions or final BFSG applicability decisions.\n\nThe mock enrichment provider creates deterministic test data only. It does not call Northdata, scrape company registers, scrape websites, or claim real company data.\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment/mock\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/enrichment\n```\n\nExample response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"candidate_id\": \"<candidate-id>\",\n  \"enrichment_id\": \"<enrichment-id>\",\n  \"source\": \"mock_company_data\",\n  \"confidence_score\": 0.5\n}\n```\n\nA future Northdata or company-register integration should live behind the enrichment provider abstraction. Live company-data calls are not implemented in this foundation step.\n\n## Company Qualification Precheck\n\n`CompanyQualification` stores precheck signals for a `LeadCandidate`. It is a signal and review layer only. It does not make legal conclusions and it does not call Northdata or any external company-data provider yet.\n\nPrecheck endpoints:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification/precheck\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/qualification\n```\n\nThe precheck uses the latest `CompanyEnrichment` when available. Missing company data results in `needs_company_data` or `needs_human_review`. Microenterprise-like data can signal `likely_not_applicable` or review need. Non-microenterprise-like data can signal `possible_bfsg_candidate` only when category/B2C and website signals are present. These are review signals, not legal scoring or final applicability decisions.\n\nConfigured microenterprise signal thresholds:\n\n```text\nBFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_EMPLOYEE_THRESHOLD=10\nBFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_REVENUE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\nBFSG_MICROENTERPRISE_BALANCE_THRESHOLD_EUR=2000000\n```\n\nThese thresholds are only used as precheck signals.\n\n## Promotion Gate\n\n`PromotionDecision` stores an internal routing decision for a `LeadCandidate` after company enrichment and qualification precheck. The possible routing statuses are:\n\n```text\nrejected\nneeds_review\nready_for_website_probe\n```\n\nPromotion endpoints:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion/evaluate\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/promotion\n```\n\nExample response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"candidate_id\": \"<candidate-id>\",\n  \"promotion_decision_id\": \"<decision-id>\",\n  \"status\": \"needs_review\",\n  \"reason_code\": \"mock_or_test_data\",\n  \"confidence_score\": 0.2\n}\n```\n\nThe Promotion Gate is only internal routing. `ready_for_website_probe` means the candidate can move to a Website Probe stage. It does not mean a BFSG obligation, an accessibility issue, or any violation has been established.\n\n## Website Probe Foundation\n\n`WebsiteProbe` stores lightweight website and web-flow signals for a promoted `LeadCandidate`. It is not a full accessibility audit, not Playwright scanning, not legal scoring, and not report generation.\n\nMock Website Probe endpoints:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/website-probe/mock\ncurl http://localhost:8000/discovery/candidates/{candidate_id}/website-probe\n```\n\nExample response:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"candidate_id\": \"<candidate-id>\",\n  \"website_probe_id\": \"<probe-id>\",\n  \"status\": \"skipped\",\n  \"confidence_score\": 0.2\n}\n```\n\nThe mock website probe does not fetch websites or scrape pages. It derives deterministic test signals from the candidate domain, category, and raw data. A candidate without a domain is skipped with `missing_domain` evidence. Ecommerce-like candidates can produce shop, checkout, and B2C transaction signals; booking and transport candidates can produce booking/ticket-like signals; banking candidates can produce login-like signals.\n\nThese signals only help decide whether a future full scan may be worth scheduling. They are not accessibility results, legal conclusions, or BFSG violation findings. A full scan/audit stage comes later.\n\nThis discovery layer does not scrape websites, does not perform reporting, and does not run accessibility scans for seed candidates automatically.\n\n## Guarded Pipeline\n\nThe numbered guarded pipeline files validate that runtime dependencies are present and that the canonical city CSV is usable:\n\n```bash\npython -m py_compile \\\n  04_filter_quality.py \\\n  05_run_pipeline.py \\\n  13_city_guard.py \\\n  14_evidence_gate.py \\\n  15_run_pipeline_guarded.py\n\npython 15_run_pipeline_guarded.py\n```\n\nThe guarded runner fails if `data/orte_deutschland.csv` is missing, unreadable, missing required columns, header-only, or contains zero usable rows.\n\n## Async Scan Flow\n\nCreate a lead directly in the database while a public lead API does not exist yet:\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose exec db psql -U northaccess -d northaccessbfsg -c \"INSERT INTO leads (id, domain, company_name) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111', 'https://example.com', 'Example') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;\"\n```\n\nRun a scan for the lead:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/scans/run/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111\n```\n\nExpected immediate response:\n\n```json\n{\"scan_id\":\"<scan-id>\"}\n```\n\nThe API creates a `pending` scan and queues a Celery task without blocking. The worker launches Playwright headless Chromium, loads the lead domain, runs axe-core, captures evidence metadata, and persists raw findings.\n\nLifecycle:\n\n```text\npending -> running -> processing -> done\n```\n\nIf task execution fails, the worker marks the scan as `failed` and stores `error_message`.\n\n## Compliance Mapping Flow\n\nRun deterministic compliance mapping for a completed scan:\n\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/compliance/run/{scan_id}\n```\n\nCompliance results are stored separately in `compliance_findings`. Raw `findings` rows are never overwritten. Re-running the endpoint updates the same `finding_id` + `mapping_version` compliance rows and removes stale rows for that scan/version.\n\n## Browser Configuration\n\nThe worker defaults to Chromium and also installs Firefox:\n\n```text\nBROWSER_NAME=chromium\nBROWSER_HEADLESS=true\nBROWSER_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS=30000\nBROWSER_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=10000\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=1440\nBROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=900\nBROWSER_RETRIES=1\nBROWSER_WAIT_UNTIL=networkidle\n```\n\nWebKit is supported by configuration but is not installed in the default image.\n"
